title: Lipschitz Continuity in Deep Learning: A Systematic Review of Theoretical Foundations, Estimation Methods, Regularization Approaches, and Certifiable Robustness
comment: Accepted into Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: Lipschitz continuity is a fundamental property of neural networks that characterizes their sensitivity to input perturbations. It plays a pivotal role in deep learning, governing \textbf{robustness}, \textbf{generalization} and \textbf{optimization dynamics}. Despite its importance, research on Lipschitz continuity is scattered across various domains, lacking a unified perspective. This paper addresses this gap by providing a systematic review of Lipschitz continuity in deep learning. We explore its \textbf{theoretical foundations}, \textbf{estimation methods}, \textbf{regularization approaches}, and \textbf{certifiable robustness}. By reviewing existing research through the lens of Lipschitz continuity, this survey serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and practitioners seeking a deeper understanding of Lipschitz continuity and its implications in deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了深度学习中的Lipschitz连续性，涵盖其理论基础、估计方法、正则化方法及可认证鲁棒性，为研究者提供了统一视角的参考。
AI.motivation: Lipschitz连续性在深度学习中对鲁棒性、泛化性和优化动力学至关重要，但相关研究分散在不同领域，缺乏统一的系统综述。
AI.method: 采用系统性综述方法，从理论、估计、正则化和可认证鲁棒性四个维度梳理和整合现有研究。
AI.result: 构建了Lipschitz连续性在深度学习中的完整知识框架，明确了各研究方向之间的联系与区别。
AI.conclusion: 本篇综述为深度学习中Lipschitz连续性的研究提供了全面参考，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展。

title: MTSSL: Meta-Thresholding Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: A large body of Semi-supervised Learning~(SSL) algorithms encounter the threshold $τ$ to select pseudo-labels. The value of $τ$ across different SSL algorithms can vary depending on the learning perspective, yet they may achieve similar performance. It motivates us to establish a unified theoretical framework to explain the role of $τ$ in SSL. We statistically explained that the unsupervised loss is affected independently by correct and incorrect pseudo-labels, while $τ$ adjusts their numbers to balance the corresponding error term. This inherent trade-off indicates that SSL can reach the same loss with varying $τ$, precise optimal values of $τ$ during training may be unnecessary. With this, we treat $τ$ as an updatable parameter and optimize it via differentiation; the new policy is named \textbf{Meta-Thresholding Semi-Supervised Learning (MTSSL)}. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of MTSSL. We observe that the accuracy curves of SSL algorithms can overlap completely even when the values of $τ$ differ significantly, which supports our theoretical framework and indicates that the selection of $τ$ can be relaxed in the future design of SSL algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一理论框架解释半监督学习中伪标签阈值τ的作用，发现不同τ值可达到相似性能，进而提出将τ作为可优化参数的元阈值半监督学习方法(MTSSL)。
AI.motivation: 不同SSL算法使用不同阈值τ却能达到相似性能，缺乏统一理论解释，因此需要建立理论框架阐明τ的本质作用。
AI.method: 从统计角度解释无监督损失受正确和错误伪标签独立影响，τ通过调整二者数量平衡误差项；将τ视为可更新参数通过微分优化，提出MTSSL。
AI.result: MTSSL性能优越；实验发现即使τ值差异显著，SSL算法的准确率曲线可完全重叠，验证了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: τ的选择在SSL中可被放松，为未来SSL算法设计提供了新视角。

title: Backpropagation-Free Trunk Training via the Split Forward Gradients
summary: Backpropagation makes training deep networks memory intensive because it must store intermediate activations. Forward-mode methods avoid this cost, but their gradient estimates become increasingly noisy as the number of trained parameters grows. We introduce Split Forward Gradient (Split-FG), which splits a network at an intermediate representation: it computes the output head gradient exactly and estimates only the trunk gradient with a Jacobian--vector product. This reduces estimator variance and requires no backward pass through the trunk, while retaining an Adam-style convergence guarantee. Our experiments reveal an important practical failure mode. On WikiText-103, naive forward-gradient training of the trunk performs worse than leaving a randomly initialized trunk frozen, likely because Adam updates every noisy, under-determined trunk coordinate too aggressively. Simply using a much smaller learning rate for the trunk reverses this result: a $16$M-parameter GPT-2-style model reaches validation perplexity $387$, compared with $668$ for the frozen-trunk control and $2{,}885$ for a matched pure forward-gradient baseline (backpropagation reaches $150$). Split-FG also produces the strongest backprop-free results on our tabular benchmarks and reaches $60.5\%$ on CIFAR-10 and $35.2\%$ on CIFAR-100 with a heavy-head design. It reduces peak memory by up to $35\%$ relative to matched backpropagation, although the performance gap widens as the forward-mode trunk grows.

AI.tldr: Split-FG通过将网络分为主干和输出头两部分，对输出头使用精确反向传播、对主干使用前向模式梯度估计，显著降低了内存占用，但在大模型上仍存在性能差距。
AI.motivation: 反向传播需要存储中间激活值，导致内存开销大；前向模式方法虽节省内存，但梯度估计噪声随参数数量增长而增大。Split-FG旨在结合两者优势，在降低内存的同时保持较好的梯度质量。
AI.method: 将网络在中间表示处分割：输出头部分使用精确梯度（反向传播），主干部分仅通过雅可比-向量积进行前向模式梯度估计。为主干使用更小的学习率以抑制噪声带来的过度更新。
AI.result: 在WikiText-103上，16M GPT-2模型验证困惑度387（冻结主干668，纯前向梯度2885，反向传播150）；峰值内存相比反向传播降低35%；CIFAR-10/100分别达到60.5%和35.2%。
AI.conclusion: Split-FG是当前最强的无反向传播训练方法，在内存与性能间取得较好权衡，但前向模式主干越大，与反向传播的性能差距越明显。

title: Isotonic Conformal Prediction
summary: A point prediction that is well calibrated on average can still be systematically biased conditional on its own value, undermining its use in downstream decision-making. We consider two objectives for reliable uncertainty quantification: self-calibration, requiring a point prediction to be unbiased conditional on its own value, and prediction-conditional validity, requiring a prediction interval to attain nominal coverage conditional on the prediction. Self-Calibrating Conformal Prediction (SC-CP) attains both objectives exactly in finite samples, but requires refitting its calibrator for every candidate outcome, which is computationally prohibitive for continuous outcomes. We propose Isotonic Conformal Prediction (ICP), a framework that decouples calibration from prediction-set construction by fitting a single isotonic recalibration map and constructing prediction intervals within strata of similar recalibrated predictions. Within this framework we develop two procedures. Split Isotonic Conformal Prediction (SICP) attains prediction-conditional validity in finite samples and self-calibration asymptotically, at the computational cost of split conformal prediction. Transductive Isotonic Conformal Prediction (TICP) attains both objectives exactly in finite samples through a per-test-point inner loop that avoids refitting the isotonic calibrator. On synthetic heteroscedastic regression problems and a real-world healthcare-utilization dataset, both procedures match the coverage of SC-CP at substantially lower computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Isotonic Conformal Prediction (ICP) 框架，通过分箱等渗回归校准，在显著降低计算成本的前提下，同时实现预测的自校准和预测区间的条件有效覆盖。
AI.motivation: 传统点预测虽可做到平均校准，但条件于预测值本身时仍存在系统性偏差，影响下游决策；现有 Self-Calibrating Conformal Prediction (SC-CP) 虽能同时实现自校准和预测条件有效性，但对连续结果需要为每个候选结果重新拟合校准器，计算成本极高。
AI.method: 提出 ICP 框架，核心思路是将校准与预测集构建解耦：(1) SICP 先拟合单个等渗校准映射，再在相似校准预测的分层内构造预测区间，有限样本下保证预测条件有效性，渐近实现自校准；(2) TICP 通过每个测试点的内部循环（无需重新拟合等渗校准器）在有限样本下同时实现两个目标。
AI.result: 在合成异方差回归问题和真实医疗保健利用数据集上，SICP 和 TICP 都能达到与 SC-CP 相当的覆盖性能，但计算成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: ICP 框架在保证可靠不确定性量化（自校准与预测条件有效性）的同时，大幅降低了计算开销，为实际应用提供了高效可行的方案。

title: The conditional higher moment risk measure: second-order asymptotics with FGM contagion
summary: This paper investigates second-order asymptotic expansions for the conditional higher moment (CoHM) coherent risk measure under a Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern (FGM) dependence structure, capturing a weak contagion between a primary loss risk and a reference risk. Assuming that the primary risk belongs to the Fréchet, Weibull, or Gumbel maximum domain of attraction, we systematically derive second-order asymptotic expansions using extreme value theory and second-order regular variation theory. Compared with existing first-order results, our refined approximations capture higher-order tail behavior and dependence effects more accurately. Numerical simulations confirm that the second-order asymptotics substantially reduce approximation errors, especially at extreme confidence levels. Empirical applications to insurance claim data further illustrate the practical superiority of the second-order approach.

AI.tldr: 本文在FGM相依结构下，推导了条件高阶矩(CoHM)一致性风险测度的二阶渐近展开，利用极值理论和二阶正则变化理论，得到了比一阶结果更精确的尾部行为刻画，并通过数值模拟和保险实证验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有的一阶渐近结果对尾部行为的刻画不够精确，尤其在极端置信水平下误差较大。本文旨在通过二阶渐近展开提供更精细的近似，以捕捉更高阶的尾部特征和相依效应，从而提升风险测度在极端情形下的准确性。
AI.method: 采用Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern(FGM)相依结构建模主风险与参考风险间的弱传染关系；假设主风险属于Fréchet、Weibull或Gumbel最大吸引域；运用极值理论和二阶正则变化理论，系统推导条件高阶矩(CoHM)风险测度的二阶渐近展开式。
AI.result: 二阶渐近展开相比一阶结果显著降低了近似误差，在极端置信水平下尤为明显；数值模拟验证了二阶近似的精度提升；保险理赔数据的实证分析进一步说明了二阶方法在实际应用中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 二阶渐近展开能够更精确地捕捉尾部高阶行为和相依效应，是对现有CoHM风险测度一阶理论的重要改进，在保险和金融风险管理中具有实际应用价值。

title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided NSGA-II Enhanced with Gray Relational Coefficient for Multi-Objective Optimization: Application to NASDAQ Portfolio Optimization
summary: In modern financial markets, decision-makers increasingly rely on quantitative methods to navigate complex trade-offs among multiple, often conflicting objectives. This paper addresses constrained multi-objective optimization (MOO) with an application to portfolio optimization for minimizing risk and maximizing return. To address existing gaps, we propose a novel reinforcement learning (RL)-guided non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) enhanced with gray relational coefficients (GRC), termed RL-NSGA-II-GRC, which combines an RL agent controller and GRC-based selection to improve convergence and diversity of Pareto fronts. The agent adapts evolutionary parameters online using metrics of hypervolume, feasibility, and diversity, while the GRC tournament operator ranks parents via a unified score considering dominance rank, crowding distance, and proximity to ideal reference. We evaluate the framework on the Kursawe and CONSTR benchmarks and a NASDAQ portfolio application. On the benchmarks, RL-NSGA-II-GRC achieves convergence improvements of about 5.8% and 4.4% over NSGA-II, while preserving well-distributed non-dominated solutions. In the portfolio application, it produces a smooth, densely populated efficient frontier supporting identification of the maximum Sharpe ratio portfolio (annualized Sharpe =1.92) and utility-optimal portfolios for different risk-aversion levels. The main contributions are three-fold: 1) we propose an RL-NSGA-II-GRC method integrating an RL agent into the evolutionary framework to adaptively control parameters via generational feedback; 2) we design a GRC-enhanced binary tournament operator providing a comprehensive indicator to guide the search toward the Pareto front; 3) we demonstrate, on benchmark MOO and a NASDAQ case study, that the method delivers improved convergence and well-populated frontiers supporting actionable insights.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习（RL）和灰色关联度（GRC）的改进NSGA-II算法（RL-NSGA-II-GRC），用于求解多目标优化问题，特别是投资组合优化。该方法通过RL智能体自适应调整进化参数，并设计GRC锦标赛选择算子提升帕累托前沿的收敛性和多样性。实验在Kursawe、CONSTR基准及NASDAQ投资组合上验证，收敛性较NSGA-II提升约5.8%和4.4%，并生成了平滑高效的投资组合前沿。
AI.motivation: 现代金融市场中，决策者需在多个相互冲突的目标（如最小化风险与最大化收益）之间权衡，现有多目标优化方法在收敛性和多样性方面仍存在不足，亟需更高效的算法来生成高质量帕累托前沿。
AI.method: 提出RL-NSGA-II-GRC框架：1）引入RL智能体作为控制器，根据超体积、可行性和多样性等指标在线自适应调整进化参数；2）设计基于GRC的锦标赛选择算子，综合排序、拥挤距离和与理想参考点的接近度对父代个体进行统一评分排序。
AI.result: 在Kursawe和CONSTR基准上，收敛性分别比NSGA-II提升约5.8%和4.4%，且保持解的良好分布。在NASDAQ投资组合应用中，生成了平滑密集的有效前沿，识别的最大夏普比率组合年化夏普比为1.92，并能适应不同风险厌恶水平的效用最优组合。
AI.conclusion: RL-NSGA-II-GRC通过RL自适应参数调控和GRC选择算子，显著提升了多目标优化的收敛性和前沿质量，为金融投资组合等实际应用提供了有效的决策支持工具。

title: A Fuzzy Logic Framework for Community-Aware Crime Hotspot Detection: Prototype Application Architecture and Exploratory Validation for an Urban Computing Platform
comment: 12 pages, 6 tables, 1 figure. Framework paper with Python prototype and exploratory validation with 25 participants
summary: Urban crime prevention is a persistent socio-technical challenge for municipalities, law enforcement agencies, and citizens. Traditional reporting and response processes often rely on delayed incident reports and reactive resource allocation, while community-level signals and ambiguous early-warning indicators may remain underused. This paper reframes an Urban Computing seminar project into a fuzzy logic-based framework for community-aware urban crime hotspot detection and real-time notification. The proposed platform combines citizen reports, historical crime data, contextual urban indicators, and configurable fuzzy rules to estimate localized risk levels and support targeted awareness notifications. Unlike binary classification approaches, fuzzy logic can represent partial risk, uncertainty, and incomplete information, making it suitable for urban environments where risk is gradual and context-dependent. The paper presents the system architecture, fuzzy risk model, notification workflow, privacy safeguards, and exploratory validation with 25 participants. The evaluation focuses on perceived usefulness, notification relevance, usability, trust, privacy concerns, multilingual accessibility, and acceptance of community reporting. The findings suggest that such a platform may improve situational awareness, support reporting and planning discussions, and help address weak points in existing urban safety workflows, while not yet constituting evidence of deployed crime reduction or real-world predictive accuracy. The contribution is a responsible, human-centered framework for future research on fuzzy logic, urban computing, and community-aware crime prevention systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于模糊逻辑的社区感知型城市犯罪热点检测与实时通知框架，整合市民报告、历史犯罪数据、城市指标和可配置模糊规则来评估局部风险等级。通过25名参与者验证，该平台在情境感知、报告可用性和隐私保护方面获得积极反馈，但尚未验证实际犯罪率降低效果。
AI.motivation: 传统城市犯罪预防依赖延迟的事故报告和被动资源分配，社区层面的早期预警信号未能充分利用；二元分类方法无法处理城市环境中风险渐变、不确定性和信息不完整的问题。
AI.method: 构建模糊逻辑推理框架，融合市民报告、历史犯罪数据、城市情境指标和可配置模糊规则；设计系统架构、风险模型、通知工作流和隐私保护机制；通过25名参与者进行探索性验证。
AI.result: 参与者对平台的情境感知提升、通知相关性、可用性、信任度、隐私保护、多语言可达性和社区报告接受度给予了积极评价；但尚未提供犯罪率降低或真实预测准确性的实证证据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于改善情境意识、支持报告与规划讨论、弥补现有城市安全工作流的薄弱环节；贡献在于提供了一个负责任、以人为中心的模糊逻辑+城市计算框架，为未来社区感知型犯罪预防系统研究奠定基础。

title: Herding and Liquidity in Order-Book Markets. II. Fundamental Anchoring and the Resilience of Liquidity
summary: An order-book market whose liquidity provision is anchored to a fundamental value carries a restoring force: the price mean-reverts to value and the book refills after a shock. We show this restoring force is a robust intrinsic stabiliser and identify it causally-dialling the anchor down removes the mean-reversion, and a leverage-driven fire-sale then self-sustains. Separately, we ask whether a stressed market transmits its liquidity stress to a coupled calmer one, and find that it cannot: across six transmission channels of increasing strength-cross-market herding, arbitrage flow, and market-maker withdrawal up to a funding-constrained population fire-sale and a leverage spiral-the receiver's stress is independent of whether its neighbour is stressed, at every anchor strength. Market-maker withdrawal thins the receiving book but does not ignite it. Our order parameter throughout is the one-sidedness of the book-liquidity stress rather than a directional price crash-so a liquidity crisis here means the sustained one-sidedness a failing anchor produces. A liquidity crisis in this model is a failure of fundamental anchoring, not of market making.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过订单簿市场模型证明，锚定于基本价值的流动性供给具有稳健的内在稳定机制（价格均值回归与订单簿恢复），而移除锚定会引发杠杆驱动的自我持续抛售；同时发现压力市场的流动性危机不会通过六种渠道（从羊群效应到杠杆螺旋）传染至耦合的平静市场，接收方的压力独立于邻市状态；流动性危机的本质是基本面锚定失效，而非做市失败。
AI.motivation: 探究锚定于基本价值的订单簿市场中的恢复力是否是一种稳健的内在稳定器，以及压力市场的流动性危机是否会传染至耦合的平静市场。
AI.method: 构建锚定于基本价值的订单簿市场模型，通过因果干预（移除锚定）检验恢复力作用，并设置六种跨市场传染渠道（羊群效应、套利流动、做市商撤单、融资约束下的大面积抛售、杠杆螺旋）测试压力传染性。以订单簿单边性（流动性压力）而非价格方向作为序参量。
AI.result: 恢复力是稳健的内在稳定器：移除锚定后均值回归消失，杠杆驱动的抛售自我持续。压力不会传染至耦合市场：接收方市场压力独立于邻市是否受压，做市商撤单仅使订单簿变薄但不会点燃危机。
AI.conclusion: 流动性危机的本质是基本面锚定失效，而非做市功能失灵；市场微观结构的内在稳定机制（锚定恢复力）足以隔离外源性压力冲击。

title: Smoothed Two-Stage Decomposition Algorithm for Solving Large-Scale Transmission and Distribution AC-OPF Problems
summary: The integration of distributed energy resources (DERs) into the power grid has introduced new challenges to AC optimal power flow (AC-OPF) problems. Traditional OPF optimize consider transmission systems, treating distribution networks as static loads. However, the growing presence of DERs makes accurate distribution system modeling crucial for grid operations. Consequently, efficiently solving the resultant large-scale, nonconvex transmission and distribution (T&D) AC-OPF problem remains a significant challenge. This paper proposes a Smoothed Two-Stage Decomposition Optimizer (StsDOpt) to address these complexities by decomposing the T&D AC-OPF problem into a master-subproblem(s) structure, enabling parallel solving. Unlike traditional methods, StsDOpt does not rely on approximations or relaxations. It uses a smoothing technique to render the subproblems responses differentiable with respect to the master problem, leveraging the barrier problem properties inherent in primal-dual interior point methods. This approach is crucial for accurately modeling and solving distribution systems, which are multiphase, unbalanced, and nonlinear, distinguishing StsDOpt apart from other methods. Integrated into the PowerModelsITD framework, StsDOpt has been validated through numerical experiments, demonstrating reduced wall-clock solve time and increased scalability. Results highlight its efficacy as a robust, scalable solution for large-scale T&D AC-OPF problems, facilitating the reliable integration of DERs into complex T&D systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种平滑两阶段分解优化器（StsDOpt），通过主-子问题并行分解结构求解大规模输配电网交流最优潮流问题，避免了传统方法的近似或松弛，利用平滑技术使子问题对主问题可微，经数值实验验证其计算效率与可扩展性优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 分布式能源资源的广泛接入使配电网建模变得至关重要，而传统输配电网交流最优潮流问题规模庞大且非凸，现有方法依赖近似或松弛，难以高效精确求解。
AI.method: 提出StsDOpt，将输配电网AC-OPF分解为主-子问题结构以实现并行求解；采用平滑技术使子问题响应关于主问题可微，利用原对偶内点法的障碍问题特性，无需近似或松弛即可处理多相、不平衡、非线性的配电网系统。
AI.result: 集成于PowerModelsITD框架，数值实验表明StsDOpt减少了墙钟求解时间，提升了可扩展性，在大规模输配电网AC-OPF问题上表现出鲁棒性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: StsDOpt是一种鲁棒、可扩展的大规模输配电网AC-OPF求解方案，有助于分布式能源资源在复杂输配系统中的可靠集成。

title: Abliteration Is Not a Scalpel: Off-Target Effects of Refusal Removal on Decision Disposition Across Model Families
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Preregistered. Data and code: https://github.com/oleczek/paper-abliteration-not-a-scalpel ; dataset DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21314839
summary: Abliteration - deleting a model's refusal direction from its weights - is the standard recipe behind popular "uncensored" open-weight models. We show the surgery is not clean. As a disposition probe we use 21,600 decisions under uncertainty - weekly up/down calls on 60 Warsaw Stock Exchange equities over 18 weeks, replayed through a frozen pipeline so the decision-layer model is the only variable. The task elicits no refusals at all, so any between-arm delta is pure side effect. Holding provenance constant (official BF16 checkpoints, a single abliteration author, an identical serving stack, one byte-identical frozen prompt), we compare base and abliterated arms of two Mixture-of-Experts families, Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507. Three effects replicate across both families (weeks-clustered bootstrap CIs excluding zero): abliterated models are systematically more optimistic (+12.2 pp Gemma, +7.4 pp Qwen; the confirmed preregistered endpoint), justify themselves at greater length, and use fewer explicit uncertainty words in forced self-critiques (both exploratory). A fourth effect reverses sign: the same operation makes Gemma-abliterated less confident and Qwen-abliterated more (family CIs non-overlapping) - one weight surgery, opposite shifts in expressed confidence. Capability covariates rule out instruction-following degradation as the driver, and no arm shows economic skill: the apparent edge of abliterated arms is regime beta, not alpha. Our provenance audit also caught two independent contamination channels - a mismatched-quantizer pilot pair and a stale community chat template that silently mangled the rendered prompt - suggesting toolchain artifacts are the rule in studies of community-modified checkpoints. Whoever deploys an "uncensored" model as an agent is deploying a measurably different decision-maker, not the base model minus refusals.

AI.tldr: abliteration（删除模型拒绝方向）并非干净操作，会系统性改变模型在无拒绝场景下的决策行为：使模型更乐观、回答更长、自我批评中使用更少不确定性词，且不同模型族在置信度表达上出现相反变化。研究还发现社区修改模型的工具链伪影普遍存在。
AI.motivation: 标准"无审查"开源模型通过abliteration删除模型的拒绝方向，但该手术是否干净、是否仅移除拒绝行为而不产生副作用，尚不清楚。作者希望通过精心设计的实验，在完全不触发拒绝的场景下，检测abliteration是否产生纯副作用。
AI.method: 使用21,600个不确定性决策（华沙证券交易所60只股票的18周周度涨跌预测），通过冻结pipeline回放，确保决策层模型是唯一变量。严格控制来源（官方BF16检查点、同一abliteration作者、相同服务栈、字节相同的冻结提示），比较两个MoE家族（Gemma-4-26B和Qwen3-30B-A3B）的base和abliterated分支。
AI.result: 三个效应在两组模型中稳健复制（周聚类bootstrap CI排除零）：abliterated模型系统性更乐观（+12.2 pp Gemma, +7.4 pp Qwen）、自我辩解更长、强制自我批评中使用更少不确定性词。第四个效应符号相反：Gemma-abliterated更不自信，Qwen-abliterated更自信。能力协变量排除了指令遵循退化解释，且没有分支展现经济技能。审计还发现两种污染渠道（不匹配量化器对、过时社区聊天模板）。
AI.conclusion: Abliteration会产生产生测量上不同的决策者，而非"基础模型减去拒绝"；部署"无审查"模型作为智能体时，需意识到其带来了系统性的行为改变；社区修改模型的工具链伪影是研究中的普遍问题。

title: Kernel Minimum Distance Estimation and Testing with Conditional Moment Restrictions: A Unified Framework
comment: 99 pages, including supplementary material; 3 figures and 20 tables
summary: We propose a unified Kernel Minimum Distance (KMD) framework for estimating and testing models defined by conditional moment restrictions. By embedding conditional moments into a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS), we construct a closed-form $V$-statistic objective function that quantifies the distance from the restrictions. We establish the $\sqrt{n}$-consistency and asymptotic normality of the associated minimum distance estimator. Within this framework, the minimized objective function naturally yields a consistent omnibus specification test. Unlike projection-based methods that require auxiliary nonparametric estimation for Neyman orthogonalization, our test inherently captures the estimation effect via a projected kernel structure. We derive asymptotic properties of the test statistics under the null hypothesis, the alternative hypothesis, and a sequence of local alternatives converging to the null at the parametric rate $n^{-1/2}$. The validity of a computationally simple multiplier bootstrap is established to facilitate inference. Simulation results demonstrate robust finite-sample performance, and the framework is illustrated by analyzing Engel curves using UK Family Expenditure Survey data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的核最小距离（KMD）框架，用于估计和检验条件矩约束模型，通过将条件矩嵌入再生核希尔伯特空间，构建了闭式V统计量目标函数，并建立了估计量的渐近性质及规范检验方法。
AI.motivation: 现有条件矩约束模型估计和检验方法存在局限性，如投影类方法需要辅助非参数估计进行Neyman正交化，计算复杂且可能引入额外误差。本文旨在开发一个统一、简洁且无需辅助估计的框架。
AI.method: 将条件矩嵌入RKHS，构造闭式V统计量作为目标函数，最小化得到估计量；利用投影核结构捕捉估计效应，构建规范检验统计量；使用乘子自助法进行推断。
AI.result: 建立了估计量√n一致性和渐近正态性；检验统计量在原假设、备择假设和局部备择假设下具有良好渐近性质；乘子自助法有效；仿真和实际数据分析（英国Engel曲线）验证了有限样本性能。
AI.conclusion: KMD框架为条件矩约束模型提供了一种统一、计算便捷且理论完善的估计与检验方法，避免了传统投影方法的辅助估计需求，具有良好的有限样本表现和实际应用价值。

title: Risk Measures on Lipschitz Spaces
summary: This paper develops a theory of monetary risk measures on metric state spaces. We propose the space of Lipschitz functions vanishing at a reference state as a natural domain for financial positions. The associated Lipschitz-free space provides its canonical predual, linking anchored Lipschitz payoffs to transport-based dual variables interpreted as redistributions of mass around the benchmark. Since the domain lacks constants and need not be a Banach lattice under the Lipschitz norm, standard cash-additive methods do not apply directly. We address this by using additivity along benchmark-deviation instruments and derive dual representations for convex and coherent risk measures. The framework covers temporal cash flows, path-dependent payoffs, network risk, and model uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文在度量状态空间上建立了基于Lipschitz函数的货币风险度量理论，利用Lipschitz自由空间作为预对偶，通过基准偏差工具的加性性质推导出凸和一致风险度量的对偶表示，涵盖时间现金流、路径依赖、网络风险和模型不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统现金可加性方法不适用于Lipschitz函数空间（缺乏常数且非Banach格），需要新的理论框架来处理度量状态空间上的风险度量问题。
AI.method: 采用Lipschitz函数空间（在参考点处为零）作为金融头寸的定义域，利用其对偶Lipschitz自由空间作为预对偶；引入基准偏差工具的加性性质（additivity along benchmark-deviation instruments）替代传统的现金可加性，进而推导凸和一致风险度量的对偶表示。
AI.result: 建立了Lipschitz框架下货币风险度量的对偶表示定理，并展示了该框架在时间现金流、路径依赖期权、网络风险和模型不确定性等多个场景下的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Lipschitz框架有效拓展了货币风险度量的适用范围，解决了非标准空间结构下的对偶表示问题，为复杂金融环境下的风险度量提供了统一的理论工具。

title: Portfolio Optimization under Heavy Tails and Asymmetric Volatility: Evidence from Taiwan-Exposed ETFs
comment: 46 pages, 19 figures, 4 tables. Submitted to Journal of Risk and Financial Management (JRFM)
summary: Taiwan's central role in global semiconductor manufacturing exposes Taiwan-related ETFs to technology concentration, geopolitical uncertainty, and supply-chain disruptions, resulting in return distributions characterized by heavy tails, volatility clustering, and asymmetric responses to negative shocks. This paper analyzes thirty U.S.-listed ETFs with Taiwan exposure from February 2015 to February 2025 using tail-risk diagnostics, asymmetric volatility modeling, and portfolio optimization under mean--variance and conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) criteria. Hill tail-index estimates document heavy-tailed behavior across the ETF universe. Although the ETFs exhibit broadly similar asymptotic tail-decay behavior, semiconductor-focused ETFs produce substantially larger VaR and CVaR estimates than diversified benchmarks, indicating that cross-sectional differences in extreme downside risk are driven primarily by differences in return scale rather than tail-index estimates. GJR-GARCH estimates reveal persistent, asymmetric volatility, and the apparent long memory in squared returns is largely attributable to conditional heteroskedasticity rather than genuine fractional integration. CVaR optimization produces substantially more concentrated allocations than mean--variance optimization, with the CVaR tangent portfolio allocating a large weight to SMH during the post-COVID AI-driven expansion. Portfolio rankings depend on the performance measure: the Sharpe ratio and STARR measure favor the equally weighted portfolio, whereas the Rachev ratio favors CVaR-based portfolios. Overall, the results suggest that variance-based frameworks alone provide an incomplete characterization of risk in technology-concentrated investment environments and that variance-based and tail-sensitive performance measures may favor different portfolios over the same sample period.

AI.tldr: 本文分析30檔台灣相關美股指數股票型基金（ETF）在2015年至2025年間的尾部風險、不對稱波動性及投資組合優化，發現半導體ETF的極端下行風險顯著高於多元化基準，CVaR優化產生的配置比均值-方差優化更集中，且基於方差與基於尾部風險的績效指標可能偏好不同的投資組合。
AI.motivation: 台灣在全球半導體製造中的核心地位使台灣相關ETF面臨技術集中、地緣政治不確定性和供應鏈中斷等風險，導致其回報分布呈現厚尾、波動聚集及對負面衝擊的不對稱反應等特徵，因此需要超越傳統方差框架的風險分析工具。
AI.method: 使用Hill尾部指數估計診斷厚尾行為，應用GJR-GARCH模型捕捉不對稱波動性，並在均值-方差和條件風險價值（CVaR）準則下進行投資組合優化，比較不同風險度量下的最優配置與績效排名。
AI.result: ETF普遍呈現厚尾特徵；半導體ETF的VaR和CVaR顯著大於多元化基準，差異主要源於回報規模而非尾部指數；波動性持久且不對稱；平方回報的長記憶性主要來自條件異方差；CVaR優化產生的配置更集中；夏普比率和STARR指標偏好等權重組合，而Rachev比率偏好CVaR組合。
AI.conclusion: 僅依賴方差框架無法完整刻畫技術集中型投資環境的風險特徵，方差型與尾部敏感型績效指標在同一樣本期內可能偏好不同的投資組合。

title: Multi-level context Modeling for consistent expert selection in Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) enables efficient scaling of Transformer models by routing tokens to a small subset of experts. However, existing routers typically condition expert selection on shallow or isolated token representations, which often produce unstable and semantically inconsistent routing decisions across layers. In this work, we revisit expert selection from a representation perspective and identify context incompleteness as a key bottleneck limiting effective expert specialization. To address this issue, we propose Multi-level Context Fusion MOE (MCF-MOE), a framework that constructs context-aware representations by integrating complementary signals from cross-layer semantic aggregation and local token-level interactions, enabling more informative and consistent expert selection. Experiments on language modeling and understanding benchmarks demonstrate that MCF-MOE consistently improves routing consistency and downstream performance over strong MoE baselines, highlighting the importance of contextual completeness in expert routing. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MCFMOE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCF-MOE框架，通过跨层语义聚合和局部token交互构建上下文感知表示，解决MoE路由中专家选择不稳定和语义不一致的问题，在语言建模和理解任务上取得更好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE路由机制依赖浅层或孤立的token表示，导致专家选择不稳定且跨层语义不一致。作者从表示学习角度重新审视专家选择问题，发现上下文不完整是限制专家有效专业化的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出多级上下文融合MoE框架(MCF-MOE)，通过集成跨层语义聚合和局部token级交互信号，构建上下文感知的token表示，从而实现信息更丰富、一致性更强的专家路由。
AI.result: 在语言建模和理解基准测试上，MCF-MOE在路由一致性和下游任务性能上 consistently 优于强MoE基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 上下文完整性对于专家路由至关重要，跨层和局部上下文融合能够有效提升MoE模型的专家选择质量和整体性能。

title: An Interactive Interface for Control Integration in Mid-Fidelity Wind Farm Simulation
summary: Wind farm control (WFC) plays a crucial role in mitigating the wake effect, the negative aerodynamic interactions among wind turbines. Recent advances in data-driven control and artificial intelligence offer new opportunities to design more intelligent WFC systems, motivating the need for a tool that supports interactive design and validation in simulation. To address this, we present ffconnect, a general, open-source Python-based interface for FAST.Farm, a mid-fidelity wind farm simulator. Compared to prior work, ffconnect introduces a restructured Application Programming Interface (API) with enriched state access and supports integrating FAST.Farm with modern scientific computing and machine learning ecosystems by building entirely on Python. In experiments, ffconnect shows negligible runtime overhead compared to the original FAST.Farm across a range of simulation lengths and farm sizes, and demonstrates its effectiveness through a yaw-tracking case study. Finally, we provide the source code of ffconnect to keep it accessible for general users.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ffconnect，一个基于Python的开源接口，用于连接FAST.Farm风电场模拟器与现代科学计算和机器学习生态系统，支持交互式风电场控制设计与验证。
AI.motivation: 风电场控制中尾流效应严重影响发电效率，数据驱动和AI方法为智能控制带来新机遇，但缺乏支持交互式设计与验证的模拟工具。
AI.method: 开发了ffconnect，一个完全基于Python的通用开源接口，重构了FAST.Farm的API，提供更丰富的状态访问，并支持与现代计算和ML生态系统的集成。
AI.result: 实验表明，ffconnect在各种仿真时长和风电场规模下，与原始FAST.Farm相比运行时开销可忽略不计，并通过偏航跟踪案例验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ffconnect为风电场控制研究提供了一个高效、易用且开放的工具，促进了先进控制算法的开发与验证。

title: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
summary: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditions, raters' preferences may shift over time. As a result, preference data can encode rater state alongside judgments about response quality. These shifts differ from ordinary disagreement or random label noise. They are state dependent, can be shared across annotators working under similar conditions, and can propagate through reward modeling and policy optimization. We therefore propose rater state shift as a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data. This paper develops a hypothesis and an audit framework for studying this source of bias. We define rater state shift, rater state confound, and correlated rater state bias. We also define survival level emotional authenticity as a measurable response pattern using lexical, pragmatic, discourse, and safety related features. We analyze how correlated rater state bias can survive aggregation and enter learned reward signals. We derive five falsifiable predictions and effect size thresholds for an initial audit. Finally, we present an audit protocol and pilot study plan that can be applied to publicly available instruction tuned models. We do not infer the training history of any specific deployed model. Our goal is to isolate a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出强化学习从人类反馈（RLHF）中存在一种结构性混淆：标注者的情绪状态变化会系统地影响偏好标签，导致偏好数据不仅反映输出质量，还编码了标注者的状态。作者定义了“标注者状态偏移”、“标注者状态混淆”和“相关标注者状态偏差”，并提出了可验证的审计框架和五个可证伪的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF假设偏好标签仅反映输出质量，但忽略了标注者情绪状态（如压力、痛苦）对偏好的系统性影响。这种状态依赖的偏差与随机噪声不同，可能通过奖励建模和策略优化传播，导致模型行为出现结构性偏差。
AI.method: 1. 形式化定义三种偏差概念（状态偏移、状态混淆、相关状态偏差）。2. 提出“生存层面情感真实性”作为可测量的响应模式，涵盖词汇、语用、话语和安全性特征。3. 推导出五个可证伪的预测及效应量阈值。4. 设计审计协议和试点研究计划。
AI.result: 识别出RLHF中存在标注者状态相关结构性偏差的理论证据；定义了可操作的测量框架；提出了可验证的审计方法（包括五个预测和阈值）。
AI.conclusion: 标注者状态偏移是RLHF偏好数据中一种合理且可检验的结构性偏差来源，应引起该领域研究者的重视，并为后续实证审计提供理论基础和操作指南。

title: Semi-Supervised Conditional Diffusion via Label Augmentation
summary: Conditional diffusion models have become a powerful and flexible framework for learning complex conditional distributions from labeled data. In practice, however, acquiring high-quality labels is costly and time-consuming, leaving large volumes of unlabeled data unused. To address this, we introduce label-augmented conditional diffusion (LACD), a simple and effective approach that incorporates unlabeled examples by assigning them a designated trivial label and performing joint denoising score matching over the augmented dataset. We provide sufficient conditions guaranteeing population-level identifiability of the target conditional distribution under this scheme. Moreover, we establish rigorous statistical guarantees: when sufficiently many unlabeled samples are available, the sampling distribution produced by LACD converges strictly faster than the purely supervised estimator in total variation distance, and at least as fast in Wasserstein-1 distance. Extensive experiments on synthetic, image, and tabular benchmarks corroborate our theory and show substantial gains in sample efficiency and generative performance compared with the purely supervised estimator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出标签增强条件扩散模型（LACD），通过为无标签数据分配“平凡标签”并联合去噪评分匹配，有效利用未标注数据提升条件扩散模型的生成性能，并提供了理论保证和实验验证。
AI.motivation: 有标签数据获取成本高昂，大量无标签数据未被充分利用，而条件扩散模型依赖高质量标签数据训练。
AI.method: 为无标签样本分配一个指定的平凡标签，将其加入训练集，在增强数据集上进行联合去噪评分匹配。
AI.result: 在总变差距离上收敛速度严格快于纯监督估计，在Wasserstein-1距离上至少一样快；合成数据、图像和表格基准实验均验证了样本效率和生成性能的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: LACD是一种简单有效的半监督条件扩散方法，兼具理论可识别性保证和统计收敛优势，能大幅提升条件生成模型的样本利用效率。

title: Determining Insolvency Regions in Banks: A Stochastic Dynamic Approach Integrating Liquidity and Credit Risk
comment: Keywords: Bank insolvency, Liquidity risk, Credit risk, Stochastic optimal control, HJB equation, Basel III, Early warning systems. 25 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables
summary: We develop a continuous-time structural dynamic model to determine the exact insolvency regions of banks arising from the non-linear interaction between liquidity and credit risk. While existing literature predominantly treats these risks in isolation or via reduced-form specifications, we explicitly model the feedback loop where funding shocks and regulatory constraints force balance-sheet adjustments that can lead to endogenous insolvency. By incorporating Basel III regulatory requirements (LCR and NSFR) into a stochastic optimal control framework, we solve for the exact insolvency boundary using the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation. To bridge the gap between theoretical complexity and supervisory practice, we derive and validate a surrogate analytical approximation function that allows for real-time monitoring. Calibrated using granular balance-sheet data from the Iranian banking sector, our model reveals significant non-linear threshold effects: the joint occurrence of liquidity stress and credit portfolio defaults disproportionately accelerates the transition toward insolvency compared to their individual effects. The proposed surrogate function offers supervisors a computationally efficient tool for stress testing and early warning systems. Our findings provide novel insights into financial frictions in emerging markets and offer a rigorous framework for integrated risk management.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个连续时间结构动态模型，研究流动性与信用风险的非线性交互作用如何导致银行内源性破产，并推导出可用于实时监管的近似解析函数。
AI.motivation: 现有文献大多将流动性和信用风险孤立处理或使用简化形式，忽略了二者之间的反馈循环。监管实践中也缺乏能够在复杂性与实时监控之间取得平衡的工具。
AI.method: 基于随机最优控制框架，将巴塞尔III的LCR和NSFR监管要求纳入模型，通过HJB方程求解精确的破产边界，并推导出替代性解析近似函数。
AI.result: 利用伊朗银行业微观资产负债表数据校准后，发现流动性与信用风险的联合冲击会非线性地加速破产进程，其效应远超二者单独作用之和。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的替代函数为监管者提供了计算高效的实时压力测试工具，为新兴市场的金融摩擦提供了新见解，也为综合风险管理提供了严谨框架。

title: MDAF: A Multi-Dimensional Annotation Framework for Automated Foreign Policy Analysis
summary: Government websites contain a vast but underexploited body of textual evidence on foreign policy. This article develops a scalable approach for extracting structured information from policy texts and converting it into standardized event data, with policy event defined broadly as a statement or action. It proposes MDAF integrating an LLM workflow to automate foreign policy text identification, information extraction, and event classification. Empirically, it applies this approach to China-related texts from Five Eyes countries. The analysis shows that the resulting database supports systematic cross-national comparison, reveals variation in how states frame and implement China policy, and traces the temporal evolution of these policy profiles. This article contributes to foreign policy analysis and the methodological development of computational international relations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDAF框架，利用大语言模型自动化从政府网站文本中提取外交政策事件数据，并以五眼联盟国家涉华政策文本为案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 政府网站蕴含丰富但未被充分挖掘的外交政策文本证据，传统手工编码方法效率低、难以规模化，亟需一种可扩展的自动化方法将政策文本转化为结构化事件数据。
AI.method: 提出MDAF框架，集成大语言模型工作流，实现外交政策文本识别、信息提取和事件分类的自动化处理。
AI.result: 该方法构建的数据库支持系统性跨国比较，揭示了不同国家在涉华政策的表述和实施上的差异，并能追踪政策随时间演变的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该研究对外交政策分析和计算国际关系的方法论发展均有贡献。

title: Uniform-Loss Automated Market Making for Prediction Markets
summary: Automated market makers (AMMs) for prediction markets descend from market scoring rules, where a mechanism operator subsidizes a market to aggregate beliefs about uncertain events. The existing literature has focused on bounding the total worst-case loss to the subsidizer, but has not addressed how that loss is distributed across price states or over time. We use the framework of loss-versus-rebalancing (LVR) to study this distribution and introduce \textit{uniform AMMs}, defined by the property that instantaneous LVR is proportional to pool value and independent of the current token price. In a static setting, we show that for a broad class of \textit{win-martingales} -- processes that converge to 0 or 1 at a fixed resolution time -- there exists a pricing function that achieves uniform LVR under that process, and conversely, that any sufficiently regular pricing function induces a win-martingale under which it is uniform. We then extend the framework to dynamic liquidity management, showing that liquidity levels can be adjusted over time to implement a prescribed target expected cumulative loss schedule. This theory is illustrated with canonical examples of win-martingales and pricing functions. Our results can inform AMM designers and liquidity providers on how the inevitable cost of subsidizing price discovery can be shaped and controlled across both price and time.

AI.tldr: 本文研究预测市场中自动做市商（AMM）的损失分布问题，引入“均匀AMM”概念（瞬时LVR与池价值成正比且独立于代币价格），证明了在“赢鞅”过程下存在实现均匀LVR的定价函数，并将框架扩展至动态流动性管理，为AMM设计者和流动性提供者控制价格发现补贴成本提供了理论指导。
AI.motivation: 现有文献仅关注做市商总最坏情况损失的上界，但未涉及损失在不同价格状态和时间维度上的分布。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究损失如何分布以及如何被控制和塑造。
AI.method: 利用损失vs再平衡（LVR）框架分析损失分布；定义“均匀AMM”作为核心概念；在静态设定下证明定价函数与赢鞅过程之间的双向关系；将框架扩展到动态流动性管理场景。
AI.result: 对于一类广泛的“赢鞅”过程，存在定价函数实现均匀LVR；任何足够规则的定价函数也诱导出一个使其均匀的赢鞅过程；动态流动性管理中可随时间调整流动性水平以实施预设的累计损失计划。
AI.conclusion: AMM设计者和流动性提供者可以通过合理设计定价函数和动态调整流动性，在价格维度和时间维度上有效控制和塑造价格发现补贴的不可避免成本。

title: Batteriesandthe BritishEnergy System
summary: Batteries are becoming a central part of modern energy systems, especially as electricity, transport and heat are decarbonised. In Great Britain, batteries already play an important role by providing flexibility and acting as a buffer for the system, and their importance will continue to grow as the system moves towards net zero by 2050. This perspective reviews how the role of batteries in Great Britain is evolving, their current value, and the growing contribution of batteries in the transport sector.Itarguesthatthefullvalueofelectricvehiclebatterieswillonlyberealisedthroughcoordinated dispatchandbetterintegrationintosystemoperation.Evidencefromfuturescenariosdevelopedbythe NationalEnergySystemOperatorshowsthatwhileelectricvehiclescouldprovidemostofthestorage capacity, unmanaged charging could create challenges for the system rather than benefits. Unlocking this valuewill require improvements in market design, optimisation, and control strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了电池在英国能源系统脱碳进程中的关键作用，指出电动汽车电池的全面价值需通过协调调度和系统整合来实现，否则无序充电可能带来挑战，并强调了市场设计、优化和控制策略的重要意义。
AI.motivation: 随着英国向2050年净零排放目标迈进，电池在电力、交通和供热脱碳中日益重要，但电动汽车电池的潜力尚未充分发挥，亟需审视其当前价值与未来挑战。
AI.method: 采用综述视角，结合英国国家能源系统运营商的未来情景证据，分析电池角色演变、现有价值，并论证协调调度与系统整合的必要性。
AI.result: 电动汽车可提供大部分储能容量，但无序充电反而会给系统带来挑战；只有通过改进市场设计、优化和控制策略，才能释放其全部价值。
AI.conclusion: 协调调度和更好的系统整合是释放电动汽车电池价值的关键，需要配套的市场设计、优化及控制策略改进。

title: AlphaZeroBeta: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Market-Neutral Portfolios
comment: 59 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for publication in Financial Innovation (Springer)
summary: Market-neutral portfolios aim to generate consistent returns while offsetting systematic market risk. Traditional approaches based on factor models or convex optimization often underperform during market regime shifts or when structural assumptions break down. We propose AlphaZeroBeta, a deep reinforcement learning framework designed to deliver benchmark-relative alpha (excess returns) with near-zero beta (market neutrality). AlphaZeroBeta combines a composite reward function that balances risk-adjusted excess return, benchmark correlation, and transaction costs with a CNN-GRU policy trained end-to-end via Recurrent PPO and evaluated through a rolling walk-forward protocol. Backtests covering 2014-2024 across seven equity indices show that the model achieves higher Sharpe ratios than the baselines while maintaining near-zero benchmark correlations and competitive drawdowns.

AI.tldr: 提出AlphaZeroBeta，一种基于深度强化学习的市场中性投资框架，通过CNN-GRU策略和复合奖励函数实现近零Beta和超额收益，2014-2024年回测表现优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统市场中性策略（基于因子模型或凸优化）在市场机制转换或结构性假设失效时表现不佳，需要更鲁棒的自适应方法。
AI.method: 采用CNN-GRU策略网络，通过循环PPO算法进行端到端训练，结合包含风险调整超额收益、基准相关性和交易成本的复合奖励函数，并使用滚动前向验证协议评估。
AI.result: 在2014-2024年七个股票指数的回测中，实现了比基线模型更高的夏普比率，同时保持近零基准相关性和有竞争力的回撤水平。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习框架能够有效构建市场中性组合，在保持低市场暴露的同时产生稳定超额收益，为量化投资提供了新思路。

title: When and How to Pilot: Design Rules for Two-Wave Experiments
comment: 93 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables; includes online appendix
summary: Experimenters often run pilots, but how much a small pilot should shape the main-wave design has no settled answer. This paper shows how noisy pilot evidence should guide treatment assignment probabilities in two-wave experiments. Two canonical rules mark the extremes. Balanced assignment guards against worst cases but ignores evidence that one arm is noisier. Feasible Neyman allocation adapts, but with a finite pilot it can overreact to noise, producing arbitrarily large precision losses. We propose a Conditional Minimax Regret (CMR) rule that minimizes worst-case regret over a finite-sample confidence set for the treatment and control variances. CMR retains balance's worst-case protection with high probability, converges to the Neyman allocation as the pilot grows, and attains the minimax-regret rate up to constants. It extends to multi-arm and stratified designs, and simulations calibrated to four field experiments show it avoids feasible Neyman's severe small-pilot losses while capturing most of its large-pilot gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件极小化遗憾(CMR)规则，用于两阶段实验中根据有限先导证据分配处理概率，在平衡分配和Neyman分配之间取得最优权衡。
AI.motivation: 实验者常进行先导实验，但如何利用小规模先导数据指导主实验设计缺乏理论依据。现有方法要么忽略先导证据（平衡分配），要么过度反应于噪声（可行Neyman分配导致精度大幅损失）。
AI.method: 提出条件极小化遗憾(CMR)规则：在先导样本构建的有限样本置信集上，极小化最坏情况下的遗憾（regret）。CMR以高概率保留平衡分配的最坏情况保护，随先导增长收敛到Neyman分配，并达到极小化遗憾速率（至多常数倍）。
AI.result: CMR规则在理论上具有最优的极小化遗憾速率，可扩展到多臂和分层设计。基于四个实地实验的模拟显示，CMR避免了可行Neyman分配在小先导时的严重损失，同时捕获了其大部分大先导收益。
AI.conclusion: CMR规则为两阶段实验的分配设计提供了理论严谨且实践有效的解决方案，桥接了平衡分配和自适应分配之间的鸿沟。

title: A General Model for Continuous Time Principal-Agent Problem Under Hidden Action
summary: In this paper, we study a general continuous-time Principal-Agent (PA) problem, where the agent privately makes effort and consumption decisions over time under a contract with payment schemes both in continuous time and in lump sums. In particular, we allow the continuous payment process to be a controlled diffusion, which is directly related to the pay-to-performance sensitivity (PPS) in the empirical literature. In solving the agent's problem, we propose a new sufficient condition that directly yields a solution to the agent's problem, without requiring a separate verification step for the solution obtained from the first-order approach. We also present an example which can be solved explicitly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究连续时间下的委托-代理问题，提出一种无需单独验证步骤的新充分条件来解决代理人问题，并给出了可显式求解的示例。
AI.motivation: 传统连续时间委托-代理问题的求解通常需要先通过一阶方法得到候选解，再单独进行验证步骤，过程繁琐。本文希望通过提出新的充分条件，省去这一验证步骤，同时引入与实证文献中"薪酬-业绩敏感性"直接相关的连续支付过程。
AI.method: 研究一般化的连续时间委托-代理模型，其中代理人可私下决定努力和消费，合同包含连续支付和一次性支付。连续支付过程被建模为受控扩散过程，与薪酬-业绩敏感性相关。提出一个新的充分条件，使得从一阶方法得到的解直接成立，无需额外验证。
AI.result: 提出了一个新的充分条件，能够直接得到代理人问题的解，无需单独的验证步骤。并给出了一个可显式求解的示例。
AI.conclusion: 该新充分条件简化了连续时间委托-代理问题的求解流程，并在理论上有助于更好地理解薪酬-业绩敏感性与合同设计之间的关系。

title: DocOCR-Eval: A Correction-Based Framework for OCR Tool Selection Without Ground Truth
summary: Document parsing is a foundational step for document understanding tasks such as visual question answering and key information extraction, as it transforms unstructured scanned images into structured representations by extracting textual, visual, and layout information. While numerous Optical Character Recognition (OCR) engines and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been developed for this purpose, selecting an appropriate document parsing solution for a given document collection remains challenging, particularly in label-scarce settings. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of text recognition performance across a diverse set of OCR engines and state-of-the-art MLLMs on multiple scanned document benchmarks spanning different domains and languages. Motivated by the limited contextual reasoning capabilities of many OCR engines and the high cost of manual annotations, we propose DocOCR-Eval, an annotation-free evaluation framework for automatic OCR assessment and selection. DocOCR-Eval employs a three-staged correction and ranking strategy to approximate annotation-based tool ordering without ground-truth labels. We show that aggregating across multiple MLLMs progressively improves alignment with annotation-based rankings. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that reliable OCR tool selection can be achieved in realistic, label-limited settings, providing practical guidance for deploying document parsing systems across diverse real-world document collections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocOCR-Eval，一种无需标注的评估框架，用于自动评估和选择OCR工具，通过三阶段校正和排序策略逼近真实标注排序，在多种扫描文档基准上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR引擎和MLLMs众多，但在标签稀缺场景下如何为特定文档集合选择合适的解析方案仍具挑战。许多OCR引擎缺乏上下文推理能力，而人工标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出DocOCR-Eval框架，采用三阶段校正和排序策略，在无真实标签的情况下近似基于标注的工具排序，并通过聚合多个MLLM逐步提升与标注排序的一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DocOCR-Eval能够在现实标签稀缺场景下实现可靠的OCR工具选择，聚合多个MLLM能持续提升与人工标注排序的匹配度。
AI.conclusion: 本文为跨领域、多语言的文档解析系统部署提供了实用指导，证明无标注评估框架在标签有限条件下的可行性和有效性。

title: RIMS: Preference Optimization via Smoothed Multi-pair Aggregation for Small-Scale LLM Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Small-scale language models (SLMs) are attractive for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in resource-constrained settings, but their limited capacity makes them highly sensitive to noisy or spurious retrieved evidence. Existing preference-based methods such as RoseRAG select only the hardest single preference pair via hard argmin/argmax, discarding the remaining signal; others treat multiple pairs as independent binary comparisons, resulting in low data utilization. We propose RIMS, a three-stage preference optimization framework comprising (1) synthetic chain-of-thought preference data generation via rejection sampling using the target SLM itself without relying on proprietary models, (2) a differentiable soft aggregation mechanism that replaces hard selection with a smooth operator, preserving gradient signal from all preference pairs while retaining the discriminative structure of margin-aware selection, and (3) preference optimization with the smoothed objective applied to multiple alignment algorithms. We theoretically show that the smoothed approximation admits a controllable error bound and that smooth aggregation yields provably tighter gradient alignment to the oracle objective than hard selection. Experiments on four multi-hop question answering benchmarks show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across multiple SLM backbones, achieving consistent gains in Exact Match and F1 under noisy retrieval conditions. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/tptrix29/RIMS.

AI.tldr: RIMS是一个三阶段偏好优化框架，通过软聚合机制替代硬选择，提升小模型在检索增强生成中对噪声证据的鲁棒性，在四个多跳问答基准上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好优化方法（如RoseRAG）仅选取最难的单个偏好对（硬argmin/argmax），丢弃了其余信号；或将多个偏好对视为独立二元比较，数据利用率低。小语言模型（SLM）在资源受限场景下对检索噪声高度敏感，亟需更高效的数据利用方式。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：(1) 通过拒绝采样生成合成思维链偏好数据，不依赖闭源模型；(2) 可微分的软聚合机制，用平滑算子替代硬选择，保留所有偏好对的梯度信号；(3) 将平滑后的目标函数应用于多种对齐算法进行偏好优化。理论证明了平滑近似的可控误差界及比硬选择更紧的梯度对齐。
AI.result: 在四个多跳问答基准上，RIMS在多个SLM骨干上超越SOTA基线，在噪声检索条件下取得一致的Exact Match和F1提升。
AI.conclusion: RIMS通过软聚合策略有效提升了小模型在RAG场景中的抗噪能力和数据利用效率，为资源受限环境下的偏好优化提供了新范式。

title: A 0.74-mW K$_u$-band Cryogenic SiGe LNA in 130-nm BiCMOS with 14-K Noise Temperature for Scalable Quantum Readout
comment: Accepted to IEEE BiCMOS and Compound Semiconductor Integrated Circuits and Technology Symposium (BCICTS), October 11--14, 2026
summary: This paper presents a sub-milliwatt K$_u$-band cryogenic low-noise amplifier (LNA) implemented in GlobalFoundries (GF) 130CBIC SiGe BiCMOS, intended for a sub-Kelvin qubit readout chain integrating a JPA and SiGe LNA on the Still stage. The four-stage cascode LNA features balun-coupled interstage matching with a Q-enhanced resonance tank controlled by 2-bit switches tank for frequency tuning and a voltage-controlled cross-coupled negative-$g_m$ cell. The operating point of the Q-cell is optimized at each temperature stage to achieve the best in-band performance under a stable condition. Characterized at 2.5 K for the initial demonstration, the LNA achieves an average noise temperature of $\sim$14 K across 12-18 GHz and 28 dB peak gain around 16.5 GHz, while consuming only 0.74 mW. To the authors' knowledge, this is the lowest reported DC power for a K$_u$-band cryogenic SiGe LNA.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一款工作在Ku波段（12-18 GHz）的亚毫瓦级低温低噪声放大器（LNA），采用GF 130CBIC SiGe BiCMOS工艺实现，专为亚开尔文量子比特读出链设计。该四级级联LNA采用巴伦耦合级间匹配、Q增强谐振腔（2位开关调谐）及电压控制交叉耦合负跨导单元，在2.5 K下测得平均噪声温度约14 K、峰值增益28 dB（约16.5 GHz），功耗仅0.74 mW，是报道中Ku波段低温SiGe LNA中最低的直流功耗。
AI.motivation: 量子比特读出链需要工作在亚开尔文温度下的低噪声放大器，同时要求极低的功耗以避免对低温环境的过度热负载。现有SiGe低温LNA在Ku波段的功耗仍然较高，难以满足与约瑟夫森参量放大器（JPA）共同集成在Still级的需求。
AI.method: 采用四层级联共射共基（cascode）结构；使用巴伦耦合实现级间匹配；设计Q增强谐振腔，通过2位开关进行频率调谐；引入电压控制交叉耦合负跨导（negative-gm）单元；在不同温度级优化Q单元的工作点以在稳定条件下获得最佳带内性能。
AI.result: 在2.5 K低温下测试，该LNA在12-18 GHz范围内平均噪声温度约14 K；16.5 GHz附近峰值增益达28 dB；总功耗仅0.74 mW，为Ku波段低温SiGe LNA中最低功耗报道。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了极低功耗下Ku波段低温低噪声放大，为量子比特读出链中JPA与SiGe LNA共集成在Still级提供了可行的超低功耗方案。

title: Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions
summary: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-source MATLAB-based framework for the development and validation of compact deep learning models for affective touch recognition in soft interactive companions. As a primary contribution, a diverse FAIR-compliant dataset of 1326 labelled gesture sequences collected from 25 participants spanning children, teenagers, and adults is made publicly available, providing a reusable resource for future research in affective touch recognition. Through systematic architecture and hyperparameter exploration across 468 CNN models, the study identifies compact dilated one-dimensional convolutional neural networks (1D CNNs) as the most effective solution, with a 13.2k-parameter model achieving 75% test accuracy and 85% mean leave-one-subject-out cross-validation accuracy. Theoretical inference-time analysis shows that quantized deployment requires 3.2 MMAC per window, compatible with 20 Hz real-time operation on the target microcontroller. PC-based real-time simulation with the physical toy streaming sensor data demonstrates that the CNN resolves subtle social touches that the previous heuristic system failed to detect, whereas high-force negative interactions are captured more reliably by trivial threshold-based logic. The resulting hybrid inference pipeline - instantaneous heuristic filtering followed by CNN-based nuanced gesture classification - is proposed as the embedded deployment strategy. The study demonstrates that emotionally meaningful, privacy-preserving touch interpretation is computationally feasible for direct embedding within soft therapeutic companions, with hardware integration addressed in a forthcoming study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套完整的开源MATLAB框架，用于开发轻量级深度学习模型实现软体交互伴侣的情感触觉识别。研究公开了包含1326个标注手势序列的FAIR兼容数据集，通过468个CNN模型架构探索，发现紧凑型扩张一维CNN（13.2k参数）在微控制器上可实现75%测试准确率和20Hz实时推理，并提出了启发式阈值过滤+CNN精细分类的混合推理管线。
AI.motivation: 软体传感器化伴侣虽具备物理安全和情感直观性，但其可变形性和多通道触觉感知特性使得对人类情感的鲁棒性解读变得复杂，现有方法难以有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建了含1326个标注手势序列的FAIR兼容数据集（覆盖儿童至成人）；2) 系统探索了468个CNN模型的架构与超参数；3) 识别出紧凑型扩张1D CNN为最优方案（13.2k参数）；4) 提出启发式阈值过滤+CNN精细分类的混合推理管线。
AI.result: 13.2k参数模型达到75%测试准确率、85%留一法交叉验证准确率；量化部署仅需3.2 MMAC/窗，支持20Hz实时运行；混合管线能检测到启发式系统遗漏的细微社交触觉，同时高力度负面交互由阈值逻辑可靠捕获。
AI.conclusion: 情感有意义且隐私保护的触觉解读在计算上可直接嵌入软体治疗伴侣中，硬件集成将在后续研究中解决。

title: A Causal Markov Condition for Value
summary: This paper proposes a causal independence principle for value -- the value Causal Markov Condition (v-CMC) -- and develops the conceptual and mathematical foundations of a "causal value theory" linking causality and utility. After motivating a local formulation of the v-CMC, we introduce a probability-value duality that translates standard causal-inference results into the value setting. In particular, we formulate local, global, and decomposition versions of the v-CMC and prove their equivalence. We also define v-separation and show that it is sound and complete for conditional value independence. Furthermore, we derive a Bellman-type recursion as a special case of the v-CMC, thereby generalizing standard Bellman recursion from linear chains to causal DAGs. Finally, we show how the v-CMC supports modular transfer and updating of utility information across causal contexts and develop algorithms for causally structured utility elicitation and canonical influence-diagram construction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了价值因果马尔可夫条件（v-CMC），构建了连接因果性与效用的“因果价值理论”数学基础，并展示了其在贝尔曼递归推广、模块化效用迁移及因果结构效用 elicitation 等方面的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推断主要关注概率关系，缺乏对价值（效用）与因果关系之间系统联系的理论框架，需要建立一种将因果结构与价值评估统一起来的理论基础。
AI.method: 提出价值因果马尔可夫条件（v-CMC），建立概率-价值对偶性，定义v-分离概念并证明其完备性，推导出因果DAG上的广义贝尔曼递归。
AI.result: 证明了局部、全局和分解版本的v-CMC等价性；v-分离对条件价值独立性是可靠且完备的；贝尔曼递归作为v-CMC的特例被推广到因果DAG。
AI.conclusion: v-CMC为因果结构下的效用建模提供了理论基础，支持模块化效用迁移和因果结构化的效用 elicitation 算法。

title: Comparing Spectrogram Front-Ends for Abnormal Heart-Sound Detection with a Convolutional Neural Network
summary: Heart disease kills a lot of people, and one cheap way to catch it early is by listening to heart sounds with a stethoscope, or better yet, just recording them and running them through a model. This project is a binary classification task: take a short clip of someones heartbeat and decide if it sounds normal or abnormal. Instead of trying out a bunch of different models, we kept the CNN the same the whole time and just changed how we turned the raw audio into a picture for it to look at. We tried three ways of doing that: a regular logmel spectrogram, PCEN (which basically normalizes each frequency bin over time), and a multi resolution version that stacks a few different window sizes together. We ran all three on the PhysioNet 2016 heart-sound dataset with the exact same setup but same model, same optimizer, same random seed. Turns out all three do pretty well at catching abnormal cases (sensitivity around 0.95), but PCEN and multi-resolution both edge out the plain logmel on the official PhysioNet accuracy metric (0.915 and 0.916 vs. 0.910). We also ran Grad-CAM to see where the model was actually looking, and it mostly focused on the low frequencies where S1 and S2 heart sounds live, which is a good sign that it learned something real

AI.tldr: 研究了三种不同音频特征（logmel、PCEN、多分辨率）对CNN模型进行心音分类的影响，发现PCEN和多分辨率在PhysioNet 2016数据集上的性能略优于标准logmel，且Grad-CAM显示模型关注了有生理意义的低频区域。
AI.motivation: 心脏病致死率高，通过心音听诊进行早期筛查是一种低成本方法。作者希望探索不同的音频特征表示方式是否能提升模型对心音异常的分类性能，而无需改变模型架构本身。
AI.method: 固定CNN模型，对比三种音频特征（logmel谱图、PCEN归一化、多分辨率谱图堆叠）在二分类任务（正常/异常）上的表现。所有实验基于PhysioNet 2016数据集，保持模型、优化器、随机种子一致。使用Grad-CAM进行注意力可视化。
AI.result: 三种方法的敏感性均约0.95；PCEN（0.915）和多分辨率（0.916）在PhysioNet官方指标上优于标准logmel（0.910）。Grad-CAM显示模型主要关注包含S1和S2心音的较低频区域。
AI.conclusion: PCEN和多分辨率特征相比标准logmel能带来微小的性能提升，且模型学到了具有生理学意义的特征（关注心音关键频段），验证了特征工程在固定模型架构下仍有价值。

title: Optimal Market Making in Prediction Markets
summary: Prediction markets are attracting growing attention as trading volumes rise and their practical relevance increases. To ensure efficient price discovery, liquidity provision becomes ever more important. Due to the binary settlement structure in prediction markets, optimal market making leads to an optimization problem that is fundamentally different from the ones studied in classical settings. In this paper, we develop a stochastic control framework for prediction markets in which the market price is modeled as a conditional probability of the outcome that is generated by a transformed latent belief diffusion. A market maker selects bid and ask quotes to maximize expected terminal wealth while controlling both mark-to-market inventory risk and the settlement risk of remaining positions at resolution. We derive the associated Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman equation and characterize the unique optimal bid and ask quotes. By transforming the equation to the latent belief space and using a fixed-point argument, we prove existence and uniqueness of a classical solution and verify the resulting optimal quoting strategy. In addition, we provide a numerical analysis, which reveals how optimal liquidity provision in prediction markets depends on inventory, market beliefs, time to resolution, and risk aversion. Further, we demonstrate that the optimal quoting strategy substantially improves downside protection while preserving most of its expected profit relative to a myopic benchmark that maximizes the instantaneous expected mark-to-market profit.

AI.tldr: 本文针对预测市场的做市问题，提出了一个随机控制框架，将市场价格建模为潜在信念扩散的条件概率，推导出最优买卖报价，并通过数值分析展示了该策略在风险控制方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 随着预测市场交易量增长，流动性提供变得愈发重要。由于预测市场的二元结算结构，最优做市问题与经典设置截然不同，亟需专门的理论框架。
AI.method: 建立随机控制框架，将市场价格建模为潜在信念扩散的条件概率；推导HJB方程；通过变换到潜在信念空间并结合不动点论证，证明经典解的存在唯一性；进行数值分析。
AI.result: 推导出唯一最优买卖报价；证明了HJB方程经典解的存在唯一性并验证了最优策略；数值分析揭示了库存、市场信念、到期时间和风险厌恶对最优流动性的影响；最优策略在保留大部分期望利润的同时显著改善了下行风险保护。
AI.conclusion: 本文为预测市场的做市问题提供了严格的随机控制框架，所提出的最优报价策略在风险管理上优于短视基准策略。

title: History-Dependent Recursive Preferences in Markov Decision Processes
summary: In finite horizon dynamic programming with history-dependent preferences, the relevant state may be the entire realized history, even when the physical state is Markov. This paper develops a behavioral state-reduction theory for such Markov decision processes. Under behavioral axioms and a certainty-equivalent richness condition, the full-history problem admits a recursive representation composed of time and risk aggregators. We then derive a canonical preference-augmented (PA) state by quotienting histories that have the same current physical Markov state, are indifferent under every common continuation plan, and remain equivalent after every common one-step extension. This canonical PA state is minimal among reachable recursive factorizations of the underlying preferences. Under Markov feasibility and standard dynamic-programming regularity, a PA Bellman selector induces an optimal full-history policy. With additional rectangularity and exhaustiveness conditions, we reparameterize the preference memory into distinct belief and taste coordinates, and obtain a separated representation and Bellman recursion. We give a taxonomy of examples to illustrate the scope of our framework.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有历史依赖偏好的有限期动态规划问题，提出了一套行为状态约简理论，将全历史问题转化为由时间和风险聚合器组成的递归表示，并构造了规范的状态空间压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 在动态规划中，当决策者具有历史依赖偏好时，即使物理状态是马尔可夫的，相关状态也必须是整个历史。这导致状态空间呈指数级增长，亟需一种系统性的状态约简理论。
AI.method: 基于行为公理和确定性等价丰富条件，将全历史问题分解为时间聚合器和风险聚合器的递归表示。通过商掉在当前物理状态和所有延续计划下无差异的历史，构造规范偏好增广（PA）状态。进一步在矩形性和穷尽性条件下，将偏好记忆分解为信念和品味两个独立坐标。
AI.result: 证明了PA状态是可达递归分解中的最小状态；PA贝尔曼选择子能够诱导出最优全历史策略；在额外条件下获得分离式表示和贝尔曼递归。
AI.conclusion: 本文为历史依赖偏好下的动态规划问题提供了一套公理化、系统化的状态约简框架，并通过丰富的例子展示了其适用范围。

title: Compositional Synthetic Controls
summary: This paper develops a synthetic control estimator for compositional outcomes, vectors of shares generated by an underlying categorical process. Derived from a random utility model with interactive fixed effects on relative systematic utilities, the estimator maps compositions to log-odds, where the standard convex hull condition identifies the counterfactual as a convex combination of donor log-odds. Equivalently, it recovers the Fréchet barycenter under the Aitchison metric, the canonical geometry of the simplex (the non-linear space of shares) using a single set of weights across all categories. I also developed a placebo inference procedure based on the Aitchison distance. An application to Pennsylvania's electricity generation mix following the Alternative Energy Portfolio Standard uncovers a large and persistent compositional shift: natural gas exceeds its counterfactual by nearly 60 percentage points by 2022, while renewables lose relative ground.

AI.tldr: 本文针对组合结果（份额向量）开发了合成控制估计量，基于随机效用模型和交互固定效应，通过Aitchison几何将反事实识别为捐赠池对数的凸组合，并应用于宾夕法尼亚州电力结构，发现天然气份额相比反事实增加近60个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有合成控制方法大多处理标量或连续结果，但许多政策影响涉及份额/比例数据（如能源结构），这些数据位于单纯形这一非线性空间，标准欧氏方法不适用。
AI.method: 从随机效用模型出发，引入交互固定效应，将组合数据映射到对数优势比空间，在该线性空间中构建标准合成控制凸组合条件，等价于在Aitchison度量下寻找Fréchet重心。
AI.result: 应用至宾夕法尼亚州《替代能源组合标准》，发现天然气份额相比反事实由2010年至2022年增加近60个百分点，而可再生能源相对份额下降。
AI.conclusion: 所提估计量能在单纯形几何下有效估计政策对组合结果的因果效应，且Aitchison距离的安慰剂推断方法稳健；宾州案例表明政策实际推动了化石燃料内部的替代而非清洁能源转型。

title: Mean-field equilibrium price formation under single-default risk
summary: We study equilibrium price formation in an incomplete financial market with a large population of agents, where stock prices are subject to a single-default event. Agents are assumed to be heterogeneous in their risk aversion and terminal liabilities, and maximize exponential utility of terminal net wealth. We first characterize each agent's optimal strategy by a quadratic-growth backward stochastic differential equation (BSDE) driven by Brownian motions and a compensated default martingale. We then formulate the market-clearing condition in terms of aggregate optimal demand and derive a mean-field quadratic-growth BSDE for the equilibrium risk premium. The resulting characterization quantifies how default intensity, jump size, and agent heterogeneity jointly shape the default-risk component of equilibrium security risk premia. Under a Markovian factor model, we establish short-time solvability of the mean-field BSDE through a fixed-point argument based on estimates for a coupled semilinear PDE system. Finally, we show that the risk premium characterized by the mean-field BSDE asymptotically clears the market as the population size tends to infinity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究不完全金融市场中，在单一违约事件冲击下，异质性投资者的均衡价格形成机制，通过均值场二次增长BSDE刻画均衡风险溢价，并证明其渐近市场出清性质。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少同时考虑违约风险、投资者异质性（风险厌恶异质、终端负债异质）以及市场不完全性对均衡价格形成的综合影响。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，量化违约强度、跳跃规模与投资者异质性如何共同决定均衡风险溢价中的违约风险成分。
AI.method: 1. 建立每个投资者的最优策略问题，由带布朗运动和补偿违约鞅的二次增长BSDE刻画；2. 通过加总最优需求形成市场出清条件，导出均值场二次增长BSDE刻画均衡风险溢价；3. 在马尔可夫因子模型下，利用耦合半线性PDE系统的估计进行不动点论证，建立短期可解性；4. 证明均值场BSDE刻画的风险溢价在人口规模趋于无穷时渐近出清市场。
AI.result: 成功推导出违约强度、跳跃规模与投资者异质性共同决定均衡风险溢价的量化关系；在马尔可夫因子模型下建立了均值场BSDE的短期可解性；证明了所刻画的风险溢价在大规模市场中渐近实现市场出清。
AI.conclusion: 本文为违约风险和不完全市场下的资产定价提供了严格的均值场理论框架，揭示了违约风险溢价的结构性决定因素，并验证了该均衡概念在大人口极限下的合理性。

title: Fully-sensorized smart-eyewear platform for on-device Machine Learning
comment: This work was carried out in the EssilorLuxottica "Smart Eyewear Lab", a Joint Research Center between EssilorLuxottica and Politecnico di Milano
summary: This paper presents ARGO, a smart eyewear platform designed to bridge ergonomic comfort, high computational throughput, and energy efficiency. Unlike cloud-dependent solutions, ARGO leverages the STM32N6 microcontroller and its integrated Neural Processing Unit (NPU) to enable on-device machine learning, minimizing latency and preserving user privacy through local data processing. The primary contribution lies in the holistic co-design of hardware, firmware, and artificial intelligence, centered on the deployment of an optimized YOLOv11 model for real-time urban obstacle recognition. To ensure compatibility with the target NPU, we introduce Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA), an architectural refinement that enables efficient accelerator execution while preserving the original computational logic. The model is trained on the Walking On The Road (WOTR) dataset, and the final deployed configuration achieves an mAP50-95 of 24 under strict memory constraints, with a memory footprint of only 2.483 MB. The platform integrates a multimodal sensor suite, RGB cameras, Time-of-Flight sensors, microphones, and ambient sensors, and delivers 10 FPS at a continuous autonomy of ~113 minutes on a 200 mAh battery. These results demonstrate the feasibility of a high-performance, privacy-preserving, and socially acceptable assistive device, and highlight how competitive edge AI solutions increasingly demand tightly integrated, multidisciplinary co-design approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARGO智能眼镜平台，基于STM32N6微控制器和集成NPU，通过硬件-固件-AI协同设计，部署优化后的YOLOv11模型（引入Head-wise Parallel Attention）实现实时城市障碍物识别，在2.483MB内存占用下达到mAP50-95为24，10 FPS帧率，200mAh电池续航约113分钟，兼顾高性能、隐私保护和社交可接受性。
AI.motivation: 现有智能眼镜方案多依赖云端处理，存在延迟高、隐私风险大、能效与舒适性难以兼顾的问题。作者希望通过端侧AI推理和软硬件协同设计，打造一款高性能、隐私保护且社交可接受的辅助设备。
AI.method: 1) 硬件层面：采用STM32N6微控制器+集成NPU，结合RGB相机、ToF传感器、麦克风等多模态传感器套件；2) 算法层面：部署优化后的YOLOv11模型，并提出Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA)架构改进，使注意力机制适配NPU高效执行；3) 训练数据：使用Walking On The Road (WOTR)数据集进行模型训练；4) 系统层面：硬件、固件与AI的协同设计（co-design）。
AI.result: 模型内存占用仅2.483 MB，mAP50-95达到24；系统运行帧率10 FPS；200mAh电池下连续续航约113分钟。
AI.conclusion: ARGO证明了在不依赖云端的情况下，通过端侧AI和软硬件深度协同设计，可以实现高性能、隐私保护且社交可接受的智能辅助穿戴设备。竞争性边缘AI解决方案越来越需要跨学科的紧密集成设计。

title: Committed Before Reasoning: Behavioral Reproduction and Preliminary Activation-Level Evidence of Answer Pre-Commitment in an Open-Weight LLM
comment: 8 pages. Code, data, and all reported statistics: https://github.com/JO-HEEJIN/interview_mate/tree/docs/car-wash-repro/car_wash/paper_4
summary: Chat models sometimes commit to an answer and then produce reasoning that justifies it rather than deriving it -- even when the answer contradicts a task premise. We study a minimal probe: "I want to wash my car. The car wash is 100 meters away. Should I walk or drive?" Only drive works (the car must be at the car wash), yet models overwhelmingly recommend walking. (1) Behavioral reproduction: on Qwen3-8B across five system-prompt conditions (210 rollouts), the wrong commitment occurs in 85-100% of sampled rollouts per condition and 100% of greedy rollouts, in both thinking and non-thinking modes; a 4,096-token thinking budget does not repair it. (2) Preliminary activation-level evidence: probing hidden states with a pretrained, training-free activation oracle (no task-specific probe training) at positions before the answer text is emitted, "walk" read-outs exceed a neutral-context baseline (68% vs. 17%; walk-committing rollouts p=.005, drive-committing rollouts p=.005, Fisher exact) -- notably, rollouts that eventually answer drive also read as walk-leaning before commitment (5/6). The oracle's default on unrelated content is "drive" (83%), so the read-outs are not lexical bias; stratifying by literal walk/drive occurrence shows they are not text recovery either (spans containing "drive" still read out walk; in balanced lexical fields, per-rollout walk-majorities beat a per-prompt neutral baseline 15/22 vs. 1/8, p=.01; drive-committing rollouts 6/6, p=.002). Samples are small and the within-rollout positional gradient is not significant (p=.34); we frame these results as preliminary. (3) Methodological: with fixed oracle, activations, and positions, question wording alone moves a positive control from 2/16 (open question) to 11/16 (closed); negative oracle results are uninterpretable without per-wording positive controls.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了聊天模型在推理中先入为主地承诺错误答案的问题。以“洗车应步行还是开车”为探针（只有开车合理），发现模型在85-100%的采样中错误承诺步行，即使在4,096 token思考预算下也无法修复。激活层面的初步证据显示，模型在输出正确答案前已表现出步行倾向。方法论上强调测试需配合正控制。
AI.motivation: 揭示聊天模型在推理过程中的一种系统性缺陷：模型先承诺一个答案，再用推理去合理化它，而不是从前提推导出答案。这种"事后合理化"行为削弱了模型推理的可信度。
AI.method: 设计一个最小探针任务（洗车应步行还是开车），在Qwen3-8B上跨5种系统提示条件进行210次rollout。同时在激活层使用预训练的无训练激活Oracle探测隐藏状态，在答案文本输出前的位置读取模型倾向。
AI.result: (1) 行为上：模型在85-100%的采样rollout和100%的贪心rollout中错误承诺步行，4,096 token思考预算无效；(2) 激活层面：在输出答案前，即使是最终回答"开车"的rollout也表现出步行倾向（5/6），且该偏差非词汇偏差或文本恢复所致；(3) 方法论：问题措辞从开放式改为封闭式可将正控制从2/16提升到11/16。
AI.conclusion: 模型存在先承诺后推理的系统性缺陷；激活层面的初步证据支持承诺先于推理发生的假设；研究同时指出未来类似测试必须包含正控制以确保结论可解释。

title: Distributed Adaptive Estimation of Unknown Nonlinear Systems without Input Sharing
comment: This is an extended version of the paper accepted for publication in ASME Letters in Dynamic Systems and Control
summary: This paper studies distributed adaptive state estimation for discrete-time nonlinear systems with unknown source dynamics over directed communication networks. Each sensing agent estimates the source state using only local measurements and information exchanged with neighboring agents, enabling a fully distributed implementation without requiring shared excitation or control inputs. A normalized adaptive estimation scheme is proposed to identify unknown linear and nonlinear dynamics while ensuring robust discrete-time adaptation. A Lyapunov-based analysis establishes input-to-state stability (ISS) of the estimation error dynamics, guaranteeing bounded adaptive parameters under bounded disturbances and asymptotic convergence of the estimation errors in the disturbance-free case under suitable conditions. To characterize the network-induced coupling, explicit norm-based and LMI-based Schur stability conditions are developed for the coupling operator, including a robust formulation accounting for bounded model uncertainty. Numerical simulations on star, cyclic, and path communication topologies demonstrate accurate distributed state estimation and validate the proposed stability conditions. Computational results further show that the proposed estimator scales efficiently with the network size.

AI.tldr: 本文针对有向通信网络下的离散时间非线性系统，提出了一种分布式自适应状态估计方法。每个感知代理仅利用本地测量和邻居信息，无需共享激励或控制输入即可估计源状态。通过归一化自适应估计方案识别未知线性和非线性动力学，并基于Lyapunov方法证明了估计误差动态的输入-状态稳定性（ISS）。为描述网络耦合效应，推导了基于范数和LMI的Schur稳定性条件，并考虑了模型不确定性。在星型、循环型和路径型拓扑上的仿真验证了方法的准确性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式状态估计研究多面向线性系统或需共享激励/控制输入，缺乏对具有未知动力学和非线性的离散时间系统的普适方法。本文旨在填补这一空白，实现无需全局信息的完全分布式自适应估计。
AI.method: 1）设计归一化自适应估计方案，联合估计未知线性与非线性动态；2）采用Lyapunov方法推导ISS稳定性条件；3）提出显式范数条件与LMI条件确保耦合算子Schur稳定，并引入鲁棒范数条件处理模型不确定性。
AI.result: 在星型、循环型和路径型三种通信拓扑下，所提方法均能准确估计源状态。网络规模扩展性测试表明计算效率随代理数增长保持良好。稳定性条件在数值上得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式自适应估计器能有效处理有向网络下离散时间非线性系统的状态估计问题，具有鲁棒性、可扩展性和无需全局信息的优势，为实际分布式感知系统提供了理论支撑。

title: Some Large Language Models Exhibit Consistent Risk Attitudes
summary: As artificial intelligence systems are deployed in open-ended, high-stakes settings, a critical dimension remains unmeasured: how perceived risk is translated into action. We test whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic and consistent risk attitudes under uncertainty. We introduce a cross-domain framework that decouples contextual risk belief from categorical decision, and apply it to six representative LLMs and 100 human participants across spatial navigation, clinical triage, and financial allocation tasks. Using regression models, we extract each agents belief-to-decision mapping and quantify risk sensitivity and risk attitude bias. We find that most tested LLMs exhibit (i) robust intra-task consistency, indicating stable mappings from contextual belief to risk decision within a fixed task domain; (ii) cross-domain rank-order stability, preserving relative risk posture across tasks; and (iii) a convergence toward a restricted risk-attitude distribution relative to the broader human baseline. These results reveal risk attitude as a stable and previously uncharacterized dimension of LLM behavior, establishing a foundation for evaluating and aligning AI systems in open-ended decision-making and motivating further investigation into the origins of these intrinsic behavioral dispositions.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过空间导航、临床分诊和金融分配三项任务，测试了六个大语言模型(LLMs)和100名人类参与者的风险态度，发现LLMs表现出稳定的任务内一致性、跨域排名稳定性和相对于人类更受限的风险态度分布，揭示了风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定但此前未被充分研究的维度。
AI.motivation: AI系统在开放式、高风险场景中部署时，其如何将感知到的风险转化为实际行动这一关键维度尚未被衡量，作者旨在测试LLM是否表现出系统且一致的风险态度。
AI.method: 提出了跨领域框架，将上下文风险信念与分类决策解耦；对六个代表性LLM和100名人类参与者在空间导航、临床分诊和金融分配三项任务中进行测试；使用回归模型提取每个智能体的信念-决策映射，量化风险敏感性和风险态度偏差。
AI.result: 大多数LLM表现出：(i) 稳健的任务内一致性；(ii) 跨域排名顺序稳定性；(iii) 相对于人类基线，风险态度分布收敛至更受限的范围。
AI.conclusion: 风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定且此前未被表征的维度，为评估和对齐开放式决策中的AI系统建立了基础，并激励进一步研究这些内在行为倾向的起源。

title: Semi-Supervised Conditional Generative Learning through Stochastic Interpolation and Sufficient Representations
summary: Conditional generative modeling remains a challenging problem in semi-supervised settings where labeled data is scarce but unlabeled samples are abundant. To effectively leverage structural information embedded within the unlabeled dataset and compensate for sparse conditioning signals, we propose a semi-supervised framework combining conditional stochastic interpolation with low-dimensional latent representations. RepG decomposes generation into two stages: label-dependent latent sampling and high-dimensional reconstruction. This isolates the supervised learning of conditional dependencies to a low-dimensional space, requiring few labels while utilizing the abundant unlabeled data purely for reconstruction. Theoretically, we establish an error decomposition showing that the Kullback-Leibler divergence of RepG comprises stage-wise estimation errors and a structural bias quantified by conditional mutual information. For deep neural network estimators, we derive non-asymptotic convergence rates proving that RepG significantly improves sample complexity. By confining the supervised estimation burden to the low intrinsic dimension of the latent representation, RepG achieves a strictly faster convergence rate. Complemented by a minimax lower bound, our theoretical results demonstrate that this method effectively mitigates the curse of dimensionality inherent in direct ambient-space generative modeling.

AI.tldr: RepG提出了一种半监督条件生成框架，将生成过程分解为标签相关的低维潜在采样和高维重建两个阶段，通过将监督学习限制在低维空间来有效利用少量标签和大量无标签数据，并理论上证明了该方法能显著提升样本效率、缓解维度灾难。
AI.motivation: 在半监督条件下，标签数据稀缺但无标签样本丰富，传统的条件生成模型难以有效利用无标签数据中的结构信息来弥补稀疏的条件信号。现有方法在高维空间中直接进行条件生成面临维度灾难和样本复杂度高的困境。
AI.method: RepG将生成过程分解为两个阶段：(1) 标签相关的低维潜在空间采样；(2) 高维空间重建。监督学习仅限于低维潜在空间的条件依赖学习，而大量无标签数据仅用于重建阶段。理论分析通过KL散度的误差分解，证明该方法具有更快的非渐近收敛率和更优的样本复杂度。
AI.result: 推导了深度神经网络估计器的非渐近收敛率，证明RepG显著改善了样本复杂度；通过将监督估计限制在潜在表示的低本征维度上，实现了严格更快的收敛速率；并提供了极小化下界作为理论互补。
AI.conclusion: RepG通过解耦条件学习与重建过程，有效缓解了高维条件生成中的维度灾难问题，为半监督条件下的生成建模提供了一种理论上可控且实际有效的新范式。

title: Students' Perceptions of Peer Grading
comment: Expanded author version of a paper accepted for presentation at the European Conference on Technology Enhanced Learning (ECTEL 2026)
summary: Peer grading is widely used in education, yet it elicits mixed reactions from educators and students. Although many studies have examined students' views of peer grading, their findings are scattered, and no clear overall picture has emerged. To address this gap, we conducted a mixed-source thematic analysis of literature and student discussions on Reddit. To scale the Reddit data analysis, we fine-tuned a Gemini 2.5 text-classification model and used it as an initial relevance filter for our initially retrieved dataset of 659 posts and 6,607 comments, after which the items predicted as relevant were manually reviewed. The study synthesized evidence from 107 papers, 114 Reddit posts, and 300 comments. The findings show that students view peer grading as both beneficial and problematic. Positive perceptions included learning and understanding benefits, skill development, engagement, and collaboration, while negative perceptions centered on unreliable grading, unfairness, weak feedback quality, emotional stress, and workload. Reddit discussions also suggested an emerging concern that remains underexplored in the literature: AI use in peer grading may weaken students' trust in the accuracy and authenticity of the process. We further identified eight mitigation strategies and mapped them to the negative perceptions they help address. Among these, instructor oversight and training played the most central role.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对107篇论文、114个Reddit帖子和300条评论的混合来源主题分析，系统梳理了学生对同行评分的看法。研究发现同行评分既有学习提升、技能发展等积极面，也有评分不公、情感压力等消极面，并揭示了AI使用可能削弱信任这一新问题，同时提出了八项缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 同行评分在教育中被广泛应用，但学生对其看法存在分歧且相关研究成果分散，缺乏整体图景。作者旨在系统整合来自学术文献和社交平台（Reddit）的多种来源证据，填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用混合来源主题分析法，结合107篇学术论文与Reddit平台学生讨论数据。为处理大规模Reddit数据，作者微调了Gemini 2.5文本分类模型作为初始相关性过滤器，从659个帖子和6,607条评论中筛选出114个帖子及300条评论进行人工审查。
AI.result: 积极感知：学习理解提升、技能发展、参与感和协作；消极感知：评分不可靠、不公平、反馈质量差、情绪压力和工作量大。Reddit讨论还发现AI使用可能削弱学生对同行评分准确性和真实性的信任，这一议题在文献中尚缺乏探索。最终识别出八项缓解策略，其中教师监督与培训作用最为关键。
AI.conclusion: 学生对同行评分的看法具有双重性，需平衡其益处与问题。教师监督和培训是缓解负面感知的核心策略，而AI对同行评分信任的影响是值得未来深入研究的全新方向。

title: Near-Optimal Lower Bounds for Exact Zeroth-Order Convex Optimization
summary: The fundamental oracle limits of exact function value access remain poorly understood in zeroth-order optimization: even for canonical convex problems, the optimal joint dependence on dimension $d$ and accuracy $ε$ has remained unresolved. We resolve this question for arbitrary adaptive randomized algorithms minimizing nonsmooth $L_0$-Lipschitz convex functions over the $d$-dimensional Euclidean unit ball, where each query returns only the exact scalar value $f(\mathbf x)$ of a fixed objective. With universal $L_0>0$, let $T_ε$ denote the minimum number of queries required to return an $ε$-suboptimal point with probability at least $1/2$, uniformly over the function class. We prove that $$ T_ε\ge c\, \frac{ d\min\{d,ε^{-2}\} }{ \log\!\bigl(e\min\{d,ε^{-2}\}\bigr) }, $$ for all $d\ge d_0$ and $0<ε\leε_0$, for universal constants $c,ε_0>0$ and $d_0\in\mathbb N$. In the low-accuracy regime $ε\ge d^{-1/2}$, this matches the $O(dε^{-2})$ two-point exact value upper bound up to a logarithmic factor. In the high-accuracy regime $ε\le d^{-1/2}$, the lower bound saturates at $Ω(d^2/\log(ed))$, independently of $ε$, matching the $\widetilde O(d^2)$ evaluation oracle upper bound up to polylogarithmic factors. The proof uses a random support function hard family and develops a posterior mean energy method for adaptive exact max observations, in place of first-order zero chain constructions and noise based transcript inequalities.

AI.tldr: 本文解决了零阶优化中精确函数值访问的oracle极限问题，对于非光滑L0-Lipschitz凸函数，建立了查询复杂度下界：低精度区域为Ω(dε^{-2}/log(e d))，高精度区域为Ω(d²/log(ed))，分别匹配已知上界至多对数因子。
AI.motivation: 零阶优化中精确函数值访问的基础oracle极限长期以来未被充分理解，即使是典型凸问题，维度d与精度ε的最优联合依赖关系仍未解决。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
