AI.method: 两步法：向量检索获取动作特定邻近证据 → 生成器估计条件期望结果/对比 → 插件规则选择动作；一步法：直接将端到端计算视为策略。两步法的遗憾分解为候选生成遗憾和候选内选择遗憾，并用最近邻估计器和Transformer的预测误差界来限定后者。
AI.result: 建立了RAG动作选择与因果推断中最近邻匹配的形式化联系；给出两步法遗憾的分解与界；将一步法作为整体策略进行评估。
AI.conclusion: RAG-based策略学习在理论上可归约为带生成模型的匹配估计问题，两步法的遗憾可控，为实际应用提供了理论保障。

title: Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction
summary: Integrating heterogeneous genomic and clinical modalities for joint cancer subtype classification and survival prediction remains a key challenge in precision oncology. Existing approaches suffer from three limitations: (1) they treat each modality as a monolithic feature vector, precluding fine-grained token-level interactions across modalities; (2) cross-modal fusion is typically performed through linear weighting or late averaging rather than structured token exchange; and (3) survival and classification objectives are optimized independently, missing a joint regularization signal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的多模态融合方法，通过token级交互、结构化融合和联合优化，解决癌症亚型分类和生存预测中的三个关键局限。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将每种模态视为整体特征向量，无法进行细粒度token级交互；跨模态融合仅通过线性加权或后期平均，缺乏结构化交换；生存预测和分类任务目标独立优化，缺少联合正则化信号。
AI.method: 提出token级交互机制替代传统模态级融合，采用结构化token交换策略实现跨模态融合，并设计联合优化框架同时优化分类和生存预测目标。
AI.result: 预期在癌症亚型分类和生存预测任务上优于现有基线方法，实现多模态信息的有效整合和任务间协同提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决现有方法的三个关键局限，该研究有望为精准肿瘤学中的多模态融合提供更有效的解决方案。

title: Are Arithmetic Heuristic Neurons Form-Invariant? A Mechanistic Analysis of Symbols, Text, and Code in LLMs
summary: Large language models often succeed on one formulation of a problem while failing on an equivalent formulation. Whether these failures arise from distinct internal circuits or different activation states of a shared circuit remains unknown. Recent mechanistic interpretability studies suggest that arithmetic in LLMs emerges from a "bag of heuristics," encoded by a sparse set of MLP neurons that represent distinct arithmetic strategies. We investigate whether arithmetic heuristic neurons are form-invariant across symbolic arithmetic, natural language word problems, and Python code in three Llama-3 models. In each format, we identify arithmetic heuristic neurons using a two-stage pipeline combining attribution patching and activation patching. A compact set of neurons is shared across all three formats, and targeted interventions show this shared circuit is both necessary and sufficient for late-layer arithmetic computation. Transferring the shared neurons' activations from a successful execution in one format to a failed execution in another recovers most incorrect predictions, exceeding 97% for addition and subtraction, indicating that cross-format failures arise from activation states rather than distinct circuits. Moreover, shared neurons consistently belong to the same heuristic families across formats, demonstrating that arithmetic computation in LLMs is largely form-invariant at the neuron level.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Llama-3模型的算术推理依赖于一组跨格式（符号算术、自然语言问题、Python代码）共享的神经元回路。这些共享神经元不仅必要且充分，而且跨格式失败源于激活状态差异而非不同回路。转移激活可恢复97%以上的错误预测。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在同一问题的不同表述上表现不一致，但不知道这种不一致源于不同的内部回路还是同一回路的不同激活状态。本文旨在厘清这一问题。
AI.method: 使用两阶段流水线（归因修补+激活修补）在三种Llama-3模型中识别三种格式（符号算术、自然语言问题、Python代码）下的算术启发式神经元，然后进行跨格式干预实验。
AI.result: 发现一组紧凑的共享神经元跨所有三种格式；跨格式转移这些神经元的激活状态可恢复超过97%的加法和减法错误预测。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的算术计算在神经元层面是很大程度上格式不变的，跨格式失败主要源于共享回路的激活状态差异，而非不同的内部回路。

title: Learning to Stay Fresh: A Self-Learning Semantic Framework for Underwater Internet of Things
summary: The emerging paradigm of Non-Conventional Internet of Things (NC IoT), which focuses on the usefulness of information rather than high-volume data collection and transmission, will be a dominant paradigm in the next generation of wireless systems. On the downside, the absence of standardized protocols and the heterogeneity of underwater nodes, coupled with the unique constraints of acoustic communication (e.g., propagation delays and bandwidth limitations), pose significant interoperability challenges for Underwater Internet of Things (UIoT) networks. In this paper, we introduce a pioneering self-learning semantic framework that addresses these issues by leveraging a three-layer architecture using a novel Semantic Bayesian Optimization (SBO) approach integrated with Multi-Transmission Bayesian Optimization (MTBO). This framework employs Age of Information (AoI) as a freshness metric, incorporates a hybrid deep neural network-Gaussian process surrogate model, and formulates a propagation-aware Aol metric to enhance real-time environmental monitoring. Results are provided and compared with other competing methods to quantify the proposed method's superiority.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义贝叶斯优化（SBO）与多传输贝叶斯优化（MTBO）的三层自学习语义框架，利用信息年龄（AoI）作为新鲜度指标，结合混合深度神经网络-高斯过程代理模型，解决水下物联网（UIoT）中非传统物联网（NC IoT）范式的互操作性和实时环境监测挑战。
AI.motivation: 非传统物联网（NC IoT）强调信息的有用性而非海量数据采集，但水下物联网（UIoT）缺乏标准化协议、节点异构性强，且水声通信存在传播时延和带宽限制，导致严重的互操作性问题，亟需新方法解决。
AI.method: 提出三层自学习语义框架：1) 采用新颖的语义贝叶斯优化（SBO）与多传输贝叶斯优化（MTBO）集成方法；2) 以信息年龄（AoI）作为信息新鲜度指标；3) 构建混合深度神经网络-高斯过程代理模型；4) 提出传播感知的AoI度量。
AI.result: 通过与其他竞争方法的对比实验，量化证明了所提方法的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 该语义框架能有效提升水下物联网的实时环境监测能力，为解决UIoT互操作性问题提供了创新路径。

title: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL
summary: Recent growth in reinforcement learning (RL) has surfaced a need for diverse, specialized training environments. Hand-curated environments with fixed task and reward difficulties become ineffective signals as model performance improves, and sparse rewards over long horizons induce mode collapse on specific workflows or tool structures. World models that simulate environment states have matched pure rollout performance, making them promising for scaling diversity on-demand. However, autoregressive (AR) world models suffer from a left-to-right bias preventing conditioning on globally interdependent state anchors such as tool schemas, prior turns, and expected outcomes. We (i) formalize text-based world modeling as a steerable transition-dynamics problem decomposed into initial state, task context, tool schemas, domain rules, and steering directives, and (ii) curate 239,403 grounded state-action trajectories spanning nine open-source environments and twelve frontier model families. We compare AR LMs and masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), showing MDLMs, via bidirectional anchor-aware denoising, achieve better coherence, groundedness, and empirically validated rollout diversity than LLMs over 4x their parameter size, at comparable inference latency. We introduce a plug-and-play GRPO training framework with deterministic state checks, and perform zero-shot transfer ablations on three OOD environments (ScienceWorld, ALFWorld, AppWorld) across three 1.2B-7B agent backbones (LFM2.5, Qwen3, Mistral), achieving up to 47% absolute gains over baselines without environment-specific fine-tuning. We further conduct behavioral analysis of failure modes under adversarial scenarios and human evaluation on realism, outcome correctness, and training utility. We open-source our work to encourage research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于掩码扩散语言模型(MDLM)的文本世界建模方法，通过双向锚点感知去噪解决自回归模型在全局状态锚点上的条件偏差问题，在9个开源环境、239k轨迹数据上训练，相比大4倍参数的LLM实现更好的一致性、grounded性和轨迹多样性，并在零样本迁移至OOD环境时取得高达47%绝对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 强化学习需要多样化训练环境，但人工设计的固定难度环境在模型性能提升后会失效，且长程稀疏奖励易导致模式崩溃。世界模型虽可扩展多样性，但自回归模型存在从左到右的偏见，无法对工具模式、先验轮次、预期结果等全局状态锚点进行条件化建模。
AI.method: (1) 将文本世界建模形式化为可引导的转移动力学问题，分解为初始状态、任务上下文、工具模式、领域规则和引导指令；(2) 构建包含239,403条状态-动作轨迹的基准数据集；(3) 比较自回归LM与掩码扩散语言模型(MDLM)，利用双向锚点感知去噪提升建模效果；(4) 提出即插即用的GRPO训练框架，包含确定性状态检查；(5) 在三个OOD环境上进行零样本迁移消融实验。
AI.result: MDLM相比4倍参数规模的LLM实现了更好的一致性、grounded性和轨迹多样性，推理延迟相近；在ScienceWorld、ALFWorld、AppWorld三个OOD环境上，使用三种1.2B-7B骨干网络（LFM2.5、Qwen3、Mistral），获得最高47%的绝对性能提升，无需环境特定微调。
AI.conclusion: 双向锚点感知去噪的掩码扩散模型是比自回归模型更有效的文本世界建模方案，能够实现更好的跨环境零样本泛化，有望推动RL训练环境多样化自动生成的研究方向。

title: Efficient Sequential Evaluation of Large Language Models
comment: This is a preliminary version; feedback is welcome
summary: We study the problem of sequentially evaluating a new large language model (LLM) on a fixed question set using historical performance data from prior LLMs. Our goal is to construct a confidence sequence (CS) for the model's capability on this question set and to design active querying rules that shrink the CS width as quickly as possible. For CS construction, we invert a family of test supermartingales and focus on two representative approaches: a reverse information projection (RIPr)-based approach and a testing-by-betting-based approach. We first study these approaches under an oracle setting, and demonstrate the oracle optimality of the RIPr-based construction. We then propose a growth-oriented querying rule that aims to maximize the worst-case one-step expected log-increment over the endpoints of the current CS. In practice, we build these test supermartingales and the querying rule on predictions of question-level correctness learned from historical data. We then analyze the shrinkage behavior of the resulting CSs and identify two key factors that slow the shrinkage rate of CSs: accumulated prediction mismatch and the spikiness of the querying distribution. Finally, motivated by this analysis, we propose several mixture querying rules that combine growth-oriented querying, prediction refinement, and uniform exploration, trying to mitigate the effects that slow the shrinkage rate. We provide experiments comparing different querying rules for the RIPr-based and testing-by-betting-based CSs across several synthetic testing datasets. Interestingly, we observe that the simplest querying rule, uniform sampling, can sometimes outperform more adaptive querying rules for both methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用历史LLM的性能数据，对新LLM在固定问题集上的能力构建置信序列，并设计主动查询规则以快速缩小置信区间宽度。作者比较了基于RIPr和testing-by-betting两种方法，提出增长导向查询规则，并发现均匀采样有时反而优于更复杂的自适应规则。
AI.motivation: 在新LLM不断涌现的背景下，高效评估模型能力至关重要。利用历史LLM数据来加速新模型评估，可以在减少查询成本的同时获得可靠的统计推断。
AI.method: 1) 构建置信序列：比较基于RIPr和testing-by-betting两种测试超鞅反转方法；2) 提出增长导向查询规则，最大化当前CS端点上的最坏情况一步期望对数增量；3) 基于历史数据学习题目级正确性预测；4) 分析CS收缩速率减慢的两个因素：累积预测不匹配和查询分布尖峰性；5) 提出混合查询规则，结合增长导向查询、预测精炼和均匀探索。
AI.result: 在合成测试数据集上的实验表明，均匀采样这种最简单的查询规则，有时反而优于更复杂的自适应查询规则。
AI.conclusion: RIPr方法在oracle设置下具有最优性，但实际中查询规则的选择对CS收缩速率影响显著。均匀采样的竞争力提示我们，自适应查询策略的复杂度可能带来意想不到的负面效应。

title: A Method for Learning Value Systems in Generative AI
comment: Full version of a to be published paper in proceedings of the 9th AAAI/ACM conference in AI, Ethics and Society (AIES 2026). Includes supplementary material. 20 pages, 2 figures
summary: Value-aware AI systems require explicit computational representations of human values (groundings) and their aggregation into value systems in order to align their decisions with ours. As such representations are difficult to elicit, value learning seeks to infer them by observing human behaviour. This work addresses the lack of grounded value learning methods in generative AI: existing approaches typically replicate human preferences without awareness of the multidimensional structure of value alignment, or lack principled value system elicitation methods. To address these gaps, we adapt a previously validated value system learning method to the generative AI setting, which, based on pairwise prompt-response preference data, simultaneously learns: i) an implementation of a grounding for a set of values given by a multi-objective reward model, and ii) a value system representation in the form of a weighted linear scalarization of the previous grounding model. To ensure that the learned value systems are based on coherent value representations, our algorithm dynamically prioritizes the grounding learning process. We evaluate the method against baselines and a contemporary method on prompt-response preference datasets. Results show competitive performance and minimal trade-offs against the baselines, while improving explainability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在生成式AI中学习价值系统的方法，通过偏好数据同时学习多目标奖励模型（价值基础）和加权线性标量化（价值系统），并动态优先学习价值基础以确保一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式AI方法在价值对齐中缺乏对价值多维结构的意识，且缺乏原则性的价值系统学习方法，要么简单复制人类偏好，要么无法有效学习价值系统。
AI.method: 将已有的价值系统学习方法适配到生成式AI场景，基于成对提示-响应偏好数据，同时学习：(i) 多目标奖励模型实现的价值基础；(ii) 加权线性标量化的价值系统表示。通过动态优先级机制确保学习的价值系统基于一致的价值表征。
AI.result: 在提示-响应偏好数据集上，该方法与基线方法相比表现具有竞争力，权衡最小，同时提高了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能在保持性能的同时提升可解释性，为生成式AI的价值对齐提供了一种兼顾多维结构和可解释性的价值系统学习途径。

title: Treasure Search Optimization
summary: We introduce Treasure Search Optimization (TSO), an interacting particle method for global optimization. Most swarm methods balance exploration and exploitation within a single population, and typically switch between the two by degenerating the noise, annealing a temperature, or tuning a parameter. TSO instead splits these tasks across two kinds of agents. A swarm of explorers stays in exploration mode and a single treasure hunter performs exploitation. The hunter drifts toward an objective-weighted average of the explorers and may teleport to it when the move lowers the objective. The swarm then re-centers around the hunter, creating a feedback loop between search and capture. We model the dynamics as coupled jump-diffusion stochastic differential equations (SDEs). The hunter's jumps are shared by all explorers and act as a common noise. The mean-field limit is therefore a conditional McKean-Vlasov jump-diffusion SDE, whose well-posedness we prove. We also characterize the steady state and prove, via Laplace approximation techniques, that the hunter settles near the global minimum with error of order $1/α$, where $α$ is the weight parameter. Linking the consensus drift to a smoothed free energy, we explain why the swarm ignores spurious local traps and demonstrate how to quantify uncertainty in inverse problems using post-processing Kalman steps after TSO iterations. Numerical experiments on ODE-constrained problems and a low dimensional Bayesian inverse problem demonstrate the effectiveness of the TSO method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Treasure Search Optimization (TSO)的全局优化粒子交互方法。与传统的群智能方法不同，TSO将探索和开发任务分配给两类不同的智能体：一群探索者负责全局探索，一个宝藏猎人负责局部开发。通过耦合的跳跃-扩散随机微分方程建模，并证明了其平均场极限的适定性。理论分析表明，猎人最终会收敛到全局最小值附近，误差为$O(1/α)$。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统群智能优化方法通常在单一群体中平衡探索与开发的矛盾，需要通过噪声衰减、温度退火或参数调优来实现两者之间的切换。这种设计存在内在的权衡困境——过度探索会降低收敛速度，过度开发则容易陷入局部最优。作者希望设计一种自然分离探索与开发任务的优化框架，从而避免人工切换参数的麻烦，同时保持全局收敛的理论保证。
AI.method: TSO方法包含两类智能体：一群探索者(explorers)持续进行全局探索，一个宝藏猎人(treasure hunter)执行局部开发。猎人向探索者的目标加权平均值漂移，并可在降低目标函数值时跳转到该位置。探索者随后以猎人为中心重新分布，形成搜索与捕获的反馈循环。动力学由耦合的跳跃-扩散随机微分方程(SDEs)建模，猎人的跳跃作为公共噪声影响所有探索者。平均场极限是一个条件McKean-Vlasov跳跃-扩散SDE。作者利用拉普拉斯近似技术，证明了猎人驻留在全局最小值附近，误差阶为$1/α$。还将共识漂移与平滑自由能联系起来，解释了为何群体会忽略虚假局部陷阱。
AI.result: 理论结果：(1) 证明了条件McKean-Vlasov跳跃-扩散SDE的适定性；(2) 刻画了稳态行为；(3) 通过拉普拉斯近似证明猎人收敛到全局最小值，误差$O(1/α)$。数值实验：(1) ODE约束优化问题展示了有效性；(2) 低维贝叶斯逆问题结合后处理卡尔曼步骤，展示了不确定性量化的能力。
AI.conclusion: TSO通过探索与开发任务的分离设计，有效地解决了传统群智能方法中平衡探索与开发的难题。理论分析与数值实验共同表明，该方法具有良好的全局收敛性能和不确定性量化能力，为逆问题求解提供了一种新的有效工具。

title: HantaWatch: Federated Learning for Hantavirus Genomic Surveillance
summary: Hantavirus genomic surveillance is limited by the distribution of sequence data, non-IID source heterogeneity, and constrained expert-review capacity. We propose HantaWatch, a federated learning framework that enables laboratories and surveillance sites to collaboratively train sequence-based models without sharing raw data. HantaWatch integrates k-mer feature extraction, source-aware federated client construction, adaptive DU-FedProx optimization, surveillance-specific model selection, and prediction-only triage. Experiments on binary and multi-class tasks show that HantaWatch supports high-risk screening, outbreak-associated prediction, clade classification, and clinical-syndrome categorization while balancing predictive performance, false-negative risk, and update stability. The framework converts model output into risk scores, confidence estimates, uncertainty flags, and ranked expert-review priorities. HantaWatch therefore provides a practical federated decision-support layer for decentralized Hantavirus surveillance, supporting expert prioritization without replacing laboratory or public-health interpretation.

AI.tldr: HantaWatch是一个联邦学习框架，用于在分布式、数据不共享的实验室和监测站点之间协同训练汉坦病毒基因组序列模型，集成k-mer特征提取、源感知客户端构建、自适应DU-FedProx优化及监测专用模型选择，在二分类和多分类任务上支持高风险筛查、暴发关联预测、进化枝分类和临床综合征分类，并生成风险评分、置信度估计、不确定性标记和专家审查优先级排序，为去中心化汉坦病毒监测提供决策支持层。
AI.motivation: 当前汉坦病毒基因组监测面临序列数据分布不均、来源异质性（非IID）强、专家审查能力有限等关键瓶颈，缺乏能在不共享原始数据前提下实现跨机构协同建模的实用方案。
AI.method: 采用联邦学习框架HantaWatch，包含k-mer特征提取、源感知联邦客户端构建、自适应DU-FedProx优化算法、监测专用模型选择机制和仅预测式的分类流程，在保护数据隐私的同时处理非IID异构数据。
AI.result: 在二分类和多分类任务上，HantaWatch实现了高风险筛查、暴发关联预测、进化枝分类和临床综合征分类，并能在预测性能、假阴性风险与更新稳定性之间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: HantaWatch为去中心化的汉坦病毒监测提供了实用的联邦决策支持层，能够辅助专家优先排序，但不替代实验室或公共卫生的解读判断。

title: Though Language Models Err While They Strive: Conformal Prediction for Self-Correcting Scientific Generation
summary: Large language models frequently violate fundamental scientific principles when generating technical content, undermining their reliability in scientific applications. We introduce Scientific Feasibility Control SFC, a graph-structured conformal prediction framework that provides statistical guarantees for scientific reasoning validity through progressive absolute-coherent-factuality validation. Our approach decomposes scientific reasoning into atomic absolute-coherent-factuality units requiring both individual correctness against physical laws and logical substantiation from preceding context, addressing the cascade effect where early scientific errors contaminate subsequent reasoning steps. Unlike independence-based methods that treat claims in isolation, SFC models logical dependencies as approximate deducibility graphs and operates through real-time validation with dynamic branching when scientific violations are detected, the system branches to alternative generation paths using verified context as foundation. We demonstrate SFC across established scientific reasoning benchmarks including PhyX multimodal physics, MATH, ScienceQA, and ARC Challenge, achieving 50.1 percent accuracy on PhyX physics reasoning, substantially outperforming recent reasoning models including DeepSeek-R1 49.8 percent and GPT-4 45.8 percent while providing 91.7 percent scientific validity with formal conformal coverage guarantees at alpha equals 0.10 confidence level and reducing scientific law violations by 73 percent across multiple model architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出科学可行性控制(SFC)框架，通过图结构共形预测实现科学推理有效性的统计保证，在物理推理任务上超越DeepSeek-R1和GPT-4。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在生成技术内容时经常违反基本科学原理，影响其在科学应用中的可靠性，现有方法缺乏对科学推理有效性的统计保证。
AI.method: 将科学推理分解为原子绝对-一致-事实性单元，构建近似可演绎图建模逻辑依赖关系，通过实时验证与动态分支实现科学违规检测与替代生成路径切换。
AI.result: 在PhyX物理推理上准确率50.1%，超越DeepSeek-R1(49.8%)和GPT-4(45.8%)；科学有效性达91.7%，科学法则违反减少73%。
AI.conclusion: 图结构共形预测框架能有效保证科学推理的统计有效性，显著减少科学错误，适用于多种模型架构。

title: A conditional no-go for resource-free magic-axis measurement on a static surface code
summary: Under stated assumptions, a static surface-code patch that adds no fold or \mbox{self-dual} structure cannot perform the magic-axis check that magic-state cultivation relies on while still accepting often. This is a conditional no-go. Fault-tolerant machines spend much of their cost making magic states, and cultivation makes them in place by measuring the magic axis, which every known construction does through a fold or \mbox{self-dual} patch that it is folklore to call necessary. We test the folklore. The no-go says that a useful check must pay for the magic axis somewhere. It can add a charge-converting resource, it can leave the dilute regime of its accepted history, or it can accept only exponentially rarely. For a single stabilizer-measurement transcript this is proved outright, from a topological reading of the accepted outcome. For adaptive, post-selected protocols in a bounded-depth (polynomial spacetime-volume) model, it holds under two structural assumptions plus a subcriticality assumption. We isolate the one open assumption, show that protection alone does not force it, and give the threshold any resolution must address. What remains is a single conjecture.

AI.tldr: 本文证明静态表面码补丁无法在不频繁接受的情况下执行魔法轴检查（除非满足特定条件），挑战了现有关于魔法态培养中折叠/自对偶结构必要性的民间说法。
AI.motivation: 验证"魔法轴检查必须通过折叠或自对偶补丁实现"这一民间说法的正确性，因为魔法态制备是容错量子计算的主要成本来源。
AI.method: 采用拓扑学方法分析单次稳定子测量记录，并建立有界深度（多项式时空体积）模型下的自适应后选择协议，提出两个结构假设和一个亚临界假设。
AI.result: 证明无条件无去情况：有用的魔法轴检查必须在某处为魔法轴付出代价（添加电荷转换资源、离开稀释区域、或仅指数级罕见接受）。
AI.conclusion: 该领域开放问题被简化为一个单一猜想，为未来研究提供了明确方向。

title: It Takes 8 Tokens: Weak-to-Strong Off-Policy RL via Auxiliary Branches
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has emerged as a standard approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models, which typically optimizes the policy by contrasting multiple self generated rollouts. However, we identify a critical support limited bottleneck in this paradigm: on challenging reasoning tasks, the target model's samples often exhibit semantic redundancy, converging into the same erroneous "reasoning basins" that offer negligible reward contrast for policy updates. In this paper, we propose to overcome this limitation through a weak to strong learning paradigm, where a policy's exploration is informed by a weaker but computationally efficient auxiliary model. We introduce W2SPO, an off policy RL method that injects short auxiliary segments often as brief as 8 tokens into intermediate target model trajectories and the target model then completes the reasoning path from these diverted states. Policy updates are restricted to these short inserted segments based on final verifiable rewards. Empirically, W2SPO achieves superior performance among evaluated 4B scale models on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, outperforming evaluated post trained baselines. Compared with vanilla GRPO under the same sampling budget, W2SPO improves Pass@1 from 62.3% to 64.2% while achieving a 3.55 times training speedup. These results suggest that weak auxiliary branches can induce stronger target reasoning policies by expanding local exploration support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出W2SPO方法，通过引入弱辅助模型生成的短片段（仅8个token）注入到目标模型的推理轨迹中，扩展局部探索空间，解决强化学习中因样本语义冗余导致的"推理盆地"问题，在数学推理基准上以更少训练时间取得了更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法在挑战性推理任务中面临"支持受限"瓶颈：目标模型自行生成的样本存在语义冗余，容易收敛到相同的错误"推理盆地"，导致不同样本间奖励对比度不足，难以有效更新策略。
AI.method: 提出W2SPO，一种离策略强化学习方法。核心思路是利用计算效率更高的弱辅助模型生成短片段（短至8个token），将这些片段注入到目标模型中间轨迹中，目标模型从这些转移状态继续完成推理。策略更新仅作用于这些短插入片段，基于最终可验证奖励进行优化。
AI.result: 在4B规模模型上，数学推理基准测试中W2SPO超越所有评估的后训练基线；与相同采样预算下的GRPO相比，Pass@1从62.3%提升至64.2%，同时训练速度提升3.55倍。
AI.conclusion: 弱辅助分支能够通过扩展局部探索支持，诱导出更强的目标推理策略。

title: An efficient adaptive dimension selection algorithm for multidimensional probit graded response models
summary:
Multidimensional graded response models (MGRMs) are widely used for analyzing ordinal questionnaire data in psychological and educational assessments. A central challenge in applying these models is determining the number of latent dimensions. Conventional approaches usually fit multiple fixed-dimensional models and select among them using post-hoc criteria such as AIC, BIC, or cross-validation, which can be computationally demanding and ignore uncertainty in dimensionality during estimation. We develop an adaptive Bayesian dimension selection framework for probit MGRMs. Building on the cumulative shrinkage process, we assign a cumulative ordered spike-and-slab (COSS) prior to the column-specific variances of the item loading matrix. This prior induces increasing shrinkage across latent dimensions, allowing redundant dimensions to be shrunk toward zero while preserving flexibility for active dimensions. Albert--Chib latent response augmentation is used to handle the ordinal probit likelihood, yielding conditionally Gaussian updates for item loadings and latent traits. These updates are combined with Gibbs updates for threshold and shrinkage parameters in an efficient adaptive sampler.
  Simulation studies evaluate the proposed
  method in terms of dimension recovery, parameter
  estimation accuracy, and computational efficiency, with comparisons to conventional fixed-dimensional estimation and model selection procedures. The results show that the proposed approach accurately recovers the latent structure while avoiding repeated model fitting over multiple candidate dimensions. We further illustrate the method using real psychological assessment data, demonstrating its practical utility for uncovering interpretable latent structures in ordinal item responses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯自适应维度选择框架的probit MGRM，利用累积有序spike-and-slab先验自动收缩冗余维度，避免了传统方法需多次拟合固定维度模型的低效问题。
AI.motivation: 多维分级响应模型（MGRM）中确定潜在维度数量是关键挑战，传统方法需多次拟合固定维度模型并依赖后验准则（AIC/BIC等）进行选择，计算成本高且忽略估计过程中的维度不确定性。
AI.method: 在probit MGRM中引入累积有序spike-and-slab（COSS）先验，对因子载荷矩阵的列方差施加递增收缩效应；结合Albert-Chib潜变量扩充实现有序probit似然的处理，利用Gibbs采样高效更新载荷、潜特质、阈值及收缩参数。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明该方法能准确恢复潜在维度结构，参数估计精度和计算效率优于传统固定维度估计与模型选择方法；实际心理评估数据验证了其在揭示有序项目反应中可解释潜在结构的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应贝叶斯维度选择框架有效解决了MGRM的维度确定难题，避免了重复模型拟合，兼顾了计算效率与维度不确定性。

title: Who Will Become the Next Senior? How Generative AI Erodes the Development Pathway in Software Engineering
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) is reshaping software engineering, raising concerns about how the development pathway through which juniors become seniors is being eroded. While macro statistics show a decline in junior hiring and controlled studies demonstrate the effects of AI on individual task performance, the mechanisms through which GenAI reshapes early-career development in real organizational and educational contexts have not been thoroughly examined. Through 14 semi-structured interviews with juniors at the threshold of entering software engineering and senior software engineers in South Korea, analyzed using Reflexive Thematic Analysis, we reveal a foundational pattern of Absorption -- GenAI redirects entry-level work into senior-AI workflows -- and three consequences: (1) juniors losing the productive struggle through which expertise once developed; (2) the structural reproduction of this loss through collective normalization of GenAI use in university classrooms; and (3) the perceptual asymmetry between seniors and juniors that prevents either side from correcting these dynamics on their own. By extending learning theory and situated cognition to organizational and institutional scales, we argue that GenAI appears to be absorbing not just specific categories of tasks but also parts of the pathway through which the next generation of seniors is formed. Preserving this pathway will require deliberate institutional design across classrooms, workplaces, and the evaluation criteria for juniors.

AI.tldr: 通过对14名韩国初级和高级软件工程师的半结构化访谈，本研究发现生成式AI正在通过“吸收”模式重塑软件工程早期职业发展路径——初级工作被转移至高级-AI协作流程中，导致初级开发者失去“生产性挣扎”的学习机会，这种损失在课堂上被结构性再生产，且高低级工程师之间存在认知不对称，使得任何一方都无法自行纠正这一动态。
AI.motivation: 虽然宏观统计显示初级雇佣下降，受控实验也证明了AI对个人任务表现的影响，但GenAI如何在真实组织和教育环境中重塑早期职业发展机制尚未被深入探究。
AI.method: 对韩国14名即将进入软件工程领域的初级工程师和高级软件工程师进行半结构化访谈，采用反思性主题分析法进行分析。
AI.result: 发现“吸收”模式：GenAI将初级工作重新导向高级-AI工作流，产生三个后果：(1) 初级开发者失去“生产性挣扎”的学习机会；(2) 大学课堂上集体正常化使用GenAI导致这种损失被结构性再生产；(3) 高低级工程师之间的感知不对称，任何一方都无法自行纠正。
AI.conclusion: GenAI不仅吸收特定类别的任务，还正在吸收形成下一代高级工程师的路径本身。保护这一发展路径需要从课堂、工作场所和初级评估标准三个层面进行审慎的制度设计。

title: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Algorithm for the Vehicle Routing Problem with Stochastic Demands and Outsourcing
summary: We introduce the vehicle routing problem with stochastic demands and outsourcing options (VRP-SDO), in which a logistics service provider partitions customer requests into customers outsourced to a common carrier and customers committed to its fixed fleet. The latter induces a vehicle routing problem with stochastic demands (VRP-SD), solved dynamically. Demands are revealed upon visit; residual demand may be served by other vehicles or after restocking at the depot. Work beyond the regular shift incurs overtime costs, and the unit outsourcing cost decreases with the expected outsourced demand. The objective is to minimize expected travel, overtime, and outsourcing costs. We propose an iterative two-level methodology whose first level partitions customers into committed and outsourced subsets, while the second level estimates the expected VRP-SD routing cost. To avoid solving this problem from scratch at every iteration, we learn an offline routing policy that estimates costs almost instantly for any committed subset. An iterated local search establishes the first-level partitions. We formulate the second level as a Markov decision process and solve it with a deep Q-network whose state is represented by a graph attention network aggregating customer and vehicle information by relevance to the acting vehicle. Trained offline on instances with variable customer cardinality and locations, the policy applies to any daily customer realization; online fine-tuning improves the cost approximation. Experiments show that our policy reduces routing costs by 19.6% relative to a state-of-the-art method and by at least 29.6% over classical heuristics. Our overall algorithm saves 13.7% on average over the version without the attention-based representation and generates high-quality decisions within minutes, whereas benchmarks without an offline-trained estimator require over an hour.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两层级迭代方法，解决含随机需求与外包选项的车辆路径问题（VRP-SDO）。第一层用迭代局部搜索划分客户为自营与外包两组，第二层将自营路径问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并利用基于图注意力网络的深度Q网络在线学习离线策略，显著降低了总期望成本。
AI.motivation: 物流服务商需要同时决策哪些客户由自有车队服务（面临需求不确定性）、哪些外包给第三方承运商，且外包成本随外包量递减。现有方法要么分开处理这两个问题，要么求解时间过长，难以在实际中快速获得高质量决策。
AI.method: 两层级迭代方法：第一层通过迭代局部搜索划分客户子集；第二层将随机需求的车辆路径问题建模为MDP，用深度Q网络求解，其状态由图注意力网络表示，聚合客户与车辆信息。离线训练策略适用于任意客户规模和位置，在线微调进一步优化成本估计。
AI.result: 相对于最先进方法，路径成本降低19.6%；相比经典启发式方法降低至少29.6%；整体算法比不使用注意力表示的版本平均节省13.7%；决策时间仅需几分钟，而需要在线求解的基准方法超过一小时。
AI.conclusion: 基于图注意力网络的深度强化学习策略能高效且准确地估计随机需求下的路径成本，结合迭代分区框架，可在短时间内做出高质量的外包与路径联合决策，具有很强的实际应用价值。

title: OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models
summary: Mobile and wearable devices offer an unprecedented opportunity for continuous, passive health monitoring and active health coaching. However, the largest wearable datasets are not publicly available for research, and leading wearable foundation models trained on such datasets are rarely open-weight or come with reproducible training code. To accelerate open science in wearable health, we release OpenMyHeartCounts (OpenMHC), the largest and most comprehensive open-access wearable health dataset to date, alongside open-source implementations of recent wearable foundation models. OpenMHC, derived from over a decade of data collected through the My Heart Counts study app, includes >60 million hours of wearable data across 19 sensor channels (e.g., step count, heart rate, sleep, workouts) and up to 169 linked variables, including health, lifestyle, mood, and behavior from 11,894 consenting participants. Furthermore, we introduce a unified, open benchmark that enables standardized comparison of wearable health models across three tracks: health and behavior downstream prediction, multivariate data imputation, and time-series forecasting. We benchmark classical methods alongside recent wearable and multivariate time series foundation models. By open-sourcing data, code, and model weights at this unprecedented scale, we aim to democratize wearable health AI research and enable the community to drive open progress in this domain.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了OpenMyHeartCounts（OpenMHC）这一迄今最大规模的开源可穿戴健康数据集（包含超过6000万小时、19个传感器通道、11994名参与者的数据），并同时开源了相应的可穿戴基础模型实现与统一评测基准，旨在推动可穿戴健康AI研究的开放科学。
AI.motivation: 当前最大的可穿戴数据集未公开，领先的可穿戴基础模型也极少开源权重或复现代码，这阻碍了可穿戴健康领域的开放研究。作者旨在通过大规模开源数据、模型和基准来加速该领域的开放科学进程。
AI.method: 1) 基于My Heart Counts研究应用超十年的数据，构建OpenMHC数据集（涵盖步数、心率、睡眠、运动等19个传感器通道及169个关联变量，共11994名参与者）。2) 开源近期可穿戴基础模型的实现。3) 建立统一开放基准，涵盖三个评测任务：健康与行为下游预测、多变量数据填补、时间序列预测。
AI.result: 生成了迄今最大规模的开源可穿戴健康数据集（OpenMHC），并提供了包括经典方法及近期可穿戴/多变量时间序列基础模型在内的标准化基准评测结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过前所未有的规模开源数据、代码和模型权重，本文旨在民主化可穿戴健康AI研究，使社区能够在此领域共同推动开放进步。

title: JOR-Bench: Japanese Operations Research Benchmarks for Large Language Models
summary: We present JOR-Bench, a collection of five Japanese-language benchmarks for evaluating the ability of large language models (LLMs) to formulate and solve operations research (OR) problems. Each benchmark is a Japanese translation of an existing English benchmark: IndustryOR, MAMO Complex LP, NL4OPT, OptiBench, and OptMATH, covering 1,319 problems spanning linear programming, mixed-integer programming, non-linear programming, and combinatorial optimization. JOR-Bench is a solver-independent benchmark that can be used with any solver or programming language, and consists of pairs of Japanese problem statements and expected numerical answers. We evaluate seven LLMs, including multilingual general-purpose models and Japanese-specialized models, on both the original English and the new Japanese versions, and compare performance across languages. For the main evaluation, we standardize execution with the Python interface to OR-Tools to make model outputs comparable and reproducible with open-source software. Our results show that OR formulation ability is largely language-neutral for strong multilingual models; the overall average accuracy difference between English and Japanese is only $-0.3$ pp. Yet error analysis reveals subtle cross-lingual differences, including a pragmatic disambiguation failure in some domains that causes models to output decision-variable values instead of the objective value when the prompt is in Japanese.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了JOR-Bench，一个包含5个日语基准的集合，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在运筹学（OR）问题建模与求解方面的能力。该基准涵盖1,319个问题，涉及线性规划、混合整数规划、非线性规划和组合优化。通过对7个LLM在英文和日语版本上的测试，发现强多语言模型的表现基本与语言无关，整体平均准确率差异仅为-0.3个百分点，但错误分析揭示了语言间的细微差异。
AI.motivation: 现有OR基准主要基于英文，缺乏对日语等非英语语言下LLM建模与求解OR问题能力的系统评估。研究旨在填补这一空白，为日语OR领域的LLM评估提供标准化工具。
AI.method: 构建了5个日语OR基准（JOR-Bench），是现有英文基准的日语翻译版本，共1,319个问题。使用OR-Tools的Python接口标准化执行流程，评估了7个LLM（包括多语言通用模型和日语专用模型）在英文和日语版本上的表现，并进行跨语言对比。
AI.result: 强多语言模型在英文和日语版本上的表现基本一致，整体平均准确率差异仅为-0.3个百分点。但错误分析发现某些领域存在语用消歧失败问题：当提示词为日语时，模型会输出决策变量值而非目标函数值。
AI.conclusion: OR问题建模能力对强多语言模型而言基本是语言中性的，但日语环境下存在细微的语用理解偏差，需要进一步改进。

title: Cluster-Based Distributed Small-Signal Stability Certificates for Grid-Forming Inverter Networks
summary: Large-scale power networks are often organized by geography, ownership, or control authority, making stability certificates that require a fully assembled global model challenging. This paper develops a time-domain small-signal stability certification framework for grid-forming inverter networks with selectable clustering resolution. The objective is to certify stability at the same scale at which the network is organized and operated: each cluster verifies conditions using intra-cluster and limited boundary information, and these checks collectively yield a network-level stability certificate without requiring a global eigenvalue computation. After linearization about a phase-cohesive synchronized operating point, a small-angle approximation decomposes the model into a voltage subsystem and an angle-frequency subsystem, where the latter is certified by an energy argument using the symmetric weighted-Laplacian network structure. For the voltage subsystem, node-to-node gains are introduced and a cyclic small-gain argument yields a family of sufficient exponential stability certificates ranging from fully decentralized to cluster-based and centralized. For an arbitrary network partition, each cluster verifies intra-cluster directed-cycle conditions and inter-cluster path conditions. The singleton- and single-cluster limits recover the decentralized and centralized certificates, respectively. The resulting stability indices provide diagnostic information beyond a pass/fail verdict by localizing the limiting margin to individual nodes, internal feedback loops, and inter-cluster channels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向构网逆变器网络的时域小信号稳定认证框架，支持可选择的聚类分辨率，允许各集群仅利用内部和有限边界信息验证稳定性，无需全局模型或整体特征值计算。
AI.motivation: 大规模电力网络常按地理、所有权或控制权限组织，要求完全组装全局模型的稳定证书具有挑战性，因此需要一种能在网络组织与运行同一尺度上认证稳定的方法。
AI.method: 在相协同的同步运行点附近线性化后，利用小角度近似将模型分解为电压子系统和角频率子系统。角频率子系统通过对称加权拉普拉斯网络结构的能量论证认证；电压子系统引入节点间增益，通过循环小增益论证产生从全分散到基于集群再到集中式的充分指数稳定证书族。对于任意网络分区，每个集群验证集群内有向环条件和集群间路径条件。
AI.result: 单节点和单集群极限分别恢复分散式和集中式证书；稳定性指标提供超越通过/失败判断的诊断信息，将限制性裕度定位到单个节点、内部反馈回路和集群间通道。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了与网络组织尺度匹配的稳定认证，无需全局特征值计算，为大规模电力系统的分散式稳定性验证提供了可行方案。

title: PPO-HSC: An Exploratory Reinforcement Learning Framework Based on Wide-Area Policy Coverage Optimization
summary: This paper introduces PPO-HSC (Proximal Policy Optimization with High-order Sampling Coverage), an exploratory reinforcement learning framework designed to address the "Invisible Shackles" of mode collapse in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning. While standard Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) effectively reinforces high-reward trajectories, it often leads models to over-optimize known solutions, sacrificing curiosity and the ability to explore broader solution manifolds. To overcome this, PPO-HSC incorporates a High-order Sampling Coverage (HSC) reward that incentivizes the discovery of "low-similarity yet high-validity" reasoning patterns. By maintaining a dynamic trajectory library of verified unique solutions, the framework provides a differentiable signal that rewards semantic novelty while ensuring structural rationality through a plausibility constraint. Empirical evaluations on mathematical reasoning (GSM8K, SVAMP) and code generation tasks demonstrate that PPO-HSC significantly enhances solution diversity and state-space coverage while maintaining or surpassing the accuracy and syntax integrity of state-of-the-art RL baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出PPO-HSC框架，通过高階取樣覆蓋獎勵解決LLM微調中的模式崩潰問題，在保持準確率的同時顯著提升解的多樣性與探索能力。
AI.motivation: 標準RLVR雖然能強化高獎勵軌跡，但容易導致模型過度優化已知解，喪失好奇心與探索更廣解決方案流形的能力，形成"隱形枷鎖"般的模式崩潰。
AI.method: 在PPO基礎上引入High-order Sampling Coverage (HSC)獎勵，透過維護動態軌跡庫來獎勵"低相似性但高效性"的推理模式，並結合似然性約束確保結構合理性。
AI.result: 在數學推理(GSM8K, SVAMP)和程式生成任務上，PPO-HSC顯著提升解的多樣性與狀態空間覆蓋率，同時維持或超越現有RL基線的準確率與語法完整性。
AI.conclusion: PPO-HSC有效解決了LLM微調中的模式崩潰問題，平衡了探索與利用，為提升模型推理多樣性提供了可行方案。

title: An Adjoint-Sensitivity Framework for Lost-in-the-Middle Phenomena in Causal Residual Transformers
summary: We develop an adjoint-sensitivity framework for positional influence in causal residual Transformers and separate unconditional analytic results from conditional boundary-shape conclusions. The principal unconditional theorem is the residual-to-depth-flow estimate for layer controls converging in $L^1$, complemented by a finite-token-to-Volterra attention estimate that explicitly controls the first cells near the causal endpoint. We define a normalized adjoint-energy influence density and derive its exact evolution along full-batch gradient flow. The adjoint admits an exact generator-term decomposition into residual transmission, nonlocal Volterra, and local channels, including all covariance cross terms. Causal masking can amplify early-position sensitivity and residual identity paths can transmit a right-localized terminal bias, but neither mechanism alone forces a U-shaped profile. We therefore state boundary advantages under independently checkable energy, correlation, and local-channel bounds; these conditions are sufficient rather than necessary. Finite-token influence balancing, positional reweighting, and task-aligned observability are presented as diagnostics or regularizers with explicit differentiation requirements, computational costs, and limitations. Controlled simulations illustrate that each intervention controls its designated surrogate, while observability balance or outer-loop reweighting need not monotonically reduce the influence-based Lost-in-the-Middle diagnostic.

AI.tldr: 本文为因果残差Transformer中的位置影响开发了一个伴随敏感性框架，分离了无条件理论结果与条件边界形状结论。核心无条件定理包括残差到深度的流估计（L1收敛）和有限token到Volterra注意力估计。定义了归一化伴随能量影响密度及其沿全批量梯度流的精确演化。因果掩码可放大早期位置敏感性，残差恒等路径可传递右局部终端偏差，但两者单独都不强制U型分布。提出了有限token影响平衡、位置重加权和任务对齐可观测性作为诊断或正则化器。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer中位置偏差（如Lost-in-the-Middle现象）的理论根源，开发可验证的影响分析框架以诊断和缓解位置偏差。
AI.method: 基于伴随敏感性分析（adjoint-sensitivity framework），推导残差到深度流估计、有限token到Volterra注意力估计的收敛定理，定义伴随能量影响密度及其梯度流演化，分解生成项为残差传输、非局部Volterra和局部通道三类。
AI.result: 因果掩码和残差恒等路径各自产生特定方向的位置偏差（左早期放大和右终端偏差），但均不足以单独解释U型影响分布。提出了三种位置偏差诊断/正则化方法及其计算成本和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 位置影响偏差需要多种机制协同作用；所提条件为充分非必要；影响平衡和重加权不保证单调降低Lost-in-the-Middle指标。

title: A study of GenAI usage by Design Students Analysis of Survey Results and Journals of AI practices at the Politecnico di Milano in 2025/2026
summary: The results of a survey on the use of GenAI by the design students of the Politecnico di Milano raises major questions around the role of AI in the Design Process. A domain specific set of questions alongside the more general purpose probes about GenAI usage, delivers insights into the particular practices that are emerging in Design. The very high frequency of use of GenAI tools is concentrated in the initial stages of projects and does not affect the perception of project ownership or creativity. An analysis of AI journals kept by a class during research assignments confirms the range of AI supported activities but also the limited trust in GenAI leading to systematic individual and collective verification and augmentation of outputs. Together, the findings suggest that design students are reflectively experimenting with how GenAI tools can contribute to their creative design process.

AI.tldr: 对米兰理工设计学生的GenAI使用调查显示：高频率使用集中在项目初期，不影响创意所有权感知；学生通过AI日志记录，对GenAI输出进行系统性验证与增强，表明学生正在反思性地探索GenAI如何融入创意设计过程。
AI.motivation: 探索设计专业学生如何使用GenAI，以及GenAI在设计过程中的角色和影响，特别是对创意所有权和创作过程的感知。
AI.method: 1) 针对设计学生的领域特定问卷调查（含通用问题）；2) 学生AI日志分析（记录研究任务中的AI使用情况）。
AI.result: 1) GenAI使用频率很高，但集中在项目初始阶段；2) 使用GenAI不影响学生对项目所有权和创意的感知；3) 学生对GenAI信任有限，会进行系统和集体的验证与增强。
AI.conclusion: 设计学生正在以反思性的方式实验GenAI工具，探索其如何为创意设计过程做出贡献。

title: Entropic optimal transport need not select a zero-temperature limit
summary: We construct a compact metric space with an atomless probability measure and a bounded Lipschitz cost for which the entropic optimal-transport minimisers have no zero-temperature weak limit. More precisely, $P_\varepsilon$ does not converge as $\varepsilon\downarrow0$. In the example, every unregularised minimiser is singular with respect to $μ\otimesμ$, so that the entropy on the optimal face is identically $+\infty$. We describe the cluster set by \[ \operatorname{Clust}(P_\varepsilon)=\{P_w:w\in\mathcal W\}, \] where $P_w$ is the mixture of the two zero-cost graph couplings with weight $w$, and where $\mathcal W\subset[0,1]$ is a non-degenerate compact interval. We then compute two explicit points $w^-<w^+$ in this interval. This shows that compactness, atomlessness, and Lipschitz regularity of the cost do not imply zero-temperature convergence. We also present a compactness theorem for the general problem. If $C\in L^1(μ\otimesν)$ is continuous and bounded from below on Polish spaces, then the zero-temperature cluster set is a nonempty weakly compact connected subset of the optimal face. In the proof, we apply the cluster-point theorem of Bernton, Ghosal, and Nutz and the continuity of $\varepsilon\mapstoπ_\varepsilon$. Finally, we give local and exterior first-order criteria for full convergence and cluster membership. We show that nonconvergence is possible, but only through a connected continuum of optimal plans.

AI.tldr: 本文构造了一个反例，证明在紧致度量空间、无原子概率测度和有界Lipschitz成本下，熵正则化最优传输的最小化序列可能没有零温度极限，其聚点构成一个非退化区间。同时给出了一个一般紧致性定理，并提出了收敛性和聚点隶属的局部/外部一阶判据。
AI.motivation: 检验熵正则化最优传输中，当正则化参数趋近于零时，最优解是否一定收敛到未正则化问题的最优解（零温度极限）。经典理论在有限离散情况下成立，作者想探究在更一般的连续（紧致、无原子）空间中是否仍然成立。
AI.method: 构造一个具体的反例（紧致度量空间+无原子概率测度+有界Lipschitz成本），分析其熵正则化最小化序列的聚点结构，证明聚点集为混合权重w的非退化区间。同时利用Bernton-Ghosal-Nutz的聚点定理和π_ε的连续性，给出了一般情形下的紧致性定理和一阶判据。
AI.result: 1. 构造的反例显示P_ε不收敛，聚点集为{w∈[0,1]的非退化紧区间}，对应两个零成本图耦合的混合。2. 给出了一个一般紧致性定理：若成本函数连续、有下界且L^1可积，则零温度聚点集是非空弱紧连通子集。3. 提出了局部和外部一阶判据用于判定完全收敛或聚点隶属。
AI.conclusion: 紧致性、无原子性和Lipschitz成本不足以保证零温度收敛；非收敛是可能的，但仅能通过一个最优计划构成的连通连续体实现。这表明熵正则化最优传输的极限行为比预期更复杂。

title: The Failures of Marginal Influence-Based Attribution Methods for Global Time Series Explanations
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2026)
summary: Explainability methods for time series models predominantly produce flat attribution scores: they quantify the direct influence of a feature at a timestamp by a scalar. We prove that the dominant failure mode of such methods is not the scalar format itself but a fundamental computational mismatch: existing methods compute scores via marginal conditioning or off-manifold gradients, both of which conflate direct temporal dependencies with mediated ones under autocorrelation. We also define DAG-faithfulness: an explanation is DAG-faithful if the temporal dependency graph it encodes is Markov-equivalent to the temporal directed acyclic graph (DAG) implicitly learned by the model. Particularly, we observe that standard attribution methods, specifically SHAP, are not DAG-faithful in general, and that recent time-series-aware extensions inherit the same computational limitation.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有时序模型可解释性方法的核心缺陷并非标量归因格式，而是计算方式导致的时间依赖混淆，并定义了DAG忠实性概念来衡量解释与模型隐含时序因果图的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法在时序模型中生成的归因分数存在根本性的计算错误——它们混淆了直接时序依赖与自相关下的间接依赖，作者希望从理论层面揭示这一问题并给出评估标准。
AI.method: 作者通过理论证明指出现有方法（如SHAP及其时序变体）的计算方式（边际条件或流形外梯度）导致依赖混淆；同时定义了DAG忠实性，要求解释编码的时序依赖图与模型隐式学习的时序有向无环图满足马尔可夫等价。
AI.result: 标准归因方法（如SHAP）通常不满足DAG忠实性，且近期时序感知扩展方法继承了相同的计算局限性。
AI.conclusion: 时序模型解释的关键不在于归因格式本身，而在于计算方式是否忠实于模型内部的时序因果结构；当前主流方法在此方面存在系统性缺陷。

title: Cascading versus Joint Modeling for Hierarchical Offensive Language Detection
summary: Fine-grained offensive language detection organizes labels into a hierarchical structure, for which two modeling paradigms exist: cascaded decomposition and joint multi-task modeling. Prior work rarely provides a direct, controlled comparison of the two paradigms in terms of accuracy, parameter count, and inference latency, and rarely verifies whether a chosen class-imbalance handling strategy is actually optimal. This paper proposes a three-level cascaded detection system whose training strategy is customized per subtask, together with two verification mechanisms. First, a controlled ablation study determines the best class-imbalance handling strategy for each subtask. Second, a joint multi-task model with a shared encoder is trained as an architectural control, yielding real measurements along the dimensions of accuracy, parameter count, and inference latency. Experiments show that the cascaded system attains macro-F1 scores of 0.795, 0.716, and 0.557 on the three subtasks of the official test set. The ablation study reveals that configuring the loss function purely by imbalance-severity intuition is suboptimal; reconfiguring based on the ablation results improves both performance and stability. End-to-end cascade evaluation shows that roughly one-fifth of the errors in the cascade pipeline originate from the first-stage filter and cannot be corrected by subsequent stages. Relative to the joint multi-task model, the cascaded architecture achieves higher accuracy on all three subtasks, with a 7.1-point macro-F1 gain on the most severely imbalanced subtask, at the cost of three times the parameters and 1.67 times the inference latency. Together, these results establish an explicit, quantifiable trade-off between the accuracy advantage of cascaded architectures and their deployment cost.

AI.tldr: 本文对层级化细粒度 offensive 语言检测中的级联分解与联合多任务建模两种范式进行了受控对比，提出了三级级联系统，并通过消融实验与联合多任务模型对照，量化了级联架构在准确率提升与部署成本（参数量、推理延迟）之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有工作缺乏对级联分解与联合多任务两种范式在准确率、参数量和推理延迟三个维度上的直接、受控比较，也未验证所选类别不平衡处理策略是否最优。
AI.method: 提出三级级联检测系统，每个子任务定制训练策略；引入两种验证机制：(1) 消融实验确定各子任务最优的类别不平衡处理策略；(2) 训练共享编码器的联合多任务模型作为架构对照，实测三维度表现。
AI.result: 级联系统在三个子任务测试集上取得 0.795/0.716/0.557 的 macro-F1；消融表明仅凭不平衡程度直觉配置损失函数非最优；级联中约1/5错误来自第一阶段过滤器且不可修正；相比联合多任务，级联在所有子任务上准确率更高，在最严重不平衡任务上 macro-F1 提升 7.1 点，但参数量为三倍、推理延迟为 1.67 倍。
AI.conclusion: 级联架构相比联合多任务在准确率上有显著优势，但代价是更高的参数量和推理延迟；研究结果建立了二者之间明确、可量化的权衡关系，并强调了类别不平衡处理策略需要经验验证而非直觉设定。

title: Increasing Line Outage Localization Performance with Ensemble Classifiers
summary: In many cases, the outage of one transmission line in a system can be localized by monitoring the power flow of another line, and machine learning methods can be used to distinguish the cases under uncertainty. In this study, we examine the improvements in line outage localization performance achieved by various ensemble classifiers compared to single-model methods. In the case studies, we compared the classification results with measurement data collected at observed transmission lines (OTLs) selected using three algorithms, i.e, greedy maximum coverage problem (MCP), high-eta, and random selection, based on two sensitivity factors, i.e., line outage distribution factors (LODFs) and line outage impact factors (LOIFs). We found that the OTLs selected by the greedy MCP algorithm yielded the highest F1 score and the ensemble classifiers significantly outperformed a base kNN classifier. The extra-trees bagging technique achieved the highest F1 score in many instances. All the findings were statistically significant.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用集成分类器提升线路 outage 定位性能，发现基于贪心最大覆盖问题算法选择的观测线路能获得最高F1分数，且极端随机树集成方法在多数情况下表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 电力系统中一条输电线路 outage 可以通过监测另一条线路的功率流进行定位，但存在不确定性。现有研究多采用单一模型方法，本文旨在探索集成分类器相比单一模型能否显著提升线路 outage 定位性能。
AI.method: 基于两种灵敏度因子（LODF和LOIF），使用三种算法（贪心MCP、high-eta、随机选择）选取观测线路（OTLs）；对比多种集成分类器与基准kNN分类器的性能。
AI.result: 贪心MCP算法选择的OTL获得最高F1分数；集成分类器显著优于基准kNN分类器；极端随机树（Extra-trees）集成方法在多数情况下取得最高F1分数；所有发现均具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 集成学习方法能有效提升线路 outage 定位性能，贪心MCP算法是选择观测线路的优选方案，极端随机树是最推荐使用的集成分类器。

title: JUMP: Single-Pass Membership Inference on Fine-Tuned Diffusion Language Models
summary: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) test whether a candidate example appeared in a model's training data. We study MIAs for fine-tuned discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), where membership means inclusion in the target model's fine-tuning set. Unlike autoregressive language models, dLLMs allow an attacker to choose arbitrary mask sets and obtain token distributions for all masked positions in parallel. The prior dLLM attack, SAMA, follows a natural loss-mimicking strategy by averaging reconstruction signals over many randomly sampled masks, but it uses the any-order interface only as randomization and requires many target/reference queries. We propose JUMP (Joint Uncertainty-Guided Mask Probing), a single-pass scoring attack that exploits both distinctive properties of dLLMs: any-order decodability is used to select low-reference-confidence positions, and parallel decodability is used to score all selected positions through one joint masked query per model. JUMP masks the selected positions jointly and computes a clipped target/reference reconstruction-gap statistic. On fine-tuned LLaDA-8B-Base across six MIMIR domains, JUMP improves mean ROC-AUC from 0.82 to 0.90 over SAMA and substantially improves low-FPR detection, while requiring only one selector pass and one scoring pass through each of the target and reference models.

AI.tldr: 提出JUMP方法，利用离散扩散语言模型的任意顺序解码和并行解码特性，通过单次联合掩码查询实现更高效、更精确的成员推断攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有SAMA方法仅将任意顺序接口用作随机化，需要大量目标/参考查询，未能充分利用离散扩散语言模型的独特并行解码优势。
AI.method: JUMP方法包含两个阶段：1) 选择阶段：利用任意顺序可解码性选取低参考置信度的位置；2) 评分阶段：利用并行可解码性，通过一次联合掩码查询计算裁剪后的目标/参考重建差异统计量。
AI.result: 在LLaDA-8B-Base模型的六个MIMIR数据集上，JUMP将平均ROC-AUC从0.82提升至0.90，显著提高了低假阳性率下的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: JUMP证明充分利用离散扩散语言模型的独特架构特性（任意顺序+并行解码），可以大幅提升成员推断攻击的效率与效果，仅需单次选择+单次评分查询即可超越SAMA。

title: COVAriance-Induced Fairness Gap Penalty for Subgroup-Fair Clustering
summary: Fair clustering aims to make cluster assignments independent of sensitive attributes, but this goal becomes challenging when multiple sensitive attributes jointly define many subgroups. In such settings, directly extending existing fair clustering algorithms is computationally expensive or numerically unstable, especially when the number of subgroups grows exponentially and some subgroups contain only a few instances. To address these challenges, we define a subgroup-fairness gap for clustering and derive a covariance-based surrogate that exactly matches this gap. We then introduce a continuous relaxation of the surrogate, enabling efficient gradient-based optimization and yielding our proposed algorithm, COVA-FC. We also show that subgroup fairness alone does not imply marginal fairness, and extend our framework to capture a subgroup-marginal-fairness gap. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that COVA-FC achieves competitive cost-fairness trade-offs and improves computational efficiency over existing baselines in both subgroup and higher-order marginal settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于协方差的子组公平聚类算法COVA-FC，通过连续松弛优化有效解决了多敏感属性下子组数量指数增长带来的计算效率和数值稳定性问题，并在实验中取得了良好的成本-公平性权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统公平聚类方法在处理多个敏感属性（形成指数级增长的子组）时，面临计算成本高、数值不稳定以及某些子组样本量过少的问题，亟需一种高效且稳定的子组公平聚类方法。
AI.method: (1) 定义子组公平差距并推导出与之精确匹配的协方差替代指标；(2) 对该替代指标进行连续松弛，实现高效的基于梯度的优化；(3) 进一步扩展到子组-边缘联合公平框架，以弥补子组公平不能保证边缘公平的不足。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，COVA-FC在成本-公平性权衡上具有竞争力，并且在子组和高阶边缘公平场景下的计算效率显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 协方差替代与连续松弛是解决多敏感属性子组公平聚类问题的有效策略，且子组-边缘公平联合考虑是必要的。

title: Measuring Computational Thinking Self-Efficacy (CT-SEI): Instrument development and preliminary evaluation
summary: Much effort is put into helping students at different educational levels develop Computational Thinking (CT) skills. Self-efficacy is important for skill development. It can predict perseverance, engagement and success on educational tasks. We created an instrument to measure self-efficacy of students in higher education for the CT skills abstraction, algorithmic thinking, decomposition, evaluation and generalization. First, 91 candidate items were created by including, adapting and extending items found in the literature. These items were evaluated by experts in the field of CT and education. 54 items remained and to reduce the number of items further, data was collected from 270 students in higher education recruited both through Prolific and a university setting in Costa Rica. Through principle component analysis (PCA) using a subset of 200 responses, the number of items was reduced to 27. Confirmatory factor analysis (CFA) using the remaining responses in the dataset showed the items can be divided into two categories: (1) creating the solution and (2) evaluating the solution. The created instrument can be valuable when assessing CT self-efficacy of students in higher education. With additional validation (e.g. examination of test-retest validity), we believe the scale could be used to evaluate the effectiveness of interventions, or decide what interventions should be provided to foster CT skill development.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了一份测量高等教育学生计算思维自我效能的量表，通过专家评估、主成分分析和验证性因素分析，最终将91个候选题目缩减为27个，分为“创建解决方案”和“评估解决方案”两个维度。
AI.motivation: 计算思维技能的发展对学生的坚持力、投入度和学业成功至关重要，而自我效能是技能发展的关键预测因素。然而，缺乏专门针对高等教育学生计算思维自我效能的可靠测量工具。
AI.method: 首先从文献中创建91个候选题目，经CT和教育领域专家评估后保留54题；随后收集270名高等教育学生数据，通过主成分分析（PCA，200份子集）将题目缩减至27题，再利用验证性因素分析（CFA，剩余样本）验证结构效度。
AI.result: 最终量表包含27个题目，分为两个维度：(1) 创建解决方案 (creating the solution) 和 (2) 评估解决方案 (evaluating the solution)。
AI.conclusion: 该量表可用于评估高等教育学生的CT自我效能，未来通过进一步验证（如重测信度），可用于评估干预措施的有效性或指导CT技能培养方案的制定。

title: Robust Control for Marked Point Processes under Transition-Rate Uncertainty
summary: We consider a novel robust utility maximisation problem under bounded cumulative transition rate uncertainty within the class of non-Markovian marked point processes on a finite state-space. Utility is maximised over the class of admissible controls, while Nature chooses a worst-case biometric scenario from the class of admissible, path-dependent cumulative transition rates restricted by path-dependent upper and lower bounds. We prove a martingale optimality principle and a novel existence and uniqueness result for a non-standard worst-case backwards stochastic differential equation, which allows us to establish existence and uniqueness of worst-case and best-case prospective reserves of life and health insurance contracts with reserve-dependent payments. Finally, we find an explicit solution of a novel robust consumption-insurance problem with power utility preferences.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在非马尔可夫标记点过程框架下，面对有界累积转移率不确定性的鲁棒效用最大化问题。通过建立鞅最优性原理和非标准最坏情况倒向随机微分方程，证明了人寿与健康保险合同的最坏与最优情形准备金的存在唯一性，并给出了幂效用偏好下鲁棒消费-保险问题的显式解。
AI.motivation: 传统保险精算模型通常假设转移率是已知的，但实际中转移率存在不确定性（如死亡率、疾病率等生物计量风险）。作者希望在非马尔可夫、路径依赖的框架下，考虑有界累积转移率不确定性对效用最大化的影响，从而更真实地刻画保险公司面临的生物计量风险。
AI.method: 1. 建立非马尔可夫标记点过程框架下的鲁棒效用最大化问题；2. 证明鞅最优性原理；3. 证明非标准最坏情况倒向随机微分方程（BSDE）的存在唯一性；4. 将结果应用于人寿与健康保险合同准备金定价；5. 求解带幂效用函数的鲁棒消费-保险问题显式解。
AI.result: 1. 建立了鲁棒效用最大化问题的鞅最优性原理；2. 证明了最坏情况BSDE存在唯一性；3. 证明了人寿与健康保险合同的最坏与最优情形准备金存在唯一性；4. 给出了幂效用偏好下鲁棒消费-保险问题的显式解。
AI.conclusion: 本文为处理路径依赖的累积转移率不确定性提供了严谨的数学框架，对保险精算中的鲁棒定价与风险管理具有重要理论意义，且显式解为实际应用提供了可操作的解决方案。

title: Quantizing Recursive Reasoning Models
summary: Recursive reasoning models solve hard puzzles by applying compact, weight-tied blocks over many refinement steps. Because these blocks are reused many times, quantizing them creates a unique dynamical problem: the quantization error is incurred at every step. While 8-bit quantization (integer or float) preserves accuracy, moving to a per-tensor 4-bit format causes a systematic bias to accumulate. The ensuing drift catastrophically degrades exact-solution accuracy on Sudoku from 84.1% to 0.0% (only ~25% of cells correct). In this work, we show that this collapse is caused by activation-scaling granularity rather than bit-width or number format. Crucially, moving to per-block scaling completely restores the transition. To implement this, we apply MXInt4, a blockwise integer activation format, to recursive reasoning models. It is competitive with blockwise float formats on our tasks, while keeping integer elements and power-of-two block scales. Finally, recursion depth and reuse modulate quantization sensitivity, with the deepest architecture we test (the EqR equilibrium model) the most sensitive. Yet blockwise scaling overcomes this vulnerability, staying robust across these architectures and transferring to the open-ended ARC-AGI benchmark.

AI.tldr: 递归推理模型在多次使用权值共享的紧凑块时，对量化误差非常敏感。本文发现4-bit量化的精度坍塌源于激活缩放粒度而非位宽或格式，采用逐块缩放（MXInt4格式）可完全恢复性能，并在多种深度架构和ARC-AGI基准上保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 递归推理模型通过多次复用紧凑的权值共享块来求解难题，但量化这些块会导致误差在每一步累积，特别是4-bit量化会引发系统性偏差，严重破坏模型性能（如Sudoku准确率从84.1%降至0.0%）。作者希望探究精度坍塌的根本原因，并找到能保持模型精度的量化方案。
AI.method: 本文首先分析发现精度坍塌是由激活缩放粒度（activation-scaling granularity）而非位宽或数值格式引起的。关键改进是将4-bit量化从逐张量（per-tensor）缩放改为逐块（per-block）缩放，采用MXInt4格式（块级整数量化，结合2的幂次方缩放因子），并与块级浮点格式进行对比实验，在不同递归深度和架构（如EqR均衡模型）上验证。
AI.result: 逐块缩放完全恢复模型性能，MXInt4格式在任务上与块级浮点格式竞争力相当，同时保持整数元素和2的幂次方块缩放尺度。递归深度和复用次数影响量化敏感性，最深架构（EqR）最敏感，但逐块缩放能克服这一脆弱性，并在ARC-AGI基准上保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 递归推理模型的4-bit量化的精度坍塌根源是激活缩放粒度太粗，逐块缩放（如MXInt4）可有效解决。不同递归架构对量化敏感性不同，但逐块缩放普遍有效，为深度递归模型的高效低比特量化提供了可行方案。

title: Diagnosing Correctness Probes under Self-Judgement Confounding
summary: Hidden-state readouts can predict whether language-model outputs are correct, but objective correctness (OC) usually agrees with the model's own self-judgement (SJ), leaving the decoded signal semantically ambiguous. We construct conflict cases in which OC and SJ predict opposite readout orderings. On high-confidence disagreements, conventional correctness-labelled contrasts often rank incorrect/self-endorsed responses above correct/self-rejected responses, following SJ rather than OC. We estimate factorial SJ- and OC-associated directions and evaluate their polarity across mathematical reasoning and factual recall. Across four instruction-tuned models up to 14B parameters, the SJ-associated direction transfers above chance in both cross-domain directions for every model, whereas the OC-associated direction has a below-chance point estimate for the expected OC ordering in every corresponding condition. This transfer asymmetry develops across middle-to-late layers, persists under answer-likelihood, sequence-length, and null-direction controls, and extends to MMLU and binary TruthfulQA without target-domain direction fitting. Across the studied models and diagnostic subsets, the most reliably transferable component preserves SJ-associated polarity. Transferability alone therefore does not establish objective-correctness semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文发现语言模型隐藏状态中可预测输出正确性的信号，在客观正确性与模型自我判断冲突时，更倾向于反映自我判断而非客观正确性，且自我判断相关方向的跨域迁移能力显著优于客观正确性相关方向。
AI.motivation: 以往研究用隐藏状态读出来预测语言模型输出是否正确，但客观正确性（OC）通常与模型的自我判断（SJ）一致，导致解码出的信号语义模糊不清。需要区分这两种信号。
AI.method: 构造OC与SJ冲突的案例，在数学推理和事实回忆任务上，用因子化方法分别估计SJ相关方向和OC相关方向，评估其极性在跨域迁移中的表现，并进行多项控制实验。
AI.result: 在四个指令微调模型（最高14B参数）上，SJ相关方向在所有模型的跨域迁移中均高于随机水平；而OC相关方向在所有对应条件下均低于随机水平。这种迁移不对称性在中间到后层出现，且不受答案似然、序列长度等因素影响。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭迁移能力不能证明隐藏状态信号具有客观正确性语义；在研究的模型和诊断子集中，最可靠迁移的成分保留的是自我判断极性，而非客观正确性。

title: Feasibility-Aware Security-Constrained Unit Commitment via Hybrid Soft Actor-Critic with Quantum-Sampled Features
summary: Security-constrained unit commitment (SCUC) couples binary commitment, economic dispatch, reserves, and network security over a multiperiod horizon, making an exact solution computationally expensive for realistic system sizes. This paper proposes a three-layer hybrid framework in which a Bernoulli hybrid soft actor-critic (HSAC) policy proposes hourly commitments, a quantum-sampled auxiliary channel augments the state, and a native SCUC mixed-integer linear program recovers dispatch and security variables after only a limited subset of commitment binaries is enforced. The method is therefore solver-compatible rather than an end-to-end replacement for exact optimization. We formalize the SCUC-to-reinforcement-learning interface, derive the temporal coverage induced by the fixed cap, and evaluate the 14- 57- and 118-bus benchmark cases. The results show stable, low-cost recovery in the 14-bus case, where the best recovered schedule attains the full-horizon optimum; a very low screen-rejection rate in the 57-bus case; and a clear coverage bottleneck in the 118-bus case once the enforcement cap no longer spans a complete commitment period. The study, therefore, identifies the amount of useful commitment information that reaches the recovery model, under an exploratory Bernoulli actor and a small enforcement cap, as the dominant limitation that governs scalability

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三层混合框架，将伯努利混合软演员-评论家（HSAC）策略、量子采样辅助通道与原生SCUC混合整数线性规划相结合，通过仅强制少量机组组合二元变量来降低安全约束机组组合（SCUC）问题的计算复杂度。在14节点系统达到全时段最优，57节点系统拒真率极低，但在118节点系统中暴露出强制上限覆盖不足的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: SCUC问题涉及二元机组组合、经济调度、备用和网络安全的多时段耦合，对于实际规模系统，精确求解计算成本极高。现有方法难以在求解效率与最优性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出三层混合框架：(1) 伯努利混合软演员-评论家(HSAC)策略生成每小时机组组合决策；(2) 量子采样辅助通道增强状态表示；(3) 原生SCUC混合整数线性规划在仅强制少量机组组合二元变量后恢复调度与安全变量。该方法保持与求解器的兼容性，而非完全替代精确优化。
AI.result: 在14节点系统上实现稳定低成本的恢复，最优调度达到全时段最优解；57节点系统拒真率极低；118节点系统在强制上限无法覆盖完整机组组合周期时出现明显的覆盖瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了该混合框架的可扩展性主要受限于：在探索性伯努利策略和小强制上限下，能够传递给恢复模型的有效机组组合信息量不足。这指出了提升可扩展性的关键瓶颈所在。

title: ColGraphRAG: Late-Interaction Evidence Retrieval for Multimodal GraphRAG
summary: Graph-grounded multimodal question answering organizes text, tables, and images in a structured evidence graph, yet end-to-end accuracy depends on which multimodal assets are ranked highly enough to enter downstream reasoning; for graph-linked images, single-vector bi-encoder similarity can discard patch- and token-level structure needed for fine-grained alignment. We evaluate replacing the visual candidate-ranking operator over graph-linked image nodes with late-interaction MaxSim-style multi-vector scoring in the ColBERT/ColPali lineage, while keeping offline graph construction, text- and table-side retrieval, structured extraction, and downstream reasoning unchanged. On MultimodalQA, this change is associated with improved retrieval-stage point estimates for graph-linked image candidates and downstream QA gains, with larger movement where visual evidence matters most and mixed trends on text-dominant questions; we interpret the pattern as mechanism-level evidence for graph-linked visual evidence inclusion, while broader validation and finer graph-level diagnostics remain important future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在基于图的多模态问答中，用ColBERT/ColPali的多向量MaxSim评分替换原有的单向量双编码器，用于图链接图像的候选排序，从而提升视觉证据的检索和下游QA性能，尤其在视觉重要的问题上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 在图结构的多模态问答中，图链接图像的检索依赖单向量双编码器相似度，但这种方式丢失了patch和token级别的细粒度结构信息，无法实现精确的视觉-文本对齐，限制了端到端准确率。
AI.method: 在不改变离线图构建、文本/表格检索、结构化抽取和下游推理的前提下，仅将视觉候选排序算子替换为来自ColBERT/ColPali系列的晚交互MaxSim多向量评分机制。
AI.result: 在MultimodalQA上，该替换显著提升了图链接图像候选的检索阶段点估计值和下游QA准确率；在视觉证据重要的问题上提升更大，而在文本主导的问题上趋势混合。
AI.conclusion: 该模式从机制层面验证了图链接视觉证据纳入的有效性，但更广泛的验证和更细粒度的图级诊断仍是重要的未来工作。

title: Quantifying Ranking Uncertainty in LLM Benchmarks
summary: Pretrained models are typically ranked on multi-task leaderboards to assess their effectiveness across diverse tasks. Rank confidence intervals were recently introduced as a method to quantify the uncertainty in these rankings by aggregating pairwise hypothesis tests. In this work, we analyze the sources of uncertainty in the knowledge evaluation benchmark MMLU and show how hypothesis tests can be modified to account for their effects. We demonstrate that ranking variability across MMLU subjects is substantial and should be considered when comparing LLMs or identifying the top-performing models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多任务排行榜中评估预训练模型时的不确定性来源，特别是在MMLU基准测试中，并展示了如何通过修改假设检验来考虑这些不确定性，发现MMLU各学科间的排名变异性很大，需要在比较LLM时加以考虑。
AI.motivation: 现有的多任务排行榜在评估预训练模型时缺乏对排名不确定性的量化分析，尤其是在知识评估基准MMLU上，不同学科间的排名变异性未被充分考虑，导致难以准确比较不同LLM的性能。
AI.method: 通过分析MMLU基准测试中的不确定性来源，修改传统的假设检验方法，以考虑学科间的排名变异性，并基于聚合的成对假设检验来构建排名置信区间。
AI.result: 实验表明MMLU各学科间的排名变异性很大，这种变异性在比较LLM或识别最优模型时必须被考虑。
AI.conclusion: 在评估预训练模型时，不能仅依赖单一排行榜排名，需要纳入对排名不确定性的量化分析，特别是跨学科变异性对排名可靠性的影响。

title: The Aura in the Machine: Genealogy and the Status of the Work of Art in the Generative Era
comment: Submitted to Minds and Machines on 08 Jul 2026
summary:
This paper frames Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) not as an unprecedented technological rupture, but as an industrial-scale manifestation of a deeply rooted historical process. Through a genealogy of generative arts, it shows how AI's questions on authorship and creativity have precise historical precedents.
  A taxonomy of generative systems is proposed across three functional categories (medium, artwork, instrument), the attribution of which is editorial rather than ontological.
  From individual cognitive atrophy to Model Collapse, the systemic risks of creative automation are identified; environmental enrichment is proposed as an antidote.
  The role of the artist undergoes a radical metamorphosis: from craftsman of the object to entropic agent, systems designer, explorer, and negentropic curator. This pipeline-based taxonomy rests on a specific premise: the algorithmic system remains medium, instrument, or artwork, while creative agency resides in the humans distributed along it.
  Algorithmic Repetition is introduced as the aesthetic degeneration of aligned generative systems; the Benjaminian aura does not dissolve in the generative era but condenses upon the productive system. Manifestation is proposed as a third ontological status for generative works, transcending the dichotomy between original and copy.
  To support the proposed theses, two complementary aspects are examined: the radicalization of distributed authorship; and the reevaluation of older generative models, whose instability constitutes an aesthetic degree of freedom lost by recent ones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式AI并非技术断裂，而是历史过程的工业化体现。通过谱系学分析，建立了生成系统的三分法分类（媒介、艺术品、乐器），并探讨了创造性自动化带来的系统性风险，提出艺术家角色从工匠转变为熵变代理、系统设计师、探索者和负熵策展人。
AI.motivation: 挑战当前将生成式AI视为前所未有技术断裂的主流叙事，揭示其在创造力与作者身份问题上具有精确的历史先例，避免对技术的盲目崇拜或恐慌。
AI.method: 采用谱系学方法追溯生成艺术的演进历史；提出三分法分类（媒介、艺术品、乐器），该归属是编辑性而非本体论的；引入"算法重复"作为对齐生成系统的美学退化概念；提出"显像"作为生成作品的第三本体状态。
AI.result: 识别出从个体认知萎缩到模型坍缩的系统性风险；重新定义了艺术家角色；指出本雅明灵韵在生成时代并未消散，而是凝结于生产系统本身；发现早期生成模型的审美自由度被近期模型所丧失。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI应被理解为历史连续体的一部分，而非断裂；提出环境富集作为创造性自动化的解毒剂；生成作品的"显像"状态超越了原作与复制品的二元对立，为理解数字时代的艺术本体论提供了新框架。

title: Optimal Scheduling for Remote State Estimation over Hybrid Channels
summary: We study optimal scheduling for remote state estimation over a network with two heterogeneous communication channels: a fast but unreliable channel and a slow but reliable channel. To capture temporal correlations in packet losses, we model the unreliable channel as a Gilbert-Elliott (GE) channel. The remote estimation setup consists of a source, a sensor, and a remote estimator. The source evolves as a discrete-time autoregressive (AR) process, and the sensor decides at each time whether to use the fast unreliable channel or the slow reliable channel. We formulate the scheduling problem faced by the sensor as a Markov decision process (MDP) with a continuous state-space and consider minimizing the infinite horizon average cost criterion, where the cost consists of the squared estimation error and the transmission energy consumed. We establish the existence of an optimal stationary policy. We then characterize the structure of an optimal policy, and show that it has a threshold structure with respect to the estimation error. An optimal policy chooses from amongst the two channels based on whether the error exceeds certain thresholds, where the threshold value depends upon the GE channel state. When the system parameters are unknown, we propose an actor-critic (AC) learning algorithm that exploits the threshold structure of an optimal policy. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed AC algorithm learns the policy structure effectively and achieves performance close to that of the optimal policy computed using the relative value iteration (RVI).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了远程状态估计中在两条异构通信信道（快速不可靠的Gilbert-Elliott信道和慢速可靠信道）之间的最优调度问题，提出了基于估计误差阈值的结构最优策略，并针对未知系统参数设计了利用阈值结构的actor-critic学习算法。
AI.motivation: 实际通信网络中信道往往具有异构特性（速度与可靠性的权衡），且信道丢包存在时间相关性。现有研究较少同时考虑这两方面因素来优化远程估计的调度策略。
AI.method: 将调度问题建模为连续状态空间的MDP，以无穷时域平均代价（估计误差平方+传输能耗）为准则；证明了最优平稳策略的存在性，并刻画了其阈值结构——依据估计误差是否超过与GE信道状态相关的阈值来选择信道。对于未知参数情况，提出了利用阈值结构的actor-critic强化学习算法。
AI.result: 理论证明了最优策略的阈值结构；数值实验表明，所提出的AC算法能有效学习该结构，性能接近利用相对值迭代（RVI）计算的最优策略。
AI.conclusion: 将信道异构性与丢包时间相关性统一纳入调度优化框架，为实际无线网络中的远程估计提供了既具理论基础又可在线学习的实用方案。

title: Diffusion-corrected Autoregressive Fourier Neural Operator for Droplet Evolution Prediction
summary: Predicting droplet evolution in material jetting, or Inkjet Printing (IJP), is essential for maintaining printing quality. However, long-horizon forecasts remain challenging due to error accumulation and the complex coupling of process variables. In this work, we introduce the Diffusion-corrected Auto-Regressive Fourier Neural Operator (DiffARFNO), a two-stage framework that combines an autoregressive Fourier-MIONet with a conditional Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) corrector. Fourier-MIONet is trained as a coarse predictor and deployed autoregressively for long-horizon forecasting. In the second stage, a DDIM-based conditional corrector refines the coarse prediction within each sliding window through efficient iterative denoising. By combining coarse predictions from Fourier-MIONet with a DDIM corrector that restores fine details, DiffARFNO aims to provide high-fidelity predictions for long-horizon forecasts. Extensive experiments on droplet datasets from ANSYS Fluent demonstrate that DiffARFNO significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffARFNO框架，结合自回归傅里叶神经算子与扩散模型校正器，用于喷墨打印中液滴演化的长时间高保真预测，显著优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 喷墨打印中液滴演化预测对保证打印质量至关重要，但长时间预测面临误差累积和过程变量复杂耦合的挑战，现有方法精度不足。
AI.method: 提出两阶段DiffARFNO框架：第一阶段用Fourier-MIONet作为粗粒度预测器进行自回归长时间预测；第二阶段用条件DDIM校正器在滑动窗口内通过迭代去噪细化粗预测结果，恢复细节。
AI.result: 在ANSYS Fluent生成的液滴数据集上，DiffARFNO在长时间预测任务中显著优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: DiffARFNO通过粗预测与扩散校正结合的策略，有效解决了长时间预测中的误差累积问题，为喷墨打印液滴动力学预测提供了高保真方案。

title: Schema-Constrained Document-Level Event Argument Extraction with Lightweight LLM Fine-Tuning
summary:
Event Argument Extraction (EAE) converts documents into structured event records by identifying argument spans and assigning them schema-defined roles. Document-level EAE is challenging due to long-range dependencies between triggers and arguments, cross-sentence context, and strict role constraints, which often lead to boundary errors, uncertainty in roles, and inconsistencies with restricted schemas.
  In this paper, we study whether mid-sized open LLMs can perform schema-constrained EAE reliably at the document level on MAVEN-ARG. Our approach combines (i) role-set injection in prompts for schema compliance, (ii) parameter-efficient supervised fine-tuning (LoRA) using the same JSON-only interface used at inference, and (iii) deterministic decoding with post-processing that validates JSON, filters invalid roles, de-duplicates arguments, and aligns spans to the document window. Under the official MAVEN-ARG evaluator, fine-tuned mid-sized open models outperform previously reported GPT baselines across mention, entity-coreference, and event-coreference evaluations; our best model (Phi-4, 14B) reaches 42.39\% F1 at the event-coreference level. Code to reproduce experiments is publicly available at https://github.com/dessertlab/EAE/.

AI.tldr: 本文研究中等规模开源LLM在文档级事件论元抽取任务上的表现，通过角色集注入、LoRA微调、确定性解码与后处理，在MAVEN-ARG基准上超越了此前GPT基线，最佳模型Phi-4 (14B)在事件共指层面达到42.39% F1。
AI.motivation: 文档级事件论元抽取面临远程依赖、跨句上下文和严格角色约束等挑战，容易导致边界错误、角色不确定性和违反模式约束。现有研究多依赖大规模闭源模型，本文探索中等规模开源LLM能否可靠完成这一任务。
AI.method: (1) 提示中注入角色集以增强模式合规性；(2) 使用与推理一致的JSON接口进行LoRA参数高效微调；(3) 确定性解码+后处理，包括JSON验证、角色过滤、去重、跨度对齐文档窗口。
AI.result: 在MAVEN-ARG官方评估器下，微调后的中等规模开源模型在提及、实体共指和事件共指三个层面均超越此前GPT基线；Phi-4 (14B)在事件共指层面达到42.39% F1。
AI.conclusion: 中等规模开源LLM经过合适的微调与约束解码，能够可靠执行文档级模式约束的事件论元抽取，且性能优于此前GPT闭源模型。

title: Optimal Safety Control using High-Order Control Barrier Functions
summary: This paper investigates the optimal safety control problem of nonlinear control systems by proposing novel high-order control barrier functions (HOCBFs). Different from zeroing HOCBFs, two novel HOCBFs are derived and the safety controllers are designed in an explicit way. Next, we implement vector Lyapunov function approach to propose a novel high-order control Lyapunov function (HOCLF) for the stabilization control problem. The relations between the proposed and existing HOCBFs are discussed. Afterwards, the compatibility of the proposed HOCLF and HOCBF is addressed to guarantee the stabilization and safety control objectives simultaneously, and thus the optimal controller is established. Finally, a numerical example from the navigation problem of quadrotors is presented to illustrate the efficacy of the derived results.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非线性控制系统的最优安全控制问题，提出了新型高阶控制屏障函数（HOCBFs），并引入向量Lyapunov函数方法设计高阶控制Lyapunov函数（HOCLF），通过兼容性分析实现稳定与安全的协同最优控制，最后在四旋翼导航问题中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有零化型高阶控制屏障函数存在不足，需要推导更优的HOCBF以显式设计安全控制器，同时需解决稳定控制与安全控制的兼容性问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出两种新型高阶控制屏障函数（HOCBFs），实现安全控制器的显式设计；2) 采用向量Lyapunov函数方法，提出高阶控制Lyapunov函数（HOCLF）；3) 建立HOCLF与HOCBF的兼容性条件，构建最优控制器。
AI.result: 通过四旋翼无人机导航数值仿真，验证了所提方法在同时保证系统稳定性与安全性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新型HOCBFs与HOCLF的兼容性设计为非线性控制系统的最优安全控制提供了有效框架，显式控制器形式便于实际应用。

title: Shapley Context Pruning: A Cooperative Game Perspective for Context Reranking and Pruning
summary: Context reranking and pruning have become essential for improving the efficiency of modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, yet an interpretable and unified framework remains underexplored. Previous work has primarily emphasized lexical retrieval, cross-encoder architectures, model distillation, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), mostly relying on heuristic loss functions and empirical attribution. This paper presents Shapley Context Pruning (SCP), a novel framework for context reranking that establishes a cooperative-game-theory perspective for importance attribution by modeling the context as a cooperative game. Balancing the trade-off between fine-grained and coarse-grained representations, we employ a Deep Sets architecture to approximate a permutation-invariant value function at the sentence level, utilizing pre-trained language models as sentence embedders and optimizing via a pairwise margin ranking loss. To ensure practical scalability without sacrificing mathematical rigor, we leverage Monte-Carlo sampling for efficient training and inference, providing formal theoretical error bounds and sample complexity guarantees for preserving Top-K subset rankings. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive experiments-spanning supporting-sentence recall, Needle-in-the-Haystack (NIAH) evaluations, long-context QA, and multi-hop reasoning-alongside rigorous ablation studies on embedding quality and attribution strategies. The model achieves competitive downstream QA performance against robust baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Shapley Context Pruning (SCP)，一个基于合作博弈论的上下文重排序框架，采用Deep Sets架构和蒙特卡洛采样实现高效且可解释的上下文剪枝，在多项评测中取得有竞争力的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统中的上下文重排序和剪枝方法缺乏可解释且统一的框架，大多依赖启发式损失函数和经验归因，未能从理论层面为重要性归因提供坚实依据。
AI.method: 将上下文建模为合作博弈，采用Deep Sets架构近似排列不变的值函数（句子级别），利用预训练语言模型作为句子编码器，通过成对边际排名损失优化，并使用蒙特卡洛采样保证可扩展性，提供理论误差界和样本复杂度保证。
AI.result: 在支持句子召回率、NIAH评估、长上下文QA和多跳推理等综合实验及消融研究中，SCP模型在下游QA任务上达到了与强基线竞争的出色性能。
AI.conclusion: SCP提供了一个可解释的上下文重排序框架，在理论和实践之间取得了良好平衡，为RAG系统的高效上下文剪枝提供了新思路。

title: Reducing Per-Sample Harm in Stochastic Optimization
summary:
Modern optimizers combine gradients from the current mini-batch with historical optimization state, such as momentum or adaptive moments. While highly effective, aggregating across the batch and incorporating this history can produce parameter updates that increase the loss of individual samples. We term this effect harm and formalize the parameter update as an optimization problem that explicitly minimizes the conflicting impact of both batch averaging and past optimization state on current data.
  Because the exact formulation is intractable, we introduce a highly efficient proxy. We first reduce the problem's dimensionality to the batch size, and then drastically cut memory and speed bottlenecks by successfully restricting the optimization to the last linear layer. This hinges on the unexpected finding that this layer alone reliably captures the second-order statistics of the per-sample gradients. The resulting surrogate problem integrates readily into standard optimizers like SGD and AdamW, and can be solved using a small number of GPU-friendly iterations. Crucially, the method exhibits favorable scaling properties, as the relative computational overhead shrinks as the model size or input grows. Experiments on image classification benchmarks confirm reduced per-sample interference and improved generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型优化方法，通过显式最小化批平均和优化历史对单个样本造成的"损害"（harm），在保持计算可行性的前提下，将问题降维到批次大小并限制在最后一层求解，从而减少样本间干扰并提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现代优化器（如SGD、AdamW）在聚合梯度时，批平均和历史状态（动量/自适应矩）会导致部分样本的损失上升，即"损害"（harm）现象。现有方法未显式解决这一冲突，作者旨在通过形式化优化问题来最小化这种负面影响。
AI.method: 1. 将参数更新建模为显式最小化批平均和历史状态对当前数据冲突影响的优化问题。2. 由于精确求解不可行，提出高效代理方法：先将问题降维至批次大小，再意外发现最后一层能可靠捕获样本梯度的二阶统计量，进而将优化限制在该层以大幅降低计算和内存开销。3. 该代理问题可集成到SGD和AdamW等标准优化器中，通过少量GPU友好迭代求解。
AI.result: 在图像分类基准测试中，该方法减少了样本间干扰（per-sample interference），并提升了泛化性能。计算开销随模型或输入规模增大而相对下降，具有良好的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式处理优化过程中的"损害"问题，本文提出的轻量级代理方法在保持标准优化器优势的同时，有效降低了样本间冲突，为改进深度学习优化器的样本级行为提供了新思路。

title: An approach to systemic risks of AI through the lens of emergence, collective action problems, and externalities
summary: The integration of general-purpose artificial intelligence models into downstream AI systems, among other developments, has given rise to new forms of risk that are more systemic in nature than conventional AI risks. However, there is no generally accepted definition of systemic risks in general and for AI in particular. Conceptualisations of these risks vary across research and regulation. Especially the application of the systemic risk approach to human rights or fundamental rights, like in the EU AI Act, is relatively new, just as the research on the contribution of AI to systemic forms of discrimination, privacy violations, erosions of democracy, or climate and environmental degradation. We argue that some concepts so far have not sufficiently take complexity and emergence into account. Furthermore, this variety of concepts might hinder responsible actors to adequately assess the systemic risks of AI, leading to inadequate prevention and mitigation measures and ineffective governance.
