summary: Machine learning-based Type 2 diabetes risk prediction models obtain good internal validation results but lose effectiveness in real-world applications due to deficient external testing and fairness assessment. We developed a multi-dimensional framework evaluating discrimination, calibration, interpretability, and algorithmic fairness on nationally representative populations. An XGBoost model was trained on NHANES 2015-2020 (n=15,685) using eight non-laboratory predictors: age, sex, race/ethnicity, BMI, smoking status, physical activity, history of heart attack, and history of stroke. External validation was performed on BRFSS 2020-2022 (n=1,285,783) under realistic distribution shift. Internal validation showed good discrimination (AUC=0.794, 95% CI 0.788-0.800), with performance loss on external validation (AUC=0.717, relative decrease: -9.7%, p<0.001). Fairness analysis revealed severe bias: elderly adults (>=60) showed AUC=0.607 vs 0.742 for young adults (difference=0.135, p<0.001); obese individuals showed AUC=0.698 vs 0.735 for normal weight (difference=0.037, p<0.001). Gender showed comparable performance (male=0.723 vs female=0.712, p=0.142). Calibration revealed risk overestimation (Brier score=0.123). SHAP analysis identified age, BMI, and physical activity as primary risk drivers. Populations with highest diabetes risk receive the worst algorithmic performance, underscoring the need for fairness-aware, age-stratified deployment strategies before clinical use.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了包含歧视、校准、可解释性和算法公平性的多维评估框架，在NHANES数据上训练XGBoost糖尿病风险预测模型，并在大规模外部数据BRFSS上验证。结果显示内部验证良好(AUC=0.794)，但外部验证性能下降(AUC=0.717)，且存在严重年龄偏见和高风险人群表现更差的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的2型糖尿病风险预测模型虽然内部验证结果不错，但在实际应用中因缺乏外部测试和公平性评估而失效，亟需更全面的评估框架来检验模型的真实表现。
AI.method: 使用NHANES 2015-2020 (n=15,685)训练XGBoost模型，基于8个非实验室指标(年龄、性别、种族、BMI、吸烟、运动、心脏病史、中风史)，在BRFSS 2020-2022 (n=1,285,783)上外部验证，并系统评估歧视、校准、可解释性和公平性。
AI.result: 内部AUC=0.794，外部AUC=0.717(-9.7%)；老年人AUC=0.607 vs 年轻人0.742(差距0.135)；肥胖者AUC=0.698 vs 正常体重0.735(差距0.037)；性别差异不显著(男0.723 vs 女0.712)。校准显示风险高估(Brier=0.123)。
AI.conclusion: 糖尿病风险最高的人群反而获得最差的算法性能，强调了在临床应用前需要公平性感知和年龄分层的部署策略。

title: Debate-on-Graph: Reliable and Adaptive Reasoning of Large Language Model on Uncertain Knowledge Graph
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in natural language processing. However, LLMs often suffer from hallucinations and lack of relevant knowledge when dealing with question answering (QA) tasks. To mitigate these issues, knowledge graphs (KGs) have been utilized to enhance LLM reasoning. Nevertheless, KGs often contain noise and errors, while existing KG-enhanced LLM approaches are generally unable to identify and filter such noisy and erroneous content, which can instead amplify hallucinations and pose challenges for reliable reasoning. Uncertain knowledge graphs (UKGs), which associate each triple with a confidence score to quantify uncertainty, offer a promising direction to address this challenge. Compared with prior work, we investigate how to leverage UKGs to support LLMs for QA. We propose Debate-on-Graph (DoG), a new framework that enables LLMs and UKGs to collaborate adaptively for reliable reasoning. Specifically, we first design a heuristic search algorithm tailored for UKGs to extract reliable and question-relevant subgraphs, thereby reducing noise and errors in retrieved knowledge. We then introduce a Multi-Agent Debate mechanism, which yields reliable answers through adaptive adversarial debates, aiming to fully exploit the knowledge in UKGs while preserving the reliability of retrieved evidence. Extensive experiments on four benchmark QA datasets show that DoG achieves state-of-the-art performance over existing LLM reasoning methods and KG-based baselines, while enabling reliable and adaptive reasoning. Our code is available at https://github.com/seucoin/Debate-on-Graph.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Debate-on-Graph (DoG) 框架，利用不确定知识图谱（UKG）增强大语言模型（LLM）在问答任务中的推理能力，通过启发式子图搜索和多智能体辩论机制实现可靠推理，在四个基准数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: LLM 在问答任务中容易出现幻觉和知识缺失问题，现有 KG 增强方法无法识别和过滤 KG 中的噪声与错误，反而可能放大幻觉。UKG 通过置信度分数量化不确定性，为解决该问题提供了新方向。
AI.method: 提出 DoG 框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 针对 UKG 设计的启发式搜索算法，提取可靠且与问题相关的子图以降低噪声；(2) 多智能体辩论机制，通过自适应对抗辩论充分挖掘 UKG 中的知识并保持检索证据的可靠性。
AI.result: 在四个基准 QA 数据集上的实验表明，DoG 在现有 LLM 推理方法和基于 KG 的基线方法中取得了最优性能（SOTA），同时实现了可靠且自适应的推理。
AI.conclusion: DoG 框架有效利用 UKG 的置信度信息来增强 LLM 问答推理，通过子图搜索和多智能体辩论协同工作机制，成功降低了知识噪声并提升了推理可靠性。

title: LLMs and Agentic AI Systems for Smart Grids: A Tutorial on Architectures and Applications
comment: 28 pages, 11 figures, 6 tables; plus supplementary material. Review/tutorial article
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and agentic AI systems have evolved from natural language tasks to using external tools to plan, retrieve, and act in technical domains. In smart grids, recent work applies agentic schemes to forecasting, optimization, and control, wrapping trusted solvers behind language interfaces and orchestrating multi-step workflows. The literature lacks a unified approach to designing and evaluating such systems. LLMs can produce numerically plausible yet physically infeasible outputs, evaluation protocols vary across tasks, and the boundary between what the model should and should not compute is implicit. This paper presents a solver-grounded design principle: a numerical result is reported only when it originates from a trusted tool and passes explicit verification. We review the building blocks of LLM and agentic AI systems for power systems: prompting strategies and agentic architectures. We instantiate the principle in four case studies: wind power forecasting, EV charging scheduling, power flow analysis, and contingency diagnosis, each comparing an LLM-only baseline against its solver-grounded counterpart on identical data and metrics. EVAgent reproduces the CVXPY optimum while reducing LLM-only unmet energy by 7.5-9.5x, and GridDebugAgent repairs 17/39 contingency cases while reducing total violations by 52.3%. We propose a four-group evaluation framework spanning task utility, solver-grounded correctness, faithfulness and safe failure, and cost and latency. A consistent division of labor emerges: the agentic system reliably orchestrates, retrieves, and explains, while trusted tools compute and a verification gate decides what is reported.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于求解器的设计原则，即数值结果仅当源自可信工具并通过显式验证时才输出。通过四个案例研究（风电预测、EV充电调度、潮流分析、故障诊断）验证，该方法相比纯LLM基线显著提升了物理可行性和可靠性，并提出了四维度评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有工作将LLM和智能体系统应用于智能电网的预测、优化和控制，但缺乏统一的设计和评估方法。LLM可能产生数值上合理但物理上不可行的输出，评估协议因任务而异，模型应计算与不应计算的边界不明确。
AI.method: 提出求解器接地设计原则：数值结果必须源自可信工具并通过显式验证。回顾了提示策略和智能体架构等构建模块，并在四个案例研究（风电预测、EV充电调度、潮流分析、故障诊断）中将纯LLM基线与其求解器接地对应版本进行比较。提出四组评估框架：任务效用、求解器接地正确性、忠诚度与安全失败、成本与延迟。
AI.result: EVAgent复现了CVXPY最优解，同时将仅LLM的未满足能量减少7.5-9.5倍；GridDebugAgent修复了39个故障案例中的17个，同时将总违规减少52.3%。
AI.conclusion: 智能体系统与可信工具之间存在一致的分工：智能体负责编排、检索和解释，可信工具负责计算，验证门负责决定输出内容。求解器接地原则能有效提升LLM在电力系统中的物理可行性和可靠性。

title: Exact Network Surgery: Functional Invariance and Gradient Plasticity in Reactive Computational Graphs
comment: Companion paper: "Cost Accounting for Reactive Computational Graphs" (submitted concurrently)
summary: Function-preserving network growth techniques such as Net2Net and progressive stacking expand a model's capacity without destroying its learned function, but existing formulations either tolerate numerical perturbations or require a full rebuild of the training program. We formalize Exact Network Surgery: the in-place insertion of a residual block into a live computational graph such that (i) the network function is preserved -- bit-exactly under explicit floating-point hypotheses -- and (ii) inserted parameters remain trainable immediately after insertion. We prove an identity-morphism theorem for gated residual blocks, a structural-locality theorem showing that a reactive invalidation engine recomputes exactly the downstream cone of the insertion point, leaving every other node's value and optimizer state untouched, and an escape-from-initialization proposition showing that the Gradient Shadowing gate alpha, initialized at zero over a randomly initialized branch, receives a generically non-zero gradient at insertion time. We identify a degenerate configuration -- zero-initialized output projections combined with a zero gate -- that is an exact saddle point gradient descent cannot escape. Every claim is validated on the reference implementation in NeuroDSL, a reactive graph engine in Julia: grafting is bit-exact on every logit tested (0 mismatches out of 1600); the gate escapes zero at the first optimizer step and unlocks branch gradients at the second, exactly as predicted; the degenerate configuration exhibits gradients identically zero for the entire 600-step run; surgery cost tracks downstream cone size with r = 0.9992 while graft-plus-invalidation bookkeeping is constant (about 0.75 ms) across insertion depths; and training resumes bit-identically across a real process restart. A flagged preliminary appendix reports first single-seed observations on post-insertion gate dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出精确网络手术（Exact Network Surgery），即在保持网络函数比特级精确的前提下，将残差块原位插入到实时计算图中，并确保插入参数立即可训练。通过身份同态定理、结构局部性定理和逃逸初始化命题等理论保证，并在NeuroDSL引擎上验证了比特精确性、梯度逃逸行为及性能开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的网络增长技术（如Net2Net、progressive stacking）要么容忍数值扰动，要么需要完全重建训练程序。缺乏一种既能保持函数精确不变又能立即可训练的原位插入方法。
AI.method: 形式化定义了精确网络手术：(1) 在实时计算图中原位插入残差块；(2) 提出身份同态定理确保gated残差块的函数保持；(3) 结构局部性定理使响应式失效引擎仅重算插入点的下游锥体；(4) 逃逸初始化命题证明零初始化的梯度掩蔽门α在插入时获得非零梯度；(5) 识别出零初始化输出投影+零门导致的退化鞍点配置。
AI.result: 在NeuroDSL上验证：移植1600个logits无一错误；门控在第一步优化器步长后逃逸零值；退化配置600步梯度为零；手术开销与下游锥体大小相关系数0.9992；书签开销恒定约0.75ms；训练在进程重启后比特一致。
AI.conclusion: 精确网络手术为网络增长提供了一种既保持函数精确性又支持原位可训练的理论框架和实现方案，揭示了梯度掩蔽门逃逸机制及退化鞍点配置，为后续动态网络扩展研究奠定基础。

title: CADMM-Prox: A Bi-level Consensus ADMM for Non-smooth Non-convex Distributed Consensus Optimization
summary: Non-smooth and non-convex optimization problems are pervasive in machine learning, control, and signal processing, due to the need for sparse solutions and the inherently non-convex nature of many objective functions. In this paper, we study non-smooth and non-convex distributed optimization problems. We propose a novel bi-level Consensus Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) algorithm, termed CADMM-Prox. The proposed algorithm integrates classical Consensus ADMM with a proximal mechanism by introducing a sufficiently large proximal term associated with an outer-level variable. Under the mild assumption that the local objective functions are semi-convex, CADMM-Prox is guaranteed to converge globally to a neighborhood of a Clarke stationary point. Numerical experiments on a phase retrieval problem demonstrate that our proposed method exhibits more stable convergence behavior compared with baseline algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CADMM-Prox的双层共识ADMM算法，用于解决非光滑非凸分布式优化问题。通过引入与外部变量相关的大近端项，在局部目标函数半凸的温和假设下，算法能全局收敛到Clarke稳定点的邻域。相位恢复实验表明其收敛行为比基线算法更稳定。
AI.motivation: 机器学习、控制和信号处理中广泛存在非光滑非凸优化问题（如稀疏解需求、目标函数固有非凸性），现有分布式优化方法在处理这类问题时面临挑战，亟需具有全局收敛保证的算法。
AI.method: 提出CADMM-Prox算法，将经典共识ADMM与近端机制相结合：在外部变量上引入一个足够大的近端项，形成双层优化结构。该方法仅需局部目标函数满足半凸性这一温和假设。
AI.result: 理论上证明算法能全局收敛到Clarke稳定点的邻域；在相位恢复问题上，与基线算法相比展现出更稳定的收敛行为。
AI.conclusion: CADMM-Prox为分布式非光滑非凸优化提供了一种具有全局收敛保证的有效方案，近端机制的引入增强了收敛稳定性，在信号处理等领域具有应用潜力。

title: More Than Memory: Task-Conditioned Signed FFN Writes in Long-Context Retrieval
summary:
FFNs are often treated as parametric memories. In long-context retrieval, however, the sharper question is not only what they store, but whether their native residual writes push the current retrieval state toward or away from the correct answer. We test this by scaling the model's own FFN write one layer at a time, without editing weights or injecting external steering vectors.
  Across controlled literal and semantic retrieval suites, native FFN response surfaces are signed, layer-specific, and task-conditioned: the final FFN is a suppressor in 7 of 8 model-suite cases, and 60% of layers switch role between retrieval modes (95% CI [50%, 69%]). A local directional derivative along the native write separates the two monotone roles: suppressors have negative derivative in 34/35 cases, and amplifiers have positive derivative in 18/18 cases, so the roles are not reducible to write size. On a safety-filtered LongBench retrieval-QA probe, the same diagnostic predicts attenuation damage with raw R^2=0.796 on Qwen2.5-7B and 0.791 on Qwen3.5-9B; a held-out suppressor-attenuation policy improves retrieval margins over random and norm-matched controls. These results show that native FFN scaling exposes a signed, task-conditioned residual-write structure in retrieval, and that write-gradient alignment is a compact diagnostic for the two monotone roles.

AI.tldr: 本文发现FFN在检索任务中扮演两种相反的残差写入角色：放大器与抑制器。这些角色是带符号、分层的、任务条件化的。通过局部方向导数可以区分两种角色（抑制器导数为负，放大器导数为正），且该诊断能够预测检索性能退化（R²≈0.79）。
AI.motivation: 已有研究将FFN视为参数化记忆，但在长上下文检索中，关键问题不仅是FFN存储了什么，更是它们原生的残差写入（residual writes）将检索状态推向还是推离正确答案。需要系统性地检验这一方向性作用。
AI.method: 逐层缩放模型自身的FFN写入（不编辑权重或注入外部引导向量），在受控的字面检索与语义检索套件上测量FFN响应曲面；计算局部方向导数（local directional derivative）来区分放大器与抑制器；在安全过滤后的LongBench检索QA探测上验证诊断有效性。
AI.result: FFN响应是带符号、分层、任务条件化的：最终FFN在7/8模型-套件组合中是抑制器；60%的层在两种检索模式间切换角色。方向导数区分两种单调角色：抑制器34/35例为负，放大器18/18例为正。该诊断对检索衰减的预测R²≈0.80；基于抑制器-衰减的干预策略优于随机和范数匹配基线。
AI.conclusion: 原生FFN缩放揭示了检索中带符号、任务条件化的残差写入结构，写入梯度对齐（write-gradient alignment）是区分两种单调角色的紧凑诊断指标。

title: FST.ai 2.5: Explainable and Uncertainty-Aware AI for Olympic and Para-Taekwondo Decision Support, Athlete Digital Twins, and Federation-Scale Analytics
summary:
The rapid digitalisation of elite sport has created new opportunities for integrating artificial intelligence (AI), performance analytics, and decision-support systems into athlete development and competition management. However, existing solutions remain fragmented, typically addressing isolated tasks such as performance analysis, athlete monitoring, or referee support. This paper presents \textbf{FST$\cdot$ai~2.5}, an explainable, uncertainty-aware, and secure AI framework for Olympic and Para-Taekwondo.
  \textbf{FST$\cdot$ai~2.5} introduces a unified digital ecosystem integrating athlete intelligence, competition analytics, federation-scale data management, AI-assisted decision support, athlete and event digital twins, explainable performance indicators, and adaptive training recommendations. The framework supports World Taekwondo (WT), Member National Associations (MNAs), coaches, referees, analysts, and athletes through transparent, secure, and federation-aware governance.
  By combining multi-source competition data, athlete-performance information, and contextual evidence, \textbf{FST$\cdot$ai~2.5} provides tactical diagnostics, longitudinal athlete monitoring, performance forecasting, personalised development planning, and federation-wide benchmarking using explainable and uncertainty-aware AI. Prototype deployments demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed framework. Although developed for Olympic and Para-Taekwondo, the methodology is broadly applicable to explainable AI, digital twins, and trustworthy decision support in combat sports and other high-performance sporting environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FST·ai 2.5，一个面向奥运及残奥跆拳道的可解释、不确定性感知且安全的AI框架，整合运动员智能、比赛分析、数字孪生等功能于统一数字生态系统，并已在原型部署中验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有精英体育AI解决方案碎片化严重，仅能处理孤立任务（如表现分析、运动员监控、裁判支持），缺乏统一、可解释且安全的集成框架。
AI.method: 构建统一数字生态系统，融合多源比赛数据、运动员表现信息和情境证据，集成运动员智能、比赛分析、联邦级数据管理、AI辅助决策、数字孪生、可解释性能指标及自适应训练推荐，采用透明、安全且联邦感知的治理机制。
AI.result: 原型部署验证了框架的可行性，能提供战术诊断、纵向运动员监控、表现预测、个性化发展规划及联邦级基准比较。
AI.conclusion: 虽专为跆拳道开发，但该方法论可广泛应用于格斗运动及其他高性能体育场景中的可解释AI、数字孪生和可信决策支持系统。

title: Consumption and Investment in Incomplete Markets with Epstein-Zin Preferences in Infinite Horizon
summary: We solve the optimal consumption-investment problem in incomplete markets, where the investor aims to maximise an Epstein-Zin type stochastic differential utility from consumption over an infinite time horizon. We verify that the optimal strategies can be characterised by the limit of a sequence of solutions of the HJB equation in bounded domains with carefully designed boundary conditions. We also conduct numerical experiments for three market models. Explicit solutions are constructed under some parameter regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不完全市场中投资者在无限时间范围内最大化Epstein-Zin型随机微分效用的最优消费-投资问题，通过有界域HJB方程序列极限刻画最优策略，并进行了数值实验。
AI.motivation: 在不完全市场环境下，投资者面临更复杂的消费-投资决策问题，而Epstein-Zin偏好能更好地区分风险厌恶与跨期替代弹性，现有研究对此类问题的最优策略刻画尚不充分。
AI.method: 通过构造有界域内精心设计边界条件的HJB方程序列，取其极限来表征最优策略；同时在特定参数条件下构建显式解，并针对三种市场模型进行数值实验验证。
AI.result: 证明了最优策略可由有界域HJB方程序列的极限刻画，并在特定参数条件下得到了显式解，数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的序列极限方法有效解决了不完全市场中Epstein-Zin效用下的最优消费-投资问题，为更一般的不完全市场模型提供了理论框架和数值求解路径。

title: Feature Generation Using LLMs: An Evolutionary Algorithm Approach
summary: A crucial step in machine learning pipelines is to present each entity with features or attributes that are representative of the characteristics of the processed entities. Feature engineering is an important step in finding a relation among attributes that otherwise may not be processed by the ML algorithms. Meanwhile, Large Language Models have shown promising abilities in coding, mathematical reasoning, and processing world knowledge. In this work, we utilize an LLM for the problem of feature generation from tabular data based on the previously given features. We have created a pipeline that takes a set of attributes and a prompt to generate new features. Then, our selection algorithm selects the best-performing sets of attributes. We apply our method to eight datasets from different domains and data types. Our results show that, in most cases, the language model can produce new features based on mathematical and logical operators that are useful for the given tasks and can improve classification results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大语言模型（LLM）从表格数据中自动生成新特征，并通过选择算法筛选最佳特征集，实验表明该方法在多个数据集上提升了分类效果。
AI.motivation: 特征工程是机器学习中关键但繁琐的步骤，传统方法难以自动发现属性间复杂关系。LLM展现出强大的推理和知识处理能力，因此作者希望利用LLM来自动化特征生成过程。
AI.method: 构建了一个pipeline：输入已有属性集合+提示词(prompt) → LLM生成新特征 → 选择算法筛选表现最佳的特征子集。新特征基于数学和逻辑运算符生成。
AI.result: 在来自不同领域和数据类型的8个数据集上，LLM生成的新特征在多数情况下能提升分类任务的效果。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够基于数学和逻辑运算自动生成有意义的特征，有助于提升下游任务的性能，验证了LLM在自动化特征工程中的潜力。

title: Team DACTYL at PAN 2026: Bayesian Data Mixing and Empirical X-risk Minimization for AI-text Detection
summary: Existing research shows that AI-generated text detection classifiers achieve strong in-distribution (ID) performance but do not maintain the same performance on out-of-distribution (OOD) texts, suggesting overfitting to dataset-specific features. However, combining different training datasets doesn't always improve performance and, in some cases, can even encourage shortcut learning. To address this issue, we fine-tune BERT-tiny models with Bayesian classification heads to select texts across three different datasets to use as a consolidated training set. We trained three different classifiers: fine-tuned DeBERTa-V3-large and ModernBERT-large classifiers via empirical X-risk minimization, and an MCGrad model that calibrates the predictions from the ModernBERT-large classifier. The DeBERTa-V3-large-large classifier achieves a mean score of 0.882 on the PAN 2026 test set across five metrics: AUROC, $F_1$, C@1, Brier score, and $F_{0.5u}$. ModernBERT-large achieves a score of 0.96 while MCGrad achieves the best score of the three with a mean score of 0.974, ranking second on the leaderboard. Our results highlight that careful dataset curation can lead to strong OOD performance. We release our ModernBERT-large and DeBERTa-V3-large models at https://huggingface.co/collections/ShantanuT01/panclef-2026 .

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI生成文本检测中过拟合特定数据集的问题，提出通过贝叶斯分类头精调BERT-tiny模型来精选训练数据，并训练了三个检测器，其中MCGrad模型在PAN 2026测试集上达到0.974的平均得分，排名第二，表明精心筛选数据集能有效提升OOD检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测分类器在分布内表现良好，但在分布外文本上性能下降，表明存在过拟合问题；且简单合并不同训练集有时反促使用捷径学习，亟需更优的数据筛选与训练策略。
AI.method: 使用贝叶斯分类头对BERT-tiny模型进行微调，从三个不同数据集中筛选文本构建融合训练集；在此基础上训练三个分类器：DeBERTa-V3-large和ModernBERT-large通过经验X风险最小化微调，MCGrad则对ModernBERT-large的预测进行校准。
AI.result: DeBERTa-V3-large在五个指标上平均得分0.882；ModernBERT-large得分0.96；MCGrad最佳，平均得分0.974，在排行榜上位列第二。
AI.conclusion: 精心筛选训练数据集能够显著提升模型在分布外文本上的检测性能，证实了数据质量比数据量更重要的观点。

title: Just A Rather Very Intelligent Spoken Agent
summary: Long-horizon AI agents are becoming increasingly capable, yet their interaction with users remains surprisingly thin. In most workflows, users give an initial instruction, receive only selective textual updates, and lose a clear sense of what the agent is doing or when to step in. This leaves a missing part in the current agent ecosystem: an always-on Jarvis-style mediator that keeps the agent continuously reachable to the user. Such a mediator should support real-time spoken interaction with the user, answer questions without interrupting the worker, proactively report progress or confusion, and inject user guidance back into the agent's execution when useful. In this work, we introduce JarvisBench, a benchmark for measuring the dual value of mediation in long-horizon agent workflows. JarvisBench contains two complementary tracks: an agent-collaboration track that measures whether mediation improves downstream task completion, and a user-interaction track that measures whether mediation makes ongoing execution more understandable, responsive, and accessible to users. We instantiate the benchmark with a modular reference Jarvis prototype and evaluate it on 34 text-only WildClaw tasks executed in OpenClaw. Preliminary results with GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini-based, and GPT-based worker agents suggest that Jarvis-style mediation can provide trace-grounded responses to user questions and improve task performance when sparse user guidance is injected at appropriate moments. The results also show that effectiveness depends strongly on the mediator's LLM brain, highlighting both the promise of this missing middle layer and the need for broader community effort. Demo page https://cchen1436.github.io/jarvis

AI.tldr: 本文提出了JarvisBench，一个用于评估长周期AI代理中"中介层"（Jarvis式调解器）价值的基准测试。该中介层支持实时语音交互、主动报告进度、回答用户问题，并将用户指导注入代理执行流程。基准包含代理协作和用户交互两个维度，初步实验表明这种调解方式能提升任务性能，但其效果高度依赖底层LLM的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前长周期AI代理与用户的交互过于单薄：用户仅能给出初始指令，接收零散文本更新，缺乏对代理执行过程的持续感知和干预能力。现有生态系统缺少一个始终在线、类似Jarvis的中介层，使得代理能够持续与用户保持联系，支持实时语音交互、主动汇报、问题解答和用户指导注入。
AI.method: 构建JarvisBench基准测试，包含两个互补轨道：(1) 代理协作轨道，衡量调解是否提升下游任务完成率；(2) 用户交互轨道，衡量调解是否使执行过程更可理解、响应更及时。在34个文本型WildClaw任务上，使用GPT-5.5、Claude Opus 4.7、Gemini和GPT系列代理评估模块化Jarvis原型。
AI.result: Jarvis式调解能为用户问题提供基于执行轨迹的答案，并在合适时机注入稀疏用户指导时提升任务性能。调解效果强烈依赖于调解器所用LLM的能力。
AI.conclusion: Jarvis式中介层是当前AI代理生态中缺失但极具潜力的环节，能显著改善人机协作体验和任务完成效果。同时需要更广泛的社区共同努力来推动这一方向的发展。

title: Monotonicity and Frank-Wolfe Dynamics in Atomic Splittable Congestion Games
summary: We study universal monotonicity and Frank--Wolfe stability properties for atomic splittable congestion games. Specifically, we characterize the largest resource cost class for which the associated variational inequality operator is monotone for every game. This characterization is given by a curvature inequality involving the first two derivatives of the allowable cost functions and the number of players. Our framework yields exact characterizations for universal monotonicity, strict monotonicity, and strong monotonicity; the strict and strong variants require corresponding stricter curvature conditions. We then draw a perhaps surprising connection to learning dynamics in atomic splittable congestion games. We show that the very same curvature condition also characterizes universal \emph{local and global stability} of the Euclidean-regularized Frank--Wolfe dynamics on arbitrary convex strategy spaces, provided the cost class is closed under positive affine transformations. Finally, we study games on simplices and show that an interior equilibrium of the regularized Frank--Wolfe dynamic is locally exponentially stable, even without the curvature condition.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了原子可分拥堵博弈的通用单调性和Frank-Wolfe稳定性，通过曲率不等式刻画了成本函数类与单调性之间的精确关系，并发现同一曲率条件也决定了欧几里得正则化Frank-Wolfe动力学的局部和全局稳定性。
AI.motivation: 建立原子可分拥堵博弈中变分不等式算子的单调性条件与学习动力学稳定性之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 利用曲率不等式（涉及成本函数的前两阶导数和玩家数量）对通用单调性（以及严格单调和强单调）进行精确刻画，并证明该条件同样刻画Frank-Wolfe动力学的稳定性。
AI.result: (1) 精确刻画了成本函数类使得变分不等式算子在所有博弈中保持单调性的最大类；(2) 同一曲率条件也刻画了正则化Frank-Wolfe动力学的局部和全局稳定性；(3) 在单纯形博弈中，即使不满足曲率条件，内点均衡也是局部指数稳定的。
AI.conclusion: 原子可分拥堵博弈的单调性与Frank-Wolfe动力学稳定性由同一曲率条件统一刻画，揭示了博弈结构属性与学习动力学稳定性之间的深刻联系。

title: Discovery by Dreaming: Cross-Domain Recombination in Artificial Memory
summary: Dreams splice together people, places, and times that never met. Neuroscience suggests this recombination is not noise, but a function driving insight and creative discovery. This reframes memory consolidation: rather than merely defending against forgetting, its measurable value lies in recombining knowledge across experiences that have not yet co-occurred. We test this directly by isolating the recombinatory-replay mechanism and implementing it in two architecturally unrelated systems: a LoRA fine-tuning pipeline (DREAMS) and a symbolic engine replaying structured knowledge objects (SAPIENCE). Both systems converge on the same finding: cross-domain consolidation creates value, while within-domain rehearsal does not. The symbolic arm surfaces novel cross-domain connections at 85.7%, a +21 percentage point (pp) gain over baseline. The neural arm improves overall by +5.64 pp, but on subtasks explicitly requiring cross-domain transfer (like unseen math reasoning on GSM8K), gains reach +14.5 pp. This effect is a genuine property of the weights--not a prompt artifact--as prepending the same material in-context to a 671B-parameter model actually reverses the gain. We validate this prediction against documented discoveries across 50,000 real papers and state a falsifiable hippocampal-recording prediction to distinguish recombination from rehearsal. Ultimately, this principle is substrate-general, tracking real discovery at scale. Reading the literature teaches a model to recall what it has seen, but producing discovery requires a separate offline phase that recombines knowledge across domains--the computational analog of dreaming. Consolidation is not for remembering, but for discovering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出记忆巩固的真正价值不在于防止遗忘，而在于跨领域重组知识以产生新发现。通过在LoRA微调（DREAMS）和符号引擎（SAPIENCE）两种无关系统中实现重组合放机制，验证了跨领域整合创造价值而领域内复述则无效。两种系统均表现提升，符号系统发现新跨域连接达85.7%（+21 pp），神经系统的跨域转移子任务提升达+14.5 pp。研究还通过5万篇真实论文验证了这一预测，并提出了可证伪的海马体记录预测。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观点——记忆巩固仅仅是为了防止遗忘。基于神经科学发现（梦境重组的创造力功能），提出记忆巩固的真正价值在于跨经验重组知识以驱动洞察和创造性发现。
AI.method: 分离出"重组合放机制"并在两个架构无关的系统中独立实现：(1) DREAMS——LoRA微调流水线；(2) SAPIENCE——符号引擎重放结构化知识对象。对比跨领域整合与领域内复述的效果差异。
AI.result: 符号系统发现新跨域连接达85.7%（+21 pp）；神经系统中跨域转移子任务（如GSM8K数学推理）提升+14.5 pp。预置相同上下文到671B大模型反而逆转增益，证明效果源于权重而非提示。通过5万篇真实论文验证该预测。
AI.conclusion: 记忆巩固的核心目的不是记住，而是发现。原理具有基底通用性，可追踪规模化的真实发现。梦境的计算类比——阅读文献教模型回忆所见，但产生发现需要独立的离线阶段跨域重组知识。

title: The Librarian Who Refused to Code: Model-Dependent Identity Enactment in LLM Code Generation
comment: 17 pages, 3 tables, no figures. Ancillary files include raw completions, derived scores, analysis scripts, persona texts, and preregistration
summary: Biographical personas are widely used in system prompts, but their effects on code generation are rarely evaluated under controlled, pre-registered conditions. We tested four prompt conditions (no persona, two engineer personas, and a research-librarian persona), 12 code-generation tasks, two frontier models, and five runs per cell (480 completions). Persona effects differed between the two tested models. Under the pre-registered mixed-effects analysis, the condition-by-model interaction was significant for provider-reported output tokens; a post-hoc visible-character measure showed the same qualitative pattern. Six GPT-5.5 completions were length-capped and are reported separately. On Claude Opus, the minimalist engineer persona reduced visible output by 30% (33% in provider tokens) without improving correctness, while the thorough engineer persona increased output without a correctness gain. In an exploratory post-hoc analysis, the librarian persona elicited in-character disclaimers in 55 of 60 Opus responses and 12 genuine no-code responses, lowering mean correctness from 0.92 to 0.67. GPT-5.5 produced neither behavior in its 59 non-truncated responses. These results are consistent with personas acting as Model-Dependent behavioral-policy biases rather than universal quality interventions. We release raw completions, derived scores, analysis artifacts, a pre-registration document, and an execution gate log; end-to-end test-based rescoring requires an unreleased task harness.

AI.tldr: 通过预注册对照实验发现，系统提示中的角色设定对代码生成的影响取决于模型本身，而非普遍有效的质量提升手段。角色设定更像是一种依赖模型的行为策略偏差。
AI.motivation: 角色设定（biographical personas）被广泛用于系统提示中，但其对代码生成的影响缺乏受控、预注册条件下的系统评估。
AI.method: 设置四种提示条件（无角色、两个工程师角色、一个研究馆员角色），使用12个代码生成任务、两个前沿模型（GPT-5.5和Claude Opus），每个单元格运行5次，共480次生成。采用预注册的混合效应分析及事后分析。
AI.result: 角色效应因模型而异：在Claude Opus上，极简工程师角色使输出减少30%但未提升正确性；详尽工程师角色增加输出但未提升正确性；馆员角色导致55/60的响应中带有角色内免责声明，12次真实无代码响应，正确率从0.92降至0.67。GPT-5.5未出现类似行为。
AI.conclusion: 角色设定并非通用的质量提升手段，而是作为依赖模型的行为策略偏差发挥作用。

title: A Research Prototype for Closed-Loop Generative Design of Customized Foot Orthoses via Semantic-Physics Alignment
summary: Translating unstructured clinical prescriptions into patient-specific foot orthoses (FOs) is hindered by a semantic-physical misalignment: high-level clinical intent is not mapped deterministically onto the 3D geometric parameters of the orthosis, and existing design workflows remain dependent on manual expertise with no instantaneous biomechanical validation. We present TANS-FO, a research prototype-a modular pipeline with closed-loop feedback for computational design automation of customized FOs, not a clinically validated therapeutic device. A Text-Aligned Neural Surrogate (TANS) uses cross-attention to project clinical-text embeddings onto a continuous lattice-density field, while a Graph Neural Network (GNN) surrogate predicts plantar stress in real time as a substitute for Finite Element Analysis (FEA). The framework is anchored on the open-access PicoFoot-5K anthropometric database (5,230 subjects; 30+ anatomical parameters). Under standardized quasi-static loading, the GNN surrogate agrees with an Abaqus reference solver (R^2 = 0.94), and the full pipeline synthesizes manufacturing-ready lattice insoles within minutes. On the Male 18-40 cohort, the proposed system attains a surrogate-predicted peak-pressure reduction of 34.7% over parametric CAD, with a fit error of 0.42 mm. Separately, an exploratory feasibility observation (n = 12; 2-week follow-up; no control group) using VAS pain reporting indicates short-term comfort improvement (VAS 6.4 -> 2.1), but this data is explicitly classified as preliminary observational evidence only-not evidence of clinical efficacy.

AI.tldr: 提出TANS-FO模块化管道，通过文本对齐神经代理（TANS）和GNN代理将临床文本自动转化为定制足部矫形器，实现快速设计与实时生物力学验证。
AI.motivation: 临床处方文本与足部矫形器3D几何参数之间存在语义-物理不对齐，现有设计依赖人工且缺乏即时生物力学验证。
AI.method: 构建TANS-FO管道：TANS使用交叉注意力将临床文本嵌入映射到连续晶格密度场；GNN代理实时预测足底应力替代有限元分析；基于PicoFoot-5K数据库（5230名受试者）。
AI.result: GNN代理与Abaqus参考求解器R²=0.94；男性18-40队列峰值压力降低34.7%，拟合误差0.42mm；初步观察性试验（n=12）VAS疼痛评分从6.4降至2.1。
AI.conclusion: TANS-FO实现了从临床文本到制造就绪晶格鞋垫的自动化设计（分钟级），具备实时应力预测能力；但初步临床观察结果仅作可行性参考，缺乏疗效证据。

title: Limiting Stationarity of Regularized Gap-Function Reformulations for Bilevel Optimization with Unbounded Multipliers
summary: Value-function-type reformulations have generated a broad class of methods for bilevel optimization. However, the corresponding value-function-type constraints are inherently degenerate and generally fail to satisfy standard constraint qualifications, so the associated multiplier sequences may be unbounded and bounded-multiplier convergence analyses become inapplicable. We study this issue for the regularized gap-function reformulation of bilevel problems with constrained convex lower-level programs. We prove that accumulation points of approximate stationary sequences are C-stationary for the corresponding Karush-Kuhn-Tucker-based mathematical program with complementarity constraints (MPCC), even when the multiplier sequence associated with the regularized gap-function constraint is unbounded. The result holds under Mangasarian-Fromovitz constraint qualification (MFCQ) for the upper- and lower-level constraint systems and MPCC-MFCQ at the limiting MPCC point, without any constraint qualification on the regularized gap-function constraint itself. We further provide an example showing that approximate stationary points of the standard regularized gap-function reformulation may converge to a point that is C-stationary but not M-stationary. To guarantee M-stationarity, we introduce a slack-based two-parameter penalty formulation preserving exact multiplier-slack complementarity and establish M-stationarity under a domination condition on the penalty parameters. We develop an inexact slack-penalty method with adaptive penalty updates and feasibility correction, whose accumulation points are M-stationary under the stated assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究含凸下层规划的双层优化问题的值函数型重构方法，证明了正则间隙函数重构的近似稳定点累积点在不满足约束规范时仍可达到C-稳定点，并提出一种基于松弛的两参数罚方法以保证M-稳定点收敛性。
AI.motivation: 值函数型重构是求解双层优化的主流方法，但其约束具有内在退化性，不满足标准约束规范，导致乘子序列无界、有界乘子收敛分析失效。本文旨在解决这一理论缺陷，并建立无需约束规范的收敛性保证。
AI.method: 1) 分析正则间隙函数重构的近似稳定点累积点的C-稳定性；2) 实例说明C-稳定点可能不是M-稳定点；3) 提出基于松弛的两参数罚方法，保持精确乘子-松弛互补性；4) 设计非精确松弛罚方法，含自适应罚更新和可行性校正。
AI.result: 在上下层MFCQ和MPCC-MFCQ条件下，正则间隙函数重构的近似稳定点累积点为C-稳定点。所提松弛罚方法在支配条件下保证M-稳定性，且非精确算法的累积点为M-稳定点。
AI.conclusion: 本文为值函数型双层优化方法提供了无需约束规范的收敛理论，松弛罚方法有效弥补了标准重构无法达到M-稳定点的缺陷。

title: From Outcomes to Actions: Leveraging Hindsight for Long-Horizon Language Agent Training
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a widely adopted technique for improving large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks. Despite this progress, existing RL methods still face challenges in training agents with longer-horizon interactions. One major bottleneck is distinguishing the contribution of different actions in long-horizon interaction, leading to high optimization variance. To address this, we introduce a novel policy gradient method, Hindsight Policy Optimization (HPO), that projects both the current policy distribution and the hindsight distribution into an intent space and extracts low-variance learning signals from the Wasserstein distance between them. We theoretically and empirically show that aggregating semantically similar states and actions in the intent space yields a bounded-variance estimator and improves policy performance stably. Our code is available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hindsight Policy Optimization (HPO)方法，通过将当前策略分布和后见分布投影到意图空间，利用Wasserstein距离提取低方差学习信号，解决长程交互中强化学习的优化方差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法在训练长程交互的智能体时面临挑战，主要瓶颈是难以区分长程交互中不同动作的贡献，导致高优化方差。
AI.method: 提出HPO方法，将当前策略分布和后见分布投影到意图空间，通过计算两者之间的Wasserstein距离提取低方差学习信号。
AI.result: 理论上证明了在意图空间中聚合语义相似的状态和动作能得到有界方差估计器；实验上验证了该方法能稳定提升策略性能。
AI.conclusion: HPO通过意图空间中的分布匹配有效降低了长程RL的优化方差，为改进LLM长程交互能力提供了新思路。

title: How Reliable Are Multimodal Signals of Conversational State? Evidence from Remote Dyadic Collaborative Tasks
comment: Accepted, to appear in Proceedings of ACM International Conference on Multimodal Interaction 2026, 13 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
summary: Measuring conversational states such as cognitive load and conversational power from multimodal behavior requires characteristic features that are not only predictive but also reliable across task contexts. We present a three-dimensional evaluation framework assessing predictive accuracy, cross-task generalizability, and test-retest reliability, applied to interactional, acoustic, and linguistic features extracted from dyadic conversations during collaborative tasks performed over a video-conferencing platform (AVCAffe dataset; 53 dyads, 9 tasks). Our results show that no single feature family dominates all three dimensions. Linguistic features show the highest predictive accuracy for cognitive load but collapse under cross-task evaluation, revealing sensitivity to task-specific vocabulary. Additionally, acoustic reliability, often reported as evidence of feature stability, degrades once speaker identity is controlled, confirming that standard prosodic features measure vocal characteristics rather than conversational state. Interaction features provide the only genuinely reliable signal, unchanged after speaker normalization. Interestingly, classifying power role remained near chance baseline across all conditions, indicating limitations of task-level aggregated behavior for predicting power role in conversation. Our findings reveal three insights: (1) linguistic features predict best but generalize poorly across task contexts; (2) acoustic reliability collapses to near-zero once speaker identity is controlled, challenging standard evaluation practice; and (3) interaction features provide the only genuinely reliable signal, with floor dominance predicting within-dyad cognitive load asymmetry. These results argue for speaker normalization and multi-dimensional evaluation as prerequisites for context-aware, robust multimodal feature selection in conversational systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三维评估框架（预测准确性、跨任务泛化性、重测信度），分析多模态特征在对话状态测量中的表现。发现：语言特征预测最佳但跨任务泛化差；声学特征在控制说话人身份后可靠性急剧下降；交互特征是最稳定的可靠信号。权力角色分类在所有条件下均接近随机水平。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦特征预测能力，忽视了跨任务泛化性和测试-重测可靠性。本文旨在系统评估多模态特征在这三个维度的综合表现，为对话系统选择稳健特征提供依据。
AI.method: 基于AVCAffe数据集（53组双人对话、9项任务），提取交互、声学、语言三类特征，从预测准确性、跨任务泛化性、测试-重测信度三个维度进行评估，并通过说话人归一化控制个体差异。
AI.result: (1)语言特征预测认知负荷最准确，但对任务特定词汇敏感，跨任务泛化差；(2)声学特征在控制说话人身份后可靠性降至近零；(3)交互特征（如地板主导权）是唯一保持稳定的可靠信号；(4)权力角色分类在所有条件下均接近随机基线。
AI.conclusion: 对话系统应进行说话人归一化处理，采用多维度评估框架选择特征。交互特征是最可靠的信号来源，声学特征的稳定性被高估，语言特征需注意任务特异性的影响。

title: TopoTuner: Topological Finetuning of Large Language Models
summary:
Full fine-tuning remains a strong way to adapt pretrained LLMs, but it updates all weights and can be expensive. LoRA reduces the number of trainable parameters, but it does not directly answer which pretrained components should be trained and which can be frozen during adaptation. We introduce TopoTuner, a topology-guided fine-tuning framework for selective freezing of attention projection matrices. \method treats each projection matrix as a row cloud and uses Wasserstein distances between persistence diagrams to measure how its topology changes during fine-tuning.
  TopoTuner learns a reusable freezing profile from a source dataset and transfers it to efficiently fine-tune models on out-of-domain datasets, evaluating whether task-specific topological drift generalizes across question answering and sentiment analysis tasks.
  Across LLaMA-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, and Qwen3-8B-Base, TopoTuner is competitive with full fine-tuning while training only 1-2\% of the model parameters, and outperforms LoRA in 7 out of 9 model-dataset settings, which can change up to 39.57\% of the projection parameters. Along with minimized updates, TopoTuner reduces training time by 20.4\% relative to full fine-tuning and 5.5\% relative to LoRA on average. TopoTuner opens a new direction for reusable freezing profiles, where fine-tuning behavior learned on one dataset can be shared across multiple tasks.

AI.tldr: TopoTuner是一种拓扑引导的微调框架，通过Wasserstein距离测量注意力投影矩阵在微调中的拓扑变化，学习可复用的冻结策略，仅训练1-2%的参数即可达到与全量微调相当的性能，在7/9的设置中超越LoRA，并减少20.4%的训练时间。
AI.motivation: 全量微调虽有效但计算成本高，LoRA虽减少了可训练参数，但无法直接回答"哪些预训练组件应该被训练、哪些可以冻结"这一关键问题。TopoTuner旨在通过拓扑分析指导选择性冻结，实现高效微调。
AI.method: 将每个投影矩阵视为点云，利用持续同调计算其拓扑特征（持久性图），并通过Wasserstein距离度量微调前后拓扑结构的变化。从源数据集学习可复用的冻结配置，迁移到目标域实现高效微调。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B-v0.3、Qwen3-8B-Base上，仅训练1-2%参数即与全量微调竞争力相当；7/9的设置中优于LoRA；可改变最多39.57%的投影参数；相比全量微调减少20.4%训练时间，相比LoRA减少5.5%。
AI.conclusion: TopoTuner开辟了可复用冻结配置的新方向，证明了从源数据集学到的微调行为可以跨任务共享，为高效微调提供了拓扑视角的新范式。

title: Thermal management optimization of Battery Electric Vehicles via hierarchical NMPC with CMO-trained Neural Models
summary: This paper addresses the problem of energy-efficient thermal management in Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs), with the goal of extending driving range while ensuring passenger comfort and battery thermal safety. A hierarchical Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) framework is proposed, in which the supervisory layer explicitly balances energy consumption and cabin temperature reference tracking over a long horizon and translates this trade-off into optimal actuator command sequences for the integrated heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) system and the battery thermal management (BTM) system. These command sequences are then enforced by a lower-layer NMPC, which introduces local corrections to compensate disturbances and modeling uncertainty while tracking an externally specified cabin temperature reference trajectory. To enable predictive control of the highly nonlinear and strongly coupled thermal dynamics, data-driven neural network models are employed as prediction models within both control layers. The proposed approach is developed and validated using a high-fidelity BEV thermal simulator developed at Politecnico di Torino in collaboration with Stellantis N.V., and benchmarked against an industrial rule-based (RB) control strategy over the WLTC driving cycle. Simulation results demonstrate a significant reduction in energy consumption compared to the baseline strategy, while satisfying comfort and battery temperature constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）框架，用于电动汽车热管理，通过数据驱动神经网络模型实现能耗与乘员舒适性/电池热安全的权衡，相比工业规则策略在WLTC工况下显著降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车续航里程受热管理系统能耗制约严重，现有规则控制策略难以在保障乘员舒适和电池安全的同时高效节能，亟需一种能显式权衡多目标的最优控制方法。
AI.method: 提出分层NMPC框架：上层（长时域）优化能耗与座舱温度跟踪的折中，生成HVAC和BTM系统最优指令序列；下层NMPC在跟踪上层温度轨迹的同时引入局部修正以补偿扰动和建模误差。两层均采用数据驱动神经网络模型预测非线性强耦合热动力学。
AI.result: 在都灵理工大学与Stellantis合作的高保真BEV热仿真平台上，基于WLTC工况验证，所提方法相比工业规则控制策略，在满足舒适度和电池温度约束的前提下，显著降低了能耗。
AI.conclusion: 分层NMPC框架能有效协调能量效率与多热管理目标，数据驱动预测模型为非线性热动力学的在线优化提供了可行方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: Neural Controlled Differential Equations for EMT-Level Surrogate Modeling of Grid-Forming Inverters
summary: The application of artificial intelligence methods in power electronic converter modeling is becoming increasingly widespread, but existing applications still face many challenges, such as difficulties in multi-time-scale hybrid analysis and the lack of physics-aware evaluation criteria and constraints, resulting in poor performance. This paper proposes a Neural Controlled Differential Equation (Neural CDE) framework for learning continuous-time surrogate models of grid-forming inverters for electromagnetic transient (EMT) simulation, which relaxes the constraint of fixed sampling rates and enables multi-time-scale control analysis. Then, an affine-control formulation with dual slow/fast pathways is proposed to capture the hierarchical and multiscale behavior of converter dynamics, and a physics-inspired regularization method is utilized to enhance stability and coherence. Evaluated on EMT-generated trajectories, the model accurately reproduces transient responses, preserves effective damping and the dominant oscillatory characteristics, and maintains bounded long-horizon rollouts. The results show that Neural CDE-based component modeling offers a physically consistent surrogate modeling approach for EMT-level simulation studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经控制微分方程（Neural CDE）框架，用于学习构网型逆变器的连续时间代理模型，实现电磁暂态仿真中的多时间尺度分析与物理一致性建模。
AI.motivation: 现有AI方法在电力电子变换器建模中面临多时间尺度混合分析困难、缺乏物理感知评估准则与约束，导致性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出Neural CDE框架（摆脱固定采样率约束，实现多时间尺度控制分析），采用双慢/快路径仿射控制公式（捕获分层多尺度行为），并利用物理启发正则化方法（增强稳定性与一致性）。
AI.result: 模型准确再现瞬态响应，保持有效阻尼与主导振荡特性，并在长期推演中保持有界输出。
AI.conclusion: Neural CDE组件建模为EMT级仿真提供了一种物理一致的代理建模方法。

title: Multilingual Sentence Embeddings for Linguistic-Integrated Reliability Audit
summary: Multilingual assessment systems commonly rely on translation for scoring and quality-control processes. We evaluate whether multilingual sentence embeddings can replace translated English input for Linguistic-Integrated Reliability Auditing (LiRA) across 11 PIRLS constructed-response items and three embedding models. Native-language embeddings reproduced translation-based reliability estimates closely while recovering responses excluded after translation failure, with no meaningful change in reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多语言句子嵌入能否替代翻译后的英文输入用于语言集成可靠性审计（LiRA），实验覆盖11个PIRLS建构反应题和三种嵌入模型。结果表明，母语嵌入能够紧密复现基于翻译的可靠性估计，并能恢复因翻译失败而被排除的回答，且可靠性无显著变化。
AI.motivation: 多语言评估系统通常依赖翻译进行评分和质量控制，但翻译过程可能导致信息丢失或回答被排除。作者希望验证多语言句子嵌入能否作为翻译的替代方案，以提高评估的包容性和效率。
AI.method: 在11个PIRLS建构反应题上，使用三种不同的多语言句子嵌入模型，将母语文本直接编码为嵌入向量，与传统的翻译后英文输入方法进行对比，评估两者在LiRA框架下的一致性。
AI.result: 母语嵌入生成的可靠性估计与基于翻译的结果高度一致，并且能够恢复因翻译失败而被丢弃的原始回答，同时在可靠性指标上没有产生显著变化。
AI.conclusion: 多语言句子嵌入可以作为翻译方法的有效替代方案，在保持评估可靠性的同时，避免翻译失败带来的数据损失，提升多语言评估系统的鲁棒性和包容性。

title: Bridging battery design and health assessment through virtual sensing and physics-informed learning
summary: Supercharging of lithium-ion batteries (LiBs) requires robust health monitoring to ensure durability, safety, and user confidence, particularly for emerging vehicle-to-grid applications with bidirectional energy flows. Yet battery management remains largely disconnected from the material and structural origins of aging, limiting both interpretable health assessment and informed battery design. Here we propose a physics-informed learning framework with virtual sensing that infers hard-to-measure design parameters, including solid-state diffusion coefficient, electrode thickness, ion concentration, and particle size, directly from standard battery management system (BMS) measurements. Across diverse fast-charging strategies and driving profiles, embedding a digital-twin-derived particle-cracking mechanism as a soft constraint reduces trajectory and lifetime prediction errors by 6-8 times relative to state-of-the-art machine learning baselines using only 2% early-life observations. We further show that accurate degradation extrapolation does not require fully resolved governing equations; validated partial mechanisms, jointly refined with limited data, provide sufficient guidance. Virtual sensing transforms standard charging signals into latent design variables without additional sensors, bridging observable battery behavior and underlying aging processes while reducing capacity loss error by up to 39%, end-of-life (EOL) error by 17%, and prediction variability by up to 54%, enabling real-time exploration of new battery configurations. More broadly, the proposed framework establishes a practical feedback loop between deployment and development, demonstrating how real-world operation can continuously inform upstream design decisions across complex multiphysics systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理信息学习框架，通过虚拟传感从标准BMS测量数据中推断难以测量的电池设计参数，利用数字孪生派生的颗粒开裂机制作为软约束，仅需2%早期观测数据即可将轨迹和寿命预测误差降低6-8倍，建立了部署与开发之间的实用反馈回路。
AI.motivation: 当前电池管理系统与老化的材料和结构根源脱节，缺乏可解释的健康评估方法，且无法为电池设计提供反馈信息，亟需一种能从标准测量数据中推断设计参数、实现可解释健康监测并桥接电池行为与老化过程的框架。
AI.method: 提出物理信息学习框架，集成虚拟传感技术，从标准BMS测量推断固态扩散系数、电极厚度、离子浓度和颗粒大小等设计参数；将数字孪生导出的颗粒开裂机制作为软约束嵌入模型；仅需2%早期寿命观测数据即可实现预测。
AI.result: 相比最先进的ML基线，轨迹和寿命预测误差降低6-8倍；容量损失误差降低39%，EOL误差降低17%，预测变异性降低54%；验证了部分机制联合有限数据精炼即可提供充分指导。
AI.conclusion: 该框架建立了部署与开发的实用反馈回路，使实际运行数据能够持续指导上游设计决策，适用于复杂多物理系统，无需额外传感器即可将标准充电信号转化为潜在设计变量。

title: Diversity-Oriented Fine-Tuning for Uncertainty-Based Hallucination Detection
summary: Existing hallucination detection methods are typically conducted at the inference stage, without making any modifications to the model itself. In this paper, we are interested in exploring fine-tuning strategies that enhance the detectability of hallucinations in the resulting model. Focusing on semantic-entropy-based detection, we observe that many erroneous outputs remain undetected because the model produces nearly identical incorrect answers across multiple runs. To address this, we propose diversity-oriented fine-tuning to encourage more varied generations. We introduce two specific strategies: one based on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and the other on Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate our approach and analyze the behavior of the models before and after fine-tuning. We find that after adopting our fine-tuning methods, the models become less likely to produce low semantic entropy responses for hallucinated answers, thereby improving the effectiveness of hallucination detection, eventually yielding results better than or comparable with state of the art methods. The code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多样性导向微调策略（基于SFT和DPO），使模型在幻觉输出时产生更多样化的生成结果，从而提升语义熵检测方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的幻觉检测方法仅在推理阶段进行检测，未对模型本身做任何修改。此外，基于语义熵的检测方法存在盲区：当模型多次生成几乎相同的错误答案时，语义熵很低，导致幻觉难以被检测到。
AI.method: 提出两种多样性导向微调策略：1）基于监督微调（SFT）的方法；2）基于直接偏好优化（DPO）的方法。通过鼓励模型在不确定时生成更多样化的输出，降低幻觉答案的低语义熵倾向。
AI.result: 微调后，模型对幻觉答案产生低语义熵响应的概率显著降低，幻觉检测有效性提升，最终效果优于或媲美现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 在模型训练阶段引入多样性导向微调可以有效提升下游幻觉检测的性能，为幻觉检测与模型训练的结合提供了新的思路。

title: Finding Fair Draws for Incomplete Round Robin Tournaments
summary: In an incomplete round robin tournament, teams play against different sets of opponents. Given varying strengths of the teams, this raises a fairness issue. We establish the complexity of determining whether a fair draw exists under various scenarios involving the presence of pots (i.e., strength based groups of teams), teams coming from the same association, connectivity requirements, and others. We also show experimentally how fair incomplete round robin tournaments can be generated.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不完全循环赛中的公平性问题，分析了在不同约束条件下（如分组、协会限制、连通性需求等）是否存在公平抽签的复杂性，并通过实验展示了如何生成公平的不完全循环赛。
AI.motivation: 在不完全循环赛中，球队面对不同对手组合，由于球队实力差异，导致公平性问题。本文旨在探究在多种现实约束下，能否公平地安排赛程。
AI.method: 通过理论复杂性分析，研究在不同场景（如分档、协会归属、连通性要求等）下判断是否存在公平抽签的计算复杂度；同时进行实验，探索如何实际生成公平的不完全循环赛。
AI.result: 确定了在不同约束条件下判断公平抽签是否存在问题的复杂度类别；实验表明，在合理条件下可以生成公平的不完全循环赛。
AI.conclusion: 不完全循环赛的公平性抽签是一个计算上复杂的问题，但在实际场景中仍有可能通过算法生成公平的赛程安排。

title: Token-Level Off-Policy Learning for Faithful Generation Under Distribution Shift
summary: We propose Token-Level Off-Policy Labeling (TOPL), an off-policy training paradigm that reframes post-training as a token-level correctness prediction task. Our key intuition is that by training the model to distinguish good and bad tokens in a response, we naturally guide the model towards generating good tokens, while avoiding the pitfalls that come with directly training the model to generate off-policy tokens. Experiments on document summarization tasks show that TOPL achieves strong out-of-distribution generalization across 11 datasets against a diverse set of sequence-level and token-level baselines. We further demonstrate that TOPL transfers effectively to machine translation, suggesting that its benefits generalize across different faithful generation tasks. Through ablation studies, we confirm that our token-level learning signal is critical to good performance; sequence-level analogues do not confer similar benefits. Finally, we show that TOPL induces interpretable model updates: the LoRA adapters learned through TOPL function as linear classification heads and steering vectors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOPL，一种将后训练重构为token级正确性预测任务的离策略训练范式，通过区分响应中的好/坏token来引导生成，在摘要和翻译任务上取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的直接训练模型生成离策略token会引入伪影和错误累积，TOPL旨在通过token级正确性预测来规避这些问题，实现更稳健的模型对齐。
AI.method: TOPL将后训练转化为token级别的二分类任务，训练模型区分响应中每个token的好坏（是否来自高质量参考），从而隐式引导模型生成优质token，而非直接模仿离策略输出。
AI.result: 在11个摘要数据集上展现出强跨域泛化能力，优于序列级和token级基线；有效迁移至机器翻译任务；消融实验证实token级学习信号优于序列级变体。
AI.conclusion: TOPL作为一种离策略训练新范式，通过token级预测信号实现了更好的泛化性能和可解释性（LoRA适配器可作为线性分类头和引导向量），为忠实文本生成任务提供了新的训练思路。

title: When Can Safe Controllers Adapt? Information before Commitment
summary:
Safe adaptive control is online adaptation under a safety guarantee on the learning trajectory itself. The controller may use any causal, history-dependent rule and act differently across environments as data arrive. Only its safety guarantee is uniform: the same rule must satisfy it under every initially plausible model. Performance is measured against a safe oracle that knows the realized model. Many finite-time analyses assume persistent excitation of the uniformly safe closed loop, so the data distinguish every pair of models requiring different control decisions. Under that assumption, feasibility is already settled; only the rate remains. We ask instead: Do the safety constraints permit such an informative experiment at all?
  While an alternative remains plausible, the controller must preserve a safe continuation under it. We call the first action that forecloses such a continuation commitment. Chance safety allows commitment only on an event rare under the alternative, and the evidence must arrive beforehand: the observation generated by the committing action is too late. We define precommitment information as the KL divergence between learner-visible laws stopped before commitment.
  Our main result is a causal reduction. The commitment rule determines (1) the probability that safety permits commitment under the alternative, (2) the target-side cost of remaining noncommittal, (3) and the information available when the decision is made. Bounded precommitment information therefore leaves a fixed fraction of the oracle gap unavoidable. If the gap is Ω(T), every uniformly safe policy has linear regret. We establish the obstruction in a constrained linear system with quadratic regulation cost. We also prove recovery in special cases and derive semidefinite upper certificates for deterministic linear-Gaussian systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究安全自适应控制中，安全约束是否允许进行信息丰富的实验。提出"承诺"概念——第一个排除替代模型安全延续的动作，并证明如果承诺前的KL散度有界，则安全策略必然产生线性遗憾。
AI.motivation: 现有有限时间分析通常假设均匀安全闭环具有持续激励，使得数据能区分需要不同控制决策的模型对。在此假设下，可行性已被解决，只剩收敛速率问题。本文追问：安全约束本身是否允许进行如此信息丰富的实验？
AI.method: 定义了"承诺"（commitment）——第一个排除替代模型下安全延续的动作；定义了"承诺前信息"（precommitment information）——承诺前学习者可见规律的KL散度。通过因果归约（causal reduction），建立承诺规则与三个量之间的联系：安全允许承诺的概率、保持非承诺状态的目标侧成本、决策时可用的信息量。
AI.result: 证明了如果承诺前KL散度有界，则固定比例的oracle差距不可避免；若差距为Ω(T)，则任何均匀安全策略都有线性遗憾。在线性约束二次调节系统中验证了该障碍，并在确定性的线性高斯系统中给出了半定上界证书。
AI.conclusion: 安全约束与高效学习之间存在根本性冲突：在有限信息下，追求均匀安全必然导致线性遗憾，这是安全自适应控制中无法回避的信息论下界。

title: DS@GT ARC at eRisk 2026: Hybrid Multi-Agent LLM System with Structured Algorithmic Guidance for Conversational Depression Screening
comment: Conference and Labs of the Evaluation Forum (CLEF), 19 pages, 5 figures
summary: We describe DS@GT's submission to the eRisk 2026 Task 1 challenge on conversational depression screening, in which systems interview LLM personas that simulate individuals with varying depression profiles and produce a Beck Depression Inventory II (BDI-II) score plus four key symptoms per persona, without directly asking sensitive mental health questions. Our pipeline evolved through three stages: a monolithic single-model prototype to start off, a baseline multi-agent architecture that separates conversational interviewing from BDI-II scoring under a coordinating orchestration layer, and a final hybrid configuration that replaces the paid GPT-5-nano interviewer with the open-source Gemma 27B. To offset the model's weaker reasoning and instruction-following, the hybrid adds three algorithmic components: a precomputed dialogue tree that standardizes interview openers and follow-ups, a reliability-weighted consensus aggregation inspired by the Weaver framework, and a cluster-based imputation step for unprobed symptoms. We submitted three fully automated runs across all 20 personas, with Run 1 from the paid baseline and Runs 2 and 3 from the hybrid. Hybrid Run 3 achieved an ADODL of 0.9063, ranking 3rd among all complete-submission runs and placing DS@GT 2nd among the 21 teams overall, while outperforming our paid baseline Run 1 (0.8841) at roughly one-quarter of the per-persona API cost. These results support our central hypothesis that with sufficient algorithmic supervision, a weaker open-source model can compete with a stronger proprietary model in the conversational interviewer role. Our source code is available at https://github.com/dsgt-arc/erisk-task1-2026.

AI.tldr: DS@GT提交了一个三阶段进化的对话抑郁症筛查系统，最终采用混合架构（开源Gemma 27B + 算法组件），在eRisk 2026任务1中排名第3（ADODL=0.9063），团队总排名第2，且成本仅为付费基线的四分之一。
AI.motivation: 在对话式抑郁症筛查中，直接询问敏感心理问题可能引发不适。因此需要一种既能有效评估抑郁状况（BDI-II评分及关键症状），又避免直接提问的系统。
AI.method: 系统经历三个阶段：1）单体单模型原型；2）多智能体基线架构（分离对话访谈与BDI-II评分，含编排层），使用付费GPT-5-nano；3）最终混合架构：用开源Gemma 27B替换付费模型，并加入三个算法组件——预计算对话树、Weaver框架启发的可靠性加权共识聚合、基于聚类的未探查症状插补。
AI.result: 混合版Run 3的ADODL达0.9063，完整提交中排名第3，21支队伍中团队排名第2。相比付费基线Run 1（0.8841）性能提升，且每个persona的API成本仅为其四分之一。
AI.conclusion: 在充分的算法监督下，较弱的开源模型在对话访谈角色中可以与更强的专有模型竞争。

title: Reflected Schrodinger Bridge Problem over Sub-Riemannian Manifold
summary: We formulate and solve the reflected sub-Riemannian Schrödinger bridge problem: minimum-energy transport of probability distributions on a bounded domain for underactuated dynamics with degenerate diffusion and hard state constraints. The main difficulties are geometric and degeneracy: Euclidean normal reflection is generally incompatible with the horizontal subbundle, since it may push the process in directions not generated by the admissible control and noise fields. Also, the reference measure may not have full support. We address these by introducing an intrinsic oblique reflection mechanism that is compatible to the sub-Riemannian structure. Under Hörmander and non-characteristic boundary assumptions, we prove that the reflected degenerate reference process admits a smooth, strictly positive transition density. The resulting optimal control is characterized by a forward--backward PDE system with asymmetric boundary conditions: an oblique Neumann condition for the backward factor and a normal no-flux condition for the forward factor. Since explicit transition densities are generally not available in this setting, we develop a PDE-based Sinkhorn iteration that enforces these boundary conditions directly. We illustrate the framework with an example.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有界域上反射次黎曼薛定谔桥问题，针对欠驱动系统、退化扩散和硬状态约束下的概率分布最小能量输运。通过引入与次黎曼结构兼容的内禀斜反射机制，在Hörmander和非特征边界假设下证明了退化反射参考过程存在光滑严格正的转移密度。最优控制刻画为具有不对称边界条件的前向-后向PDE系统，并开发了基于PDE的Sinkhorn迭代方法求解。
AI.motivation: 解决有界域内欠驱动系统（退化扩散）在硬状态约束下的概率分布最小能量输运问题，克服欧几里得法线反射与次黎曼水平子丛不相容的几何困难，以及参考测度缺乏全支持的退化问题。
AI.method: 提出与次黎曼结构兼容的内禀斜反射机制，在Hörmander和非特征边界假设下证明转移密度的光滑性和正性；将最优控制表征为具有斜Neumann边界条件（后向因子）和法向无通量条件（前向因子）的前向-后向PDE系统；开发基于PDE的Sinkhorn迭代算法显式处理边界条件。
AI.result: 建立了反射次黎曼薛定谔桥问题的理论框架，证明了退化参考过程存在光滑严格正的转移密度，推导了具有不对称边界条件的前向-后向PDE系统，并给出了基于PDE的Sinkhorn迭代数值方法及实例验证。
AI.conclusion: 成功将薛定谔桥问题推广到具有退化扩散和硬状态约束的次黎曼几何场景，所提斜反射机制和PDE-Sinkhorn迭代为欠驱动系统的约束最优输运提供了有效工具。

title: AdaSurvMamba: Dynamic Fusion and Semantic Scanning for Multimodal Survival Analysis
summary: Multimodal survival analysis utilizing whole slide images (WSIs) and genomic profiles is fundamental for cancer prognosis. Recently, state-space models like Mamba have emerged as powerful tools for sequence modeling. However, translating this success to complex multimodal tasks is hindered by two critical limitations. First, conventional fusion strategies assume a static multimodal interaction strength, ignoring the fluctuating diagnostic importance of each modality across different patients and local regions. Second, the standard Mamba architecture processes tokens along predefined physical paths. This rigid scanning disrupts the semantic continuity of spatially scattered medical features and exacerbates long-range decay. To address these challenges, we introduce AdaSurvMamba as a novel adaptive framework for multimodal survival analysis. The framework features a Dual-Scale Importance-Aware Reconstruction (DSIR) module to dynamically modulate cross-modal interaction strength. It evaluates diagnostic importance at both the sequence and token levels to reconstruct the input representations. Furthermore, we propose a Semantic Aggregation Scanning (SAS) module to overcome contextual fragmentation. The SAS module dynamically reorganizes discrete tokens into semantically continuous sequences via a shared prototype pool. It explicitly modulates the state transition step size using global modality context and semantic priors to adaptively control the information absorption rate. Experiments across five TCGA cohorts demonstrate consistent gains over existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/zjlGO/AdaSurvMamba.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaSurvMamba框架，通过动态多模态融合（DSIR模块）和语义连续扫描（SAS模块）解决Mamba在病理图像与基因组数据生存分析中的静态交互与上下文碎片化问题，在五个TCGA数据集上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法两个局限：1）传统融合策略假设多模态交互强度静态不变，忽略不同患者和局部区域中每种模态诊断重要性的动态变化；2）标准Mamba沿预定义物理路径扫描，破坏离散分布的医学特征的语义连续性，加剧长距离衰减问题。
AI.method: 1）DSIR模块：在序列级和token级评估诊断重要性，动态调节跨模态交互强度，重构输入表示；2）SAS模块：通过共享原型池将离散token动态重组为语义连续的序列，利用全局模态上下文和语义先验显式调节状态转移步长，自适应控制信息吸收速率。
AI.result: 在TCGA五个癌种数据集上，AdaSurvMamba一致优于现有生存分析方法。
AI.conclusion: AdaSurvMamba通过动态多模态融合与语义聚合扫描，有效提升了Mamba在复杂多模态任务中的表现，代码已开源。

title: Oracle Gap and Signal Fidelity: A Fixed-Pool Diagnostic for Test-Time Collaboration
summary: Test-time collaboration, including self-consistency, best-of-N selection, critic models, and verifier pipelines, is often credited with broadly improving LLM reasoning, yet its gains are uneven and sometimes negative. We ask when training-free collaboration should be expected to help. For a fixed candidate pool, we decompose a selector or verifier's net gain into measurable factors: recoverable mass, verification-signal coverage, conditional selection quality, and harm to already-correct outputs. This reframes collaboration as a candidate-selection problem rather than as an intrinsic property of a multi-agent topology. Across LiveCodeBench, MATH Level-5 hard subjects, and GPQA-Diamond, gains are bounded first by the oracle gap and then by signal fidelity, which we measure directly as candidate-level agreement between verifier verdicts and official labels. On LiveCodeBench, a public-test verifier (MCC 0.825) gains +8.14 percentage points (pp) over a first-sample baseline; a generated-test verifier (MCC 0.248) improves by +2.70pp and is not statistically distinguishable from an LLM selector, but operates at near-zero harm versus the selector's 4.69% harm rate. On MATH, a symbolic answer-equivalence selector beats self-consistency by +4.67pp, while LLM selectors are negative. On GPQA-Diamond, recoverable mass is only 3.03% and 87.54% of candidate pools are answer-identical; a weaker model's pools shrink both further, suggesting that oracle gap is a joint property of task, model, and sampling configuration. Our framework yields a practical pre-deployment diagnostic: estimate the oracle gap, then measure coverage, signal fidelity, and harm before investing in collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将测试时协作（如自一致性、最佳N选、验证器）重新定义为候选选择问题的框架，通过可恢复质量、验证信号覆盖、条件选择质量和对正确输出的伤害四个可测量因素分解协作的净增益，并在多个基准上验证了协作效果首先受限于oracle gap，其次受限于信号保真度。
AI.motivation: 测试时协作（自一致性、最佳N选、验证器等）在LLM推理中效果不均，有时甚至为负。作者希望回答：何时无训练的协作方法应该被预期有效，并建立可量化的诊断框架。
AI.method: 对于固定候选池，将选择器/验证器的净增益分解为：可恢复质量（oracle gap）、验证信号覆盖、条件选择质量、对正确输出的伤害。在LiveCodeBench、MATH Level-5、GPQA-Diamond上直接测量了验证器判决与官方标签之间的候选级一致性（MCC）。
AI.result: LiveCodeBench上，公开测试验证器（MCC 0.825）增益+8.14pp；生成测试验证器（MCC 0.248）增益+2.70pp，接近零伤害vs LLM选择器4.69%伤害率。MATH上符号答案等价选择器优于自一致性+4.67pp，LLM选择器为负。GPQA-Diamond可恢复质量仅3.03%，87.54%候选池答案相同。
AI.conclusion: 协作增益首先受限于oracle gap，其次受限于信号保真度。oracle gap是任务、模型和采样配置的联合属性。提供了实用的部署前诊断：先估计oracle gap，再测量覆盖、信号保真度和伤害，再决定是否投入协作。

title: Tractable Query Answering under Epistemic Confidentiality Policies in DL Ontologies (extended version)
summary: We study Controlled Query Evaluation (CQE), a declarative approach to confidentiality-preserving data access, in the context of Description Logic (DL) ontologies, and for confidentiality policies expressed through Epistemic Dependencies (EDs). We first address the problem of answering queries (specifically, Boolean unions of conjunctive queries) under known semantics for CQE (GA- and IGA-entailment). Our results show that if the TBox is expressed in $\text{DL-Lite}_{\mathcal{R}}$, CQE is computationally intractable in general. Moreover, in the presence of EDs, the IGA semantics has recently been proven not to satisfy an important confidentiality preservation property known as indistinguishability. With the goal of defining computationally easier and confidentiality-preserving forms of CQE, we introduce a new semantics for CQE, based on the notion of minimal policy violation (MPV). We show that the new semantics provides a sound approximation of the previous ones, while satisfying the indistinguishability property. We also prove that, in the case of $\text{DL-Lite}_{\mathcal{R}}$ ontologies, query entailment under the MPV semantics can be decided in polynomial time in data complexity. Finally, we present a software implementation of our framework that we used to evaluate the feasibility of this new approach using an existing benchmark for OWL 2 QL.

AI.tldr: 本文针对描述逻辑本体中的受控查询评估问题，提出了一种基于最小策略违反（MPV）的新语义，解决了现有方法计算复杂度高且不满足不可区分性属性的问题，并在DL-Liteᵣ本体上实现了多项式时间可判定性。
AI.motivation: 现有CQE方法（GA-和IGA-蕴涵）在DL-Liteᵣ上计算复杂度高（总体上不可处理），且IGA语义不满足不可区分性这一重要的机密性保护属性。需要定义计算上更高效且能保护机密性的CQE形式。
AI.method: 提出基于最小策略违反（MPV）的新CQE语义，作为对先前语义的合理近似；在DL-Liteᵣ本体上设计多项式时间数据复杂度的查询蕴涵判定算法；并实现软件框架进行实验评估。
AI.result: MPV语义满足不可区分性属性；在DL-Liteᵣ本体上，查询蕴涵可在多项式时间数据复杂度内判定；通过OWL 2 QL基准测试验证了可行性。
AI.conclusion: MPV语义在计算效率和机密性保护之间取得了良好平衡，为描述逻辑本体中的受控查询评估提供了一种实用且理论上可追踪的解决方案。

title: A Curvature-Aware Rank-Adaptive Distributed Augmented-Lagrangian Solver for Large-Scale SDPs
summary: We present CARDAL (Curvature-Aware Rank-Adaptive Distributed Augmented Lagrangian), a distributed multi-GPU solver for large-scale semidefinite programs (SDPs) based on a rank-adaptive Burer-Monteiro factorization and an augmented Lagrangian method. At fixed ranks, a matrix-free L-BFGS method with negative-curvature corrections targets an approximate Euclidean second-order stationary point of the factored augmented Lagrangian. A reverse multiplier shift turns a negative dual-slack direction into exact negative curvature after rank expansion, and a small joint rank-lift problem selects a batched low-rank correction. A verified slack lower bound provides an a posteriori approximate KKT certificate. Our analysis establishes generic global-optimality guarantees for heterogeneous products of PSD cones at per-block ranks near the Barvinok-Pataki scale, together with a finite-accuracy counterpart under blockwise cost smoothing. For scalable execution, CARDAL distributes constraint rows, factor columns, and PSD blocks over a Constraint x Rank x Cone device mesh. The primal residual, gradient, Hessian-vector products, and slack matrix-vector products are evaluated using device-local operations and axis-wise collectives. On the Mittelmann benchmark, CARDAL exhibits stronger robustness than existing low-rank GPU approaches under a uniform accuracy standard. Experiments on large-scale SDP relaxations from robotics, electronic structure, and Max-Cut demonstrate the complementary scaling regimes of the three distribution axes, with observed wall-clock speedups of up to 4x on four H100 GPUs.

AI.tldr: CARDAL是一个分布式多GPU求解器，采用秩自适应Burer-Monteiro分解和增广拉格朗日方法求解大规模半定规划（SDP）。它通过L-BFGS方法结合负曲率校正、反向乘子移位和联合秩提升问题实现高效求解，并利用约束×秩×PSD块的三维设备网格进行分布式计算。在Mittelmann基准测试中表现优于现有低秩GPU方法，在机器人、电子结构和Max-Cut等大规模SDP松弛问题中实现最多4倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有低秩GPU方法在处理大规模SDP时存在鲁棒性不足的问题，且缺乏有效的秩自适应机制和分布式扩展方案，难以充分利用多GPU的计算能力。
AI.method: 采用秩自适应Burer-Monteiro分解和增广拉格朗日方法；使用矩阵自由L-BFGS方法配合负曲率校正逼近二阶稳定点；通过反向乘子移位和联合秩提升问题实现秩扩展；构建约束×秩×PSD块的三维设备网格进行分布式计算。
AI.result: 在Mittelmann基准测试中表现出比现有低秩GPU方法更强的鲁棒性；在机器人、电子结构和Max-Cut等大规模SDP松弛问题中实现最多4倍加速（四块H100 GPU）。
AI.conclusion: CARDAL通过秩自适应和三维分布式策略有效解决了大规模SDP求解的鲁棒性和可扩展性问题，为分布式多GPU环境下的大规模SDP求解提供了新范式。

title: Tokenizing Crosslingual Homographs
summary: Multilingual language models rely on shared subword vocabularies to represent multiple languages within a limited number of token units. While such sharing is often useful, it can also create cases in which identical surface forms are treated too uniformly across languages, even when their meanings or usage differ. We investigate this limitation through cross-lingual homographs and false friends, and examine whether introducing language information earlier in the tokenization process can improve their treatment. We propose a simple tokenizer-level intervention based on language cues: language-specific characters replacing initial characters of shared-vocabulary words, reducing common identity during vocabulary construction. In intrinsic analysis, we find through tokenizer-level statistics that BPE and UnigramLM often treat cross-lingual homographs in a largely language agnostic way, whereas the context-sensitive SaGe tokenizer diverges more strongly; our intervention removes this gap. In downstream English-to-X machine translation, our cues yield modest improvements in several settings, especially under BPE, although the effect is not consistent across all languages and evaluation sets. Overall, the findings suggest that adding lightweight language information at the tokenizer level is a promising direction for further exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多语言模型中跨语言同形异义词（假朋友）问题，提出在分词阶段引入语言标记（将共享词汇的首字符替换为语言特定字符）以改善模型对跨语言同形异义词的处理，实验表明该方法在分词统计和机器翻译任务上带来有限但积极的改进。
AI.motivation: 多语言模型使用共享子词词表表示多种语言，这导致跨语言同形异义词（表面相同但含义/用法不同）被过度统一处理，模型缺乏区分不同语言中相同词汇的能力。
AI.method: 提出一种简单的分词器层干预：用语言特定字符替换共享词表词汇的初始字符，减少词汇构建过程中的共同身份。在BPE、UnigramLM和SaGe三种分词器上进行实验，并结合下游英译X机器翻译任务评估。
AI.result: 分词统计显示BPE和UnigramLM对跨语言同形异义词的处理是语言无关的，SaGe则有更强区分性；提出的干预方法消除了这种差距。机器翻译在BPE下取得适度改进，但在不同语言和评估集上效果不一致。
AI.conclusion: 在分词层加入轻量级语言信息是一个有前景的方向，值得进一步探索。

title: RECON: Benchmarking Agent Memory for Compositional Reasoning over Long Contexts
summary: Large language models and LLM-based agents are widely used as personal chat assistants, enterprise copilots, and autonomous workflow agents. In all these applications, memory (the ability to retain, access, and reason over information accumulated over long contexts and multiple interactions) plays a crucial role in determining the reliability of any agent. We introduce RECON (Reasoning over Extended Contexts with Obfuscated Narratives), a benchmark for evaluating compositional reasoning over long contexts. RECON spans 24 case files across three domains (criminal, medical, and financial), each ranging from 50k to 100k tokens, and tests agents on six memory intensive tasks: reconstructing multi-hop evidence chains, propagating cascading invalidations, resolving source conflicts, counterfactual reasoning, satisfying temporal constraints, and temporal fact retrieval. Recent memory benchmarks evaluate whether agents can retrieve scattered facts or detect if a fact has changed whereas RECON evaluates what happens after the change, whether agents can trace which downstream conclusions are affected, which survive through independent support, and how alternative timelines would have unfolded. Our evaluation reveals substantial limitations across current architectures: even the strongest non-Oracle system reaches only 22.4% Accuracy, with retrieval and reasoning each surfacing as challenges.

AI.tldr: RECON是一个评估LLM代理在长上下文中进行组合推理的基准测试，涵盖24个案例文件（50k-100k tokens），测试6类记忆密集型任务。即使最强系统准确率仅22.4%，揭示了当前架构在检索和推理方面的重大局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆基准只评估事实检索或检测事实是否变化，但无法评估变化后代理能否追踪下游结论受影响情况、哪些结论因独立支持而幸存，以及替代时间线如何展开。RECON旨在填补这一评估空白。
AI.method: 构建24个案例文件，横跨刑事、医疗、金融三个领域，每个案例50k-100k tokens。设计六类记忆密集型任务：多跳证据链重构、级联失效传播、源冲突解决、反事实推理、时间约束满足和时间事实检索。
AI.result: 最强非Oracle系统仅达22.4%准确率，检索和推理各自构成挑战，当前架构存在显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: RECON揭示了LLM代理在处理长上下文组合推理任务上的严重不足，表明需要更强大的记忆与推理机制来提升代理的可靠性。

title: Long-time behavior and turnpike properties of linear-quadratic graphon mean field control problems
summary: We investigate the asymptotic behavior and turnpike properties of graphon mean field control (GMFC) problems in the linear-quadratic setting. We consider both a finite-horizon GMFC problem and its associated ergodic counterpart, in which the controlled dynamics are governed by a graphon mean field stochastic differential equation with heterogeneous interactions. The optimal controls and state trajectories for both problems are characterized by systems of Riccati equations together with systems of generalized differential and algebraic equations on suitable Hilbert spaces. Under a stabilizability condition and appropriate positivity assumptions on the graphon-induced operators, we establish the unique solvability of the ergodic control problem and derive exponential convergence estimates for the finite-horizon system to its stationary limit. As a consequence, we establish an exponential turnpike property for the optimal pair and prove the convergence of the time-averaged value function for the finite-horizon GMFC problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性二次型图平均场控制问题的渐近行为与转向性质，通过Riccati方程和Hilbert空间上的广义微分代数方程刻画最优控制与状态轨迹，在可镇定性和正性假设下建立了遍历控制问题的唯一可解性，并证明了有限时域系统指数收敛到稳态极限，进而得到最优对指数转向性质及时间平均价值函数的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究图平均场控制（GMFC）问题在有限时域与其对应遍历问题之间的渐近关系，特别是转向性质（turnpike property），这类性质在经济学、工程等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 采用线性二次型（LQ）框架，将GMFC问题转化为Riccati方程与Hilbert空间上的广义微分代数方程系统；引入可镇定性和图诱导算子的正性假设，通过函数分析方法推导遍历问题的唯一可解性及指数收敛速率。
AI.result: 建立了遍历控制问题的唯一可解性；证明了有限时域系统指数收敛到稳态极限；推导了最优对的指数转向性质；证明了时间平均价值函数的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 在LQ框架下，GMFC问题具有指数转向性质，有限时域最优轨迹会指数快速逼近遍历稳态，这为大规模异质交互系统的近似最优控制提供了理论基础。

title: Autonomous mechanistic discovery of colorectal cancer vulnerabilities via multi-scale AI swarms
summary: The acceleration of automated scientific discovery has been fundamentally bottlenecked by the epistemic gap between the semantic reasoning of large language models (LLMs) and the deterministic physics of mammalian biology. While recent multi-agent frameworks have achieved autonomous hypothesis generation and in vitro experimental analysis, they lack the mathematically grounded, causal constraints required for multi-scale clinical translation. Furthermore, while algorithmic clinical digital twins successfully forecast biological states, they rely on black-box latent spaces, sacrificing mechanistic interpretability for predictive accuracy. Here, we introduce the Multi-Scale Autonomous Discovery Engine (Octopus), a neuro-symbolic architecture that unites zero-leakage, local LLM swarms with strict algorithmic physics engines. Rather than stopping at isolated cellular assays, the system autonomously generated therapeutic hypotheses against in vitro CRISPR dependency data (CCLE), traced dynamic causal cascades using mechanistic interpretability (XGBoost SHAP vectors), and orthogonally translated the emergent vulnerabilities in silico to predict in vivo mammalian tumor trajectory (PDX) and human overall survival (Marisa). In a fully unsupervised sweep of colorectal cancer transcriptomes, the pipeline autonomously identified Insulin-like Growth Factor 2 (IGF2) as a strictly bounded vulnerability to 5-Fluorouracil resistance. The discovery maintained significance after rigorous Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate correction (q=0.0292, Log-Rank p=0.0007 ) and successfully predicted significant in vivo tumor volume shrinkage in an independent mouse cohort (Mann-Whitney p=0.0373). By bridging the chasm between multi-agent reasoning and mathematically bounded clinical survival, this framework establishes a verifiable, zero-leakage paradigm for automated, end-to-end biomedical discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Octopus的多尺度自主发现引擎，通过将本地LLM群与严格算法物理引擎结合，实现了从体外CRISPR数据到体内肿瘤轨迹和人类生存预测的全自动生物医学发现。在结直肠癌转录组中，该系统自主识别出IGF2作为5-FU耐药性的脆弱靶点，并经多种验证方法确认。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的科学发现缺乏数学基础的因果约束，无法进行多尺度临床转化；而临床数字孪生虽能预测生物状态，但依赖黑盒潜空间，牺牲了机制可解释性。亟需一种既能保持可解释性又具备精确预测能力的自动化发现框架。
AI.method: 构建了神经符号架构Octopus：1) 零泄漏本地LLM群用于自主生成治疗假设；2) 严格算法物理引擎提供数学约束；3) 通过CRISPR依赖性数据(CCLE)生成假设；4) 使用XGBoost SHAP向量进行动态因果级联追踪和机制可解释性分析；5) 在PDX小鼠模型和Marisa人类生存数据中进行正交翻译验证。
AI.result: 在无监督全扫描中自主识别IGF2作为5-FU耐药的严格边界脆弱性。经Benjamini-Hochberg矫正后仍显著(q=0.0292, Log-Rank p=0.0007)，并在独立小鼠队列中成功预测显著肿瘤体积缩小(Mann-Whitney p=0.0373)。
AI.conclusion: Octopus架构成功弥合了多智能体推理与数学约束临床生存之间的鸿沟，建立了一种可验证、零泄漏的端到端自动化生物医学发现新范式。

title: AEGIS: Awareness-Enhanced Guidance for Iterative Safeguard
summary: Span-level rationales are often assumed to improve controllability in text detoxification, but it remains unclear when such guidance helps and when it introduces trade-offs. We present Awareness-Enhanced Guidance for Iterative Safeguard (AEGIS) as an exploratory framework for studying span-guided multilingual detoxification across English, Mandarin Chinese, and Korean. AEGIS combines span-level detector outputs with frozen generator backbones, allowing harmful spans, intensity labels, and target attributes to be provided as structured guidance during rewriting. Rather than claiming state-of-the-art detoxification performance, we analyze how span guidance affects the balance between toxicity reduction and meaning preservation across generator families, model scales, and languages. Our results suggest that span-guided detoxification is conditionally useful: explicit rationales change the trade-off between toxicity reduction and meaning preservation, but their effects depend strongly on the generator backbone and the linguistic context. These findings highlight both the promise and the limitations of span-level control signals for multilingual detoxification.

AI.tldr: AEGIS框架研究了跨度级引导在多语言文本去毒中的条件性效果，发现其虽能改变毒性降低与意义保留的权衡，但效果强烈依赖于生成器骨干和语言环境。
AI.motivation: 探索跨度级理据（span-level rationales）在文本去毒中何时有帮助、何时引入权衡，尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出AEGIS框架，将跨度级检测器输出与冻结生成器骨干结合，在重写时提供有害跨度、强度标签和目标属性作为结构化指导，并在英语、普通话和韩语上实验。
AI.result: 跨度引导在毒性降低与意义保留间的权衡上产生有条件的效果：效果强烈依赖于生成器骨干和语言上下文，而非普遍提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 跨度级控制信号在多语言去毒中既有前景也有局限性，其有效性是条件性的。

title: Constraint-Anchored Reasoning Traces
summary: Autoregressive multimodal large language models (MLLMs) suffer from error snowballing: a single incorrect inference early in a chainof-thought (CoT) trace corrupts all downstream reasoning. We find that in state-of-the-art open-source MLLMs, once the first error occurs, the reasoning cascades into failure across all remaining steps in 65% of such cases (a metric we term the snowball rate). Existing mitigations-sampling multiple chains, post-hoc self-verification, or full program synthesis-either lack symbolic grounding, catch errors too late, or sacrifice the flexibility of natural language reasoning. We propose Constraint-Anchored Reasoning Traces (CART), a neuro-symbolic framework that trains MLLMs to interleave natural language reasoning steps with symbolic constraint assertions: lightweight, machine-checkable statements about visual content (e.g., count(red_objects) = 3). A dual-pronged Constraint Propagation Module-combining a learned neural grounding head with Boolean Constraint Propagation-continuously verifies these anchors against extracted visual features and checks their mutual logical consistency. When a contradiction is detected, a backtrack controller halts generation and reverts to the last consistent checkpoint, preventing error propagation. A variable-frequency emission mechanism allows the model to adaptively control anchor density, avoiding trace bloat. We construct 218K training instances by augmenting GQA, CLEVR-CoGenT, and VCR with ground-truth constraint annotations derived from scene graphs, and fine-tune open-source MLLMs (LLaVA-NeXT, Qwen2-VL) via LoRA. On five benchmarks, CART reduces the snowball rate from 0.65 to 0.14, improves GQA accuracy by +4.6 percentage points over trainingonly baselines, and achieves 89.1 F1 on POPE-all with at most 18% inference overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出CART（约束锚定推理轨迹）框架，通过在自回归多模态大语言模型中插入可机器验证的符号约束语句，结合神经符号传播与回溯控制，将错误雪崩率从65%降至14%，并在多个视觉推理基准上提升性能。
AI.motivation: 自回归多模态大语言模型在链式思维推理中存在错误雪崩问题——早期一个错误推理会污染后续所有推理步骤，现有方法（多次采样、事后自验证、完整程序合成）要么缺乏符号基础，要么纠错太迟，要么牺牲自然语言推理的灵活性。
AI.method: 提出CART框架：1）训练MLLM在自然语言推理中插入符号约束断言（如count(red_objects)=3）；2）双重约束传播模块（神经接地头+布尔约束传播）持续验证这些锚点与视觉特征的一致性；3）检测到矛盾时回溯控制器暂停生成并回滚到最后一个一致检查点；4）变频率发射机制自适应控制锚点密度避免轨迹膨胀。在GQA、CLEVR-CoGenT、VCR上构建21.8万训练实例，通过LoRA微调LLaVA-NeXT和Qwen2-VL。
AI.result: 在五个基准上：雪崩率从0.65降至0.14，GQA准确率提升+4.6个百分点，POPE-all上达到89.1 F1，推理开销不超过18%。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号结合的CART框架能有效阻断错误传播，在不牺牲自然语言推理灵活性的前提下显著提升多模态推理的鲁棒性，且开销可控。

title: Feedback Cycles in Exploratory Equilibria
summary:
Entropy regularization smooths equilibrium policies in time-inconsistent stochastic control. At low temperature, the same Gibbs response can strongly amplify errors in learned rewards and dynamics. We show that the derivative of an exploratory equilibrium is governed by a backward Volterra-parabolic resolvent. Along an aligned positive mode, a lower bound has the same exponential order.
