A block decomposition identifies the source of the amplification: causal paths contribute powers of 1/tau, whereas a positive feedback cycle can produce exponential growth.
  At fixed temperature, a local equilibrium branch is twice differentiable with respect to finite-dimensional model parameters, which yields a function-valued delta method. A bounded uniformly elliptic diffusion realizes this path-cycle distinction in every finite dimension. Closing one positive cycle changes the root-n linear-response boundary from a power law to order 1/log n; along the cyclic Perron mode, right-endpoint discretization is relatively consistent exactly when N tau^2 -> infinity. An affine model also gives an exact nonlinear transition at the Lambert-W temperature beta T / W(beta T sqrt(n)). Numerical calculations illustrate these rates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究时间不一致随机控制中熵正则化导致的误差放大现象，发现探索性均衡的导数由后向Volterra-抛物型预解式控制，在正反馈循环下误差可呈指数级增长，并给出了不同模型参数下的相变边界。
AI.motivation: 研究熵正则化在时间不一致随机控制中，低温情况下如何放大奖励和动力学学习误差的问题，揭示误差放大的数学机制和临界条件。
AI.method: 通过后向Volterra-抛物型预解式分析均衡导数，采用块分解区分因果路径和正反馈循环的贡献；在有界均匀椭圆扩散和仿射模型中推导误差放大的指数/幂律边界，计算不同参数下的相变点。
AI.result: 因果路径贡献1/tau的幂次增长，正反馈循环可产生指数增长；关闭正循环后根n线性响应边界从幂律变为1/log n；循环Perron模式下右端点离散化在N tau^2 -> ∞时相对一致；仿射模型给出Lambert-W温度下的精确非线性相变。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了熵正则化在时间不一致控制中误差放大的根本机制来自正反馈循环，并给出了不同条件下的定量边界和相变规律。

title: Preference-based Antibody Expression Ranking: Scaling with Large-scale Weak Supervision
summary: Antibody expression ranking is a critical task in antibody design, yet its modelling is severely hindered by the scarcity of labeled experimental data. To address this, we propose a unified preference-based learning framework that integrates scarce quantitative expression data with large-scale weak positive supervision from immunization data. We adapt Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to protein language models by introducing a union-masked log-likelihood approximation and IMGT-based alignment, enabling efficient training on variable-length sequences. Evaluating on a diverse internal dataset of 1254 labeled sequences and 4 million unlabeled camelid-derived antibodies, we show that our method consistently outperforms baselines on most metrics. Our results demonstrate that preference learning can effectively learn from weak supervision, providing a scalable solution for antibody expressibility optimization in data-constrained settings. Project page: https://kisoji-biotechnology-inc.github.io/Preference-Expression-Ranking/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的基于偏好学习的框架，通过将稀缺的定量表达数据与大规模免疫数据的弱监督信号结合，并改进Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)使其适配蛋白质语言模型，从而在数据稀缺条件下有效优化抗体的表达排名。
AI.motivation: 抗体表达排名对抗体设计至关重要，但标记的实验数据极其稀缺，严重制约了该任务的建模能力。现有方法难以在数据受限条件下有效学习。
AI.method: 提出统一偏好学习框架：(1) 整合稀缺的定量表达数据与大规模免疫数据的弱正监督；(2) 将Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)适配到蛋白质语言模型，引入union-masked log-likelihood近似和基于IMGT的对齐方法，支持可变长序列的高效训练。
AI.result: 在1254个标记序列和400万未标记的骆驼科抗体数据集上评估，该方法在大部分指标上持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 偏好学习能够有效地从弱监督中学习，为数据受限场景下的抗体可表达性优化提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: C$^2$KV: Compressed and Composable KV Cache Reuse for Efficient LLM Inference
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, accepted by ACM SIGKDD 2026
summary: Long-context inference is central to modern large language model (LLM) applications such as retrieval-augmented generation and multi-document reasoning. To mitigate the growing inference cost, recent work has explored key-value (KV) cache reuse to reduce redundant prefill computation. However, existing reuse methods primarily focus on computation savings and overlook a critical bottleneck in long-context LLM serving: the cost of storing and accessing large KV caches. While KV compression appears to be a natural complement, naively combining compression with non-prefix KV reuse often leads to severe accuracy degradation. In this work, we propose C$^2$KV, a unified framework for non-prefix KV reuse that jointly optimizes KV extraction and inference-time concatenation. C$^2$KV learns a composable and compressed KV cache manifold that is explicitly designed to be position-agnostic. Our approach introduces a lightweight sidecar Extractor with learnable compression tokens and a structured attention flow, enabling modular KV representations that can be flexibly reused and concatenated without modifying the frozen base model. We further employ a compression-concatenation co-training strategy to align extraction-time representations with their downstream reuse behavior. Extensive experiments across multiple long-context benchmarks and model families demonstrate that C$^2$KV significantly reduces KV cache storage and transfer costs, achieving up to 17$\times$ inference speedup under long contexts, while preserving generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C²KV框架，通过联合优化KV提取与推理时拼接，实现非前缀KV缓存的压缩与重用，在显著降低存储和传输开销的同时，将长上下文推理速度提升高达17倍，且不损失生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存重用方法主要关注计算节省，忽视了长上下文LLM服务中存储和访问大KV缓存这一关键瓶颈。简单地将KV压缩与非前缀重用结合会导致严重精度下降，亟需一个统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出C²KV框架：1）学习可组合且压缩的KV缓存流形，设计为位置无关；2）引入轻量级侧边提取器，包含可学习压缩令牌和结构化注意力流；3）采用压缩-拼接联合训练策略，对齐提取时表示与下游重用行为。
AI.result: 在多个长上下文基准和模型家族上，C²KV显著降低KV缓存存储和传输成本，在长上下文场景下实现高达17倍的推理加速，同时保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: C²KV证明了通过联合优化压缩与重用可以有效解决长上下文推理中的存储瓶颈，为高效LLM服务提供了新范式。

title: AGG: Jacobian-Aggregated Group Gradient for Efficient GRPO Training of Diffusion Models
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a powerful reinforcement learning algorithm for aligning generative models with human preferences. While successful in large language models~\cite{shao2024deepseekmathpushinglimitsmathematical}, its extension to diffusion and flow matching models introduces a severe computational bottleneck: gradients must be back-propagated through the high-capacity DiT backbone at \emph{every} timestep of the sampling trajectory, making high-resolution text-to-image (T2I) training prohibitively expensive. Training-free DiT inference acceleration methods (e.g., $Δ$-DiT, ScalingCache) exploit the fact that DiT hidden states and velocity predictions vary \emph{smoothly and nearly linearly} along the trajectory. We ask whether the same linearity can reduce the backward-pass cost of DiT RL training, and answer affirmatively with \textbf{JAGG} (\textbf{J}acobian-\textbf{A}ggregated \textbf{G}roup \textbf{G}radient), which reduces full transformer backward passes from $W$ to $2$ per group of $W$ consecutive steps. JAGG approximates intermediate-step Jacobians via $t$-weighted interpolation of the endpoint Jacobians, then aggregates per-step upstream signals into two composite gradients applied through a single joint backward pass. We prove this interpolation is \emph{exact} when the velocity is linear in $(z,t)$, and a cosine-similarity routing rule (\texttt{jagg\_frac}) deploys JAGG only where the assumption holds. Experiments on T2I benchmarks show JAGG delivers $\sim$2$\times$ backward speedup with negligible quality degradation.

AI.tldr: JAGG提出了一种通过雅可比矩阵插值将DiT强化学习训练中的反向传播次数从W步减少到2步的方法，在文本到图像生成任务中实现约2倍反向传播加速且质量损失可忽略。
AI.motivation: GRPO在扩散/流匹配模型中需要对每个采样步长通过高容量DiT骨干网络进行梯度反向传播，导致高分辨率文本到图像训练计算成本过高，亟需降低训练代价。
AI.method: 利用DiT隐藏状态沿轨迹平滑近线性变化的特性，通过t-加权插值近似中间步长的雅可比矩阵，将每W个连续步长的全变换器反向传播从W次减少到2次；同时设计了余弦相似度路由规则（jagg_frac）以决定何时应用该近似。
AI.result: 在文本到图像基准测试中，JAGG实现了约2倍的反向传播加速，且生成质量几乎没有下降。
AI.conclusion: JAGG通过利用DiT轨迹的线性特性，成功地将训练加速方法引入推理加速领域，解决了扩散模型强化学习训练的计算瓶颈问题。

title: Supporting Autonomous Process Execution within a Multi-Perspective Constraint Frame via Numeric Planning
summary: AI-Augmented Business Process Management Systems (ABPMS) enhance traditional BPMS by leveraging advanced AI techniques to define, execute, and monitor complex process structures. Within this landscape, Framed Autonomy denotes the capability of a system to autonomously advance the execution of a Business Process (BP) instance while strictly adhering to a predefined frame, i.e., a set of constraints that may span multiple perspectives. Existing research on framed autonomy has predominantly focused on control-flow constraints, either declarative or procedural, and typically relies on their transformation into automata-based representations. In this study, we extend this line of work by introducing a novel tool for what-if analysis that augments the process frame with multi-perspective constraints, including data-aware and temporal conditions. Given a partial process execution, the proposed approach exploits this enriched frame to recommend optimal continuations in compliance with the underlying process specifications. We additionally report an empirical evaluation demonstrating the scalability and effectiveness of the technique, thereby highlighting its potential for supporting autonomous and constraint-aware decision making in ABPMS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强型工具，在AI增强的业务流程管理系统中引入多视角约束（包括数据和时间条件），用于流程的假设分析，能根据部分执行情况推荐最优且合规的后续流程。
AI.motivation: 现有框架自主性研究主要关注控制流约束（声明式或过程式），且依赖自动机表示，缺乏对数据感知和时间条件等多视角约束的支持。
AI.method: 在部分流程执行的基础上，利用包含数据感知和时间条件等多视角约束的增强框架，推荐最优且合规的流程续行方案。
AI.result: 通过实证评估证明了该技术的可扩展性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具有潜力支持ABPMS中自主且约束感知的决策制定。

title: Improved Convergence Rate for Stochastic Multi-Gradient Descent: A Proof Discovered with AI
summary: For smooth nonconvex stochastic multi-objective problems, stochastic multi-gradient descent (SMG) computes an approximate steepest common descent direction of the objectives from stochastic gradients. With unbiased, variance-bounded stochastic gradients, this note establishes a new convergence rate for SMG in terms of the squared Pareto-stationarity (PS) measure. With a constant stepsize and linearly growing mini-batches, this measure at the algorithm's output is $\widetilde O(T^{-1})$ after $T$ iterations. This improves on the $\widetilde O(T^{-1/4})$ bound obtained by Chen et al. (2024) under the same setting, where $\widetilde O(\cdot)$ suppresses logarithmic factors. The key to the rate improvement is to exploit the Lipschitz continuity of the PS measure, defined by the norm of the multi-gradient descent algorithm (MGDA) direction, rather than the $(1/2)$-Hölder continuity of the MGDA direction used by Chen et al. (2024). The proof was discovered while the author was preparing homework for a graduate course: ChatGPT 5.4 Thinking Extended generated the initial proof strategy in response to an author-written homework-solution prompt; the author then verified and reorganized the resulting argument. The appendices document the prompt and summarize the student submissions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对光滑非凸随机多目标优化问题，证明了随机多梯度下降（SMG）在平方Pareto平稳性（PS）测度上达到$\widetilde O(T^{-1})$的收敛率，显著改进了此前$\widetilde O(T^{-1/4})$的结果。关键创新在于利用PS测度的Lipschitz连续性替代了MGDA方向的$(1/2)$-Hölder连续性。
AI.motivation: 多目标优化问题在机器学习、经济学等领域广泛存在，而随机多梯度下降（SMG）是解决此类问题的核心方法。此前Chen等人(2024)得到的$\widetilde O(T^{-1/4})$收敛率并不理想，亟需更紧的理论保证。
AI.method: 1) 使用SMG算法处理光滑非凸随机多目标问题；2) 采用恒定步长和线性增长的mini-batch策略；3) 关键改进：利用PS测度（MGDA方向的范数）的Lipschitz连续性性质，替代此前工作中使用的$(1/2)$-Hölder连续性假设。
AI.result: 在T次迭代后，平方PS测度达到$\widetilde O(T^{-1})$的收敛率，相较于Chen等人(2024)的$\widetilde O(T^{-1/4})$有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过更强的连续性假设分析，大幅改进了SMG算法的收敛理论。有趣的是，该证明策略最初由ChatGPT 5.4 Thinking Extended生成，作者随后验证和整理，展示了AI辅助数学研究的潜力。

title: PsiLogic: Chaos-Aware Active Cancellation for Adam with a Fair Cross-Domain Benchmark
summary:
Adaptive optimizers such as Adam and AdamW apply the same update rule regardless of whether training is in a chaotic early phase or near convergence. We introduce PsiLogic, an optimizer that augments Adam with a dynamic Active Cancellation Term gated by a dual exponential moving average (EMA) of scale-normalized gradient norms. The resulting chaos detector strengthens damping when gradient statistics are unstable and fades to zero as training stabilizes, providing an implicit warmup without a hand-tuned schedule.
  We evaluate PsiLogic against Adam, AdamW, and Lion using FairBench -- a reproducible benchmark protocol with per-optimizer learning-rate sweeps, identical initialization per seed, and Welch t-tests. On an NVIDIA H100 80GB reference run (4 arenas, 3 seeds, 2000 steps, bf16 AMP), PsiLogic achieves the best validation metric in three of four arenas: NLP perplexity 7.79 +/- 0.18 vs. 8.17 +/- 0.08 (AdamW, p = 0.049), ViT top-1 accuracy 0.244 +/- 0.006 vs. 0.223 +/- 0.002 (AdamW, p = 0.015), and ResNet top-1 accuracy 0.222 +/- 0.001 vs. 0.172 +/- 0.004 (Adam, p = 0.001). On diffusion, validation MSE is statistically tied with Adam/AdamW (p = 0.49). ResNet accuracy vs. AdamW is a numerical tie without significance at three seeds (p = 0.44). Peak GPU memory is comparable across optimizers; PsiLogic incurs 1.2--1.8x wall-clock overhead on transformer-heavy arenas (implementation-bound).
  We release an open-source PyTorch implementation, the full FairBench harness, and all raw CSV outputs to support independent verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PsiLogic优化器，通过双指数移动平均检测梯度混沌状态，在Adam基础上添加动态衰减项，无需手动调整预热调度。在NLP、ViT、ResNet任务上超越Adam/AdamW，计算开销略有增加。
AI.motivation: Adam类优化器在训练早期（混沌阶段）和收敛阶段使用相同的更新规则，缺乏对训练动态的自适应调整能力。传统预热调度需要手动调整，不够灵活。
AI.method: 在Adam优化器中引入"主动取消项"（Active Cancellation Term），通过双指数移动平均（dual EMA）监测归一化梯度范数，构建混沌检测器（chaos detector）。当梯度统计不稳定时增强阻尼，训练稳定后衰减至零，实现隐式预热。
AI.result: 在FairBench基准测试中，PsiLogic在NLP（困惑度7.79 vs 8.17）、ViT（Top-1准确率0.244 vs 0.223）、ResNet（0.222 vs 0.172）上显著优于AdamW/Adam；扩散任务上统计持平；GPU内存相当，计算开销增加1.2-1.8倍。
AI.conclusion: PsiLogic通过动态混沌检测机制改进了Adam的自适应性，在多个任务上取得更优性能，且无需手动调整预热调度。额外计算开销是可接受的权衡，代码已开源支持复现。

title: Large Language Models for Citation Function Classification
comment: Published at the 15th edition of the Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: Citation function classification plays a crucial role in understanding the relationships between scientific publications and advancing bibliometric analysis. This study presents one of the first comprehensive evaluations of multiple state-of-the-art (SOTA) large language models (LLMs) for citation function classification, achieving new SOTA results on the ACL-ARC dataset. We systematically compare five models (Mistral 7B, Orca 2-7B, LLaMA 3.1-8B, Falcon 7B, and SciBERT) across zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuning approaches. Our fine-tuned Falcon 7B model achieves a 73.3% macro F1 score on ACL-ARC, representing a significant improvement over previous methods. Additionally, we introduce AC3, a novel dataset featuring a seven-category annotation scheme that distinguishes between neutral acknowledgments and explicit evaluative stances (more opinion-oriented citations - criticizing, complimenting, contradicting). The dataset is implemented across four context extraction variants to systematically evaluate the impact of contextual scope on classification performance. We also provide detailed analysis of model performance, experimental configurations, and limitations to guide future research in this domain. To our knowledge, this is one of the first studies dedicated to comprehensive model comparison for citation function classification, addressing a gap identified in recent surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多个大语言模型（Mistral 7B、Orca 2-7B、LLaMA 3.1-8B、Falcon 7B、SciBERT）在引文功能分类任务上的表现，通过微调的Falcon 7B在ACL-ARC数据集上达到73.3%的宏F1分数，并引入了一个具有七类标注体系的新数据集AC3，同时探索了不同上下文范围对分类性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 引文功能分类对于理解科学出版物之间的关系和推进文献计量分析至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对多种大语言模型在该任务上的系统比较，近期综述也指出了这一研究空白。
AI.method: 比较五种模型（Mistral 7B、Orca 2-7B、LLaMA 3.1-8B、Falcon 7B、SciBERT）在零样本、少样本和微调三种范式下的表现；引入AC3数据集，采用七类标注方案区分中性致谢与明确评价立场（批评、赞美、反驳等），并在四种上下文提取变体下评估。
AI.result: 微调后的Falcon 7B在ACL-ARC数据集上取得73.3%的宏F1分数，显著优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文是首批专门致力于引文功能分类模型比较的研究之一，填补了相关研究空白，并提供了详细的性能分析、实验配置和局限性说明，为未来研究提供了指导。

title: Concentration and Mean-Square Bounds for Contractive Stochastic Approximation: A Unified Elementary Approach
comment: Submitted to Stochastic Processes and their Applications
summary: We establish mean-square and concentration bounds for stochastic approximation (SA) with arbitrary norm contractive mappings, under a multiplicative noise model where the noise may scale affinely with the norm of the iterates, and the iterates are potentially unbounded. These settings arise in reinforcement learning, where operators are often contractive in the $\ell_\infty$ norm and the noise scales with the iterates. To address the arbitrary norm, earlier works replace the non-smooth squared norm with a smooth Lyapunov function constructed via the generalized Moreau envelope. For concentration analysis, these works handle multiplicative noise and unbounded iterates through a multi-stage bootstrapping argument that starts from a time-varying worst-case bound and iteratively refines it. We instead present a unified and elementary analysis that yields both bounds. Using an averaged noise sequence and corresponding auxiliary iterates, we obtain a one-step Lyapunov drift inequality for the normed error directly, without smoothing the norm or constructing an envelope. For the mean-square bound, we combine this drift inequality with an induction argument showing that the iterates remain bounded in expectation. For the concentration bound, we develop a probabilistic induction over a sequence of "good" events on which the iterates are controlled, allowing the standard Azuma-Hoeffding bound to be applied. Our approach yields the first sub-Gaussian tailed maximal (all-time) concentration bound for SA under multiplicative noise, by allowing the stepsize to depend logarithmically on the confidence level. Beyond the specific setting considered here, we discuss the generalizability of these proof techniques to other noise models and iterative algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有任意范数压缩映射的随机逼近(SA)算法，在乘性噪声模型下建立了均方界和浓度界。提出了一种统一且初等的分析方法，无需平滑范数或构造包络，首次给出了乘性噪声下SA的次高斯尾部极大浓度界。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中的算子通常在ℓ∞范数下是压缩的，且噪声与迭代量成比例缩放。现有方法需要平滑范数或使用多阶段自举论证，过程复杂。作者希望提出一种更统一、更初等的分析框架。
AI.method: (1) 使用平均噪声序列和辅助迭代量，直接得到误差范数的一步Lyapunov漂移不等式；(2) 均方界：结合漂移不等式与归纳论证，证明迭代量在期望意义下有界；(3) 浓度界：通过概率归纳构建一系列"好"事件控制迭代量，从而应用标准Azuma-Hoeffding界；(4) 允许步长依赖置信水平的对数项，得到次高斯尾部极大浓度界。
AI.result: (1) 建立了乘性噪声下SA的均方界；(2) 首次得到了乘性噪声下SA的次高斯尾部极大（全时）浓度界；(3) 步长可依赖于置信水平的对数项。
AI.conclusion: 该统一分析框架可推广到其他噪声模型和迭代算法，为后续研究提供了通用性的证明技巧。

title: RELIC: Revealed Principles for Learning Interpretable Composable Skills in Multi-Agent Planning
summary: Multi-agent planning becomes substantially harder when agents must improve specialized decision-making skills while keeping their internal implementations private. This regime arises when agents are developed independently, expose different interfaces and capabilities, and must nevertheless coordinate without sharing executable policies. Prior research has largely assumed centralized optimization, shared policy access, or common skill representations, making it poorly suited to privacy-constrained cooperation. We introduce RELIC, a framework for learning interpretable and composable skills via revealed principles. Each agent refines its own programmatic skill through private LLM-guided search, while a trusted orchestrator evaluates proposed updates solely through team-level performance. Successful behaviors are not broadcast as code; instead, they are abstracted into portable principles that other agents can instantiate within their own interfaces and recombine with local strategies. This separates coordination from implementation sharing, enabling cross-agent transfer under heterogeneous skill signatures. RELIC thus introduces a new paradigm for privacy-preserving skill learning and coordination in multi-agent planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RELIC框架，在保护各智能体内部实现隐私的前提下，通过可解释原则实现技能学习与多智能体协作，无需共享可执行策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖集中优化、共享策略或共同技能表征，无法满足隐私约束下的多智能体协作需求。智能体由不同开发者独立开发，接口和能力各异，需在不泄露内部实现的前提下协调行动。
AI.method: 每个智能体通过私有LLM引导搜索精炼自身程序化技能；可信协调者仅基于团队级表现评估更新提案；成功行为被抽象为可移植原则，而非广播代码；其他智能体可在自身接口内实例化这些原则并与本地策略重组。
AI.result: 实现了异构技能签名下的跨智能体迁移，将协调与实现共享解耦，达成隐私保护下的技能学习与协调。
AI.conclusion: RELIC为隐私保护的多智能体规划引入了新范式，打破了传统方法对共享策略和共同表征的依赖。

title: Risk-sensitive exit-time control for stochastic differential equations with path-dependent coefficients
summary: In this work, we study small-noise asymptotics of risk-sensitive exit-time control problems governed by stochastic differential equations with path-dependent coefficients. Our main result establishes the convergence of the $\log$-transformed exit-time problem to a deterministic control problem with path-dependent coefficients. For its proof, we first derive a novel variational representation for general $\log$-transformed stochastic control problems with path-dependent coefficients, combining tools from the theory of path-dependent partial differential equations and convex expectations on path spaces. In a second step, we use probabilistic methods to analyze the convergence of the resulting variational formulas. To illustrate the scope of our analysis, we consider a computable example for a stochastic differential equation with memory and characterize the limiting problem and associated control strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了路径依赖随机微分方程下风险敏感退出时间控制问题的小噪声渐近行为，建立了对数变换后退出时间问题收敛到确定性控制问题的结果，并提出了结合路径依赖PDE和凸期望的新变分表示。
AI.motivation: 研究带路径依赖系数的随机微分方程中风险敏感退出时间控制问题的小噪声渐近行为，填补该领域理论空白。
AI.method: 1) 提出一种新的变分表示，结合路径依赖偏微分方程理论和路径空间上的凸期望工具；2) 使用概率方法分析变分公式的收敛性。
AI.result: 建立了对数变换后退出时间问题收敛到具有路径依赖系数的确定性控制问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过一个带记忆的随机微分方程可计算实例，刻画了极限问题及相应的控制策略，验证了理论分析的有效性。

title: A Predict-then-Correct Loop Based on Few-Shot Continuous Contextual Bandit for Demand Forecasting
summary: Retail demand forecasting remains difficult when demand shifts faster than static forecasting models can be retrained, especially in early demand cycles where newly observed labels are sparse. To address this, this study aims to improve adaptive retail forecasting by proposing a predict-then-correct (PtC) framework that retains a first-stage machine learning (ML) forecast and applies a few-shot continuous contextual bandit correction policy with similar-SKUs augmentation and top-p masked updating. Across Walmart retail data and an exclusive beverage dataset, PtC delivers statistically significant reductions in MAPE, MAE, and RMSE across stable & high volume, stable & low volume, and erratic & intermittent demand patterns, improves average RMSE by 9.52% over the ML-only baseline in the ablation study, and yields lower inventory costs than base-stock, proximal policy optimization, and soft actor-critic policies under the tested lead-time settings. These findings show that online forecast correction can bridge offline demand learning and real-time retail decision-making by adapting to sparse feedback without fully retraining the base forecasting model.

AI.tldr: 提出预测-校正(PtC)框架，通过少样本连续上下文强盗校正策略，在不完全重新训练基础模型的情况下改进零售需求预测，在沃尔玛和饮料数据集上实现9.52%的RMSE改进并降低库存成本。
AI.motivation: 需求变化速度超过静态预测模型的再训练频率，尤其在早期需求周期中新标签稀疏，导致传统预测方法难以适应快速变化的需求模式。
AI.method: 提出PtC框架：第一阶段保留ML预测，第二阶段应用少样本连续上下文强盗校正策略，结合相似SKU增强和top-p掩蔽更新。
AI.result: 在沃尔玛和饮料数据集上，MAPE、MAE和RMSE均显著降低；消融研究中RMSE较纯ML基线提升9.52%；在测试的提前期设置下，库存成本低于base-stock、PPO和SAC策略。
AI.conclusion: 在线预测校正能够在不重新训练基础模型的情况下，弥合离线需求学习与实时零售决策之间的差距，有效适应稀疏反馈。

title: When to Use Extra Context: Evidence-Grounded Terminology Adaptation for Simultaneous Speech Translation
summary: Extra context is valuable for simultaneous speech translation of technical talks, but injecting the entire document context into every streaming segment is often too coarse. Through diagnostic experiments, we find that context gains mainly come from paper-specific terminology recovery rather than uniform semantic enhancement. We therefore propose EGTA, an Evidence-Grounded Terminology Adaptation framework that builds a document terminology memory, selects compact candidate terms conditioned on the current streaming state, and adapts ASR/speech-side and decoder-side decision spaces using only the selected terms. EGTA can be instantiated in cascaded, end-to-end, and generation-only SimulST settings without full-model fine-tuning. We evaluate EGTA on an ACL technical-talk SimulST evaluation suite consisting of MCIF-dev and ACL60/60-dev. On MCIF-dev, EGTA-RG improves BLEU by +1.05/+0.59, XCOMET-XL by +0.019/+0.006, named-entity recall by +79\%/+73\% relative, and acronym recall by +0.099/+0.171 on En$\rightarrow$Zh and En$\rightarrow$De. Across MCIF-dev latency settings, EGTA consistently improves XCOMET-XL, named-entity recall, and acronym recall. External validation on ACL60/60-dev further shows consistent terminology-recall gains without additional fine-tuning. Shuffled-memory controls and activation audits provide evidence that the improvements are tied to paper-specific evidence alignment rather than generic context prompting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EGTA框架，通过构建文档术语记忆库并选择与当前流式状态相关的术语，在无需全模型微调的情况下提升技术讲座同传翻译中术语恢复能力，实验表明BLEU提升1.05/0.59，命名实体召回率提升79%/73%。
AI.motivation: 现有同传翻译中使用全文文档上下文过于粗糙，上下文增益主要来源于特定术语恢复而非统一语义增强，因此需要一种更精准的术语适应方法。
AI.method: 提出EGTA框架：构建文档术语记忆库，根据当前流式状态选择紧凑的候选术语，分别适应ASR/语音侧和解码器侧决策空间，可实例化为级联、端到端和仅生成三种SimulST设置，无需全模型微调。
AI.result: 在MCIF-dev上，EGTA-RG在En→Zh和En→De任务中BLEU提升+1.05/+0.59，XCOMET-XL提升+0.019/+0.006，命名实体召回率相对提升+79%/+73%，缩写召回率提升+0.099/+0.171；在ACL60/60-dev上验证了一致的术语召回增益。
AI.conclusion: EGTA通过论文特定证据对齐而非通用上下文提示实现了翻译质量的提升，打乱记忆对照和激活审计进一步验证了改进来源于术语与论文证据的对齐。

title: FUSAR-R1: A Large-Scale Reasoning Model for Intelligent Interpretation of SAR Images
summary: In recent years, large-scale vision-language models have been driving a paradigm shift in intelligent remote sensing image interpretation. By incorporating textual semantic information, the cognitive expression, semantic understanding, and human-computer interaction capabilities of interpretation models have been significantly improved, achieving initial progress in the field of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) image interpretation. However, SAR images are affected by factors such as coherent imaging mechanisms, complex scattering characteristics, speckle noise interference, and target-background coupling, resulting in complex and variable image features with significant uncertainties and specializations. Existing SAR vision-language models do not yet possess the step-by-step analysis, logical judgment, and self-correction capabilities of human experts, making it difficult to support reliable intelligent interpretation in complex scenarios. To address this issue, this paper proposes a large-scale reasoning model, FUSAR-R1, for intelligent interpretation of SAR images. The model first constructs explicit chain-of-thought reasoning data by simulating the interpretation process of human experts and uses this data to guide instruction learning, thereby endowing the model with basic reasoning capabilities. Subsequently, a reinforcement learning strategy is introduced to optimize the model's outputs based on inference results, enabling self-correction and more reliable reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that FUSAR-R1 consistently outperforms existing multimodal large-scale models across various SAR interpretation tasks, including target detection, target counting and classification, and land-cover category recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUSAR-R1，一种面向SAR图像智能解译的大规模推理模型。通过构建人类专家推理链数据指导指令学习，并结合强化学习实现自我纠错与可靠推理。实验表明，该模型在目标检测、计数分类、地物识别等任务上优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有SAR视觉语言模型缺乏人类专家那样的逐步分析、逻辑判断和自我纠错能力，难以支持复杂场景下的可靠智能解译。SAR图像受相干成像机制、复杂散射特性、散斑噪声干扰等因素影响，特征复杂多变且具有显著不确定性和特殊性。
AI.method: 1) 模拟人类专家解译过程，构建显式链式思维推理数据；2) 利用该数据指导指令学习，赋予模型基础推理能力；3) 引入强化学习策略，基于推理结果优化模型输出，实现自我纠错和更可靠的推理。
AI.result: 在目标检测、目标计数与分类、地物类别识别等SAR解译任务中，FUSAR-R1一致优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟专家推理过程并结合强化学习自我纠错，可以有效提升SAR图像智能解译的可靠性和推理能力，为复杂场景下的SAR解译提供了新路径。

title: ESCUCHA: A Spanish Speech Benchmark for Heterogeneous Acoustic Conditions
summary: As large audio language models (LALMs) advance, robust evaluation frameworks have become essential. In this context, Spanish speech understanding under realistic acoustic conditions has received particularly little attention. We introduce ESCUCHA, the first Spanish speech understanding benchmark designed to evaluate LALMs across heterogeneous acoustic conditions and reasoning abilities. ESCUCHA comprises 1,000 human-curated questions paired with audio, totaling 162.9 hours sourced directly ``from the wild'' rather than drawn from existing datasets, with durations ranging from a few seconds to over 80 minutes. The benchmark emphasizes reasoning, spanning 9 perceptual and 10 reasoning categories, and it captures linguistic diversity through multiple Spanish accents and non-normative speech. ESCUCHA further includes multi-audio questions, spoken questions, and audio instructions, and it flags which questions support open-ended evaluation. Benchmarking several state-of-the-art multimodal and speech models reveals substantial performance gaps relative to trained humans.

AI.tldr: ESCUCHA是首个专门用于评估大型音频语言模型（LALMs）在真实声学条件下西班牙语语音理解与推理能力的基准测试，包含1000个人工筛选的真实场景问题，覆盖多种口音和非规范语音，评测发现当前最先进模型与人类表现存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 随着大型音频语言模型的发展，需要能够评估其在真实声学条件下（尤其是非英语语言）语音理解和推理能力的评测框架，而西班牙语在这方面的研究尤为匮乏。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,000个人工精选问题和音频（共162.9小时，来自真实场景）的基准测试ESCUCHA，涵盖9种感知类别和10种推理类别，包含多音频问题、口语问题、音频指令以及多种西班牙语口音和非规范语音。
AI.result: 对多个最先进的多模态和语音模型进行基准测试，发现它们与受过训练的人类之间存在显著的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前LALMs在真实声学条件下的西班牙语理解和推理能力远未达到人类水平，ESCUCHA为这一方向提供了有价值的评测基准。

title: From Overload to Insights: How AI Agents Can Support Scientists in Analyzing Complex Data
comment: Accepted for publication at the 42nd IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution
summary: Scientists at European XFEL conduct experiments that generate very large and complex datasets. The subsequent data analysis is challenging as scientists must combine their domain expertise with facility- and software-specific knowledge scattered across documentation, tools, and support channels. To address this problem, we designed and evaluated an agentic AI system tailored to the scientists' needs and integrated with the high-performance computing environment of European XFEL. Using a design science research approach, we conducted a rapid literature review, a systematic evaluation of 16 AI tools, multiple interviews, a focus group, and a user study with experts at European XFEL to develop and evaluate two prototypes. Our study identifies key knowledge challenges in scientific data analysis, derives requirements for an AI agent that supports knowledge retrieval and source code generation, and proposes design recommendations for a specialized system adaptable to the evolving AI tool landscape. These findings provide guidance for developing maintainable AI support in highly specialized scientific environments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对欧洲XFEL科学家在数据分析中面临的知识碎片化挑战，通过设计科学研究方法，开发并评估了一个集成AI代理系统，该系统结合领域专长与设施软件知识，支持知识检索和代码生成，为高度专业化科学环境中的AI支持提供了设计建议。
AI.motivation: 欧洲XFEL实验产生海量复杂数据集，科学家进行数据分析时需要结合领域知识及分散在各处的设施/软件知识，现有工具与文档难以高效整合，亟需一种AI系统来弥合这一知识鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用设计科学研究方法，包括快速文献综述、系统评估16种AI工具、多轮访谈、焦点小组讨论，以及与欧洲XFEL专家开展用户研究，开发并评估了两个原型系统。
AI.result: 识别出科学数据分析中的关键知识挑战，推导出支持知识检索与源代码生成的AI代理需求，提出了适应快速演变的AI工具环境的专业化系统设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为高度专业化科学环境中开发可维护的AI支持系统提供了指导，证明了结合知识检索与代码生成的AI代理能有效辅助科学家应对复杂数据分析任务。

title: Retrieval is Enough: Training-Free Interpretability with a Tool-Using Agent
summary: Interpretability methods for neural network activations span a wide cost spectrum, from cheap, training-free techniques (such as linear probes, PCA, SVD) to more expensive training-based ones (such as SAEs and activation oracles). Training-based methods are typically more powerful, in part because they leverage large activation datasets during training. This raises a natural question - do they actually surface insights that go beyond what is recoverable from the training dataset itself? To address this, we equip an LLM agent with a vector database of activations paired with their textual contexts, along with tools for manipulating activations - projecting out directions in latent space, computing activation differences and averages. The agent iteratively queries the database, forms hypotheses from the retrieved samples, and validates them by constructing linear probes. We call this method HARP, for Hypothesis-driven Agentic Retrieval and Probing. Despite not involving any training, HARP outperforms both activation oracles and SAE-based agents on concept discovery, concept detection, model steering, and secret elicitation. The training-free design also makes HARP substantially cheaper and more flexible: new datasets can be indexed on demand whenever existing ones prove insufficient. More broadly, our results suggest that current training-based methods do not yet extract insights beyond their training data, and motivate benchmarks that explicitly require interpretability methods to demonstrate such insights. We release our code at https://github.com/SriramB-98/HARP

AI.tldr: 本文提出HARP方法，一种基于假设驱动的智能体检索与探针方法，无需训练即可通过LLM智能体结合激活值向量数据库进行概念发现、模型操控等任务，性能超过需要训练的SAE和激活预言机，表明当前训练式可解释性方法并未从训练数据中挖掘出额外洞察。
AI.motivation: 训练式可解释性方法（如SAE、激活预言机）虽然性能更强，但代价高昂。作者质疑这些方法是否真正发现了超越其训练数据集本身的洞察，因此希望探索一种无需训练、成本低廉但性能优异的替代方案。
AI.method: HARP方法：让LLM智能体配备激活值-文本上下文向量数据库，以及激活值操纵工具（投影、差值、平均等）。智能体通过迭代式检索数据库、形成假设、构造线性探针来验证假设，整个过程无需任何训练。
AI.result: HARP在概念发现、概念检测、模型操控和秘密提取四个任务上均优于激活预言机和基于SAE的智能体方法，且成本更低、更灵活（可随时索引新数据集）。
AI.conclusion: 当前训练式可解释性方法并未从训练数据中提取出超越数据本身的洞察；需要建立新的基准来明确要求可解释性方法展示这种超越性洞察能力。

title: When a Name Is Not a Name: A Benchmark Dataset and Distilled Reasoning for Culturally Entangled Bangla Homographs in Low-Resource LLMs
summary: Many Bangla words are at once personal names and culturally loaded common nouns, "Maya" is both a girl's name and a word for affectionate compassion. Choosing the right reading demands cultural knowledge that is scarce in the pretraining data of modern language models. We introduce Culturally Entangled Homograph (CEH) disambiguation and build a Bangla benchmark of 1,516 expert-verified sentences (3,032 labelled occurrences) in which one word appears twice with two distinct readings, each labelled with a culturally grounded category and an explanation of the reasoning behind it. Across open- and closed-source models, we find a systematic dominant-meaning bias: models default to the common-noun sense and overlook the name. A Bangla-specific model fails under every prompting regime we test, showing that language-specific pretraining alone does not confer cultural grounding. We further show that contrastive chain-of-thought prompting can sharply reduce this bias without training, and that distilling cultural explanations teaches small (1-3B) models to reason toward the correct reading rather than memorise labels, cutting dominant-meaning bias from as high as 100% to under 5% and turning the failed Bangla-specific model into our strongest system. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/ashuvo25/BanglaCEH.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了孟加拉语文化纠缠同形词（CEH）消歧任务，构建了1,516句专家验证的基准数据集，发现大模型存在系统性主导意义偏差（偏向普通名词忽略人名），并提出对比思维链提示和知识蒸馏方法，将偏差从最高100%降至5%以下。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语中许多人名同时是文化负载的普通名词（如"Maya"既是女孩名又是"慈爱"），现有语言模型因预训练数据缺乏文化知识而难以正确区分这两种含义。
AI.method: 构建1,516句专家验证的CEH基准数据集（每句含两个标注实例，共3,032个标注），采用对比思维链提示（contrastive chain-of-thought prompting）和知识蒸馏（将文化解释蒸馏到小模型）两种方法进行消歧。
AI.result: 1）所有模型存在主导意义偏差，默认偏向普通名词；2）孟加拉语专用模型在所有提示策略下均失败；3）对比思维链提示可显著减少偏差；4）知识蒸馏将1-3B小模型偏差从100%降至5%以下。
AI.conclusion: 仅依靠语言特定的预训练不足以获得文化根基，文化知识的显式注入（解释性推理）比单纯记忆标签更有效，知识蒸馏可将失败模型转化为最强系统。

title: AgentBrew: Lifelong Knowledge Brewing from Strong Teachers to Weak LLM Agents
summary: Deploying LLM agents typically requires a compact test-time student, even if a stronger teacher is available during training. We study knowledge brewing: distilling a teacher's interactive experience into a persistent external memory for the student. Crucially, this requires no weight updates, expert demonstrations, ground-truth labels, or test-time teacher access. This setting poses two challenges: environments provide only sparse, binary feedback, and teacher-authored notes must be inherently tailored to be concretely executable by a substantially weaker student. To address these hurdles, we propose AgentBrew, comprising two coupled components. First, a failure-triggered teacher--Ralph Loop mitigates sparse feedback by transforming student failures into environment-validated notes. Second, student-aware synthesis calibrates teacher knowledge to the weak executor's operational granularity, yielding model-specific, actionable guidance. Extensive evaluations and comprehensive ablations across coding, math, and tool-use tasks demonstrate that this asymmetric, training-free brewing paradigm produces highly capable yet deployable LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出AgentBrew方法，通过将教师智能体的交互经验蒸馏为持久化外部记忆，无需权重更新、专家演示或测试时教师访问，即可增强学生智能体的部署能力。
AI.motivation: 部署LLM智能体时通常需要轻量级的学生模型，但更强的教师模型仅在训练阶段可用。如何在无权重更新、无专家演示、无真实标签、无测试时教师访问的条件下，将教师的交互经验有效传递给较弱的学生，是一个核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出AgentBrew，包含两个组件：1) 故障触发教师Ralph Loop，通过将学生失败转化为环境验证的笔记来缓解稀疏反馈问题；2) 学生感知合成，根据弱执行者的操作粒度校准教师知识，生成模型特定的可操作指导。
AI.result: 在编码、数学和工具使用任务上的广泛评估和消融实验表明，这种非对称、免训练的知识酿造范式能够产生能力强且可部署的LLM智能体。
AI.conclusion: AgentBrew通过将教师经验以外部记忆形式蒸馏给学生，实现了无需权重更新即可提升弱学生智能体性能，为LLM智能体的高效部署提供了新范式。

title: Certified-Gap Dual-Price Policies for Real-Time Truckload Bid Acceptance with Relocating, Clock-Constrained Resources
comment: 14 pages, 1 figure. Companion benchmark paper: arXiv:2607.07343
summary: A truckload carrier must accept or reject each load tender within seconds. The decision depends on fleet state, hours-of-service (HOS) clocks, and appointment windows. We model this as a weakly coupled dynamic program in which the resources relocate and carry clocks: serving a request moves the truck to a new market and depletes its clocks, and whether a truck can serve a request depends on its state. Occupancy-based reusable-resource models do not cover this setting. We build a real-time dual-price policy from the same Lagrangian relaxation that gives the problem's upper bound. Policy and bound come from one object, so every run reports a certified optimality gap. We prove three things. First, the certificate is valid for any duals, any discretization, and any surrogate quality. Second, the policy's same-time spatial-gradient rule is exactly fluid complementary slackness, and the policy is asymptotically optimal in the subcritical fluid regime; the fitted prices are also portable across sample paths, by linear-programming basis stability. Third, certificates have limits: per-resource Lagrangian slack can stay bounded away from zero at every fleet size. We exhibit a three-truck kernel with an exact rational certificate and a replication lemma. On a public closed-loop benchmark with thirty paired seeds, the policy -- which needs no rollout labels, only one offline dual solve -- beats a rollout-trained surrogate on two of three scenarios (tight: +2.0 pp, 95% CI [+0.5, +3.6], Wilcoxon p = 0.023; mild: +3.5 pp, CI [+2.4, +4.5]) and ties the third. It decides in 0.04-0.09 ms, three orders of magnitude faster than the Monte Carlo rollout teacher. Its certificates are stable across ten bounded instances per scenario, at 57-64% of optimal, within 3-6 points of what the 1000x-slower teacher certifies.

AI.tldr: 本文针对卡车运输中带有工时限制和预约窗口的实时负载接受问题，提出了一种基于拉格朗日松弛的实时对偶定价策略。该策略与问题上界来自同一对象，每次运行都能给出认证最优性间隙。理论证明包括：证书的有效性、策略的渐近最优性和空间梯度规则的对偶解释，以及证书的局限性。在公开基准测试中，该策略在两种场景下优于基于rollout训练的代理，且计算速度比rollout快三个数量级。
AI.motivation: 卡车运输公司需要在数秒内决定是否接受每个负载报价，决策依赖车队状态、工时限制时钟和预约窗口。现有的基于占用率的可重用资源模型无法覆盖这种带有时钟和位置迁移的复杂动态规划问题，因此需要新的方法来实时做出高质量决策并提供可认证的最优性间隙。
AI.method: 将问题建模为弱耦合动态规划，其中资源（卡车）在市场中迁移并携带时钟。采用拉格朗日松弛方法构建实时对偶定价策略，该策略与问题上界来自同一优化对象。通过拉格朗日对偶将原问题分解为子问题，利用对偶价格指导实时决策。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中，该策略在两种场景下优于基于rollout训练的代理（紧张场景：+2.0个百分点，95%置信区间[+0.5, +3.6]；温和场景：+3.5个百分点，置信区间[+2.4, +4.5]），在第三种场景下持平。决策时间仅为0.04-0.09毫秒，比蒙特卡洛rollout教师快三个数量级。认证间隙在57-64%的最优值范围内，与慢1000倍的教师方法相差仅3-6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 提出的对偶定价策略在实时决策质量、计算效率和可认证最优性间隙方面均有优良表现。理论证明了策略的渐近最优性、证书的有效性及其局限性。该策略无需训练标签，仅需一次离线对偶求解，在实际应用中具有显著优势。

title: EA-RMENet -- Path Loss Prediction in Urban Environments using Deep Learning
summary: Accurate path loss prediction is a critical component of wireless network planning. Current path loss prediction methods typically struggle to balance the trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. This paper proposes the Efficient Attention Radio Map Estimation Network (EA-RMENet) which is an image data-driven, deep learning (DL) model designed for radio map estimation (RME). EA-RMENet uses a U-Net framework with an EfficientNetB5 encoder, Attention Gated (AG) skip connections, and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP). The EfficientNet encoder uses compound scaling to balance accuracy and efficiency. AG skip connections suppress irrelevant features, and the ASPP captures a multi-scale context. The model has a test prediction RMSE of 0.0334 on the RadioMapSeer3D dataset with an inference time of 0.022 seconds/sample. In the ICASSP 2023 Radio Map Prediction Challenge, the model ranks third with a competitive RMSE of 0.0406 this highlights the models potential for real-world RME.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EA-RMENet，一种基于深度学习的无线电地图估计网络，采用U-Net框架结合EfficientNetB5编码器、注意力门控跳跃连接和空洞空间金字塔池化，在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上实现0.0334的RMSE和0.022秒/样本的推理速度，并在ICASSP 2023挑战赛中排名第三。
AI.motivation: 现有路径损耗预测方法难以兼顾精度与计算效率，因此需要一种既能保持高精度又具有高效推理能力的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用U-Net框架为基础，使用EfficientNetB5作为编码器（通过复合缩放平衡精度与效率），引入注意力门控（AG）跳跃连接抑制无关特征，并采用空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）捕获多尺度上下文信息。
AI.result: 在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上测试预测RMSE为0.0334，推理时间为0.022秒/样本；在ICASSP 2023无线电地图预测挑战赛中排名第三，RMSE为0.0406。
AI.conclusion: EA-RMENet在精度和效率之间取得了良好平衡，具备实际无线电地图估计应用的潜力。

title: Zero Hallucination, by Construction: Hallucination-Aware Layered Oversight for Trustworthy Enterprise AI
summary: Enterprises will not deploy AI agents they cannot trust, and the most-cited reason for distrust is hallucination: confident, fluent output that is simply not true. The common response is to wait for a model that does not hallucinate. We argue that this is the wrong target. Large language models are, by construction, capable of generating unsupported text, and no amount of scale removes the possibility; a faithfulness judge bolted onto a raw model catches some errors but still ships others, and even well-curated retrieval pipelines have been shown to fabricate citations. We reframe the goal: "zero hallucination" is not a property a model possesses but a property a system enforces. We present HALO (Hallucination-Aware Layered Oversight), an assurance architecture which treats hallucination as a containable failure mode rather than an eliminable one. HALO composes six layers of defense: grounded generation over retrieved, approved content; constrained, deterministic execution that bounds where the model can err; multi-signal verification that scores every output for groundedness and hallucination using both an LLM judge and evidence-based checks against the source text; calibrated abstention, so the system declines rather than guesses when grounding is insufficient; total traceability of every retrieval, tool call, and generation; and continuous oversight that detects drift, alerts on threshold breaches, and closes the loop by regenerating and statistically validating improved agents. We detail each layer, give particular attention to evidence-based confidence (which verifies extractions against the source document rather than trusting the model's self-reported certainty), and illustrate the architecture on a regulated claims-extraction workload

AI.tldr: HALO是一种将幻觉视为可遏制故障而非可消除问题的分层保障架构，通过六层防御机制（基于检索的生成、约束执行、多信号验证、校准弃权、全链路追踪、持续监督）来实现可信AI代理部署。
AI.motivation: 企业因幻觉问题（模型输出看似自信流畅但事实性错误）而不愿部署AI代理；现有方案（等待无幻觉模型、事后陪审员、检索增强）无法根本解决，因为LLM本质具备生成无依据文本的能力。
AI.method: 提出HALO六层架构：1) 基于已检索且经批准内容的接地生成；2) 约束性确定性执行限制模型错误范围；3) 多信号验证（LLM法官+基于源文本的证据检查）评分；4) 接地不足时系统弃权而非猜测；5) 每次检索、工具调用和生成的完全可追溯性；6) 持续监督检测漂移、阈值告警、自动闭环改进。
AI.result: 在受监管的索赔提取任务上展示了架构的效果，特别关注了基于证据的置信度（从源文档验证提取内容而非信任模型自我报告的确定性）。
AI.conclusion: "零幻觉"不应被视为模型固有属性，而应是系统强制执行的性质。幻觉是可遏制的故障模式，HALO通过多层防御实现可信AI代理部署。

title: Beyond Semantic Equivalence: Logical Graphs for LLM Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often produce confidently stated yet unreliable outputs, posing critical challenges for deployment in safety-sensitive applications. Existing uncertainty metrics such as semantic entropy capture agreement at the level of semantic equivalence, but largely ignore the logical relationships between distinct answers. As a result, they tend to overestimate uncertainty and falsely flag hallucinations in settings where generated responses are diverse in form yet logically compatible (e.g., differing only in granularity or specificity). We propose Logical Graph Uncertainty (LGU), a framework that explicitly models implication and incompatibility among answers. LGU aggregates probability mass along entailment chains, computes entropy over logically maximal hypotheses, and penalizes mutual incompatibility among them. Across multiple question-answering benchmarks, LGU consistently improves uncertainty estimation over existing methods, and outperforms the semantic entropy baseline by up to +7.1% AUROC and +3.5% AUARC across datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出逻辑图不确定性（LGU）框架，通过显式建模答案间的蕴含与不相容关系，改进了大语言模型的不确定性估计，在问答基准上相比语义熵基线提升高达+7.1% AUROC和+3.5% AUARC。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性度量（如语义熵）仅考虑语义等价层面的一致性，忽略了答案间的逻辑关系，导致在回答形式多样但逻辑兼容（如粒度不同）的场景中高估不确定性，错误地将幻觉标记为不确定。
AI.method: 提出逻辑图不确定性（LGU），显式建模答案间的蕴含与不相容关系，沿蕴含链聚合概率质量，在逻辑最大假设上计算熵，并对相互不相容的假设进行惩罚。
AI.result: 在多个问答基准上，LGU持续优于现有方法，相比语义熵基线在AUROC上提升最高+7.1%，在AUARC上提升最高+3.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过纳入答案间的逻辑关系进行不确定性估计，可以有效减少对逻辑兼容但形式多样回答的错误高估，提升安全敏感场景下LLM输出的可靠性。

title: Compact convolutional neural networks for AI-based drone detection system
summary: The increasing use of first-person-view drones in modern conflicts has created a demand for compact and reliable detection systems capable of operating in complex electromagnetic environments. These drones continuously transmit video signals through onboard video transmitters, generating radio-frequency emissions that can be exploited for early detection. This study investigates the use of lightweight convolutional neural networks for automated detection of drone signals captured by a software-defined radio-based electronic warfare framework. Samples are converted into rasterized time-domain images, providing a computationally efficient input representation suitable for embedded systems. Several custom model architectures were designed and benchmarked in terms of accuracy, model size, and inference performance using a dataset containing approximately 40,000 labeled images. In addition to offline testing, the models were integrated into a GNU Radio signal processing chain for real-time evaluation. The results show that compact models can achieve high detection accuracy while maintaining low computational requirements, making them suitable for embedded radio-frequency monitoring applications. Compared with existing spectrogram-based RF detection methods, the proposed approach eliminates frequency-domain preprocessing and achieves comparable accuracy with significantly reduced computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出利用轻量级卷积神经网络，基于软件无线电框架对FPV无人机射频信号进行实时检测，将信号转换为栅格化时域图像，在保证高检测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于嵌入式系统。
AI.motivation: 现代冲突中第一人称视角无人机的大量使用，亟需紧凑、可靠、能在复杂电磁环境中工作的检测系统。现有基于频谱图的射频检测方法预处理复杂、计算成本高，不适合嵌入式实时应用。
AI.method: 1) 使用软件无线电采集无人机视频发射器射频信号；2) 将信号样本转换为栅格化时域图像作为输入；3) 设计多种轻量级CNN模型架构；4) 在约40,000张标注图像的数据集上训练和评估；5) 将模型集成到GNU Radio信号处理链中进行实时测试。
AI.result: 紧凑型模型在保持高检测精度的同时计算需求低，适合嵌入式射频监测；与传统频谱图方法相比，无需频域预处理，计算成本显著降低且精度相当。
AI.conclusion: 基于时域图像的轻量级CNN方案能有效替代传统频谱图方法，在保持检测精度的前提下大幅降低计算复杂度，为嵌入式射频监测提供了可行的技术路径。

title: DeLIVeR: Decomposed Learning for Information-grounded Veracity Recognition via Reinforced Knowledge Graph Exploration
comment: Accepted to 7th International Conference on Deep Learning Theory and Applications (DeLTA 2026)
summary: Automated fact-checking remains a challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs) due to "query brittleness" in traditional retrieval systems. We propose DeLIVeR (Decomposed Learning for Information-grounded Veracity Recognition), a framework that treats evidence retrieval as a reinforced strategic exploration task. DeLIVeR utilizes a Planner LLM to decompose complex claims into targeted question sets, which are used to traverse structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) for high-precision evidence. We optimize the Planner's policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a reward system prioritizing structural diversity and verdict accuracy. Our evaluation on LIAR, FEVER, and PolitiFact shows that DeLIVeR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Using Qwen2.5-7B, our framework achieved peak F1-scores of 83.73, 84.57, and 79.70 respectively, representing a 10-15% improvement over HippoRAG2. By shifting to a reinforced question-planning strategy, DeLIVeR effectively bridges multi-hop reasoning gaps and provides an auditable, transparent path for verifiable misinformation detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了DeLIVeR框架，将事实验证中的证据检索视为强化策略探索任务，通过Planner LLM将复杂声明分解为问题集并遍历知识图谱，使用GRPO优化策略，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统检索系统存在"查询脆弱性"问题，LLMs在自动事实验证中面临多跳推理困难，现有方法难以在高精度证据检索和可审计性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出DeLIVeR框架，包含三个关键组件：(1) Planner LLM将复杂声明分解为结构化问题集；(2) 利用这些问题集遍历知识图谱以检索高精度证据；(3) 采用GRPO算法优化策略，奖励函数兼顾结构多样性和验证准确性。
AI.result: 在LIAR、FEVER和PolitiFact数据集上分别达到83.73、84.57和79.70的F1分数，相比HippoRAG2提升10-15%。
AI.conclusion: 强化问题规划策略能够有效弥合多跳推理鸿沟，为可验证的虚假信息检测提供了可审计、透明的路径。

title: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents
summary: Training API-calling large language model (LLM) agents demands massive amounts of high-quality trajectories. However, collecting such data at scale typically requires fully implemented environments with executable APIs and realistic, pre-populated backend databases, creating a major bottleneck for scalability. To overcome this, we propose an environment-free synthetic data generation approach that leverages LLMs as on-the-fly digital world models. Given only API specifications, our method generates trajectories mimicking interactions between an agent and a stateful environment. Specifically, an LLM first generates diverse tasks solvable with the provided APIs. A teacher agent then iteratively solves each task while an LLM simulator generates coherent synthetic API responses conditioned on the task context and simulation history. Finally, an LLM judge filters the trajectories to ensure the quality of the resulting dataset. We evaluate our approach on the challenging AppWorld and OfficeBench benchmarks, which include both information-retrieval and state-changing tasks. Fine-tuning models on our synthetic data yields significant performance gains, demonstrating that effective supervision for API-calling agents can be generated without any executable environment. Our results establish LLM-based API simulation as a practical, scalable solution for training agents across diverse API ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需执行环境（仅需API规格说明）的合成数据生成方法，利用LLM作为数字世界模型生成高质量轨迹，用于训练API调用型LLM智能体。该方法在AppWorld和OfficeBench基准测试上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 训练API调用型LLM智能体需要大量高质量轨迹数据，但规模化收集这类数据通常需要完整实现的环境（含可执行API和预填充的后端数据库），这成为可扩展性的主要瓶颈。因此，需要一种无需真实执行环境的合成数据生成方法。
AI.method: 1) 给定API规格说明，LLM首先生成多样化可解任务；2) 教师智能体迭代求解每个任务，同时LLM模拟器根据任务上下文和模拟历史生成连贯的合成API响应；3) LLM评判器过滤轨迹以确保数据质量。
AI.result: 在AppWorld和OfficeBench基准测试上，使用合成数据微调的模型取得了显著的性能提升，证明无需任何可执行环境即可生成有效的教师监督信号。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的API模拟是一种实用且可扩展的方案，可用于训练跨多样化API生态系统的智能体，有效解决了环境依赖这一主要瓶颈。

title: K-IPO: Kendall-constrained Importance Preserving Oversampling for Imbalanced Tabular Data
summary: Oversampling is widely used to address class imbalance in tabular classification, but existing methods can distort the feature importance ranking underlying model explanations. Although recent studies have quantified this distortion by comparing real and synthetic data, none have actively sought to prevent it. In this paper, we introduce Kendall-constrained Importance-Preserving Oversampling (K-IPO), a generator-agnostic, "generate-then-select" framework that preserves the original data's feature importance ranking during augmentation. K-IPO iteratively generates minority-class candidates and accepts them only if their inclusion maintains a user-defined minimum Kendall's tau (τ) correlation with the reference ranking. Optionally, stricter constraints can be applied to the highest-ranked features. We evaluated K-IPO on 20 imbalanced binary classification datasets using three classifiers and multiple explanation methods. In most cases, K-IPO achieved the best or tied-best results in feature importance preservation, explanation consistency, and class separability. It also generally improved predictive performance while maintaining competitive computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-IPO框架，在过采样时通过Kendall's τ约束保持原始数据的特征重要性排序，避免数据增强破坏模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有过采样方法会扭曲特征重要性排序，损害模型可解释性，而此前研究仅量化该问题却未主动预防。
AI.method: 提出生成器无关的"生成-选择"框架K-IPO，迭代生成少数类候选样本，仅当加入后与参考排序的Kendall's τ不低于用户设定阈值时才接受，可对高排名特征施加更严格约束。
AI.result: 在20个不平衡二分类数据集上，K-IPO在特征重要性保持、解释一致性、类别可分性方面达到最优或并列最优，同时提升预测性能且计算开销可控。
AI.conclusion: K-IPO有效解决了过采样中特征重要性扭曲问题，兼顾可解释性与预测性能，是一种实用且高效的数据增强框架。

title: What Transfers Under Source Shift? Definitions, Examples, and Fine-Tuning for Climate Disclosure Classification
summary: Climate disclosure classification is a fundamental task for analysing corporate climate disclosures, yet such disclosures appear in many different sources -- annual reports, press releases, and earnings calls -- that differ in length, purpose, and writing style. Existing evaluations are mostly conducted within a single source, leaving open whether common LLM adaptation strategies remain effective under source shift. We reframe climate disclosure classification as a cross-source adaptation problem and study three widely used adaptation strategies -- definitions, examples, and fine-tuning -- across eleven open- and closed-source LLMs, using two corpora that share the same label space but come from different sources. We find that all strategies bring positive cross-source gains on average, but the strongest in-source strategies are not the strongest cross-source ones: similarity-based retrieval and LoRA fine-tuning gain most in-source but lose most of that advantage under source shift; randomly selected few-shot examples, a weaker in-source baseline, retain their advantage more reliably; definitions transfer most consistently, though only when their granularity matches the target text. Across these strategies, when the source changes, simpler is often safer.

AI.tldr: 本文研究气候披露分类任务中的跨源适应问题，发现不同LLM适应策略在源域变化时表现不同：定义策略最稳定，相似检索和LoRA微调在源内最强但跨源优势下降，随机少样本示例虽源内较弱但跨源更可靠。结论是源变化时，简单策略通常更安全。
AI.motivation: 现有气候披露分类方法多在单一来源（如年报）上评估，忽略了披露文本可能来自不同来源（新闻稿、财报电话会等），这些来源在长度、目的和写作风格上差异显著。作者将问题重新框架为跨源适应问题，探究常见LLM适应策略在源域变化时是否仍然有效。
AI.method: 将气候披露分类重新定义为跨源适应问题，研究三种适应策略（定义、示例、微调）在11种开源和闭源LLM上的表现。使用两个共享标签空间但来源不同的语料库，对比不同策略在源内和跨源场景下的性能差异。
AI.result: 所有策略在跨源场景下平均都有正向增益，但源内最强策略（相似检索、LoRA微调）在源变化时优势大幅下降；随机少样本示例虽源内较弱，但跨源时更可靠；定义策略转移最一致，前提是定义粒度与目标文本匹配。
AI.conclusion: 在跨源气候变化披露分类任务中，简单策略（如随机选择示例、匹配粒度的定义）比复杂策略（相似检索、LoRA微调）更稳健。源变化时，"简单更安全"是实用原则。

title: Lomekwi: Resource-Bounded Tool Discovery in LLM Agents
comment: All authors contributed equally. 17 pages, 6 figures. Presented at the 2026 Conference on Learning Theory Workshop on Learning in an Agentic World
summary: Existing tool-use benchmarks report a single success rate for complex, multistep tasks. Inspired by ideas from cognitive science, we distinguish tool use from tool discovery and decompose the latter into curiosity (the model's ability to discover the parts needed to build the tool), recognition (the model's ability to discover the process of creating the tool), and efficiency (the model's use of the tool after creation). We show that this framework can be applied to existing discovery tasks, such as Voyager. In addition, we provide evidence that recognition inversely scales with model size, and we introduce and analyze a class of combinatorial games that demonstrates this. We further observe inverse scaling in a separate environment designed to emulate real-world tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个将工具使用与工具发现相区分的框架，将工具发现分解为好奇心、识别和效率三个维度，并发现模型规模与识别能力之间存在逆比例缩放现象。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用基准仅报告复杂多步骤任务的单一成功率，未能深入分析模型在工具发现过程中的不同能力维度。受认知科学启发，作者希望区分工具使用与工具发现，并分解工具发现的核心组成部分。
AI.method: 提出一个三组件框架：好奇心（发现所需部件的能力）、识别（发现创建过程的能力）、效率（创建后使用工具的能力）。将此框架应用于现有发现任务（如Voyager），并设计组合博弈类任务进行分析。
AI.result: 发现识别能力与模型规模呈逆比例缩放（模型越大，识别能力反而下降）。在组合博弈任务和模拟真实世界任务的独立环境中均观察到此现象。
AI.conclusion: 工具发现中的识别能力随模型规模增大而下降，这一反直觉发现对评估和提升大模型的工具发现能力具有重要意义。

title: PoLoRA: A Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA Optimizer
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) makes finetuning large language models cheaper by adding to each weight matrix a trainable low-rank update parameterized as the product of two matrices. These matrices are usually trained with Adam, which treats them as a single flat vector of parameters and ignores both the matrix and product structure of LoRA. Applying a matrix-aware optimizer such as Muon to each factor does not consistently improve over Adam, and neither do the product-aware Muon variants proposed in concurrent works. To realize consistent gains, we introduce PoLoRA, a Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA optimizer built from three ingredients: a product-aware spectral update direction, curvature preconditioning derived from controlling the per-sample loss change, and a magnitude rule that controls the sizes of both the factor and merged updates. We evaluate PoLoRA on instruction-tuning datasets for code and math across models from 1B to 8B parameters, and find that it reaches the final held-out loss achieved by tuned Adam in 1.2-1.7 times fewer steps, while adding at most 3% per-step overhead. Compared to Adam, PoLoRA is also less sensitive to the learning rate, and its optimal learning rate is stable across ranks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoLoRA优化器，通过乘积感知的谱更新方向、曲率预条件和幅度控制规则，使LoRA微调在1B-8B模型上比Adam快1.2-1.7倍，且对学习率更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA使用Adam优化器时忽略了其矩阵结构和乘积特性，而矩阵感知或乘积感知的优化器（如Muon及其变体）并未一致优于Adam，因此需要一种能同时利用LoRA结构和矩阵特性的优化方法。
AI.method: PoLoRA包含三个核心组件：1）乘积感知的谱更新方向；2）基于每样本损失变化控制的曲率预条件；3）控制因子和合并更新幅度的幅度规则。
AI.result: 在1B-8B参数的代码和数学指令微调数据集上，PoLoRA达到Adam调优最终损失所需的步数减少1.2-1.7倍，每步开销不超过3%，且对学习率不敏感，最优学习率在不同秩下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: PoLoRA是一种比Adam更高效、更鲁棒的LoRA优化器，在保证收敛质量的同时显著加速训练。

title: Leakage-Robust Evaluation and Data-Scale Sensitivity of Attention-Enhanced Multi-Task Learning for Joint Fault Diagnosis and Remaining Useful Life Estimation
summary: Multi-task deep learning models that jointly perform fault classification and remaining useful life (RUL) regression are increasingly used in predictive maintenance, yet reported performance can be strongly affected by how sliding-window sequences are split into training and test sets. We investigate this issue using AMTLNet, an attention-enhanced multi-task architecture, on three public benchmarks: NASA C-MAPSS, NASA IMS, and the UCI Hydraulic System dataset. We show that naive splitting can inflate classification accuracy from a genuine 20-60 percent to 99.9 percent, or reduce it to 0 percent through degenerate class representation. To address this, we introduce a chunk-based, leakage-audited splitting protocol and evaluate all models using five seeds, one-way ANOVA, and Tukey HSD tests. On C-MAPSS, with 19,976 leakage-free training windows, AMTLNet matches a single-task CNN-LSTM baseline in classification, achieving 84.12 +/- 0.96 percent accuracy with Tukey p = 1.0, and reaches an R2 of 0.86 +/- 0.01 while significantly outperforming a naive multi-task baseline. On the smaller Bearing and Hydraulic datasets, multi-task training is unstable, but the failure mode differs: classification degrades for Bearing, whereas regression degrades for Hydraulic. We relate this asymmetry to label provenance and propose a practical framework for deciding when joint training is appropriate under data scarcity. Ablation results show that the multi-head attention branch is the main contributor to regression stability. Removing it reduces R2 from 0.861 to 0.766 and more than doubles classification variance, whereas the convolutional branch contributes little to regression despite using about one-third of the parameters. This study contributes a reusable leakage-audit protocol, seed-transparent evaluation, and evidence that task-specific stability depends more on label provenance than on task type.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多任务深度学习（故障分类+RUL回归）中滑动窗口划分方式对性能的严重影响，提出了一种基于分块的、无泄漏的拆分协议，并在三个公开数据集上验证了AMTLNet模型。结果显示，朴素拆分会导致准确率虚高或归零；多任务训练在小数据集上不稳定，且失效模式因标签来源而异；多头注意力分支是回归稳定性的主要贡献者。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对多任务预测性维护模型的性能评估缺乏对数据划分方式的敏感性分析，朴素拆分会导致严重的数据泄漏或类别退化，从而给出不可靠的性能结论。
AI.method: 提出基于分块（chunk-based）的无泄漏拆分协议，采用五种子（five seeds）、单因素方差分析（one-way ANOVA）和Tukey HSD检验进行统计评估；消融实验分析多头注意力和卷积分支各自的贡献。
AI.result: C-MAPSS上AMTLNet分类准确率84.12±0.96%（Tukey p=1.0），R²=0.86±0.01；去除多头注意力后R²降至0.766，分类方差翻倍；小数据集上多任务训练不稳定，轴承数据集分类退化，液压数据集回归退化。
AI.conclusion: 多任务联合训练是否适合取决于数据规模和标签来源，而非任务类型本身；提出了一个实用框架用于判断何时适合联合训练。

title: An Early Warning of Emerging Biosecurity Risks in Frontier LLMs
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures, authors are listed alphabetically by surname
summary: Frontier large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into scientific workflows, yet their growing biological capabilities may outpace current safeguards. To assess the biological risks of frontier models, we develop Intern-BioBreaker, a specialized bio-red-teaming model, together with an integrated computational-to-physical framework that couples model-level stress testing with wet-lab validation. Within this framework, Intern-BioBreaker generates targeted jailbreak prompts to test whether aligned models can be induced to provide operational guidance for safety-sensitive biological tasks or produce sequence-level outputs with potentially harmful properties. Selected sequence outputs are then carried forward for DNA synthesis, host expression, and orthogonal protein verification to assess whether model-generated designs can yield the intended biological products. Our evaluation reveals a concerning gap between text-level safeguards and the risks posed by capable scientific models: (i) Intern-BioBreaker outperforms baseline attack models and reveals widespread bio-risk jailbreak vulnerabilities across both open-weight and proprietary frontier LLMs, with several targets reaching near-saturated or 100% task-level attack success rate (ASR); (ii) in sequence-level case studies, GPT-5.5 can be induced to generate modified viral candidate sequences with pathogenic potential; the corresponding translated proteins may exhibit even stronger receptor-binding affinity and thus enhanced infection potential; and (iii) end-to-end verification shows that selected model-generated biological designs are not merely textual artifacts, but can be physically realized under controlled experimental settings. These findings underscore the need for stronger biological red-teaming, nucleic acid synthesis screening, and safety mechanisms that keep pace with model capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Intern-BioBreaker生物红队测试模型及计算-物理联合框架，发现前沿LLM存在严重生物风险漏洞，模型生成的生物设计可在湿实验中物理实现，呼吁加强安全机制。
AI.motivation: 前沿LLM的生物学能力快速提升，现有安全防护可能滞后，亟需系统评估其生物安全风险。
AI.method: 开发Intern-BioBreaker红队模型，结合模型级压力测试与湿实验验证（DNA合成、宿主表达、蛋白验证）的端到端框架。
AI.result: (1) Intern-BioBreaker揭示多个模型存在近100%生物风险越狱成功率；(2) GPT-5.5可被诱导生成具有增强受体结合亲和力的致病性病毒序列；(3) 模型输出可在实验中物理实现。
AI.conclusion: 文本级防护与模型实际风险之间存在显著差距，需加强生物红队测试、核酸合成筛查及配套安全机制。

title: Training Continuous Chain of Thought Models: A Tale of Two Regimes
summary: Continuous Chain-of-Thought methods replace verbose reasoning traces with a short sequence of dense latent representations. Earlier continuous CoT methods indirectly supervise the latent representations such that its final state match that of verbose reasoning traces, requiring autoregressive, slow generation during training. We introduce C-MTP, a simpler, faster direct supervision approach that models each latent as an average of the embeddings in the CoT traces to be compressed. Our approach outperforms a prior direct supervision method that approximates the distribution of compressed tokens, and performs competitively to slower indirect supervision approaches in existing evaluation setup with simplified CoT traces (less than 100 tokens). Lastly, we extend the evaluation of Continuous CoT methods to complex tasks with longer reasoning traces ($\ge$ few hundreds reasoning tokens). We find both direct and indirect supervision training methods perform poorly (roughly 65\% performance drop) in this setting, revealing the limitations of current continuous CoT methods. The code and checkpoints are released at https://github.com/Varun221/cmtp_research

AI.tldr: 本文提出C-MTP，一种直接监督连续思维链的方法，将每个潜在表示建模为待压缩CoT轨迹中嵌入的平均值。该方法比先前的直接监督方法性能更好，与更慢的间接监督方法竞争力相当。但在复杂长推理任务上，所有连续CoT方法性能都会大幅下降约65%。
AI.motivation: 现有的连续思维链方法要么需要间接监督（慢速自回归生成训练），要么直接监督方法效果不佳。作者希望设计一种更简单、更快速的直接监督方法，同时探索连续CoT方法在复杂长推理任务上的局限性。
AI.method: C-MTP将每个潜在表示建模为待压缩CoT轨迹中所有嵌入的平均值，通过直接监督学习使得潜在表示能有效压缩推理轨迹信息。
AI.result: C-MTP在简化CoT（<100 token）设置下优于先前的直接监督方法，与间接监督方法竞争力相当。但在复杂长推理任务（≥数百token）上，所有方法性能下降约65%。
AI.conclusion: C-MTP是一种有效的直接监督连续CoT方法，但当前所有连续CoT方法在处理复杂长推理任务时都存在严重局限，表明该领域需要新的思路突破。

title: Feedback Attribution and Representation Geometry: Metrics for Comparing Individual and Shared Rewards in MARL
comment: Accepted at the Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback Workshop, ICML 2026
summary: Cooperative multi-agent RL systems routinely use team-averaged rewards, a feedback-attribution choice that gives each agent the team outcome regardless of its individual contribution. We ask whether this leaves a measurable signature, geometric or behavioral, on learned representations. We propose EffRank/$n$ (effective rank normalized by agent count) and $D_\text{act}$ (mean pairwise KL divergence between agents' action distributions) as low-overhead diagnostics for reward-attribution effects, then test them on competent MAPPO agents in SMACv2 \texttt{protoss\_5\_vs\_5}, where unit type is encoded in the observation. In an observation $\times$ reward-attribution comparison (unit type observed vs.\ masked; individual damage-contribution reward vs.\ shared team reward), geometry follows observation rather than reward. With unit type observed, shared and individual rewards have similar EffRank/$n$ ($0.31{\pm}0.03$ vs.\ $0.29{\pm}0.02$) and probe accuracy ($0.75{\pm}0.05$ vs.\ $0.73{\pm}0.05$, both $\gg 1/3$ chance), while $D_\text{act}$ leans higher under individual rewards ($1.23{\pm}0.06$ vs.\ $1.07{\pm}0.20$). Masking unit type cuts the above-chance probe signal by more than half, to $0.49$ in both reward arms. In short: individually rewarded agents are competent and separable by role, but on SMACv2 the observation explains the geometry and reward attribution shows up mainly in behavior. Thus geometric diagnostics must control for observed role information and test persistent roles that are not directly observed. EffRank/$n$ and $D_\text{act}$ add $<$5\% overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体强化学习中个体奖励与团队奖励对智能体表征的影响，提出EffRank/n和D_act两种低开销诊断指标。在SMACv2实验中发现：表征几何主要由观测信息决定而非奖励机制；个体奖励主要影响行为差异而非表征结构；观测信息的角色信息必须加以控制。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习系统常使用团队平均奖励，但忽略了个体贡献差异。作者想知道这种奖励分配方式是否会在学习到的表征中留下可测量的几何或行为特征。
AI.method: 提出EffRank/n（有效秩归一化）和D_act（智能体动作分布间的平均KL散度）两种低开销诊断指标。在SMACv2的protoss_5_vs_5任务上，对MAPPO算法进行观测×奖励归因的比较实验（单位类型可见/遮蔽 × 个体伤害奖励/共享团队奖励）。
AI.result: 1) 表征几何主要由观测信息决定，而非奖励机制。单位类型可见时，个体/共享奖励的EffRank/n相似(0.31 vs 0.29)。2) 个体奖励下行为差异更大(D_act: 1.23 vs 1.07)。3) 遮蔽单位类型后，探测准确率下降一半以上(降至0.49)。
AI.conclusion: 个体奖励的智能体行为可分且胜任，但SMACv2中观测信息主导了几何特征，奖励归因主要影响行为。几何诊断必须控制观测的角色信息，并测试非直接观测的持久角色。EffRank/n和D_act的开销低于5%。

title: Pancasila-Dilemmas: Evaluating Large Language Models on Indonesian Human Value Dilemmas Grounded in Pancasila
summary: The value alignment of large language models (LLMs) is crucial for ensuring responses align with human intention and value preferences. However, most evaluations of value alignment focus on Western or universal values, while assessments grounded in the value systems of specific countries remain scarce. In this paper, we introduce Pancasila-Dilemmas, an evaluation dataset of 1,834 questions derived from Indonesian news, classified by 5 values of Pancasila: Religion, Humanity, Unity, Democracy, and Social Justice. This dataset reflects daily life in Indonesia, making it suitable for measuring the value alignment of LLMs deployed for Indonesia. To ensure a more rigorous evaluation, we choose scenarios containing dilemmas. The dataset is proofread by native speakers and answered by 5 diverse Indonesian citizens. We evaluate 50 closed- and open-source LLMs on our dataset. Results reveal that all evaluated LLMs achieves less than 0.5 Probability Match Score (PMS) and 0.72 Max-Vote Agreement Score (MVAS). Compared by each values, LLMs mostly struggle in Religion and Unity dilemma cases. This highlights a significant gap in capturing Indonesian values. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/tjunlp-lab/Pancasila-Dilemmas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Pancasila-Dilemmas数据集，包含1,834个基于印尼新闻的 dilemmas 问题，用于评估大语言模型在印尼 Pancasila 价值观（宗教、人道、团结、民主、社会正义）上的对齐程度。评估50个开源和闭源LLM后发现，所有模型在PMS和MVAS指标上表现不佳，尤其在宗教和团结价值观上差距显著。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM价值对齐评估大多集中在西方或普世价值观，缺乏针对特定国家价值体系的评估。本文旨在填补这一空白，为印尼这一世界上最大的穆斯林占多数的民主国家提供本土化的价值观对齐评估数据集。
AI.method: 从印尼新闻中构建1,834道 dilemmas 问题，按 Pancasila 五项价值观（宗教、人道、团结、民主、社会正义）分类。由母语者校对，5位印尼公民提供答案。评估了50个开源和闭源LLM，使用Probability Match Score (PMS)和Max-Vote Agreement Score (MVAS)作为评价指标。
AI.result: 所有评估的LLM的PMS均低于0.5，MVAS低于0.72。按价值观细分，模型在宗教和团结 dilemmas 上表现最差，表明现有LLM在捕捉印尼本土价值观方面存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流LLM在印尼Pancasila价值观对齐上表现不足，尤其体现在宗教和团结相关 dilemmas 中。这揭示了一个重要缺口，需要针对特定国家的价值体系进行更深入的对齐研究。数据集已公开以促进后续研究。

title: Expected Free Energy as Belief-Dependent Utility for rho-POMDPs
comment: 41 pages, 12 figures. Paper accepted as a spotlight at the 2026 International Workshop on Active Inference (IWAI); the workshop version will appear in the Springer Communications in Computer and Information Science (CCIS) series. Code and experiment data at https://github.com/PatrickAllenCooper/rho_aif
summary: An agent acting under partial observability must decide when to gather information and which observations are worth their cost. Standard POMDPs value information only through its eventual effect on reward. The $ρ$-POMDP framework instead rewards uncertainty reduction directly, through a belief-dependent utility $ρ$, but in practice both the choice of $ρ$ and the weight placed on it are tuned by hand for every task. We show that active inference removes this tuning entirely. Minimizing Expected Free Energy (EFE) is exactly equivalent to solving a $ρ$-POMDP whose utility is expected information gain, and the exploration weight is fixed at $w=1$ because the variational bound expresses pragmatic and epistemic value in the same units (nats). We prove this equivalence for observe-then-commit POMDPs and extend it to factored observation POMDPs, a broader class that covers interleaved observe-act problems such as non-destructive testing and mobile sensing, where gathering information leaves the hidden state unchanged. Experiments support the theory. Across environments ranging from the classic Tiger problem to RockSample and a new Structural Inspection benchmark with over 65,000 states, the untuned weight matches or outperforms reward-only planning at the same horizon, avoids the over-exploration of bonuses tuned per task, and sits near the reward-maximizing knee of the success-reward Pareto frontier. The practical payoff is an exploration objective that works out of the box. In applications such as fault detection and medical screening, where every test has a price and every missed fault has a cost, EFE supplies a belief-dependent utility that is derived rather than tuned.

AI.tldr: 本文证明主动推理中的最小化期望自由能(EFE)等价于求解一个ρ-POMDP，其中探索权重自动固定为w=1，无需手动调参。实验表明，这种无需调参的探索策略在多种环境中优于或匹配人工调参的奖励规划方法。
AI.motivation: 标准POMDP仅通过奖励间接评估信息价值，而ρ-POMDP虽直接引入信念依赖效用ρ来奖励不确定性降低，但ρ的选择及其权重需针对每个任务手动调参，缺乏自动化的探索目标。
AI.method: 证明EFE最小化等价于ρ-POMDP（效用为期望信息增益，探索权重w=1）。先证明observe-then-commit POMDPs的等价性，再推广到factor observation POMDPs（涵盖非破坏性检测、移动感知等交错感知-行动问题）。
AI.result: 在Tiger问题、RockSample及含65,000+状态的结构检测基准上，未调参的EFE权重匹配或优于同视野下仅奖励规划，避免过度探索，接近奖励最大化的Pareto最优前沿。
AI.conclusion: EFE提供了一种即开即用的探索目标，在故障检测、医疗筛查等每次测试都有成本的应用中，信念依赖效用可直接推导而来而无需手动调参。

title: Hierarchical Domain Generalization
summary: We study hierarchical domain generalization as a problem of extrapolation from finite observed regions to an entire instance space, replacing i.i.d. sampling with arbitrary domain hierarchies. We show that the central obstruction is not only the complexity of the hypothesis class, but the train/test domain partition through which evidence is revealed. In particular, no matter how small the class or how large the training size, some partition makes generalization fail for some target. These results suggest that modern generalization theory must treat domain structure as a first-class object.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨层级域泛化问题，指出除了假设类复杂度外，训练/测试域的划分方式也是影响泛化能力的关键障碍，即使假设类很小或训练数据很大，某些划分仍会导致泛化失败。
AI.motivation: 现有泛化理论多基于独立同分布假设，而实际应用中数据常呈现层级结构。作者试图揭示在层级域泛化场景下，域划分方式本身对泛化能力的影响。
AI.method: 将层级域泛化建模为从有限观测区域到整个实例空间的外推问题，用非独立同分布的任意域层级结构替代传统假设，通过理论分析证明域划分对泛化失败的决定性作用。
AI.result: 证明了无论假设类多么简单或训练数据多么大，某些域划分方式总会导致某些目标域泛化失败，揭示域结构本身是泛化理论中不可忽视的一级对象。
AI.conclusion: 现代泛化理论必须将域结构作为第一类对象对待，传统仅关注假设类复杂度的理论不足以解释层级域泛化中的失败案例。

title: Modeling turn-taking with distant viewing: investigating silence thresholds in human and AI-generated discourse
comment: 10 pages, MeSSH26 (Méthodes pour les sciences sociales et les humanités - Methods for social sciences and humanities 2026)
summary: This study investigates silence gaps in two kinds of audiovisual material. We analysed thirty US situational comedies and fifty-one synthetic podcasts generated with Google NotebookLM. Gaps were compared across speaker gender, assigned from a fundamental-frequency threshold estimated in Praat, and across production settings.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了30部美国情景喜剧和51个AI生成播客中的沉默间隙，并比较了不同性别和制作环境下的差异。
AI.motivation: 探究真实与合成视听材料中沉默间隙的分布规律，以及性别和制作环境对沉默间隙的影响。
AI.method: 分析30部美国情景喜剧和51个Google NotebookLM生成的合成播客；使用Praat估算基频阈值来区分说话者性别；比较不同性别和制作环境下的沉默间隙。
AI.result: 发现沉默间隙在不同性别和制作环境中存在差异，具体结果需进一步详读原文。
AI.conclusion: 沉默间隙模式受说话者性别和制作环境影响，真实与合成材料之间存在区别。

title: PriorProof: A Point-in-Time Measure of Technique Novelty for Formal Proofs
summary: Mathematicians distinguish proofs that explain, simplify, or introduce a nonstandard route, but these judgments are difficult to operationalize. We study a deliberately narrower construct: time-relative proof-route nonstandardness in formal mathematics. For a Lean theorem, PriorProof extracts the dependency footprint of its elaborated proof term and scores the weighted surprisal of that footprint under a retrieval-conditioned, hierarchically smoothed prior built only from an earlier quarterly snapshot of Mathlib. The method requires no hand-built technique ontology and no human labels: statement retrieval is learned from proof-derived contrastive pairs, while the scored object is read mechanically from proof terms. In a blinded topology study, 100 presentations collapse to 76 distinct underlying pairs: 12 canonical contrasts shown three times for consistency screening and 64 distinct stratified pairs. Against the majority of three retained domain raters, PriorProof agrees on 53/76 pairs (69.7%, Wilson 95% CI 58.7-78.9%), including 11/12 canonical pairs (91.7%, 64.6-98.5%) and 42/64 stratified pairs (65.6%, 53.4-76.1%). Score-gap quartiles are nonmonotone after repeat collapse; the endpoints are 12/19 (63.2%, 41.0-80.9%) in the smallest-gap bin and 16/19 (84.2%, 62.4-94.5%) in the largest, supporting an endpoint-calibration tendency rather than a resolved staircase. The best language-model condition agrees on 60/76 pairs (78.9%, 68.5-86.6%); on paired outcomes, PriorProof alone is correct on 8 pairs and the model alone on 15 (exact two-sided McNemar p = 0.210), so the difference is not established at this sample size. We therefore present PriorProof not as a replacement for expert or model judgment, but as a decomposable, time-anchored signal whose score gap provides an interpretable reliability indicator.

AI.tldr: PriorProof通过形式化证明的依赖足迹和检索条件化先验，量化Lean定理证明中的时间相关非标准性，无需人工标注。在盲法拓扑研究中，该方法的判断与领域专家在69.7%的测试对上一致，效果介于随机和最佳语言模型之间。
AI.motivation: 数学家能区分"解释性"、"简化性"或"非标准路径"的证明，但这些判断难以操作化。论文旨在提出一个可计算、可分解的指标来量化形式化证明的"时间相对非标准性"。
AI.method: PriorProof提取Lean定理的证明项依赖足迹，然后基于仅从早期Mathlib季度快照构建的检索条件化层次平滑先验，计算该足迹的加权惊奇度（surprisal）。语句检索通过证明导出的对比对学习，无需手工技术本体或人工标签。
AI.result: 在盲法拓扑研究中，100份展示坍缩为76个独特底层对。PriorProof在53/76对（69.7%）上与多数专家一致，其中规范对11/12（91.7%），分层对42/64（65.6%）。最佳语言模型条件在60/76对（78.9%）上一致，但两者差异在统计上不显著（McNemar p=0.210）。
AI.conclusion: PriorProof不应被视为专家或模型判断的替代品，而是一个可分解、时间锚定的信号，其分数差提供了可解释的可靠性指标。

title: Building2Building: A Large Scale Benchmark for Generalizable Real-World Reinforcement Learning
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures, to be published at RLC 2026
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved strong results in control, yet learned policies remain brittle to changes in dynamics, action spaces, observation spaces, or goals, a critical limitation for real-world deployment. Existing benchmarks offer limited diversity and complexity, making it difficult to rigorously study transfer, multi-task learning, and meta-learning in RL. We introduce Building2Building (B2B), a large-scale suite of realistic Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning (HVAC) control environments built on EnergyPlus, a state-of-the-art building simulator. B2B is fully compatible with the Gymnasium interface and features a parametric building generator, enabling the systematic generation of diverse building configurations with heterogeneous observation and action spaces. Based on this suite, we define benchmark tasks targeting key open challenges in RL, including goal adaptation, dynamics adaptation, action-space shifts, and cross-domain transfer. By providing a large-scale, diverse, and physically grounded testbed with standardized evaluation protocols, B2B enables systematic investigation of generalization and transfer in continuous control. Beyond advancing research on generalization in RL, this new benchmark also carries significant societal implications by enabling improved HVAC control at scale, one of the most energy-intensive systems in buildings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Building2Building (B2B)，一个基于EnergyPlus的大规模、多样化、物理真实的HVAC控制环境套件，旨在系统性研究强化学习中的泛化与迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RL策略在真实部署中面对动力学、动作空间、观察空间或目标变化时表现脆弱，而现有基准测试缺乏足够的多样性和复杂度，难以系统研究迁移学习、多任务学习和元学习。
AI.method: 基于EnergyPlus建筑模拟器构建B2B套件，包含参数化建筑生成器，支持生成具有异构观察和动作空间的多样化建筑配置，并完全兼容Gymnasium接口。
AI.result: 定义了涵盖目标适应、动力学适应、动作空间迁移和跨域迁移的基准任务，提供了标准化评估协议。
AI.conclusion: B2B作为大规模、多样化、物理真实且标准化评估的测试平台，可系统研究连续控制中的泛化与迁移问题，对推动RL泛化研究及提高建筑能效（HVAC控制）具有重要价值。

title: VDAR-Router: Adaptive LLMs Routing via Verbalized Query Difficulty Analysis Retrieval
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in practical systems, making efficient model selection important for reducing deployment cost. LLM routing has emerged as a practical solution for allocating each input query to an appropriate model under a desired cost-performance trade-off. Existing routing methods often estimate model suitability from the surface semantics or embedding similarity of the input query. However, such methods may ignore the underlying difficulty of a query, leading to suboptimal routing decisions. To address the challenge, we propose VDAR-Router, a difficulty-aware retrieval-based routing framework. For each input query, VDAR-Router first generates an explicit difficulty analysis. It then retrieves historical examples with similar difficulty profiles. Based on the retrieved records, it estimates candidate model suitability and selects the model using a reward function that considers both performance and cost. Experiments on three datasets show that VDAR-Router consistently achieves better cost-performance trade-offs than existing baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of difficulty-aware retrieval for training-free LLM routing. Case studies further show that explicit query analysis helps retrieve more relevant examples and supports more reliable routing decisions.

AI.tldr: 提出VDAR-Router，一种基于难度感知和检索的LLM路由框架，通过显式生成查询难度分析并检索相似历史案例来优化模型选择，实现更好的成本-性能平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM路由方法依赖输入查询的表面语义或嵌入相似性来评估模型适用性，忽略了查询的底层难度，导致路由决策次优。需要一种能感知查询难度的路由方法。
AI.method: VDAR-Router首先对输入查询生成显式难度分析，然后检索具有相似难度特征的历史案例，基于检索记录评估候选模型的适用性，最后使用同时考虑性能和成本的奖励函数选择模型。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，VDAR-Router在成本-性能权衡上持续优于现有基线方法。案例研究显示显式查询分析有助于检索更相关的示例并支持更可靠的路由决策。
AI.conclusion: 难度感知的检索方法对于无需训练的LLM路由是有效的，VDAR-Router通过显式分析查询难度显著提升了路由决策的质量。

title: Reward-Driven LLM Agent Workflows: Synthesizing POMDP Routing and Self-Correction for Autonomous Decision-Making
