comment: 29 pages, 1 table, native TikZ/pgfplots diagrams. Code available at https://github.com/01Amez/RLAW_Implementation
summary: This paper addresses key technical challenges in current large language model (LLM) agent applications, including long-horizon planning, sparse reward attribution, and dynamic environmental interaction, by designing and optimizing an intelligent agent workflow. The proposed architecture is based on the synthesis of core AI paradigms: Visual, Language, Generative, Graph, Multimodal, Reinforcement, and Agent Intelligence. Unlike conventional baseline models that rely on static prompting and lack robust perception-action loops, our approach introduces a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) routing mechanism. This mechanism is augmented with an internal, self-correcting reward model that evaluates decision trajectories before execution. By integrating multimodal inputs and advanced reinforcement learning principles (such as proximal policy optimization and value function approximation), the agent maintains long-term structural memory and dynamically adapts its reasoning pathways to mitigate error accumulation. Empirical experiments on the ALFWorld embodied simulation environment and the WebShop online navigation benchmark demonstrate a 24.5% absolute improvement in task success rate and trajectory efficiency over mainstream baselines like the standard ReAct framework. Comprehensive ablation studies confirm the significant contribution of the reward-driven critique module in suppressing hallucination rates. This research bridges theoretical foundations of reinforcement learning and graph-based memory with autonomous agent workflows. Ultimately, the resulting architecture offers a practical, scalable reference framework for developing artificial intelligence technologies in complex, multi-step autonomous systems. Code is available at https://github.com/01Amez/RLAW_Implementation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合多模态感知、POMDP路由机制与内省奖励模型的强化学习智能体架构，在ALFWorld和WebShop任务上相比ReAct提升24.5%成功率，有效缓解长程规划中的误差累积与幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM Agent面临三大技术挑战：长程规划能力不足、稀疏奖励难以归因、动态环境交互缺乏鲁棒感知-行动闭环。现有基线模型依赖静态提示词，缺乏有效的感知-行动循环机制，导致在复杂多步任务中误差累积严重。
AI.method: 提出一种融合视觉、语言、生成、图、多模态、强化与Agent七大智能范式的架构。核心创新包括：(1) 基于POMDP的路由机制，将部分可观测环境建模为马尔可夫决策过程；(2) 内省自校正奖励模型，在决策执行前评估轨迹质量；(3) 集成PPO与价值函数近似的强化学习框架；(4) 长期结构记忆与动态推理路径调整机制。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld具身仿真环境和WebShop在线导航基准上，任务成功率和轨迹效率相比ReAct等主流基线提升24.5%。消融实验证实奖励驱动的批判模块对抑制幻觉率有显著贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该工作桥接了强化学习、图记忆理论与自主Agent工作流的理论鸿沟，为复杂多步自主系统的智能体技术提供了可扩展的实用参考框架，且代码已开源。

title: Discrete Ricci Curvature on Protein Contact Graphs for Lightweight Fold Classification
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Future Machine Learning and Data Science (FMLDS)
summary: Protein fold classification can be approached via sequence-based representations or structural descriptors, but direct comparisons between lightweight handcrafted descriptors and pretrained protein language model embeddings remain limited. We investigate discrete Ricci curvature on Calpha contact graphs as a lightweight structural descriptor for fold classification. Each protein domain is represented by a 22-dimensional fixed-length feature derived from summary statistics and quantiles of Ollivier-Ricci and Forman-Ricci edge curvature distributions. We evaluate on CATH top-10 Topology classification and on the ASTRAL 40%-identity SCOPe top-10 Fold benchmark, comparing against geometry, contact-graph statistics, persistent homology, and mean-pooled ESM-2 (150M) baselines. On both datasets, lightweight structural descriptors substantially outperform mean-pooled ESM-2 embeddings, with a larger performance gap on the ASTRAL 40% SCOPe benchmark. Ricci alone uses 22 dimensions, or 3.4% of the ESM-2 baseline dimensionality, and already outperforms mean-pooled ESM-2 on both datasets. Combining Ricci with persistent homology yields the strongest performance, achieving macro-F1 of 0.71 on CATH and 0.68 on SCOPe with a 112-dimensional feature vector. These results identify a regime where lightweight interpretable graph descriptors offer a practical alternative to pretrained protein language model embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了轻量级手工设计的Ricci曲率结构描述符与预训练蛋白质语言模型ESM-2在蛋白质折叠分类任务上的性能，发现仅22维的Ricci曲率特征就能超越高维的ESM-2嵌入，且与持续同调结合后达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管蛋白质折叠分类可通过序列表示或结构描述符实现，但轻量级手工设计描述符与预训练蛋白质语言模型嵌入之间的直接比较仍然有限，作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将每个蛋白质域表示为从Ollivier-Ricci和Forman-Ricci边曲率分布的汇总统计量和分位数导出的22维固定长度特征，在CATH top-10拓扑分类和ASTRAL 40% SCOPe top-10折叠基准上进行评估，并与几何、接触图统计、持续同调和平均池化ESM-2(150M)基线进行比较。
AI.result: 轻量级结构描述符在两个数据集上均显著优于平均池化ESM-2嵌入，在ASTRAL 40% SCOPe基准上性能差距更大。仅22维的Ricci曲率（ESM-2基线维度的3.4%）已优于平均池化ESM-2。Ricci与持续同调结合达到最强性能：CATH上macro-F1为0.71，SCOPe上为0.68（112维特征向量）。
AI.conclusion: 存在一个场景，其中轻量级可解释图描述符可作为预训练蛋白质语言模型嵌入的实用替代方案。

title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?
summary: Modern LLMs are alarmingly susceptible to surprisingly simple immaterial changes of input prompts: a casual hint, an incorrectly labeled few-shot example, or a fake prior assistant turn often flips an originally correct answer. We study where this susceptibility, spanning sycophancy and related cue-induced biases, lives inside the model. Across five model families and seven BCT bias types, we extract a per-bias direction from hidden states and triangulate it through three measures: probing, leave-one-dataset-out transfer, and causal intervention. The susceptibility is largely installed by alignment tuning rather than pretraining: pretrained base models barely cave to these biases, and their activations carry no cue-specific signal beyond question content. Within aligned models, each bias becomes a single coherent direction that we can both decode and steer along, recovering the unbiased answer across every family we test. The biases stay representationally distinct, however: cross-bias entanglement is model-specific rather than a property of the bias category, and even behaviorally similar biases occupy different directions. The same intervention also serves as a modest debiasing tool, recovering a meaningful share of bias-induced errors while preserving most correct answers across all instruct families. Cue-induced bias is therefore best understood not as a single flaw in LLMs but as a family of distinct, causally active directions that alignment tuning installs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM对提示中微小无关变化（如随意提示、错误标注的样本等）异常敏感的现象，发现这种对线索诱导偏差的易感性主要由对齐微调而非预训练引入，且每种偏差在模型中表现为独立的、可解码和操控的方向向量，通过干预可以恢复无偏答案并作为去偏工具。
AI.motivation: 现代LLM对输入提示中看似无关的微小变化（如随意提示、错误标注的少样本示例、虚假的助手历史轮次）表现出惊人的敏感性，原本正确的答案常常因此被翻转。这种易感性涵盖了奉承行为（sycophancy）及相关线索诱导偏差，但学界对其在模型内部的位置和本质尚不清楚。
AI.method: 跨五个模型家族和七种BCT偏差类型，从隐藏状态中提取每种偏差的特定方向，并通过三种测量手段进行三角验证：探针分析（probing）、留一数据集迁移（leave-one-dataset-out transfer）和因果干预（causal intervention）。
AI.result: 1）易感性主要由对齐微调（alignment tuning）而非预训练引入，预训练基座模型几乎不屈服于这些偏差；2）在对齐模型中，每种偏差表现为一个单一的、连贯的方向向量，可以被解码和操控以恢复无偏答案；3）不同偏差在表征上保持独立，交叉偏差纠缠是模型特定的而非偏差类别的固有属性；4）同一干预可作为去偏工具，恢复相当比例的偏差诱导错误，同时保留大部分正确回答。
AI.conclusion: 线索诱导偏差不应被理解为LLM中的单一缺陷，而应被视为一组由对齐微调安装的、独立的、因果活跃的方向向量。这一发现不仅揭示了偏差的来源和内部表征，还提供了一种实用的去偏干预手段。

title: When LLMs Over-Answer: Measuring and Mitigating Quality Issues in LLM-Based Hardware Description Language Question Answering
summary: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) has led practitioners to increasingly rely on them for answering questions about hardware description languages (HDLs). Because HDL is ultimately synthesized into physical hardware, an imprecise or redundant answer can propagate into timing violations or non-synthesizable logic that surface only late in the design flow, making the quality of HDL answers especially consequential. However, the quality of LLM-generated responses, particularly in comparison with answers provided by human experts, remains unclear. To investigate this question, we collect 6,246 HDL Q&A posts with accepted answers from Stack Overflow and curate them into a dataset, organized into a taxonomy of four main categories (Conceptual, Debugging, Generation, and Optimization) and ten subcategories. Using this dataset, we design a user study conducted with 19 HDL engineers with one to three years of experience. Our findings reveal a pervasive over answering tendency: LLMs supply correct content but bury it under redundant alternatives (65.7%) and verbose padding (69.1%), while nearly half of answers (49.0%) fail to fully align with expert answers yet participants still preferred LLM responses for readability (58.3%). Motivated by these findings, we propose a multi-agent framework for improving LLM-based HDL question answering. We evaluate answer quality using an LLM-as-Judge and two structural metrics: the number of core answers, which reflects redundancy since LLMs often provide multiple alternative solutions, and the length of non-core content, which reflects verbosity. Evaluated on the four mainstream LLMs, our framework increases the average core-answer quality score from 3.71 to 4.67 (+0.96) and the non-core content quality from 3.72 to 4.23 (+0.51), on a five-point scale.

AI.tldr: 本文收集6,246个HDL问答数据，发现LLM存在过度回答倾向（65.7%冗余替代方案，69.1%冗长填充），49%回答与专家不完全对齐，但58.3%参与者因可读性偏好LLM。提出多智能体框架，将核心答案质量从3.71提升至4.67，非核心内容质量从3.72提升至4.23（五分制）。
AI.motivation: 由于HDL会综合为物理硬件，不精确或冗余的回答可能导致时序违例或不可综合逻辑，且LLM生成的HDL回答质量尚不明确，缺乏与人类专家回答的系统对比研究。
AI.method: 收集Stack Overflow上6,246个HDL Q&A帖子，构建四类十子类分类体系；设计由19名1-3年经验工程师参与的用户研究；提出多智能体框架，采用LLM-as-Judge评估及两个结构指标（核心答案数量反映冗余，非核心内容长度反映冗长）。
AI.result: LLM有65.7%冗余替代方案、69.1%冗长填充；49%回答与专家不完全对齐；58.3%参与者偏好LLM的可读性。提出的框架在四个主流LLM上将核心答案质量从3.71提升至4.67，非核心内容质量从3.72提升至4.23。
AI.conclusion: LLM在HDL问答中存在过度回答问题，但可读性更好；提出的多智能体框架能有效提升回答质量，减少冗余和冗长。

title: Capacity and Redundancy Trade-offs in Multi-Task Learning
comment: Accepted in 42nd Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2026
summary: In multi-task learning (MTL) negative transfer is often considered as an optimization artifact, but it can also be viewed as a consequence of limited shared capacity and weak task redundancy. We investigate this effect through a Capacity--Redundancy (CR) identity that decomposes the sum of per-task predictive informations into joint predictive information that includes label redundancy defined via total correlation (TC), and a residual coupling term that quantifies interference left unresolved by the shared representation. Additionally, we show two key results: (i) a clustering-gap decomposition that gives a necessary and sufficient condition for clustered sharing to outperform global sharing, and (ii) a gradient--TC bridge in a Gaussian multi-task model that formally justifies gradient cosine similarity as a proxy for redundancy ordering. Empirically, we estimate the residual coupling $Δ$ from validation residual correlations, showing that clustered LoRA substantially reduces $\widehatΔ$, outperforms size-matched random partitions, and results in statistically significant gains with multi-seed confidence intervals.

AI.tldr: 本文通过容量-冗余恒等式、聚类-差距分解和梯度-TC桥接，从信息论角度解释了多任务学习中的负迁移现象，并验证了聚类LoRA方法能有效降低残差耦合，提升性能。
AI.motivation: 作者认为MTL中的负迁移不仅是由优化问题引起的，更本质上是共享容量有限和任务冗余度不足的结果。他们希望通过信息论工具来量化这一现象，并寻找改进共享表示的方法。
AI.method: 提出容量-冗余（CR）恒等式，将各任务预测信息的和分解为联合预测信息（含标签冗余/总相关TC）和残差耦合项；提出聚类-差距分解以给出聚类共享优于全局共享的充要条件；构建高斯多任务模型下的梯度-TC桥接，用梯度余弦相似度代理冗余排序；通过验证集残差相关估计△，采用聚类LoRA降低△。
AI.result: 聚类LoRA显著降低了估计的残差耦合△̂，优于相同大小的随机分区，并通过多随机种子的置信区间取得了统计显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 负迁移可以通过容量-冗余视角定量理解；共享表示的质量取决于冗余耦合项的抑制；聚类LoRA是一种有效的减少任务间干扰的实用方法。

title: VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design
summary: Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering workflows. However, existing engineering benchmarks primarily assess final artifact validity, offering limited insights into how LLMs behave across different stages of coupled physical design. We introduce VEHBench, an engineering-native diagnostic benchmark for LLM-assisted VEH design, featuring 763 literature-grounded tasks scored by an analytical physical oracle. VEHBench evaluates four design roles: specification triage, verifier-guided search, corrupted-state recovery, and policy-conditioned selection. Experimental results reveal that LLM capability is strongly stage-dependent: no single model consistently dominates the entire workflow, and response-control profiles expose distinct behavioral patterns across design roles. VEHBench thus provides a stage-aware foundation for evaluating, selecting, routing, and improving verifier-grounded engineering LLMs. The benchmark artifact is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnonymousVehbench/vehbench

AI.tldr: 提出VEHBench基准，用于评估LLM在振动能量收集器（VEH）耦合物理设计各阶段的表现，发现LLM能力存在强阶段性差异，无单一模型能全流程通吃。
AI.motivation: 现有工程基准仅评估最终制品有效性，无法揭示LLM在耦合物理设计不同阶段的行为差异，缺乏阶段性诊断工具。
AI.method: 构建包含763个文献基础任务的VEHBench基准，使用解析物理oracle评分，评估LLM在四种设计角色（规范分类、验证器引导搜索、损坏状态恢复、策略条件选择）中的表现。
AI.result: LLM能力呈现强阶段性依赖：无单一模型能主导全流程；不同设计角色展现出截然不同的响应控制行为模式。
AI.conclusion: VEHBench为评估、选择、路由和改进验证器接地工程LLM提供了阶段性感知基础。

title: Bridging the Information Gap: Semantic Densification and Hindsight Distillation for Cold-Start Prediction
summary: New-user cold-start is a critical bottleneck for e-commerce platforms: predicting user lifetime value (LTV) and conversion rate (CVR) for users with sparse interaction history. Two prior directions -- LLM-based semantic augmentation and learning using privileged information (LUPI) -- each face a key limitation. First, LLM augmentation produces unstructured rationales that are noisy and hard to operationalize in production. Second, naive student-teacher distillation can be brittle due to an information gap between the privileged teacher and the sparse student; moreover, this gap is heterogeneous across users. We propose SemRaD, a Semantic Reasoning-aware Distillation framework addressing both limitations. First, a Structured Semantic Reasoning Pipeline replaces free-form rationales with a structured schema built via a discover-curate-audit workflow, producing per user a Densified Semantic Profile (consumed by the deployed student via a Semantic-Gated Encoder that focuses on the most informative dimensions) and a Hindsight Distillation Target reconciled from pre- and post-conversion reasoning (used only at training). Second, to bridge this gap and handle its heterogeneity, a Hindsight-Aware Distillation Network transfers privileged knowledge via the hindsight target, with Distillation Experts improving transfer under per-user variability. On a large-scale industrial dataset, SemRaD lifts +1.9% LTV (Gini) and +1.0% CVR (AUROC) over a production-grade base; a four-week online A/B at Keeta confirms +1.0% LTV / +0.43% CVR. SemRaD also matches the production system's LTV using only 9% of the training data while improving CVR by 0.8%.

AI.tldr: SemRaD提出了一种语义推理感知的蒸馏框架，通过结构化语义推理管道和事后感知蒸馏网络，解决了新用户冷启动中LLM增强的噪声问题和LUPI的信息鸿沟问题，在工业级数据集上显著提升了LTV和CVR指标。
AI.motivation: 新用户冷启动是电商平台的关键瓶颈，现有两种方法（基于LLM的语义增强和利用特权信息学习）各有局限：LLM增强产生非结构化推理，噪声大且难以落地；朴素师生蒸馏因特权教师与稀疏学生之间的信息鸿沟而脆弱，且这种鸿沟在不同用户间存在异质性。
AI.method: 提出SemRaD框架，包含两个核心组件：1）结构化语义推理管道（SERP），通过发现-整理-审核工作流构建结构化模式，生成稠密语义画像（DSP）供部署学生使用，以及事后蒸馏目标（HDT）仅用于训练；2）事后感知蒸馏网络（HADN），通过事后目标迁移特权知识，并设计蒸馏专家（Distillation Experts）应对每用户可变性。
AI.result: 在大规模工业数据集上，SemRaD相比生产级基线，LTV（Gini）提升1.9%，CVR（AUROC）提升1.0%；在Keeta平台为期四周的在线A/B测试中，LTV提升1.0%，CVR提升0.43%。仅使用9%的训练数据即可匹配生产系统的LTV，同时CVR提升0.8%。
AI.conclusion: SemRaD通过结构化语义推理和事后感知蒸馏，有效解决了新用户冷启动中LLM增强和LUPI方法的关键局限，显著提升了电商平台用户生命周期价值和转化率的预测性能，同时大幅降低了训练数据需求。

title: Learning from World Feedback: Why Model Uncertainty Fails as a Risk Signal in Model-Based RL
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Reinforcement Learning from X Feedback (RLxF). 14 pages
summary: The RLxF programme argues that learning signals should come from world feedback rather than from internal model proxies. We instantiate this position in safe model-based control and distil it into three concrete design principles. Empirically, across four world-model architectures spanning a 2x MSE range, MPC planning is statistically equivalent (TOST, n=200), and dynamics-based uncertainty penalties increase collision rates from 26% to 34%: the standard MBRL safety proxy is anti-correlated with safety in this regime. Replacing the model-internal proxy with three world-feedback signals (a sensor-derived margin via minimum lidar, a temporal signal via time-to-collision, and an outcome-supervised feedback model g_psi trained on prior collision labels, structurally analogous to outcome-trained reward models in RLHF) reduces collisions to 1-14% without retraining the world model or the planner. The mechanism is structural: model uncertainty has support over state-prediction space, whereas task risk has support over constraint boundaries, with empirical correlation r < 0.15. From this we extract three RLxF principles (ground risk in world outcomes, validate proxies before deployment, and substitute outcome-trained feedback models when direct world signals are unavailable) and argue they apply equally to model-based control and to verifier-based or RLHF approaches in LLM alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLxF框架，主张学习信号应来自世界反馈而非内部代理模型。在安全模型预测控制中，使用世界反馈信号（激光雷达最小距离、碰撞时间、结果监督反馈模型）可将碰撞率从26-34%降至1-14%，而传统的基于模型不确定性的安全代理与实际安全负相关。机制上，模型不确定性与任务风险的支持集不同（r<0.15），由此提炼出三条RLxF原则。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的安全代理（如模型不确定性）与实际安全性存在反相关，需要更可靠的学习信号来源。
AI.method: 在MPC框架中，用三种世界反馈信号（激光雷达最小距离、碰撞时间、基于碰撞标签训练的结果监督反馈模型g_psi）替代传统的模型内部代理（模型不确定性惩罚），并在四种世界模型架构上进行验证。
AI.result: 世界反馈信号将碰撞率从26-34%降至1-14%；MPC规划在不同世界模型间统计等效（TOST, n=200）；模型不确定性与任务风险的相关系数r<0.15。
AI.conclusion: 学习信号应来自世界反馈；提出了三条RLxF原则：将风险基于世界结果、部署前验证代理、当直接世界信号不可用时使用结果训练的反馈模型；该框架同样适用于基于验证器的方法和RLHF中的LLM对齐。

title: PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning
summary: Not all training samples contribute equally to large language model fine-tuning. Selecting informative training samples can reduce the computational cost while preserving downstream performance. Many existing data selection methods rely on indirect heuristics, such as data quality, diversity or reasoning trace length. However, the effectiveness of these fixed criteria is task-dependent and difficult to generalize across diverse downstream tasks. Perplexity-based data selection provides a simple and model-aware solution to estimate the sample difficulty, but existing approaches typically score the entire training sequence and ignore the difference in learning objectives of language modeling and reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose PPL-Factory, a simple and interpretable data selection framework that combines task-aware perplexity-based scores and data budget-aware selection criteria. Experiments on GSM8K demonstrate that PPL-Factory outperforms other state-of-the-art data selection methods using only $1\%$ of the training set. With $10\%$ of the data, PPL-Factory exceeds full-data fine-tuning accuracy by 0.9 on GSM8K and 4.8 on MATH. Overall, our results demonstrate that task-aware and budget-aware perplexity-based selection provides an effective and applicable approach for efficient fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PPL-Factory，一种结合任务感知困惑度与预算感知选择标准的数据筛选框架，仅用1%的训练数据即可在GSM8K上超越其他SOTA方法，用10%数据即可超越全量微调性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据选择方法依赖间接启发式标准（如质量、多样性、推理链长度），这些固定标准任务依赖性高且难以泛化；而基于困惑度的选择方法忽略了语言建模与推理任务在学习目标上的差异。
AI.method: 提出PPL-Factory框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 任务感知的困惑度评分（区分语言建模与推理任务的损失函数）; (2) 数据预算感知的选择标准，根据可用数据量动态调整选择策略。
AI.result: 在GSM8K上仅用1%训练数据即超越SOTA方法；用10%数据时，GSM8K准确率超全量微调0.9，MATH超4.8。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知与预算感知的困惑度选择方法为高效微调提供了有效且可推广的解决方案。

title: Otap:Structure-Aware Optimal Transport for Evaluating Planning and Execution in Agent Trajectories
summary: Large language model agents solve tasks by generating trajectories that interleave planning, tool calls, and intermediate results. Current evaluation metrics reduce such a trajectory to a binary success flag or compare it against a reference by exact matching. A success flag cannot distinguish a sound solution from one that succeeds by luck, and says nothing about why a failed run went wrong. Exact matching penalizes plans that are valid but reordered or decomposed differently from the reference. We reframe trajectory evaluation as a distance between the agent's execution graph and a set of valid solution graphs, and instantiate it via an unbalanced fused Gromov-Wasserstein transport problem over attributed dependency graphs. The resulting score, termed \otap{} (Optimal Transport for Agentic Planning), is a pseudo-metric that is provably invariant to dependency-preserving reorderings and has bounded sensitivity to redundant steps. Its unbalanced marginals handle missing or hallucinated steps without forcing a match, and its soft coupling accommodates variation in plan granularity. On controlled perturbations and three public benchmarks, \otap{} separates valid from invalid trajectories in a regime where semantics-only metrics score below chance. Its accuracy is highest when the dependency graph is recovered exactly, and drops only when the graph is inferred heuristically from free-text traces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输的规划轨迹评估方法OTAP，通过将轨迹转化为依赖图并计算与有效解图之间的不平衡融合Gromov-Wasserstein距离，实现对智能体执行过程的细粒度评估。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标（二元成功标志或精确匹配）无法区分偶然成功与真正合理的解决方案，也无法解释失败原因，且对合法但顺序重排的计划过度惩罚。
AI.method: 将轨迹评估重新定义为执行图与有效解图之间的距离，通过不平衡融合Gromov-Wasserstein最优传输问题计算，支持依赖保留重排序的不变性、对冗余步骤的有限敏感性，并通过不平衡边缘处理缺失/幻觉步骤。
AI.result: 在受控扰动和三个公开基准上，OTAP在语义指标低于随机水平的场景中能有效区分有效与无效轨迹；在依赖图精确恢复时准确性最高，基于自由文本启发式推断时性能有所下降。
AI.conclusion: OTAP为智能体规划轨迹提供了更细粒度、更鲁棒的评估框架，尤其能处理规划变体、冗余步骤和幻觉问题。

title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
summary: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicating the relevance of code context when reading tool output. Based on this finding, we propose SWE-Pruner Pro, which prunes tool outputs directly inside the agent. Concretely, a small head turns the agent's own internal representations into a keep-or-prune label for each line, with a length-aware embedding keyed to each tool output's line count. Across two open-weight backbones and four multi-turn benchmarks, SWE-Pruner Pro saves up to 39% of prompt and completion tokens while preserving task quality, with bounded inference overhead. Notably, on MiMo-V2-Flash SWE-Pruner Pro additionally raises the SWE-Bench Verified resolve rate by +3.8% and the long-context Oolong accuracy by +2.2 points.

AI.tldr: 提出SWE-Pruner Pro方法，利用智能体内部表征直接对工具输出进行剪枝，无需额外分类器，在保持任务质量的同时最多节省39%的token，甚至在某些基准上提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文剪枝方法（如SWE-Pruner）需要额外附加代码分类器，增加了系统复杂度和开销。作者发现智能体自身在阅读工具输出时已编码了代码上下文的相关性内部表征，因此希望通过直接利用这些内部表征来实现更高效、更简洁的剪枝。
AI.method: 在智能体内部添加一个小型head，将智能体自身的内部表征转换为每行代码的保留/剪枝标签；同时设计一个长度感知嵌入（length-aware embedding），该嵌入与每个工具输出的行数相关联，从而实现对不同长度输出的自适应剪枝。
AI.result: 在两个开源基座模型和四个多轮基准测试上，SWE-Pruner Pro节省了高达39%的提示词与补全token，同时保持了任务质量，且推理开销可控。在MiMo-V2-Flash上，SWE-Pruner Pro进一步将SWE-Bench Verified解决率提升了3.8%，长上下文Oolong准确率提升了2.2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 利用智能体自身内部表征进行剪枝是可行且有效的，不仅简化了系统架构，还能在某些场景下提升任务性能，为长上下文编码智能体的高效上下文管理提供了新思路。

title: Fourier Geometric Wind Power Forecasting with Numerical Weather Prediction
summary: Accurate short-term wind power forecasting is essential for grid stability and operational planning, yet remains challenging due to the complex interactions between atmospheric conditions and turbine dynamics. However, existing methods fail to effectively incorporate weather forecasting with wind turbine data (i.e., SCADA), leading to suboptimal solutions. To address this, we introduce a multimodal framework that integrates historical point-based SCADA data with grid-based Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) forecasts, which is challenging due to heterogeneous input and the complex physical wind-turbine interactions. Our approach first explicitly decomposes inputs into scalar and vector features to better capture both site-specific and geometric dependencies and then incorporates a geometric encoder to extract rotation-invariant features from wind vectors. We further leverages a Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) architecture, which performs global convolutions in the frequency domain to efficiently model long-range spatiotemporal relationships. Extensive experiments on three real-world wind farms, with weather forecasting data, demonstrate that our model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, highlighting the effectiveness of its physically-informed design. The core implementation of our method is publicly available at: https://github.com/shawn-sypiao/GWPF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态框架GWPF，通过集成历史SCADA点数据和网格化NWP气象预报数据，利用几何编码器提取风矢量旋转不变特征，并采用FNO在频域进行全局卷积建模长程时空关系，在三个真实风电场数据上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 短期风电功率预测对电网稳定至关重要，但现有方法未能有效融合气象预报与风机SCADA数据，导致预测效果欠佳。
AI.method: 1) 将输入显式分解为标量特征和矢量特征；2) 引入几何编码器提取风矢量的旋转不变特征；3) 采用傅里叶神经算子(FNO)在频域进行全局卷积，高效建模长程时空依赖关系。
AI.result: 在三个真实风电场上的实验表明，该方法持续优于最先进的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该多模态框架有效融合了异构数据源，其物理启发式设计（几何编码+频域建模）显著提升了短期风电功率预测精度。

title: Multimodal Attention-based Deep Learning for Emergency Triage with Electronic Health Records
summary: Accurate emergency triage decision is critical to avoid clinical deterioration, morbidity, and mortality. Machine learning-based triage system involves acquiring the main presenting complaint in text form and assessing vital signs in numerical data, enabling an automated and efficient analysis of patient information for timely and accurate prioritization of medical attention. However, modelling the intricacies of both data types requires a comprehensive understanding of the temporal structure and dependencies within the data. Thus, the aim of this study is to propose a multimodal deep learning architecture that can effectively handle both tabular and textual data. Furthermore, the proposed model exploits self-attention to to capture both local and global relationships between the features. A dataset consisting of 11,102 triage data collected from emergency department of Hospital Universiti Sains Malaysia is used for model development and validation. The proposed model demonstrated an increase of 1.95% in accuracy, 2.49% in F1-score, and 1.41% in ROC AUC compared to the baseline model. The experimental results demonstrated the potential of the proposed model in predicting triage decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态深度学习架构，通过自注意力机制同时处理分类变量（生命体征）和文本数据（主诉），用于急诊分诊决策。在马来西亚一所大学医院的11,102条数据上，该模型相比基线模型在准确率、F1分数和ROC AUC上分别提升了1.95%、2.49%和1.41%。
AI.motivation: 急诊分诊决策至关重要，但现有机器学习方法难以有效建模表格数据（生命体征）与文本数据（主诉）之间的时间结构及依赖关系，因此需要一种能够同时处理两种数据类型的多模态架构。
AI.method: 提出一种多模态深度学习架构，利用自注意力机制捕捉表格数据与文本数据中特征之间的局部和全局关系，实现对两种异构数据的联合建模。
AI.result: 在11,102条真实急诊分诊数据上，相比基线模型，准确率提升1.95%，F1分数提升2.49%，ROC AUC提升1.41%。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，所提出的多模态深度学习模型在预测急诊分诊决策方面具有潜力，能有效利用表格和文本两种数据模态提升分诊准确性。

title: It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief
summary: Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledge. Notably, users' expressions of belief (EoBs) can take linguistically diverse forms - using presuppositions, evidential and certainty markers, or varied tones - each of which may have a different persuasiveness over the LLMs. We introduce a typology to systematically evaluate how different EoBs affect whether models follow context versus prior knowledge. The typology is grounded in four linguistically motivated dimensions: form, evidentiality, epistemic stance, and tone, spanning 17 fine-grained types. By pairing these EoBs with world knowledge facts, we generate controlled EoB-query pairs that isolate the effect of linguistic variation. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 16 LLMs that differ in architecture (Llama3, Qwen3, Gemma3), scale (1B-30B parameters), and training stages (base vs instruct). We identify meaningful variations in response behavior across these axes, e.g., that bigger models and instruction models tend to be less context-following than smaller models and base models. We further identify specific EoBs that statistically significantly persuade LMs more consistently than others. Our work reveals systematic patterns in how linguistic framing affects LLM context integration, with implications for prompt engineering and model robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言学维度的用户信念表达（EoB）分类体系，系统评估不同语言形式（如预设、证据标记、语气等）如何影响大语言模型（LLM）对上下文信念的跟随程度。通过对16种LLM（不同架构、规模和训练阶段）的评估，发现更大模型（如30B）和指令微调模型更倾向于坚持先验知识而非跟随上下文信念，且某些EoB类型（如确定性表达）对模型的说服力显著更强。
AI.motivation: 用户常以多样化的语言形式向LLM表达信念，但模型在面对这些信念时，何时应接受上下文、何时应坚持先验知识尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对语言变异性如何系统影响模型行为的理解，因此需要一个基于语言学理论的分类体系来量化这种影响。
AI.method: 1. 构建了基于4个语言学维度（形式、证据性、认知立场、语气）的17种EoB分类体系；2. 将EoB与世界知识事实配对，生成控制语言变异性的EoB-查询对；3. 评估16种LLM（涵盖Llama3、Qwen3、Gemma3，规模1B-30B，含基础版和指令版），考察模型在上下文跟随与先验知识之间的选择。
AI.result: 1. 更大模型（如30B）和指令微调模型更倾向于坚持先验知识而非跟随上下文；2. 某些EoB类型（如高确定性表达）对模型具有统计上显著更强的说服力；3. 不同架构、规模和训练阶段的模型在上下文跟随行为上存在系统性差异。
AI.conclusion: 语言框架会系统性地影响LLM对上下文信念的整合行为，这为提示工程和模型鲁棒性研究提供了重要启示。用户表达的语言形式应被视为影响模型行为的关键变量。

title: Evidence Interfaces Shape How Retrieval-Augmented Readers Use Support
summary: In multi-hop RAG evaluation, a top-k answer score can hide two different failures: the retrieval window may drop part of the support chain, or it may contain support in a form the adapted reader does not use well. We call this reader-facing form of retrieved evidence an evidence interface. Using three support-annotated multi-hop QA benchmarks, we compare matched adapted readers trained with raw context, retrieval windows, and gold-support diagnostic renderings. These comparisons distinguish support-availability failures from remaining reader-interface effects. Top-k windows become interpretable only after checking whether the complete annotated support chain survives: when it does, short ranked windows can match or improve over raw context; when it does not, missing support explains much of the loss. Gold support-first improves matched readers; on 2Wiki and MuSiQue, a support-supervised ranker raises coverage and recovers raw-context quality at lower prompt cost, while retaining gold headroom. Support-removal checks further show that the gains rely on exposed evidence, not only answer priors. On support-annotated evaluations, top-k answer scores should therefore be reported together with complete-support coverage.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多跳RAG评估中top-k答案分数会掩盖两种失败：检索窗口丢失支撑链，或支撑存在但读者模型未能有效利用（即证据接口问题）。通过三个含支撑标注的多跳QA数据集，比较不同训练方式的读者模型，发现top-k窗口的可解释性取决于完整支撑链是否幸存。建议在支撑标注的评估中，top-k答案分数应与完整支撑覆盖率一同报告。
AI.motivation: 多跳RAG的top-k答案分数无法区分两种本质不同的失败原因：检索阶段支撑链缺失（可用性问题）与读者阶段未能有效利用已有支撑（接口问题）。现有评估方式掩盖了问题根源，亟需解耦分析。
AI.method: 使用三个含支撑标注的多跳QA基准（2Wiki、MuSiQue等），对比四种匹配读者模型：原始上下文、检索窗口、金标准支撑诊断渲染、以及支撑监督排序器。通过支撑移除检验，量化各因素对答案分数的贡献。
AI.result: 当完整支撑链幸存时，短排名窗口可匹敌甚至优于原始上下文；否则缺失支撑是主要损失原因。金标准支撑优先可提升匹配读者；支撑监督排序器在降低提示成本的同时恢复原始上下文质量，但仍存金标准头房。支撑移除检验证实收益依赖暴露的证据而非答案先验。
AI.conclusion: 多跳RAG评估应同时报告top-k答案分数与完整支撑覆盖率，以区分可用性失败与接口失败，实现评估的真正可解释性。

title: CLDRoute: Conditional Latent Diffusion for Routability Map Generation in Physical Design
summary: Accurate routability estimation during physical design is important for reducing costly post-routing iterations. Prior learning-based methods treat this task as deterministic prediction, mapping placement-stage features to a single congestion or DRC outcome. We instead formulate routability estimation as a conditional generation problem, where both routing congestion and DRC violations are modeled as spatially structured routability fields. Our framework, Conditional Latent Diffusion for Routeability estimation (CLDRoute), uses physics-aware conditioning and task-specific latent modeling to handle the different characteristics of congestion and DRC maps. This allows our method to supports sample-based inference, producing both a mean prediction and a spatial uncertainty estimate for the same input design. On CircuitNet 2.0 (N28), our method achieves, for DRC violation generation, an SSIM of 0.9678, an MAE of 0.0028, and a TopK@1% of 0.3494; for congestion generation, it achieves an SSIM of 0.9031, an MAE of 0.0286, and an NZ-Pearson of 0.3692. Overall, our framework provides a more practical view of routability at placement by generating both the expected outcome and its uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLDRoute，将物理设计中的可布线性估计从确定性预测问题重新定义为条件生成问题。通过条件潜扩散模型，同时生成布线拥塞和DRC违例的空间分布图，并支持基于采样的推理以输出均值预测和空间不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 传统基于学习的方法将可布线性估计视为确定性预测任务（从布局阶段特征直接映射到单一的拥塞或DRC结果），无法捕捉物理设计中的内在不确定性，导致后布线迭代成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出条件潜扩散框架CLDRoute，包含物理感知条件机制和任务特异性潜空间建模，分别处理拥塞图和DRC违例图的不同特征分布，通过采样推理生成均值预测和不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在CircuitNet 2.0 (N28)上，DRC违例生成SSIM=0.9678、MAE=0.0028、TopK@1%=0.3494；拥塞生成SSIM=0.9031、MAE=0.0286、NZ-Pearson=0.3692。
AI.conclusion: CLDRoute通过生成式建模提供了比确定性预测更实际的可布线性评估视角，既能输出期望结果也能量化空间不确定性。

title: Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
summary: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe. Because discovery runs are expensive and inherently stochastic, existing harnesses are often compared using too few independent trials to distinguish key methodological improvements from run-to-run variance. We systematically decompose OpenEvolve-style evolutionary search and the TTT-Discover search harness into its constituent components and systematically evaluate 30 budget-matched harnesses across 12 model-problem pairs using more than 3.1 million LLM rollouts and repeated-trial statistical analysis. Our results show that discovery harnesses have a generalization problem: No fixed harness is reliably superior across the evaluated model-problem pairs, and variants of OpenEvolve generally underperform simpler alternatives. Thus, harness choice is better viewed as a hyperparameter rather than as a universal recipe, and should be tailored to the specific problem and underlying model. We also find that early discovery progress predicts final performance, and use this property to present a budget-matched adaptive-allocation experiment that starts multiple harnesses, prunes weak partial runs, and reallocates compute to stronger survivors, outperforming both commitment to a randomly sampled fixed harness and a non-adaptive harness ensemble. Together, these results motivate shifting from fixed harness selection to online adaptation guided by early performance. We release all run pools including baseline null distributions for every model-problem pair as reusable statistical infrastructure against for future harness proposals.

AI.tldr: 本文系统解构了OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover等自主发现系统的搜索框架，通过310万次LLM rollout和30种预算匹配框架在12个模型-问题对上的实验，发现没有固定框架普遍最优，且OpenEvolve变体常不如简单替代方案。研究提出应将框架选择视为超参数，并利用早期发现进度预测最终性能，设计了自适应分配实验，效果优于固定框架和非自适应集成。
AI.motivation: 现有自主发现系统（如OpenEvolve、TTT-Discover）被视为通用框架，但实为多种设计选择的复合体。由于发现实验昂贵且随机性强，以往比较通常独立试验次数不足，无法区分方法改进与随机波动。作者旨在系统解构这些框架，通过大统计量评估其泛化能力，并探索自适应框架选择的可能性。
AI.method: 1) 系统分解OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover的组件（档案、父代选择、探索、预算分配）；2) 构建30种预算匹配的框架变体；3) 在12个模型-问题对上进行超过310万次LLM rollouts的重复试验统计分析；4) 利用早期发现进度预测最终性能，设计自适应分配实验：同时启动多个框架，剪枝弱的部分运行，将计算资源重新分配给更强的幸存者。
AI.result: 1) 没有固定框架在所有模型-问题对上可靠地表现优越（泛化问题）；2) OpenEvolve变体普遍不如更简单的替代方案；3) 早期发现进度能有效预测最终性能；4) 自适应分配实验优于固定随机框架和静态集成框架。
AI.conclusion: 框架选择应被视为超参数而非通用配方，需针对具体问题和模型定制。研究建议从固定框架选择转向基于早期性能的在线自适应调整。作者发布了所有运行池和基线零分布作为可复用的统计基础设施。

title: A Framework for Early Sepsis Prediction via Self-Supervised (JEPA) and Federated Representation Learning
summary: Early sepsis prediction from electronic health records is challenged by irregular sampling, high missingness, and class imbalance. We systematically compare four modeling paradigms -- self-supervised Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) via masked latent prediction, self-supervised VICReg (variance-invariance-covariance regularization) with two-view augmentation, semi-supervised fine-tuning of a VICReg-pretrained encoder, and supervised Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) -- alongside raw-feature baselines. All models share a common preprocessing pipeline of hourly binning with forward-fill imputation applied to 7 biomarkers selected via sparsity analysis from the MIMIC-III dataset. Our best model (JEPA + XGBoost + mean pooling) achieves AUPRC 0.636 at the time of onset (H0), approaching the SupMix benchmark (0.667) while using 83\% fewer biomarkers. The Tier 1 pipeline -- VICReg pretraining followed by semi-supervised fine-tuning and XGBoost -- achieves AUPRC 0.510 at H0, a 3.1$\times$ improvement over the raw-feature baseline (0.165) and a 7.6\% improvement over the end-to-end supervised TCN (0.474). Crucially, the fine-tuned VICReg encoder exhibits the most temporally persistent representations, degrading only 16.8\% from H0 to H10 compared to 47.5\% for supervised TCN and 65.3\% for JEPA, demonstrating that self-supervised pretraining with task-aware fine-tuning yields features that are both sharp near onset and robust across prediction horizons.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了四种建模范式（自监督JEPA、自监督VICReg、半监督微调VICReg、监督TCN）用于早期脓毒症预测，发现自监督预训练+任务感知微调的VICReg编码器在预测时效性和鲁棒性上表现最佳，且仅用7个生物标志物即可达到接近基准的性能。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录中的早期脓毒症预测面临不规则采样、高缺失率和类别不平衡三大挑战，现有方法在特征利用效率和时序鲁棒性上存在不足，亟需系统比较不同建模范式的优劣。
AI.method: 采用统一预处理流程（逐小时分箱+前向填充），基于MIMIC-III数据集经稀疏性分析筛选7个生物标志物，系统比较JEPA（掩码潜在预测）、VICReg（方差-不变性-协方差正则化）、半监督微调VICReg和TCN四种范式，并融合XGBoost分类器。
AI.result: JEPA+XGBoost+均值池化在发病时刻AUPRC达0.636（接近SupMix基准0.667，但生物标志物减少83%）；半监督微调VICReg AUPRC达0.510，比原始基线提升3.1倍，比TCN提升7.6%；且在H0到H10时间窗口内表征退化仅16.8%，远优于TCN的47.5%和JEPA的65.3%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练结合任务感知微调能学习到既在发病时刻敏感、又在时间维度上鲁棒的特征表示，在生物标志物数量大幅减少的情况下仍能保持竞争力，为临床早期预警系统提供了高效实用的范式。

title: Is Your Model Thinking or Just Stagnating? PUMA: Diagnosing Reasoning Pathology via Phase-Momentum Alignment
summary: Test-time scaling empowers Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) to tackle complex tasks via extensive Chain-of-Thought (CoT). However, this often induces the "overthinking" paradox, where redundant reasoning increases computational overhead without guaranteeing accuracy. Existing test-time efficiency optimization methods primarily fall into two categories: information-theoretic approaches, which are prone to "deceptive convergence" where low uncertainty masks hallucinations, and latent representation analyses, which are often post-hoc, lacking the real-time sensitivity for dynamic reasoning. To bridge this gap, we first posit the Phase-Momentum Alignment Hypothesis, asserting that reasoning correctness hinges on the temporal synchronization between geometric momentum and uncertainty resolution. We then theoretically formulate the Cognitive-Energy Model to characterize these dynamics through two orthogonal dimensions: Geometric Cognitive Effort, quantified by latent velocity and tortuosity, and Entropic Cognitive Uncertainty. To operationalize this, we introduce PUMA (Phase-Uncertainty Momentum Alignment), a training-free framework employing a tiered diagnostic architecture. By coupling lightweight phase monitoring with event-triggered geometric analysis, PUMA effectively distinguishes active exploration from passive stagnation, enabling precise interventions through adaptive truncation or corrective measures. Extensive experiments on LRMs spanning 1.5B to 32B demonstrate that PUMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across diverse benchmarks, achieving a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off and robust cross-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PUMA框架，通过相位-动量对齐假说和认知能量模型，在无需训练的情况下动态检测并干预大推理模型的"过度思考"问题，实现了精度与效率的更好权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时效率优化方法存在两大问题：信息论方法易陷入"欺骗性收敛"（低不确定性掩盖幻觉），隐表示分析缺乏实时敏感性。论文旨在弥合这一差距，提出一种既能动态感知推理状态、又能精确干预的轻量级方案。
AI.method: 提出Phase-Momentum Alignment Hypothesis（相位-动量对齐假说），认为推理正确性取决于几何动量与不确定性消解的时间同步性；进而构建Cognitive-Energy Model（认知能量模型），通过两个正交维度（几何认知努力、熵认知不确定性）刻画推理动态；最后设计PUMA框架，采用分层诊断架构（轻量相位监测+事件触发几何分析），实现自适应截断或纠正干预。
AI.result: 在1.5B到32B参数规模的多种大推理模型上，PUMA在多个基准测试中一致超越现有最优方法，实现了更优的精度-效率权衡和跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PUMA通过训练自由的诊断-干预机制，有效区分了主动探索与被动停滞，为解决LRM的过度思考问题提供了一种高效、鲁棒的实用方案。

title: Building a Neural Network from Scratch: Implementation, Evaluation, and Optimization
summary: The widespread adoption of high-level deep learning libraries, while accelerating model development, has increasingly abstracted away the internal mechanics of neural networks, creating a gap between practical usage and fundamental understanding. To address this, the paper presents a self-contained neural network framework implemented entirely from scratch -- without relying on automatic differentiation or pre-built deep learning modules. The implementation encompasses all essential components, including multi-layer architectures, diverse activation functions, regularization techniques, and state-of-the-art optimizers. Beyond serving as a pedagogical instrument that demystifies forward/backward propagation, gradient dynamics, and optimization landscapes, the framework demonstrates robust performance when applied to a multi-class classification task, successfully validating its correctness, numerical stability, and generalization across varied configurations. The extensible design and clean modularity further position it as a reliable baseline for educational purposes and future research exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文从零实现了一个不依赖自动微分或深度学习库的完整神经网络框架，包含多层架构、激活函数、正则化和优化器，在多分类任务上验证了其正确性和数值稳定性，旨在作为教学工具和研究基线。
AI.motivation: 高层深度学习库的广泛使用导致开发者对神经网络内部机制的理解越来越模糊，实践与原理之间出现鸿沟。作者希望从零构建一个框架来弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 不使用任何自动微分或预构建深度学习模块，完全从零实现神经网络框架，涵盖多层架构、多种激活函数、正则化技术及先进优化器，并采用模块化设计保证可扩展性。
AI.result: 在多类分类任务上表现稳健，验证了框架的正确性、数值稳定性和泛化能力，且在不同配置下均有效。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可作为教学工具帮助学生理解前向/反向传播、梯度动力学和优化景观，同时因其可扩展的模块化设计，也适合作为未来研究的教育基线和可靠参照。

title: Toward Anthropomorphic Dialogue: A Closed-Loop Framework for Human-Like Chat Generation, Evaluation, and Preference Alignment
summary: Human-like private chat requires more than fluent response generation: a system must preserve persona, relationship, memory, bounded knowledge, medium-specific timing, and a coherent multi-turn arc. We present AnthroDial, a closed-loop framework that formulates anthropomorphic dialogue as a joint problem of system architecture, executable evaluation, and diagnostic alignment. It combines (1) a role-conditioned scheduled dialogue runtime with persona and scenario cards, long-term memory, virtual time, and single-draft message decisions; (2) an executable benchmark with an L0 validity gate, five per-turn dimensions, and five dialogue-level dimensions; and (3) a post-training pipeline that filters 16,436 scheduled-decision examples for SFT and applies GRPO with a cognitive-diagnostic, ZPD-aware reward. The reward maintains Kalman-filtered capability estimates for each behavioral dimension, upweights dimensions with larger capability deficits, and uses rollout scores as task-level ZPD matches to focus optimization on learnable weak skills. On a benchmark with 55 personas, 50 scenarios, 50 persona-scenario bindings, and 100 role-conditioned cases per model, we evaluate 16 systems spanning frontier baselines, open models, thinking/no-think variants, and SFT/RL ablations. The strongest non-trained baseline reaches 32.00% strict ACC, while Qwen3.6-27B-SFT+RL reaches 39.00% strict ACC and a 98.5 overall score. In the 9B no-think setting, SFT and RL improve strict ACC from 0.00% to 13.00% and 18.37%. These results show that anthropomorphic dialogue benefits when generation, evaluation, and reward shaping share the same behavioral dimensions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为AnthroDial的闭环框架，用于实现类人私聊对话，结合了系统架构、可执行评估和诊断对齐，通过角色条件调度、多维度基准测试和ZPD感知的GRPO训练，显著提升了对话的拟人化水平。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统虽然能生成流畅回复，但缺乏对个性、关系、记忆、知识边界、时间感知和多轮连贯性等拟人化特质的综合建模，需要一个统一的框架来联合解决生成、评估和优化问题。
AI.method: (1) 角色条件调度的对话运行时（含人物卡、场景卡、长期记忆、虚拟时间等）；(2) 可执行基准测试（含L0有效性门控、5个回合维度和5个对话级维度）；(3) 后训练流水线：先SFT过滤16,436个调度决策样本，再用基于认知诊断和ZPD感知的奖励进行GRPO训练，奖励使用卡尔曼滤波追踪各维度能力并加权优化薄弱技能。
AI.result: 在55个人物、50个场景、50个人物-场景绑定、每个模型100个角色条件的基准上评估16个系统。最强非训练基线达到32.00%的严格ACC，Qwen3.6-27B-SFT+RL达到39.00%严格ACC和98.5总分。在9B无思考设定下，SFT和RL将严格ACC从0.00%提升到13.00%和18.37%。
AI.conclusion: 拟人化对话在生成、评估和奖励塑造共享相同行为维度时效果最佳，AnthroDial框架有效验证了这一设计原则。

title: Effects of width-dependent model hyperparameters and $\ell_2$-regularization on the loss landscape of two-layer ReLU networks
comment: ICML2026 4th Workshop on High-dimensional Learning Dynamics (HiLD)
summary: Understanding deep neural networks remains a central challenge in machine learning. In particular, the theoretical properties of even two-layer ReLU networks, especially in the presence of weight decay, remain poorly understood. To this end, we derive a sufficient condition on the hyperparameter settings under which the global minima collapse to the zero solution. Interestingly, our experiments reveal that using AdamW as an optimizer prevents the collapse of the learned parameters, whereas using SGD does not, which may help explain the success of AdamW in deep learning training. In addition, when restricting the input dimension to one, we derive an analytical solution for the globally optimal parameter sets of two-layer ReLU networks and show that $\ell_2$-regularization has a width-invariant effect on connectivity, but its dimensionality-reducing effect becomes stronger as the network width increases. These results provide insight into how width-dependent hyperparameters influence the geometry of regularized loss landscapes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双层ReLU网络在权重衰减下的全局最小值坍塌问题，发现AdamW优化器能防止参数坍塌而SGD不能；对于一维输入，推导了全局最优解的解析形式，揭示了ℓ2正则化的宽度不变性和维度缩减效应。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的理论理解仍是核心挑战，尤其双层ReLU网络在权重衰减下的理论性质仍不清楚，因此需要研究超参数设置对全局最小值坍塌的影响。
AI.method: 推导了超参数设置下全局最小值坍塌到零解的充分条件；通过实验对比AdamW和SGD优化器的行为；在输入维度为一时，推导了双层ReLU网络全局最优参数集的解析解，并分析ℓ2正则化的宽度依赖性。。
AI.result: AdamW优化器能防止参数坍塌，而SGD不能；ℓ2正则化在连接性上具有宽度不变效应，但其降维效果随网络宽度增加而增强。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了宽度相关超参数如何影响正则化损失景观的几何结构，为理解AdamW在深度学习训练中的成功提供了理论依据。

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Trajectory Data Curation for LoRA Fine-Tuning of Code Agents
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. Author's accepted manuscript of a paper published in the ICIC 2026 proceedings (oral presentation)
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of open-weight LLMs on expert agent trajectories has emerged as a prominent approach to building capable code agents without reliance on proprietary models. A central yet underexplored question is how trajectory quality and quantity jointly shape model performance. We present a systematic empirical study of trajectory data filtering for LoRA fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct on the SWE-trajectory dataset (67,074 trajectories, of which 32,161 are resolved). We propose a two-axis quality scoring framework -- Efficiency and Style -- and evaluate it through 16 controlled experiments spanning strategy, scale, and ablation analyses. Since 7B-scale models attain near-zero SWE-bench resolve rates, we adopt cross-entropy (CE) loss on held-out trajectories as the primary metric, validated via first-action generation: CE loss and ROUGE-L are perfectly rank-correlated (Spearman $ρ$ = -1.00), with limited-sample evidence supporting but not conclusively establishing this proxy. Our results reveal a scale-dependent quality-quantity trade-off: at small scales, doubling the dataset (500 to 1,000) yields ~12.7% CE-loss reduction whereas the TopQ-Random gap stays <1% (Mann-Whitney p > 0.10); at 2,000 trajectories this same gap widens to 3.6% (p = 0.016). Ablation further identifies error-retry rate as the dominant sub-dimension, performing comparably to the full composite ($Δ$ < 0.2%). Together, these findings establish trajectory-level quality scoring as a viable but scale-sensitive lever for code-agent SFT and offer a proxy-validated evaluation protocol for the regime where end-to-end resolve rate is statistically infeasible.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了代码智能体SFT中轨迹质量与数量的关系，提出Efficiency-Style双轴质量评分框架。实验发现质量-数量权衡具有规模依赖性：小规模数据下数据量翻倍效果远优于质量筛选，但随规模扩大质量筛选的优势逐渐显现。其中错误重试率是最关键的子维度。针对7B模型SWE-bench解决率接近零的困境，验证了CE loss作为代理指标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 目前对开源LLM进行代码智能体SFT时，训练轨迹的质量和数量如何共同影响模型性能这一核心问题尚未被系统研究，缺乏对轨迹数据筛选策略的深入理解。
AI.method: 提出Efficiency（效率）和Style（风格）两轴质量评分框架；在SWE-trajectory数据集上对Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct进行LoRA微调，开展16组控制实验，涵盖策略、规模、消融分析；采用CE loss（经ROUGE-L验证与一阶动作生成完美秩相关）作为主要评估指标。
AI.result: 质量-数量权衡具有规模依赖性：500→1000条时数据量翻倍CE损失降低12.7%，质量筛选效果不显著；2000条时TopQ与随机筛选差距达3.6%（p=0.016）。消融实验表明错误重试率是最关键子维度，表现接近完整复合指标（Δ<0.2%）。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹级质量评分是可行的但存在规模敏感性的杠杆；在端到端解决率统计不可行的场景下，CE loss可作为经过验证的代理评估协议。

title: Half the Experts, All the Code: One-Shot Domain Pruning of Mixture-of-Experts LLMs for Coding
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures. Code and pruned checkpoints: github.com/anik-jha/moep
summary: The strongest open-weight coding models are mixture-of-experts (MoE) networks: most of their size comes from large pools of "expert" subnetworks, of which only a few act on any token. That pool is why these models do not fit on the machines most developers own, yet for a user who only wants coding help, most experts encode abilities that will never be invoked. We ask how many experts can be removed, and which, by pruning two recent open-weight MoE models from different families (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B and Gemma-4-26B-A4B) under five selection strategies, judged the way a user would: by whether the model still writes correct code. Half the experts can be removed from either model with no statistically detectable loss on the primary code benchmark, and the damage lands almost entirely on abilities outside coding, the intended trade. But the winning strategy flips between the two models, so a recipe validated on one family cannot be assumed to work on another. We further show that perplexity, the metric much of the pruning literature leans on, can rate a broken model above an intact one; that a lightweight fine-tune recovers about half of what aggressive pruning loses; and that against quantizing the full model to the same memory, pruning wins only where quantization would have to drop below 3 bits per weight. Five attempts to overturn that crossover, with failure criteria fixed in advance (better calibration, guarded selection, causal expert importance, failure attribution, and an agentic evaluation letting each model repair its failures from execution feedback), all leave it standing; the last shows single-shot benchmarks overstate compression penalties broadly, as one repair turn erases the 2-bit quantization penalty entirely. Expert pruning works, but it demands per-model validation on the task the model will actually serve.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何从混合专家（MoE）编程模型中剪枝专家子网络。通过对Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Gemma-4-26B-A4B两个模型进行实验，发现可移除一半专家而不显著影响代码生成能力，但剪枝策略在不同模型间不可通用。还发现困惑度指标会误导，且在内存约束下，剪枝仅在量化精度低于3比特时胜出。
AI.motivation: 最强开源编程模型是MoE网络，其大量专家子网络导致模型体积过大，无法在大多数开发者设备上运行。然而用户仅需编程帮助，大部分专家能力从未被调用。因此作者探究可以安全移除多少以及哪些专家。
AI.method: 对Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Gemma-4-26B-A4B两个最新MoE模型，采用五种剪枝策略进行专家移除实验。以代码正确性为评估标准，并对比了困惑度指标、轻量微调恢复效果、以及量化方法的优劣。最后通过五次预设失败标准的实验（校准、保护性选择、因果专家重要性、失败归因、基于执行反馈的智能体评估）来验证结论的稳健性。
AI.result: 1) 两个模型均可移除一半专家而不在代码基准测试上有统计显著的损失；2) 最佳剪枝策略在两个模型间不同；3) 困惑度可能将损坏模型评为优于完整模型；4) 轻量微调可恢复激进剪枝损失的一半；5) 在相同内存约束下，剪枝仅在量化精度低于3比特时胜出；6) 五次推翻该交叉点的尝试均失败；7) 单次测试夸大压缩惩罚，一次修复可完全消除2比特量化损失。
AI.conclusion: 专家剪枝可行，但需要在实际任务上逐模型验证，不同模型族的剪枝策略不可通用。

title: Constrained Path Reasoning: Measuring When Committed Stages Earn Their Cost
summary: When does a committed intermediate stage in an LLM reasoning pipeline earn its cost? Constrained Path Reasoning (CPR) pairs a source-aware path hypothesis with stage-level accounting. Search generates provisional states; trusted or validated invariants can constrain hard, while other proposals remain soft and revisable. CPR predicts that task-compatible commitments can factor transitions, concentrate candidate mass, induce regularity, and expose feedback when their gains exceed propagated error and execution cost. The formalism covers discrete commitments and continuous flows and measures effective branching, endpoint concentration, and cost per usable output. Across 1,180 generated QCQPs and 40 engineered degenerate polynomial instances (2,140 endpoints), residual triage recovers 63.0% of repair-all's additional feasible yield with 17.7% of its attempts. Fixed-LLM accounting (270 unique calls shared across nested arms) finds usable yield of 41.1% direct, 90.0% after formalization and deterministic execution, 20.0% after one-shot convexification, and 21.1% for the full path. In 120 paired-condition calls, a two-action rollback rule reaches 90% usable yield versus 36.7% for the feedback-conditioned selector. Two endpoint probes separate source from validation: a 72-output cross-trajectory transplant reduces entropy and acceptable mass; a 24-output same-call self-proposal pilot gives unchanged two-repeat collision entropy, 25.0% versus 8.3% usable yield, and 1/8 deterministically confirmed endpoint checks. Model-generated states supply hypotheses; trusted execution earns constraint strength.

AI.tldr: 本文提出约束路径推理（CPR）框架，通过阶段级核算和可信/验证不变量的约束，在LLM推理管线中评估中间承诺阶段的成本效益。实验表明，残差分类恢复了修复全部策略63.0%的可行产出，仅使用17.7%的尝试；固定LLM核算发现直接可用产出41.1%，形式化后达90.0%。
AI.motivation: 解决LLM推理管线中中间承诺阶段何时值得投入计算成本的问题，即评估在推理过程中引入受约束的中间状态能否提高效率和效果。
AI.method: 提出约束路径推理（CPR）框架，结合源感知路径假设与阶段级核算。搜索生成临时状态，可信/验证的不变量提供硬约束，其他提议保持软约束和可修正。形式化涵盖离散承诺和连续流，度量有效分支、端点集中度和每可用输出成本。
AI.result: 在1,180个生成的QCQP和40个人工退化多项式实例（2,140个端点）上，残差分类恢复修复全部策略63.0%的额外可行产出，仅用17.7%的尝试。固定LLM核算：直接可用产出41.1%，形式化和确定性执行后90.0%，一次性凸化后20.0%，全路径21.1%。两动作回滚规则达90%可用产出，反馈条件选择器仅36.7%。
AI.conclusion: 模型生成的状态提供假设，可信执行赋予约束强度。CPR框架有效量化了LLM推理管线中中间承诺的收益与成本，表明适当约束可显著提升效率，但承诺类型和验证方式至关重要。

title: Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System: A Multi-view Framework
summary: The Broad Learning System (BLS) has been widely used for data classification and is based on a layer-by-layer feed-forward structure. However, it gives the same importance to all data points, which reduces its effectiveness on real-world datasets with noise and outliers. In addition, it does not consider the geometric structure of the data and has limitations in handling data from multiple sources. To address these challenges, we propose a Multi-View Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System (MVGIFBLS) that integrates multi-view learning, graph embedding, and intuitionistic fuzzy theory into the BLS framework. This design enables the model to combine information from multiple sources and learn more discriminative representations. Graph embedding captures the geometric relationships among samples and improves class separation through intrinsic and penalty subspaces based on local Fisher discriminant analysis. Intuitionistic fuzzy theory enhances robustness to noise, while kernel-based neighborhood analysis captures local data structures. We evaluate the proposed framework on several UCI, KEEL, and AwA benchmark datasets using comparative evaluation, Gaussian feature noise analysis, ablation studies, and statistical analysis. The results demonstrate that each component contributes positively to the overall framework and that the proposed MVGIFBLS consistently achieves higher Area Under the Curve (AUC) scores and maintains robust performance under Gaussian feature noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVGIFBLS模型，将多视图学习、图嵌入和直觉模糊理论集成到Broad Learning System框架中，以解决BLS在处理噪声、异常值、数据结构和多源数据方面的局限性，实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上表现优越。
AI.motivation: 传统BLS对所有数据点赋予相同重要性，未考虑噪声和异常值的影响，也未利用数据的几何结构，同时难以处理多源数据，因此需要更鲁棒、更具判别力的模型。
AI.method: 将多视图学习、图嵌入（基于局部Fisher判别分析的固有子空间和惩罚子空间）和直觉模糊理论集成到BLS框架中，同时利用核邻域分析捕捉局部数据结构。
AI.result: 在UCI、KEEL和AwA基准数据集上，MVGIFBLS在AUC分数上持续高于对比方法，且在高斯特征噪声下保持鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: MVGIFBLS的每个组件都对整体框架有正面贡献，该模型有效提升了分类性能和鲁棒性。

title: LenGuard-GPC: Length Guarding with Guided-Prompt Consistency for Spatial Reasoning Reinforce Learning
summary: Multi-view spatial reasoning requires vision-language models to compare visual evidence across images, align object correspondences, and infer spatial relations over long visual contexts, a setting where chain-of-thought reasoning tends to grow verbose without becoming more accurate. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards is a natural fit for this task, but standard GRPO reward relies on sparse outcome-level feedback and gives no signal about where a reasoning trajectory goes wrong, nor any control over its length. We propose LenGuard-GPC, a dense reward framework that addresses both problems together. For each sampled trajectory, it compares the token-wise predictive distributions under a standard prompt and a guided prompt, and uses the resulting token-sum KL divergence as a dense reward signal. Since this KL penalty accumulates over tokens and would otherwise reward shorter responses regardless of their quality, we introduce a staged length bonus that keeps reasoning length within a controlled range without simply encouraging brevity. On six multi-view spatial reasoning benchmarks, LenGuard-GPC improves accuracy over vanilla GRPO while reducing average response length.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LenGuard-GPC，一个用于多视角空间推理的密集奖励框架。它通过比较标准提示和引导提示下的token级预测分布，利用KL散度作为密集奖励信号，并引入分阶段长度奖励来控制推理长度，在六个基准测试上提升了准确率并缩短了回复长度。
AI.motivation: 多视角空间推理需要VLM跨图像比较视觉证据、对齐物体对应关系并推断空间关系，但现有链式思维推理冗长且不准确。标准GRPO奖励仅提供稀疏的结果级反馈，无法指出推理轨迹中具体哪里出错，也无法控制推理长度。
AI.method: LenGuard-GPC框架：1）对于每个采样轨迹，比较标准提示和引导提示下的token级预测分布，计算token级KL散度作为密集奖励信号；2）引入分阶段长度奖励（staged length bonus），将推理长度控制在合理范围内，避免单纯鼓励短回复。
AI.result: 在六个多视角空间推理基准测试上，LenGuard-GPC相比标准GRPO提升了准确率，同时减少了平均回复长度。
AI.conclusion: 通过密集奖励信号和长度控制机制，LenGuard-GPC有效解决了多视角空间推理中推理冗长和反馈稀疏的问题，实现了更高效、更准确的推理。

title: BG4Sea: Biogeochemical Seasonal Forecastability via Progressive Information Scaling
summary: Marine biogeochemical forecasting is increasingly important for managing marine ecosystems and the carbon cycle, yet global, seasonal forecast products lag far behind physical oceanography, held back by the complexity of the processes involved and by data scarcity. We introduce BG4Sea, which to our knowledge is the first global, data-driven system to produce multivariate seasonal forecasts of the marine biogeochemical state. BG4Sea is a modular architecture with a column autoencoder that compresses the vertical column into a low-dimensional latent space, a latent forecaster propagates this representation forward in time, a surface-forcing conditioner that injects physical boundary information via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), and a horizontal-coupling module that incorporates neighboring-column context through cross-attention. The model is trained and evaluated on the global ocean reanalysis BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES), and produces six-month forecasts at 1/4 degree, monthly resolution for dissolved chemistry, biology, and carbon-pool variables, outperforming persistence and climatology across most variables and lead times. We position BG4Sea as an interpretable baseline for future, more expressive approaches, and discuss predictability attribution to each component, alongside the model's structural limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BG4Sea，据我们所知这是首个能够产生海洋生物地球化学状态多变量季节性预报的全球数据驱动系统。该模型采用模块化架构，包含柱自编码器、潜在预报器、表面强迫调节器和水平耦合模块，在BIORYS4再分析数据上训练，可生成六个月的全球1/4度分辨率月度预报，在大多数变量和预报时长上优于持久性和气候学基准。
AI.motivation: 海洋生物地球化学的季节性预报对管理海洋生态系统和碳循环日益重要，但全球季节性预报产品远落后于物理海洋学，主要受制于所涉过程的复杂性和数据稀缺。
AI.method: BG4Sea采用模块化架构：(1) 柱自编码器将垂直柱压缩为低维潜空间；(2) 潜在预报器在潜空间中推进时间演化；(3) 表面强迫调节器通过特征线性调制注入物理边界信息；(4) 水平耦合模块通过交叉注意力融合邻近柱的上下文信息。
AI.result: 模型在BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES)全球海洋再分析数据集上训练和评估，产生六个月的1/4度、月度分辨率预报，涵盖溶解化学、生物学和碳库变量，在大多数变量和预报时长上优于持久性和气候学基准。
AI.conclusion: 将BG4Sea定位为未来更具表达能力方法的可解释基线，讨论了各模块对可预报性的贡献，以及模型的结构性局限。

title: Coordinated Disentanglement with Iterative Mode Discovery Under Hidden Correlations
summary: Disentangled representation learning is a powerful paradigm for robust attribute prediction. While recent methods address attribute correlations, hidden correlations remain underexplored, where data under the value of a certain attribute exhibit underlying modes correlated with other attributes. To preserve mode information and achieve disentanglement, we jointly discover modes and enforce mode-based conditional independence. Yet, the interdependency between these two modules may lead to error amplification under naive iterations. We propose Coordinated Disentanglement with Iterative mode Discovery (CoDID), an end-to-end framework featuring a dynamic architecture that adapts to evolving number of modes, and a coordination mechanism that mitigates error amplification via meta-optimization. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance on diverse tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDID框架，通过迭代模式发现与协调机制解决表示学习中隐藏属性相关性的解耦问题，实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦表示学习方法虽能处理显式属性相关性，但未能充分探索隐藏相关性——即某属性取值下数据存在的潜在模式与其他属性存在关联。保留模式信息并实现真正解耦是核心动机。
AI.method: 提出CoDID端到端框架：(1) 动态架构，适应模式数量的动态演化；(2) 协调机制，通过元优化减轻迭代中模式发现与条件独立性约束之间的误差放大问题。
AI.result: 在多种任务上取得最先进（SOTA）的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: CoDID通过联合发现模式并施加基于模式的条件独立性，配合协调机制有效处理了隐藏属性相关性，验证了解耦表示学习在鲁棒属性预测中的潜力。

title: The Anatomy of a Truth Direction: Knowledge-Dependent Dimensionality, a Relational Law, and a Convergent Category Geometry in Small Language Models
summary: Bürger et al. (2024) demonstrated that truth representations in large language models are universal across statement polarity but reside within a multidimensional subspace. We extend that framework along three questions: how the dimensionality of the subspace depends on the model's knowledge, which architectural component builds the truth direction, and what the direction is a mixture of. In Part I (one model), a training-free directional probe derived from the SVD of hidden-state minimal pairs shows that the dimensionality of truth is knowledge-dependent: the signal is concentrated on a single axis for behaviorally known facts (held-out AUC 0.938) and becomes diffuse as knowledge decreases or material heterogeneity increases; seven falsification experiments sustain the one-dimensional reading, and the same decomposition recovers the supervised polarity direction of Bürger et al. at cosine 0.959 without polarity labels. In Part II (four base models, two families, pre-registered predictions), a relational law emerges: attention propagates truth frames it did not write, the feed-forward network opposes the frame of its current block, and the genuine post-peak decay is causally attributed on all four models to the SwiGLU value stream; per-category truth axes form a semantically signed arrangement that contradicts the lexical surface and converges across families (Mantel p = 0.0009). Stress tests at three scales (33 categories, 888 pairs per relation, six sampling seeds) expose a sign instability of the per-category orientation, repair it with a declared spectral consensus gauge, and sharpen the convergence into a knowledge-gated law, strengthening from +0.42 on dense mixed-knowledge material to +0.74 on knowledge-restricted categories: the geometry of the mixture belongs to the knowledge domain rather than to the architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文通过三部分实验证明：大语言模型中的"真值表征"具有知识依赖的维度性——对于模型已知的事实，真值信号集中在一个单一主轴上（AUC 0.938）；跨四种模型的预注册实验揭示注意力传播真值框架、前馈网络反对当前块的框架、SwiGLU值流负责因果衰减；真值方向是知识域而非架构域的几何混合，知识受限材料上的收敛强度可达+0.74。
AI.motivation: 在Bürger等人（2024）发现LLM的真值表征在陈述极性上具有普遍性并存在于多维子空间的基础上，本文进一步追问三个问题：真值子空间的维度如何依赖于模型的知识水平、哪个架构组件构建了真值方向、以及该方向是何种成分的混合。
AI.method: Part I：使用单模型，基于隐藏状态最小配对（minimal pairs）的SVD构建无训练的方向性探针。Part II：使用四个基础模型（两个模型家族），进行预注册预测实验，分析注意力、前馈网络、SwiGLU值流等组件的因果作用。通过33个类别、每关系888对、六个采样种子的压力测试，引入声明性谱共识指标（declared spectral consensus gauge）修复符号不稳定性。
AI.result: Part I：真值维度依赖于知识水平——行为上已知的事实信号集中在单一轴上（AUC 0.938），知识下降或材料异质性增加时信号弥散。七项证伪实验支持一维解读。无标签情况下恢复了Bürger等人的有监督极性方向（余弦相似度0.959）。Part II：注意力传播真值框架，前馈网络反对当前块框架，SwiGLU值流承担因果衰减。每类真值轴形成语义上有符号的排列，跨模型家族收敛（Mantel p=0.0009）。知识受限材料上收敛强度从+0.42提升至+0.74。
AI.conclusion: 真值表征的几何混合属于知识域而非架构域：真值方向的维度性、组件分配和跨模型收敛性均由模型的知识状态驱动，而非由架构设计决定。这揭示了对齐研究需要关注模型"知道什么"而非"如何构建"。

title: An Explicit World Model Based on Data-First Ontology: DaoQL Multimodal Storage Validation and Counterfactual Reasoning Evaluation
summary: Large language models encode world models implicitly in neural weights, which exposes four structural risks in high-precision domains such as medicine and finance: hallucination, frozen knowledge, poor explainability, and poor modifiability. This paper proposes data-first ontology: LLMs are treated as reasoning and language engines, while deterministic knowledge is moved into an explicit multimodal database, DaoQL. We formalize an explicit world model and show that, under rule independence, deterministic evaluation, and fixed conflict resolution, explicit models provide a sufficient condition for composable counterfactual decomposability; implicit models lack atomic read/delta semantics and therefore provide no comparable architectural guarantee. The implemented system focuses on DaoQL's verified storage layer and explicit Eval path, integrating graph, column, vector, and full-text engines within one process. KVCache graph nodes, expert hot updates, and the DaoQL-Agent runtime remain future work. On an embedded same-machine setup, DaoQL reports graph BFS at 1.20 ms, HNSW at 83.1 us, and a Fluent hybrid query at 105.8 us; these results indicate engineering potential but must be interpreted with deployment-shape differences from client-server systems. Exploratory measurements on LDBC SNB SF1 and ANN-Benchmarks further show 34/34 query coverage with interactive-class queries mostly in the sub-millisecond to millisecond range, but only 1.8 QPS overall due to long-tail BI/IC queries; ANN-Benchmarks reaches Recall@10 >= 99% at thousand-level QPS after a bridge-edge protection fix. In a five-domain counterfactual experiment (n = 1250), DaoQL+GPT-4o achieves 94% composable counterfactual decomposability, 49 percentage points above GPT-4o alone. The paper explicitly separates provable structure, preliminary empirical evidence, and architectural roadmap claims.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据优先本体论，将LLM作为推理引擎，把确定性知识移入显式多模态数据库DaoQL，通过显式世界模型实现可组合反事实分解性，实验显示在五领域反事实任务中DaoQL+GPT-4o比纯GPT-4o高出49个百分点。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在高精度领域（医学、金融）存在幻觉、知识冻结、可解释性差和难以修改四大结构风险，需要将确定性知识与推理能力分离。
AI.method: 提出数据优先本体论，将LLM作为推理和语言引擎，确定性知识存入显式多模态数据库DaoQL，融合图、列、向量和全文检索引擎，形式化定义显式世界模型及其可组合反事实分解性的充分条件。
AI.result: DaoQL在嵌入式设置中图BFS 1.20ms、HNSW 83.1μs、混合查询105.8μs；LDBC SNB SF1覆盖34/34查询但整体仅1.8 QPS；ANN-Benchmarks Recall@10>=99%达千级QPS。五领域反事实实验(n=1250)中DaoQL+GPT-4o达94%可组合反事实分解性，比GPT-4o高49个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 显式世界模型在可组合反事实分解性上优于隐式模型，但DaoQL系统在查询吞吐量和工程性能上仍需优化；论文明确区分了可证明结构、初步实证证据和架构路线图声明。

title: Robust Losses from Univariate Base Functions for Noisy-Label Learning
summary: Learning with noisy labels is a fundamental problem in training reliable deep neural networks. Robust loss functions provide a direct and effective way to mitigate the adverse effects of label noise. However, most existing robust losses are designed directly at the level of the final multiclass objective, which makes it difficult to systematically characterize and extend their robustness properties. In this paper, we propose a general framework that constructs robust multiclass losses from univariate base functions. By defining mapping operators from base functions to multiclass losses, the robustness of the induced losses can be characterized through simple properties of the base functions. We develop two complementary construction schemes, Target Separation and Binary Reduction, corresponding to inter-class independent and inter-class dependent formulations, respectively. For both schemes, we analyze their symmetry and asymmetry properties and derive corresponding sufficient conditions, which provide theoretical criteria for noise-robust loss design. The proposed framework also provides a new route to constructing symmetric losses, serving as a complement to normalization-based symmetric loss designs. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed losses achieve competitive or superior performance under various noise settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个通用框架，通过单变量基函数构造鲁棒多类损失函数，并利用基函数的简单性质刻画损失函数的鲁棒性。该框架包含两种互补的构造方案（目标分离和二元约简），在合成和真实噪声标签基准上取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒损失函数大多直接在最终多分类目标层面设计，难以系统地表征和扩展其鲁棒性属性。本文旨在解决这一问题，提供一种从基函数出发构建鲁棒多类损失函数的通用方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种互补的构造方案：Target Separation（目标分离）和Binary Reduction（二元约简），分别对应类间独立和类间依赖的公式化。通过分析基函数的对称性和非对称性，推导了噪声鲁棒损失设计的充分条件。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声标签基准上的大量实验表明，所提出的损失函数在各种噪声设置下取得了有竞争力或优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为噪声鲁棒损失设计提供了理论准则，并为构造对称损失提供了新途径，是对基于归一化的对称损失设计的补充。

title: Lossless but Not Free: An Empirical Anatomy of Speculative Decoding on Consumer Hardware
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Code, benchmark harness, and all result artifacts: https://github.com/ParamChordiya/speculative_decoding_engine
summary: Single-stream autoregressive decoding of large language models is bound by memory bandwidth: each generated token requires one full forward pass through the target model, and successive passes cannot be parallelized. Speculative decoding restructures this computation: a small draft model proposes $K$ tokens autoregressively, the target model scores all of them in one batched pass, and a rejection-sampling rule provably preserves the target model's output distribution. We present a from-scratch, device-agnostic (CUDA/MPS/CPU) implementation and an empirical study across five draft/target backend configurations on a consumer Apple-silicon laptop. Distribution equivalence is verified at three levels, culminating in a two-sample test over roughly 9,200 real-model tokens per method ($χ^2 = 162.5$, dof $= 200$, $p = 0.976$) and exact greedy-sequence agreement. The best configuration reaches a measured $1.61\times$ wall-clock speedup at $K=6$, on an acceptance profile declining from 69.7% at $K=1$ to 37.8% at the optimum, while three of five configurations decelerate, either because the draft fails to out-speed a small target or because the quantized Metal backend executes "parallel" verification serially, an effect we isolate and quantify. The failures are as instructive as the successes: speculative decoding pays off only when verification is genuinely batch-parallel and the draft/target latency gap is real.

AI.tldr: 本文研究推测解码（Speculative Decoding）在小模型生成候选令牌、大模型批量验证的加速策略，实现了跨硬件（CUDA/MPS/CPU）的通用实现，并在苹果笔记本电脑上进行了实验验证。最佳配置在K=6时获得1.61倍加速，但多数配置因并行验证瓶颈或草稿模型不够快而出现减速。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的自回归解码受限于内存带宽，每生成一个token都需要一次完整前向传播且无法并行化，造成推理延迟瓶颈。推测解码将计算重构为"小模型草稿生成+大模型批量验证"以突破这一限制，但该方法在实际硬件上的效果差异巨大，需要系统性的实证研究。
AI.method: 实现了一个从零开始的、设备无关（CUDA/MPS/CPU）的推测解码框架。小模型自回归生成K个候选token，目标模型以批处理方式一次性打分，再通过拒绝采样规则保证输出分布不变。在苹果Silicon笔记本上配置五种不同的草稿/目标模型后端组合进行实验，并进行三级分布等价验证。
AI.result: 1) 通过了三级分布等价验证（含χ²=162.5, df=200, p=0.976的双样本检验及精确贪婪序列一致性）；2) 最佳配置在K=6时获得1.61倍实际加速，接受率从K=1时的69.7%下降到最优点的37.8%；3) 五种配置中有三种出现减速，原因包括草稿模型速度不够快、量化Metal后端串行执行"并行"验证。
AI.conclusion: 推测解码仅在两个条件同时满足时才有价值：验证过程真正批处理并行、草稿模型与目标模型之间存在实质性的延迟差距。失败的案例与成功的案例同样具有启发性，揭示了该方法在实际部署中的关键约束条件。

title: On the Potential of Graph Neural Networks as Metamodels for Supply Chain Optimization: Dataset, Architectures, and Directions
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful, differentiable class of learning models for graph-structured systems. Their ability to generalize across topologies opens the prospect of a surrogate for combined structural and parametric optimization, which classical metamodels cannot offer. Supply chains are a natural target, yet the use of GNN surrogates for supply chain problems is largely unexplored. This paper lays the foundation, presents initial steps, and discusses key research directions. As a foundation, we formulate the problem and create a large public training dataset of programmatically generated supply chain graphs with input parameters and steady-state performance metrics obtained using our SupplyNetPy simulation library. As initial steps, we explore GNN architectures that work well as surrogates for node- and network-level predictions, and analyze their accuracy-compute trade-off against simulation. Most importantly, we outline the exciting directions this opens, namely gradient-based optimization over topology, fast design-space exploration, and sensitivity analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将图神经网络（GNN）应用于供应链代理模型，创建了大规模公开数据集SupplyNetPy，探索了适用于节点和网络级预测的GNN架构，并提出了基于梯度的拓扑优化、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析等未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统元模型无法同时处理供应链的结构优化和参数优化，而GNN具有跨拓扑泛化的能力，但GNN在供应链代理模型中的应用尚属空白。
AI.method: 1) 形式化问题定义；2) 创建大规模公开训练数据集（程序化生成供应链图+输入参数+稳态性能指标）；3) 开发SupplyNetPy仿真库；4) 探索适用于节点级和网络级预测的GNN架构；5) 评估精度-计算量权衡。
AI.result: 建立了供应链GNN代理模型的基础框架，验证了GNN在节点级和网络级预测中的有效性，并量化了与仿真相比的精度-计算权衡。
AI.conclusion: GNN代理模型为供应链的结构与参数联合优化开辟了新路径，未来可支持基于梯度的拓扑优化、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析。

title: Learning-Driven Adaptive Audit Scheduling: A Sequential Decision Approach to Off-Chain Data Integrity
summary: We model cryptographic auditing of off-chain data as a Constrained MDP (CMDP) under partial observability: the storage node's hidden type and corruption state make the problem a POMDP, while a miss-rate ceiling rho imposes an explicit security constraint. We propose DRQN-CMDP, a Deep Recurrent Q-Network whose GRU layer maintains a belief over the latent node type, paired with Lagrangian dual ascent that adapts the miss-rate penalty lambda automatically. A pairing-free homomorphic-MAC primitive supplies O(1) on-chain verification cost. Across 13 methods--four DQN variants, PPO, A2C, PPO-Lagrangian, a stateful Bayesian heuristic, three fixed-rule baselines, and an oracle-informed heuristic--DRQN-CMDP achieves a favourable balance: 83% lower gas than fixed high-frequency auditing, single-digit miss rate (7.5%), and moderate detection latency--a combination no other method matches across all three objectives simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 本文针对区块链链下数据加密审计问题，提出DRQN-CMDP模型，将问题建模为带约束的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP/POMDP），结合深度循环Q网络（GRU层维持节点潜在类型信念）与拉格朗日对偶上升（自动调整违规率惩罚）。配合无配对的同态MAC原语实现O(1)链上验证成本。实验对比13种方法，DRQN-CMDP在三个目标上同时取得最优平衡：比固定高频审计降低83% gas费，个位数违规率（7.5%），且检测延迟适中。
AI.motivation: 区块链链下数据审计面临两大挑战：存储节点可能隐藏不良类型或被腐败（部分可观测性），同时审计必须满足安全约束（违规率上限rho）。现有方法要么gas成本过高（固定高频审计），要么无法同时兼顾低违规率、低延迟和低成本三个目标。
AI.method: 1) 将问题建模为带约束的POMDP（CMDP），节点隐藏类型和腐败状态构成部分可观测性，违规率上限rho作为显式安全约束。2) 提出DRQN-CMDP：使用GRU层维持节点潜在类型的信念状态，结合深度Q网络进行决策。3) 采用拉格朗日对偶上升自动调整违规率惩罚系数lambda。4) 设计无配对的同态MAC原语，实现O(1)链上验证成本。
AI.result: 与12种方法（包括DQN变体、PPO、A2C、PPO-Lagrangian、贝叶斯启发式、固定规则基线、先知启发式）对比，DRQN-CMDP实现了：比固定高频审计低83%的gas费用，7.5%的违规率（个位数），适中的检测延迟。三个目标同时达到最优平衡，其他方法无法匹配。
AI.conclusion: DRQN-CMDP通过结合深度强化学习（DRQN）、约束优化（拉格朗日对偶）和密码学原语（同态MAC），在链下数据加密审计中实现了成本、安全性和延迟三者间的最佳权衡，为类似部分可观测安全约束问题提供了新范式。

title: MultiLoReFT: Decoupling Shared and Modality-Specific Subspaces in Multimodal Learning via Low-Rank Representation Fine-Tuning
summary: Real-world perception and decision making are inherently multimodal, integrating complementary signals across modalities. However, training multimodal models faces two main obstacles. First, collecting large-scale, well-aligned paired multimodal datasets is often impractical, making end-to-end multimodal training difficult. Second, existing multimodal representations frequently entangle information shared across modalities with modality-specific information, hindering interpretability and control. We introduce MultiLoReFT, an efficient and scalable low-rank representation fine-tuning framework for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models. MultiLoReFT extends low-rank adaptation to the multimodal setting and learns interpretable projection subspaces that decouple shared and modality-specific information. Across simulated and real-world benchmarks, it produces representations that support multimodal prediction while explicitly revealing how shared and modality-specific information is distributed across modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiLoReFT，一个高效的低秩表示微调框架，用于解决多模态学习中数据对齐难和表示耦合两大问题。该方法将低秩适配扩展到多模态场景，学习可解释的投影子空间以解耦共享信息和模态特有信息，并在模拟和真实基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的感知与决策本质上是多模态的，但多模态模型训练面临两大障碍：一是大规模、良好对齐的多模态配对数据集难以收集；二是现有多模态表示常将模态间共享信息与模态特有信息纠缠在一起，限制了可解释性和可控性。
AI.method: MultiLoReFT将低秩适配方法扩展到多模态场景，通过学习可解释的投影子空间来解耦共享信息和模态特有信息，从而在预训练单模态模型基础上实现高效的多模态表示微调。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实基准测试中，MultiLoReFT生成的表示不仅支持多模态预测，还能明确揭示共享信息和模态特有信息在各模态间的分布情况。
AI.conclusion: MultiLoReFT是一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，能够利用预训练单模态模型进行多模态学习，同时增强表示的可解释性和可控性。

title: Agentic ERP: Multi-Agent Large Language Model Architecture for Autonomous Enterprise Resource Planning
summary: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems record transactions reliably but still delegate almost all operational decision-making to human specialists, because classical rule-based automation cannot reason about exceptions and monolithic AI assistants degrade when asked to coordinate across functional boundaries. This paper presents Agentic ERP, an expert-system architecture that combines role-aligned large-language-model (LLM) agents with a risk-tiered human-in-the-loop harness and a graph-based orchestrator to execute end-to-end business workflows on a production ERP backend. First, autonomous ERP operation is formulated as a constrained sequential-decision problem over a structured enterprise state, with a decomposition argument linking role-aligned agents to a measurable reduction in per-step tool-selection complexity. Second, a graph-based Planner--Executor--Reflector--Responder orchestration decouples generation from evaluation through externalised grading criteria and sprint contracts, packaging recent harness-engineering principles as inspectable expert-system artefacts. Third, the system is evaluated at three levels: a scenario-based task suite, a comprehensive comparison of six orchestration paradigms on cross-functional crisis tasks, and a 365-day agent-in-the-loop simulation against rule-based RPA and no-intervention baselines. Across these levels the proposed multi-agent method is significantly better than the baseline, and the system sustains a simulated year of operation with zero stockouts while the rule-based baseline accumulates hundreds under the same demand stream. The work shows that role-aligned LLM agents under human oversight can move an ERP system from passively recording transactions to actively executing operational decisions, and it provides a reference architecture and an evaluation protocol for autonomous enterprise resource planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic ERP架构，通过角色对齐的大语言模型智能体、分级人工监督机制和基于图的编排器，在真实ERP后端上执行业务流程。实验证明相比传统规则方法，该多智能体系统在跨职能任务和365天模拟中显著更优，实现了零缺货运行。
AI.motivation: ERP系统虽然能可靠记录交易，但几乎所有运营决策仍需依赖人类专家，因为传统规则自动化无法处理异常，而单一AI助手在跨职能协调时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Agentic ERP架构：(1)将自治ERP运作形式化为约束序贯决策问题，通过角色对齐智能体降低每一步工具选择的复杂度；(2)基于图的Planner-Executor-Reflector-Responder编排机制，将生成与评估解耦，利用外部化评分标准和冲刺契约作为可检查的专家系统工件；(3)在三层级上评估：场景化任务套件、六种编排范式比较、365天代理在环模拟。
AI.result: 所提出的多智能体方法在所有层级上显著优于基线；在365天模拟中实现零缺货，而基于规则的基线在相同需求流下累积了数百次缺货。
AI.conclusion: 角色对齐的LLM智能体在人工监督下，能使ERP系统从被动记录交易转向主动执行运营决策，并提供了自治企业资源规划的参考架构和评估协议。

title: DeeperRadar: End-to-End MIMO Radar Design and Multi-Modal Fusion for Autonomous Vehicle Perception
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: DeeperRadar is a radar-centric, sensor-stack-conditioned framework that co-designs radar sensing and multi-modal 3D detection for autonomous mobility by learning a sparse acquisition pattern end-to-end with the fusion model. A learnable MIMO design module is trained end-to-end within a fusion network that operates directly on raw radar ADC data together with camera images and LiDAR point clouds. During training, the design module is supervised by the other sensors, enabling the system to learn both which receiver antennas to activate and the effective number of them. At deployment, the design module is removed and replaced by the learned sparse subsampling mask, leaving the downstream model architecture unchanged. Evaluated on the RADIal dataset, DeeperRadar discovers sparse, task-aware radar configurations that match or exceed full-array baselines while using fewer receivers, potentially reducing radar cost and integration complexity. These results show that learned optimal MIMO radar design depends on the fusion stack and the downstream perception task.

AI.tldr: DeeperRadar是一种以雷达为中心的框架，通过端到端学习稀疏采样模式，协同设计雷达感知与多模态3D检测，在减少接收器数量的同时保持或提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达设计固定天线数量与布局，未考虑下游感知任务及多传感器融合的需求，导致硬件冗余与成本浪费。本文旨在通过学习任务驱动的稀疏雷达配置，降低雷达成本与集成复杂度。
AI.method: 提出可学习的MIMO设计模块，与融合网络端到端联合训练，模块直接处理原始雷达ADC数据，并辅以相机图像和LiDAR点云。训练时该模块受其他传感器监督，学习激活哪些接收天线及有效数量；部署时移除该模块，替换为学习到的稀疏子采样掩码，下游模型架构不变。
