AI.result: 在RADIal数据集上，DeeperRadar发现的稀疏雷达配置在更少接收器条件下，匹配或超越了全阵列基线方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 最优MIMO雷达设计依赖于融合栈和下游感知任务，证实了任务驱动、传感器协同的雷达稀疏化设计是可行的。

title: Interpretable Anomaly and Drift Detection with Gaussian Mixture Models
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures. Code and experiments included in the source
summary: We revisit Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) as a lightweight, interpretable tool for anomaly detection and, in particular, for detecting distributional drift in data streams. We make three practical choices explicit and evaluate them on seven public benchmarks. First, the number of mixture components is selected automatically by the Bayesian Information Criterion, initialised by k-means, removing the need to fix it in advance. Second, individual observations are scored by their negative log-likelihood under a GMM fitted to normal data, with thresholds set at a target false-alarm rate using Extreme Value Theory. Third, the same interpretable model extends to distributional drift: each Gaussian component is a named "regime," and the fraction of a stream window that matches no regime -- its unexplained mass -- is a drift signal that is itself the explanation. We benchmark this against a model-free kernel two-sample test (Maximum Mean Discrepancy, MMD) and against two GMM-to-GMM divergences (a closed-form Cauchy-Schwarz divergence and a matching-based KL surrogate). Across seven benchmarks ranging from 3 to 64 dimensions and five random splits, the GMM point detector is competitive with -- though rarely more accurate than -- Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, one-class SVM, ECOD, COPOD and an autoencoder, while uniquely yielding an interpretable model. For drift, MMD is the strongest pure detector, but the interpretable unexplained-mass statistic matches it when anomalies form novel regimes (and honestly fails, as MMD does not, when drift is a pure re-weighting of existing regimes). Every alarm is explainable: anomalies lie a median of 3-10 sigma outside their nearest regime vs. about 1 sigma for normal points, and a drift alarm reports the fraction of the window matching no known regime. All code and experiments are released.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视高斯混合模型（GMM）作为轻量级、可解释的异常检测和分布漂移检测工具。通过三个实用选择：BIC自动选择分量数、极值理论设定阈值、以及"未解释质量"作为漂移信号，在七个基准上验证了GMM点检测器性能与多种方法相当，漂移检测中"未解释质量"在特定场景下与MMD匹配，且所有警报均可解释。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法（如孤立森林、自编码器等）虽然精度高，但缺乏可解释性；而传统的GMM虽然可解释，但需要预先指定分量数、阈值设定主观等问题。作者希望构建一个既轻量可解释，又能与主流方法性能竞争的异常检测和漂移检测工具。
AI.method: 三个实用选择：(1) 使用BIC（由k-means初始化）自动选择GMM分量数；(2) 对正常数据拟合GMM，用负对数似然打分，用极值理论设定目标虚警率下的阈值；(3) 将每个高斯分量视为命名"机制"，流窗口中不匹配任何机制的比例（未解释质量）作为漂移信号。基准对比包括MMD、两种GMM间散度，以及多种异常检测方法。
AI.result: 在7个基准（3-64维）和5个随机划分上：GMM点检测器性能与孤立森林、LOF、OC-SVM、ECOD、COPOD和自编码器相当（但极少更优）；漂移检测中MMD整体最强，但"未解释质量"统计量在异常形成新机制时与MMD匹敌，而在纯机制重加权漂移时诚实失败。异常点距离最近机制中位数3-10个标准差，正常点约1个标准差。
AI.conclusion: GMM作为可解释的异常检测和漂移检测工具是可行的，在保持竞争性性能的同时提供了独特的可解释性。代码和实验已开源。

title: Self-Modifying Lean Proof Agents with Verifier-Grounded Benchmark Coevolution
summary: Designing effective Lean proof agents is a central challenge in formal mathematical reasoning. Beyond building stronger provers, recent work emphasizes the workflow around Lean: how an agent decomposes proof obligations, uses tools and compiler feedback, diagnoses failures, repairs proofs, and maintains structured proof context. Motivated by code-level self-evolving agents, we study whether such workflows can be evolved rather than hand-designed. We present a self-evolving Lean proof agent in which a small fixed, trusted runtime wraps a fully mutable workspace: the proof workflow, prompts, and tools. Unlike most self-evolving systems, which optimize against a fixed external benchmark, our system coevolves the agent and its benchmark. Between generations, the highest-scoring agent (the champion) revises the active task distribution through a mastery-throttled curriculum update that introduces harder proof obligations only after the current level is mastered, and a single-anchor recalibration re-runs the champion on the updated benchmark to keep scores comparable as difficulty rises. All evolution stays inside a Lean-grounded verification loop: however the agent rewrites itself, a success counts only when its behavior yields Lean-verified proofs under a trusted snapshot, and each attempt must emit a machine-readable, Lean-grounded proof context whose representation may evolve but whose groundedness is enforced. We run the coevolving trajectory and a fixed-benchmark baseline for 15 active generations and compare them on a held-out miniF2F test split. The best coevolving agent reaches a 45.1% held-out solve rate, versus 12.7% for the seed and 32.0% for the best fixed-benchmark agent, showing that verifier-grounded self-evolution can improve Lean proof workflows under a coevolving benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自进化的Lean证明智能体，通过让智能体与基准测试共同进化，而非在固定基准上优化，实现了45.1%的保留集解决率，远超种子模型（12.7%）和固定基准基线（32.0%）。
AI.motivation: 当前设计Lean证明智能体主要依赖手工设计工作流程，而代码级自进化智能体的成功表明工作流也可以进化。此外，传统自进化系统在固定外部基准上优化，忽略了基准本身应随能力提升而调整的需求。
AI.method: 提出一个自进化Lean证明智能体，核心设计包括：(1) 固定可信运行时包裹完全可变的工作空间（证明工作流、提示词、工具）；(2) 智能体与基准共同进化：通过精通节制的课程更新（mastery-throttled curriculum update）逐步引入更难证明任务，以及单锚重校准（single-anchor recalibration）保持分数可比性；(3) 所有进化过程受Lean验证循环约束，每次成功必须产出Lean验证的证明。
AI.result: 共同进化轨迹持续15代后，最佳智能体在miniF2F保留集上达到45.1%解决率，而种子模型仅12.7%，最佳固定基准智能体为32.0%。
AI.conclusion: 验证器锚定的自进化能够有效改进Lean证明工作流，且共同进化基准比固定基准更能促进智能体能力提升。

title: Honest Physical-Support Inference after Latent Dictionary Learning: Collision Singularities and Minimax Resolution
summary:
Sparse-support uncertainty is usually quantified by treating the dictionary as known, an assumption that can produce overconfident, label-dependent conclusions when the dictionary is learned from latent sparse mixtures. Near collisions of coherent atoms, a test signal may identify the active physical group even though the training data cannot distinguish the physical rays within it.
  We develop inference for active physical rays, unit atoms modulo sign, after latent dictionary learning. In a fixed-dimensional Gaussian train-test experiment, we retain all dictionaries compatible with a robust training-moment region, profile the test representation over them, and project surviving configurations onto a permutation-invariant support space. The resulting confidence correspondence can report cross-sheet inconclusiveness, group resolution with child ambiguity, or fine-support resolution.
  We characterize both its statistical cost and decision-theoretic benefit. Residual block orientation first affects the latent training density at cubic order, yielding information of order $s^6$, where $s$ is the within-block collision scale. The correspondence provides high-probability-over-training conditional test coverage, with resolution governed separately by parent detectability, test-time support separation, and learned-dictionary orientation. In the resolved fixed-shell regime, its projective Hausdorff diameter contracts at the minimax-optimal rate $s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$, up to constants. A restricted-task theorem further determines when coefficient asymmetry allows test replication to supplement training information and when calibration uncertainty remains irreducible. The framework thus yields honest, resolution-adaptive support statements and guides the allocation of training versus test measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在潜在字典学习后量化稀疏支持不确定性的框架，通过对所有与稳健训练矩区域兼容的字典进行剖面分析，并投影到置换不变支持空间，生成诚实且分辨率自适应的置信对应关系，同时刻画其统计代价与决策理论收益。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在量化稀疏支持不确定性时假设字典已知，当字典从潜在稀疏混合中学习时，这一假设会产生过度自信且标签依赖的结论。特别是在相干原子接近碰撞时，测试信号可能识别出活跃的物理组，但训练数据无法区分组内物理射线，因此需要一种能处理字典学习带来的不确定性的推理方法。
AI.method: 在固定维度高斯训练-测试实验中，保留所有与稳健训练矩区域兼容的字典，对测试表示进行剖面分析，将幸存配置投影到置换不变支持空间，构建置信对应关系。通过残余块方向对潜在训练密度的三次阶影响（信息量阶为$s^6$）进行统计刻画，并利用投影Hausdorff直径在固定壳层中达到极小极大最优速率$s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$。
AI.result: 该方法能够报告跨片不确定、组分辨率带子歧义、或精细支持分辨率。在固定壳层中，投影Hausdorff直径以极小极大最优速率收缩。受限任务定理进一步确定了系数不对称何时允许测试复制补充训练信息，以及何时校准不确定性不可约。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能生成诚实、分辨率自适应的支持陈述，并指导训练与测试测量之间的资源分配，为字典学习后的不确定性量化提供了理论严谨且实用的解决方案。

title: Persistent Sparse Autoencoders: Learning Feature Timescales in Language Models
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose language model activations into sparse features, but standard SAEs encode each token independently and do not expose information that persists across a sequence. We introduce Persistent Sparse Autoencoders (Persistent SAEs), which extend standard SAEs by learning a persistence coefficient for each feature, allowing the model to learn which features should persist and for how long. Our experiments show that they retain competitive reconstruction quality while learning a spectrum of feature timescales: fast features behave as locally interpretable detectors, whereas slow features concentrate topic-level information in a persistent state. Moreover, as shown in a prompt-injection monitoring case study, slow features preserve detection signals and remain causally effective over long contexts. These results suggest that Persistent SAEs open up new opportunities for interpreting and monitoring language models through persistent semantic representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Persistent SAEs，通过为每个特征学习持久化系数，使稀疏自编码器能够捕捉跨序列的持续信息，在保持重构质量的同时学习不同时间尺度的特征。
AI.motivation: 标准SAE独立编码每个token，无法捕捉序列中持续存在的信息，限制了模型行为的解释和监控能力。
AI.method: 在标准SAE基础上，为每个特征引入一个可学习的持久化系数（persistence coefficient），控制特征应该持续多久以及在多大程度上跨时间步传递。
AI.result: 1) 保持有竞争力的重构质量；2) 学到从快速（局部可解释检测器）到慢速（主题级信息）的特征时间谱；3) 在提示注入监控案例中，慢速特征能长距离保持检测信号并具有因果有效性。
AI.conclusion: Persistent SAEs为通过持久化语义表示来理解和监控语言模型开辟了新途径。

title: Quantifying Diversity of Thought: A Predictive Law of Weighted LLM Ensemble Lift
summary: This paper provides an experimentally verified formal law for calculating the uplift that diversity of thought provides in Large Language Model (LLM) ensembles. From first principles, we derive an exact decomposition of LLM ensemble lift into rescue and damage masses, which yields a compact heuristic for calculating uplift. From this we extract the metrics which predict ensemble performance: an accuracy adjusted correctness correlation, $φ_{\mathrm{adj}}$, together with the accuracy gap and collective accuracy of the pair. We test the law on 767,520 inferences from ten open-weight models over two graduate-level science benchmarks, together with a novel agentic cybersecurity benchmark in which each model conducts digital-forensics investigations by multi-turn tool use in a network-isolated sandbox (23,520 graded trials including abstentions); all votes are released openly. Calibrated once on SuperGPQA at a 40:60 vote split, the heuristic predicts lift on the calibration set with Spearman's $ρ=0.84$ and, with its coefficients frozen, transfers to two datasets never used in calibration ($ρ=0.51$ on GPQA Diamond and $0.84$ on the forensic tasks), whilst the measured swap mass tracks realised lift with $R^2\ge 0.96$ throughout. Raw $φ$ has almost no predictive power ($R^2\le 0.09$ throughout); the accuracy-adjusted $φ_{\mathrm{adj}}$ is markedly superior ($R^2=0.67$ on SuperGPQA), and the heuristic combining these metrics is the most stable pre pooling predictor across the three datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了一个形式化定律，用于计算思维多样性在LLM集成中带来的性能提升。从第一性原理出发，推导出集成提升可分解为“救援质量”和“损害质量”，进而得到一个简洁的启发式公式。基于准确率调整的正确性相关性φ_adj、准确率差距和集体准确率等指标，该公式在767,520次推理和23,520次分级试验中表现出强预测能力，且跨数据集迁移良好。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM集成方法虽能提升性能，但缺乏一个形式化的、实验可验证的定律来解释“思维多样性”如何具体贡献于集成提升。作者希望从第一性原理出发，推导出可计算、可迁移的启发式公式，用以预测LLM集成的提升幅度，从而指导模型组合策略。
AI.method: 从第一性原理推导出LLM集成提升的分解公式（救援质量与损害质量），提炼出三个关键预测指标：准确率调整的正确性相关性φ_adj、准确率差距和集体准确率。在三个数据集（SuperGPQA、GPQA Diamond、网络安全取证基准）上，使用10个开源模型的767,520次推理和23,520次分级试验进行验证。先在一个数据集上标定启发式公式系数，再冻结系数迁移到其他数据集测试。
AI.result: 标定后的启发式在SuperGPQA上Spearman ρ=0.84；系数冻结后迁移到GPQA Diamond（ρ=0.51）和取证任务（ρ=0.84）。交换质量跟踪实际提升的R²≥0.96。原始φ几乎无预测力（R²≤0.09），而φ_adj显著更优（R²=0.67），组合启发式为最稳定的预池化预测器。
AI.conclusion: LLM集成提升可以被形式化分解和预测，准确率调整的相关性指标远优于原始相关性，所提启发式公式具有跨数据集的良好迁移性，为LLM集成策略提供了理论指导和实用工具。

title: First-Order Predictable but Pairwise Fragile: Local Task Adaptation in Trained Transformers
summary: Task arithmetic, sequential fine-tuning, activation steering, and first-order random search all operate through relatively small perturbations around an already trained checkpoint, and they rely on different local approximations: individual perturbations should be first-order predictable, task updates should compose with controlled interference, useful tangent structure should be stable and possible to estimate, and weight edits should have counterparts in representation space. We measure 8 such properties with the same harness around a multitask LoRA operating point, on 9 transformers (82M-7B), with a prospectively registered property list, thresholds, and test split. We find a shared one-direction validity window up to the tested scale $10^{-2}$, but no universal radius for pairwise composition or update ordering. Along individual directions, changes of the probe loss remain first-order predictable throughout the grid: a perturbation's effect on the loss is essentially its projection onto the gradient, which is also what makes local random search work. Pairwise structure, however, proves to be far more fragile: on over a third of the measured (model, task pair) combinations, two-update order sensitivity sets in strictly inside that window; task-gradient subspaces rotate within tens of steps; additivity under our fixed activation probe fails at full task-vector scale on several models, including both held-out 7B models; and no model median passes the registered global mean-vector weight-to-steering correspondence bar. For two sequential task-gradient steps, the leading order-dependent term is the Lie bracket $H_B\textbf{g}_A-H_A\textbf{g}_B$; its normalized prediction $c(η)=ηκ+O(η^2)$ tracks the measured defect at median ratio 1.002, while the onset scale $η^\dagger\approx0.10/κ$ spans three orders of magnitude across models and task pairs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统测量了围绕多任务LoRA操作点的9个Transformer模型（82M-7B）上8种局部近似性质，发现单向扰动在$10^{-2}$尺度内有效，但成对组合与更新顺序缺乏通用半径；阶数依赖项由李括号主导，预测准确但起始尺度跨模型与任务对变化达三个数量级。
AI.motivation: 任务算术、序列微调、激活操控和一阶随机搜索等方法都依赖于对预训练检查点的小扰动及其局部近似假设（如一阶可预测性、任务更新低干扰组合、切空间结构稳定、权重编辑与表征空间对应等），但缺乏对这些假设的系统性实证检验。
AI.method: 作者在9个Transformer（82M-7B）上，以多任务LoRA为操作点，预先注册了8种性质、阈值和测试集，测量了：单向扰动的一阶可预测性、成对任务更新的组成干扰、任务梯度子空间旋转、激活探针的加性、权重到操控的对齐等。并对两个序列梯度步的阶数依赖项用李括号$H_B\textbf{g}_A-H_A\textbf{g}_B$进行建模预测。
AI.result: 单向扰动在$10^{-2}$尺度内有效；但超过三分之一（模型，任务对）组合中，双更新顺序敏感性在此窗口内出现；任务梯度子空间在数十步内旋转；全任务向量尺度下加性失败；全局均值向量权重到操控对齐未通过。李括号项预测的$c(η)=ηκ+O(η^2)$与实际缺陷的中位比值为1.002，但起始尺度$η^\dagger\approx0.10/κ$跨模型和任务对差异达三个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 局部线性近似在单向扰动上成立，但成对组合和顺序敏感的局部结构远更脆弱，缺乏通用半径。李括号能准确预测顺序依赖，但其起效尺度高度依赖于模型和任务对，说明任务算术等方法的鲁棒性需结合具体几何性质评估。

title: DRNOISE: Benchmarking Deep Research Agents in Misleading Evidence Environments
summary: Deep research agents increasingly operate over the open web, where relevant records coexist with redundant summaries, outdated reports, and misleading documents. Existing evaluations offer limited insight into whether agents preserve sound evidential standards when an ordinary-looking false document is deliberately seeded into a searchable environment and offers a direct shortcut to a conflicting answer. We introduce DRNOISE, a 100-task benchmark for answer recovery under misleading evidence. Each task has a unique gold answer supported by two corroborating indirect record chains; the paired noisy condition adds one plausible document that states a conflicting answer directly. The benchmark spans ten families of evidence operations. Across agents with strong clean-task performance, this single intervention causes 66-88 percentage-point accuracy drops. Trace analyses identify verification inertia as the dominant failure mode: agents often retrieve truthful records but stop before completing and reconciling the evidence chain, instead deferring to the answer-like document. Generic verification prompts reduce but do not close this gap. The setting is especially relevant to open-web deployment, where plausible falsehoods arrive through ordinary-looking pages rather than explicit attacks. Reliable deep research therefore requires more than retrieval and citation; it requires active reconciliation of direct claims with record-level evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRNOISE基准，用于评估AI智能体在存在误导性证据环境中的答案恢复能力。在100个任务中，每个任务都有一个正确答案，但会被一份直接声称矛盾答案的虚假文档干扰。实验表明，即使是在干净任务中表现良好的智能体，在引入单一误导文档后准确率也会下降66-88个百分点。主要失败模式是"验证惯性"：智能体检索到真实记录但未完成证据链的验证和整合，转而依赖表面可信的答案文档。
AI.motivation: 现有评估无法检测AI智能体在面对伪装成普通网页的虚假文档时，是否能保持可靠的证据标准。研究者希望揭示智能体在开放网络环境中容易被误导的脆弱性。
AI.method: 构建DRNOISE基准，包含100个任务，每个任务有唯一正确答案，由两条间接记录链支持；噪声条件下加入一份直接声称矛盾答案的合理文档。涵盖十类证据操作类型，评估多种AI智能体并分析失败模式。
AI.result: 单一误导文档导致准确率下降66-88个百分点。主要失败模式是验证惯性：智能体检索到真实记录但未完成证据链的验证与整合，优先采纳类似答案的文档。通用验证提示可缩小差距但无法完全消除。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的深度研究不仅需要检索和引用能力，更需要主动对直接声明与记录级证据进行协调验证。这对开放网络环境中的AI部署尤为重要。

title: Intermittent Control Is Not Diluted Control: A Switching Effect in Artificial Agency
summary:
Adaptive agents do not always regulate under the same timing conditions. Sometimes stabilization can begin before a disturbance has fully entered the internal state; at other times the agent can only recover after disruption has taken hold. A simple expectation is that an agent moving between these conditions should behave like a weighted average of the two fixed cases: the more time spent in reactive recovery, the greater the regulatory burden.
  This paper shows that expectation can fail. In a simulated adaptive agent with retained state history, at an operating point where sustained reactive control is more costly than sustained anticipatory control, intermittent access to anticipatory control reduces the mean regulatory burden below the value predicted by a fixed-mode mixture. The effect appears under both periodic and stochastic switching schedules: losing anticipatory access does not simply dilute its benefit, and restoring it intermittently can reorganize the later regulatory burden. High-statistics runs (N = 1000 matched replicates per schedule) resolve a negative nonlinear switching penalty across every tested schedule. The effect is small but consistent: about half a percent of the mean gain, with 63-68% of replicates falling below zero. Late-window diagnostics reveal no unresolved upward accumulation of regulatory burden.
  The result identifies a design-relevant timing principle. In history-dependent adaptive systems, the burden of remaining organized is not set only by how much time an agent spends in each mode; the order in which disturbance and recovery enter the state can change the subsequent burden. Intermittent anticipatory control may therefore act less like a partial failure of regulation than like a mechanism for reducing the long-term burden of recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在具有状态历史记忆的自适应智能体中，间歇性使用预期控制不仅不会稀释其益处，反而能比两种固定模式（预期控制与反应控制）的加权平均更显著地降低平均调节负担（约0.5%），这违背了线性混合的直觉预期。该效应在周期性和随机切换调度下均存在，表明干扰与恢复进入状态的时序而非时长占比才是关键。
AI.motivation: 挑战一个直观假设：自适应智能体在预期控制（干扰前稳定）和反应控制（干扰后恢复）之间切换时，其行为应等于两种固定模式下表现的加权平均。作者想验证这一线性直觉是否成立。
AI.method: 使用具有状态历史记忆的模拟自适应智能体，在周期性和随机切换调度下进行高统计量实验（N=1000匹配复制）。比较间歇性预期控制的实际调节负担与固定模式混合的预测值，计算非线性切换惩罚。
AI.result: 间歇性预期控制将平均调节负担降低到固定模式混合预测值以下（约0.5%），63-68%的复制结果为负值（即实际负担低于预测）。效应在两种调度下均一致，且晚期窗口诊断未发现未解决的累积负担。
AI.conclusion: 在历史依赖的自适应系统中，组织负担不仅取决于各模式的时长占比，更取决于干扰与恢复进入状态的时序。间歇性预期控制应被视为降低长期恢复负担的机制，而非部分调节失败。

title: Beyond Memory Leaderboards: Evaluating Scientific Memory as Budgeted Context Restoration
summary: Long-term memory is becoming a core component of LLM agents, but most memory benchmarks evaluate conversations or compact summaries, while research agents need to restore evidence from full scientific papers. We introduce two full-text scientific-memory benchmarks, Public AI Memory (PAIM; 81 papers, 66 questions) and Public Transformers (PTr; 252 papers, 98 questions). We evaluate eight memory/retrieval systems, including our own proposed Theoria, plus a no-retrieval baseline. Our results show that memory leaderboards are not interpretable without the full protocol: ingestion granularity, raw-text preservation, retrieval budget, retrieval modality, rubric audit, and judge choice all affect the outcome. For example, on PAIM Graphiti wins convincingly but uses 2.6M characters of retrieved context per query, and after controlling for retrieval budget the lead disappears. On PTr, for the systems where BM25 retrieval can be added cleanly, the sparse-dense hybrid is the single most significant intervention: hybrid variants of Simple RAG, Mem0, and Theoria tie for the lead within 0.03 points. Multi-judge and human side-by-side calibration show that LLM-as-a-judge rankings are consistent across frontier judges and agree with human evaluation, with an effective resolution of roughly one point on a ten-point scale. We argue that scientific memory should be evaluated as budgeted, modality-aware context restoration rather than as an unconstrained architecture leaderboard, and we release the datasets, harness, raw outputs, judgments, and scripts to reproduce our results and serve as tools for such evaluation. Our code is available at http://gitlab.com/quantellence/research/scientific-recall-bench , and the datasets are available at http://huggingface.co/datasets/quantellence/srb-data .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个面向科学论文全文的长程记忆基准（PAIM和PTr），评估了八种记忆/检索系统（含提出的Theoria），发现记忆排行榜在未控协议参数（如检索预算、粒度等）时不可解释，强调科学记忆评估应作为有预算、考虑模态的上下文还原任务，而非无约束架构排行榜。
AI.motivation: 现有长程记忆基准多聚焦对话或短摘要，但研究型智能体需要从完整科学论文中恢复证据，缺乏针对全文科学论文的记忆评估基准。
AI.method: 构建两个全文科学记忆基准（PAIM: 81篇论文66题；PTr: 252篇论文98题）；评估八种记忆/检索系统，包括提出的Theoria；通过控制检索预算、引入BM25混合检索、多裁判校准等实验，系统分析协议参数对排名的影响。
AI.result: Graphiti在PAIM上表现最佳但消耗260万字符上下文/查询；控制检索预算后领先消失。BM25稀疏-稠密混合是效果最强的干预手段。LLM裁判排名与人类评估一致，有效分辨率约1分（10分制）。
AI.conclusion: 科学记忆评估应作为有预算、模态感知的上下文还原任务，而非无约束架构排行榜；发布数据集、评估工具和完整复现代码。

title: WAR: Workload-Aware Rollouts for Synchronous Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Long-horizon rollout generation has become the dominant systems bottleneck in agentic reinforcement learning (RL). As agents interact with environments over many turns, trajectories rapidly grow to tens of thousands of tokens, making synchronous RL training increasingly constrained by rollout. We propose WAR, a workload-aware rollout system that substantially accelerates synchronous agentic RL by jointly optimizing decoding and scheduling. WAR is built on a key observation: the optimal rollout optimization strategy depends on runtime load: (1) Under low load, WAR enables model-free speculative decoding with SuffixDecoding, which reuses suffix patterns from previously completed trajectories as speculative drafts for future rollouts. Unlike model-based drafters, SuffixDecoding introduces no additional draft model and avoids GPU contention with rollout generation. (2) Under high load, where saturated batched decoding leaves limited room for speculative speedup, WAR shifts the optimization focus to cache-aware scheduling. A global scheduler places requests across rollout replicas based on cache locality, trajectory progress and server load, reducing redundant KV-cache recomputation and mitigating load imbalance. By combining decoding-level suffix reuse with system-level rollout scheduling, WAR delivers robust throughput improvements across workload regimes without changing the underlying RL algorithm. WAR improves long-context agentic rollout throughput by 1.4x under low load and up to 1.6x under high load. These results show that WAR removes a major rollout bottleneck in synchronous agentic RL and provides a practical path toward scalable long-context agent training.

AI.tldr: WAR提出了一种工作负载感知的rollout系统，通过联合优化解码和调度，在低负载下使用SuffixDecoding（模型无关的推测解码），高负载下使用缓存感知的全局调度，将同步智能体强化学习的长上下文rollout吞吐量提升1.4x-1.6x。
AI.motivation: 在智能体强化学习中，长程rollout生成成为系统瓶颈——智能体与环境多轮交互导致轨迹迅速增长到数万token，使得同步RL训练越来越受限于rollout效率。
AI.method: WAR包含两个核心策略：（1）低负载时采用SuffixDecoding，复用已完成轨迹的后缀模式作为推测解码的草稿，无需额外模型避免GPU争用；（2）高负载时采用缓存感知的全局调度器，基于缓存局部性、轨迹进度和服务负载进行请求分配，减少KV-cache重计算和负载不均。
AI.result: WAR在低负载下将长上下文智能体rollout吞吐量提升1.4倍，高负载下提升1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: WAR在不改变底层RL算法的情况下，通过解码级和系统级联合优化，有效消除了同步智能体RL中的rollout瓶颈，为可扩展的长上下文智能体训练提供了实用路径。

title: Empirical Grounding Improves the Realism of LLM Agents Simulating Human Behavior During Disruptions
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents offer a generative approach to simulating human behavior under conditions that may have few or no direct historical analogues, a common challenge in disaster and infrastructure-disruption planning. However, this generative capacity creates a validity problem: individually plausible agent reasoning may fail to reproduce empirical population behavior. We evaluate whether empirical grounding improves the statistical realism of LLM-agent simulations during disruptions. Specifically, we develop an empirically grounded LLM-agent framework that embeds demographic profiles from the American Community Survey, baseline routines from the American Time Use Survey, and urban spatial context into agent initialization, memory, decision prompts, and activity execution. An independent household survey conducted during the July 2024 Philadelphia heatwave is reserved as an external validation benchmark. Compared with an ungrounded LLM-agent baseline, the grounded model improved reconstruction of normal daily routines, increasing mean correlation with empirical activity profiles from 0.528 to 0.912 and reducing mean squared error from 0.066 to 0.008. Under heatwave conditions, the grounded model better reproduced survey-derived activity profiles, increasing mean correlation from 0.349 to 0.836 and reducing mean squared error from 0.098 to 0.012. The grounded model captured 46.4% of observed heatwave response amplitude, compared with 20.6% for the ungrounded baseline. These findings show that empirical grounding can make LLM agents more statistically credible simulators of population behavior while revealing remaining gaps in modeling human adaptation during disruptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于经验数据锚定的LLM智能体框架，将人口统计、日常活动模式和城市空间信息嵌入到智能体初始化中。通过在2024年费城热浪期间的验证，该框架在模拟日常活动和灾害响应行为方面显著优于未锚定的基线模型，相关性从0.528提升至0.912，均方误差从0.066降至0.008。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在模拟罕见灾害情景中的人类行为方面具有生成能力，但个体层面合理的推理可能无法复现真实的群体行为模式。现有研究缺乏对LLM生成结果进行经验校准的系统方法，导致模拟结果的统计真实性存疑。
AI.method: 构建经验锚定的LLM智能体框架：(1)嵌入美国社区调查的人口统计特征；(2)嵌入美国时间使用调查的基线日常活动模式；(3)嵌入城市空间上下文信息。在2024年费城热浪期间独立开展家庭调查作为外部验证基准，对比锚定模型与未锚定基线的表现。
AI.result: 锚定模型在日常活动模拟中将相关性从0.528提升至0.912，MSE从0.066降至0.008；在热浪条件下相关性从0.349提升至0.836，MSE从0.098降至0.012。锚定模型捕捉到46.4%的热浪响应幅度，基线仅20.6%。
AI.conclusion: 经验锚定能显著提升LLM智能体作为群体行为模拟器的统计可信度，但在模拟人类在灾害中的适应性行为方面仍存在不足，为未来改进提供了方向。

title: Principled Direction-Free Intrinsic Motivation through Model-Free Epistemic Free-Energy Estimators
comment: Accepted for a Spotlight Presentation at IWAI 2026
summary: Across environments with mixed sources of uncertainty, unsupervised reinforcement learning requires intrinsic motivation that does not precommit to a particular direction of surprise. Surprise minimization is scoped by design to ``unstable'' environments. Prediction-error curiosity rewards total expected surprise, including irreducible noise. Bandit or mixture switching between surprise-minimizing and surprise-maximizing rewards reintroduces non-stationarity by construction. We propose a single intrinsic reward, stationary within each window, derived from the novelty contribution of a preference-free Expected Free Energy objective, expressed in reward-maximization form. Our claim is that parameter information gain, the expected surprise of the next state minus its irreducible part, is the appropriate intrinsic signal in both high-entropy and low-entropy components of the state space. Maximizing it seeks exactly the surprise the model can explain away. In regions of unresolved dynamics, this epistemic term drives exploration. As dynamics become resolved, the epistemic term vanishes, while an aleatoric penalty favors lower-variance transitions, all without fitting an explicit next-state predictor. A pseudocount supplies epistemic value, a probe-based penalty captures aleatoric variance, and a short-horizon gate protects informative successors. A window-based freeze of all reward-defining objects yields a stationary Bellman operator, explicit bounds on learning targets, and a conditional uniform-concentration result for the nonparametric estimators under mixing, smoothness, bandwidth, and capacity assumptions. In active-inference terms, the agent is preference-free where novelty is retained, standard likelihood ambiguity vanishes under full observability, a nonstandard transition-entropy penalty is added, and surprise minimization emerges in resolved regions of the state space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于期望自由能新颖性贡献的单一内在奖励函数，通过参数信息增益（预期惊喜减去不可约噪声）作为无监督强化学习中的内在激励信号，能够在混合不确定性环境中自适应地在探索（高熵区域）和利用（低熵区域）之间切换，无需预先承诺特定的惊喜方向或切换策略。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督强化学习方法存在两个主要问题：1）惊喜最小化方法被局限在"不稳定"环境中；2）预测误差好奇心奖励包含了不可约噪声；3）惊喜最小化与最大化之间的切换策略人为引入了非平稳性。因此需要一种单一、平稳的内在奖励机制，能够自动适应不同不确定性来源的环境。
AI.method: 提出一种单一内在奖励函数，基于偏好自由的期望自由能目标，以奖励最大化形式表达。关键组件：参数信息增益（期望惊喜减去不可约部分）作为内在信号；伪计数提供认知价值；基于探针的惩罚捕获偶然方差；短视窗门保护信息性后继状态；窗口冻结机制确保贝尔曼算子平稳。
AI.result: 在理论层面证明了冻结窗口下的平稳贝尔曼算子、学习目标的有界性，以及在混合、平滑性、带宽和容量假设下非参数估计量的条件均匀集中结果。该方法在主动推理框架下：偏好自由（保留新颖性）、完全可观测下标准似然模糊性消失、增加非标准转移熵惩罚、在已解决状态空间中涌现惊喜最小化。
AI.conclusion: 参数信息增益是混合不确定性环境中恰当的内在激励信号——它精确地追求模型能够解释的惊喜部分。在未解决的动力学区域，认知项驱动探索；在已解决区域，认知项消失，偶然性惩罚偏好低方差转移，无需显式拟合下一状态预测器。

title: AEC-DS: Adaptive Erasure Coding with PDP-Triggered Reputation and QoS-Aware Migration for Decentralized Storage
summary: In decentralized storage systems, audit results are often not used directly to guide later redundancy and shard-placement decisions, which can lead to inefficient resource allocation and delayed recovery. We propose AEC-DS, a closed-loop adaptive erasure coding mechanism driven by Provable Data Possession (PDP) feedback. PDP audits continuously update node reputation, while a QoS-aware migration policy adjusts shard placement according to node reliability and data priority. The policy moves high-priority shards from unstable nodes to more reliable nodes in the cold tier and penalizes unstable nodes in subsequent placement decisions. Simulations with 800 nodes and 500 files show that AEC-DS maintains 100% data durability under the evaluated fault model with a redundancy factor of 1.25x. Compared with Static-EC, Dynamic-EC, and DRD-EC, AEC-DS reduces cumulative recovery operations by 66.8%-75.2%. Ablation results further show that class migration plays a major role in preventing data loss, improving the measured loss-prevention capability by 176.8%. These results indicate that PDP feedback can connect integrity auditing with redundancy and placement adaptation, providing a practical path toward self-healing decentralized storage while accounting for the additional cost of migration.

AI.tldr: 提出AEC-DS，一种利用PDP审计反馈闭环驱动自适应纠删码和分片放置的机制，在800节点500文件仿真中实现100%数据持久性（冗余1.25倍），相比基线减少66.8%-75.2%的恢复操作，类迁移提升防丢失能力176.8%。
AI.motivation: 去中心化存储系统中，审计结果未被直接用于指导冗余和分片放置决策，导致资源分配低效和恢复延迟。
AI.method: 利用PDP审计持续更新节点信誉度；设计QoS感知的迁移策略，根据节点可靠性和数据优先级调整分片放置，将高优先级分片从不稳定节点迁移到冷层可靠节点，并惩罚不稳定节点。
AI.result: 在800节点500文件仿真中，冗余1.25倍下实现100%数据持久性；相比Static-EC、Dynamic-EC、DRD-EC，累计恢复操作减少66.8%-75.2%；类迁移提升防丢失能力176.8%。
AI.conclusion: PDP反馈可连接完整性审计与冗余及放置自适应，为去中心化存储的自愈提供实用路径，同时需考虑额外迁移成本。

title: After the Euclidean Highway: Hyperbolic Expert AI as the Next Innovation
comment: 40 pages, 11 figures. Supplementary Information included as an ancillary file. Data and code: Zenodo, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21438499 (published, CC-BY-4.0)
summary: Expert domains are trees; the Euclidean transformer is not, diluting parent-child structure exponentially at depth. The hyperbolic turn left one question unasked: not how much of a network to curve, but where curvature may touch the gradient. Placement is a law, not a knob: the same geometry on a trainable adapter collapses training (seventeen training collapses, ~220 GPU-hours), yet at the loss layer alone it trains without one -- this is HySAT (Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training), hyperbolic losses at the loss layer only. Across six expert SLMs we constructed and deployed (Llama 3.1 and EXAONE 3.5; four adapter strategies; 18.0M-sample corpus; zero NaN over ~317K optimizer steps), a matched four-arm ablation isolates the preserved manifold invariant, and three propositions and a lemma prove why loss-only placement is stable where adapter-on-manifold is not. Four models are operationally deployed (one live, consumer-facing), two open-weight, with per-step traces and a seventeen-incident failure ledger on Zenodo (CC-BY-4.0).

AI.tldr: 本文提出HySAT，仅在损失层使用双曲几何，避免将整个适配器置于双曲流形上导致的训练崩溃。通过六个专家小语言模型的实验和理论证明，验证了损失层放置双曲损失的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将双曲几何应用于整个网络或适配器会导致训练不稳定（17次训练崩溃，~220 GPU小时），作者试图找到双曲几何的正确放置位置，证明"放置位置是规律而非旋钮"。
AI.method: HySAT仅在损失层应用双曲损失，而非将整个适配器置于双曲流形上。使用六种SLM（Llama 3.1和EXAONE 3.5）、四种适配器策略、1800万样本语料库，通过四臂消融实验隔离流形不变量，并给出三个命题和一个引理证明。
AI.result: 损失层放置双曲损失可稳定训练，而适配器整体置于流形上则导致训练崩溃。在约317K优化步中零NaN，四模型已部署（一个面向消费者），两个开源权重，附带逐步轨迹和17次失败记录。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何的放置位置是关键：仅损失层放置是稳定的，而适配器整体置于流形上则不稳定。这挑战了"网络曲率越大越好"的直觉，揭示了双曲几何在语言模型中的应用边界条件。

title: Panache: One-Pass Motif Discovery at Every Window Length
summary: Motif discovery, the search for recurring patterns within a time series, is a core primitive of exploratory data analysis. A pattern, however, is defined by its duration, which analysts rarely know in advance. To resolve this unknown duration, an interval of window lengths is defined, and the accepted method is to try every length in that interval. Existing pan matrix profile (PMP) methods compute one z-normalized matrix profile per length, so $L$ lengths cost $L$ quadratic self-joins over the same series. We introduce Panache, to our knowledge the first one-pass streaming algorithm for z-normalized PMP motif discovery. It replaces the repeated self-joins with a single scan whose runtime is near-linear in the series length. The key observation is that mean-centering a subsequence changes only its DC Fourier coefficient, so the non-DC spectrum of every z-normalized subsequence can be maintained online by sliding-DFT recurrences and running statistics. This spectral state is the key under which similar subsequences collide in an occupancy-controlled hash directory and, through Parseval's theorem, yields a lower bound that rejects most colliding pairs before any exact computation. Panache computes every data-dependent parameter itself, leaving only a resource budget to tune. At the default budget, it recovers all top-20 pan-motifs against exact fixed-exclusion ground truth on 17 UCR configurations, and is faster than every CPU and GPU baseline benchmarked in this paper. On Wafer at five million samples over 51 lengths, Panache completes one pass in 2.9 minutes and emits the exact motifs in 6.0 minutes, against 7.95 hours for the fastest exact CPU baseline and 38.3 minutes for SCAMP on an H100 GPU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Panache，一种用于z归一化时间序列pan矩阵轮廓（PMP）主题发现的一遍流式算法，利用滑动DFT递推和运行统计在线维护子序列的频谱状态，通过哈希碰撞和Parseval定理下界过滤，以近线性时间完成多长度主题发现，显著优于现有CPU和GPU基线方法。
AI.motivation: 时间序列主题发现中，模式持续时间（窗口长度）通常未知，现有方法需对每个候选长度执行二次自连接，计算成本随长度数量线性增长，缺乏高效的多长度联合发现方案。
AI.method: 关键观察：z归一化仅改变子序列的DC傅里叶系数，非DC频谱可通过滑动DFT递推和运行统计在线维护。利用频谱状态作为哈希键，使相似子序列在受控占用的哈希目录中碰撞，再通过Parseval定理导出下界，在精确计算前拒绝大多数碰撞对。仅需调节资源预算这一用户参数。
AI.result: 在默认预算下，Panache在17个UCR配置上恢复了所有top-20 pan-motifs（精确固定排除真值）。在Wafer数据集（5百万样本，51个长度）上，一次扫描耗时2.9分钟，精确主题发现耗时6.0分钟；对比最快的精确CPU基线需7.95小时，SCAMP在H100 GPU上需38.3分钟。
AI.conclusion: Panache是首个针对z归一化PMP主题发现的单遍流式算法，将多次二次自连接替换为一次近线性扫描，在速度和可扩展性上大幅超越现有方法，且能自动确定数据相关参数。

title: HyBDM: Multi-Scale Hybrid Experts for Time Series Forecasting with Bidirectional Dependency Modeling
summary: Time series forecasting (TSF) is vital to many applications, yet existing models often struggle to capture the heterogeneous long-range global patterns and short-range local variations in multivariate time series. While some approaches partially model these dependencies, they often do not jointly exploit temporal and feature-wise information. To address this challenge, we propose HyBDM, a multi-scale hybrid model that decomposes temporal dynamics into global patterns and local variations, which are modeled by two specialized experts. The Global Patterns Expert employs an enhanced BiConv-Mamba module that integrates bidirectional convolutions, an M-SSM layer, a forgetting mechanism, and a GDD-MLP module for cross-channel modeling. The Local Variations Expert uses a Local Window Transformer (LWT) to perform efficient locality-aware attention with reduced computational complexity. In addition, a Multi-Scale Patcher and a Long-Short Router enable multi-resolution representations and adaptive fusion of the two experts. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that HyBDM outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency, demonstrating its effectiveness in bridging global-local dependencies for multivariate TSF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyBDM，一种多尺度混合模型，通过全局模式专家（BiConv-Mamba模块）和局部变化专家（局部窗口Transformer）分别建模时间序列中的全局依赖和局部变化，并利用多尺度Patcher和长-短路由器实现自适应融合，在6个基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型难以同时捕捉多元时间序列中的异构长程全局模式和短程局部变化，且未能充分利用时间和特征维度的信息。
AI.method: HyBDM包含：(1) 全局模式专家：使用增强型BiConv-Mamba模块（双向卷积、M-SSM层、遗忘机制、GDD-MLP跨通道建模）；(2) 局部变化专家：使用局部窗口Transformer（LWT）实现高效局部注意力；(3) 多尺度Patcher实现多分辨率表示；(4) 长-短路由器实现两种专家的自适应融合。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集上，HyBDM在预测精度和计算效率方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HyBDM有效桥接了全局-局部依赖关系，证明了混合架构在多元时间序列预测中的优越性。

title: Is Progressive Disclosure All You Need for Long-Context Agents?
summary: Long-document question answering usually forces a choice between loading the whole document into the context window and bolting on a separate retriever. Agentic AI suggests a broader option, giving the agent the document path and letting it decide how and what to read. Agent Skills, a standard for packaging expertise into folders an agent loads on demand, supply a ready mechanism: progressive disclosure, which exposes only what a query needs, from a short description down to the specific passages. Practitioners rapidly adopted this pattern for book-length understanding tasks, but the evidence to support such choices has been anecdotal. We run the first controlled study of the pattern, comparing raw-document navigation and several designs of Agent Skills packs against a classical hybrid retriever across three agent harnesses and three model families on InfiniteBench. On a single book, the gain depends on the harness, running large when the agent navigates the raw document poorly but near zero when a strong agent harness already divides and retrieves on its own. When scaling up to tasks that span many books, raw-document navigation collapses while one-level progressive disclosure degrades more slowly and pulls ahead. A second, deeper routing level never helps and sometimes breaks accuracy outright, so one level is enough. Progressive disclosure buys context, not intelligence: it is redundant while a strong agent can locate the right passages itself, and decisive once the corpus grows too large to navigate by reading.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了长文档问答中的渐进式披露模式：让Agent根据需求逐步暴露文档信息（从简短描述到具体段落）。实验发现，在单本书场景下，效果取决于Agent能力；在多本书场景下，渐进式披露显著优于原始文档导航，但两级路由无益，一级足矣。该模式主要是节省上下文而非提升智能。
AI.motivation: 长文档问答面临两难：要么将整个文档加载到上下文窗口（成本高），要么外挂检索器（增加复杂度）。Agentic AI提供了第三种思路——让Agent自主决定如何阅读文档。Agent Skills作为一种封装专业知识的标准，提供了"渐进式披露"机制，但此前缺乏对照实验证据支持其有效性。
AI.method: 在InfiniteBench上进行了首次受控实验，比较了原始文档导航、多种Agent Skills包设计与经典混合检索器，跨三种Agent框架和三种模型家族。测试场景包括单本书和多本书理解任务。
AI.result: 1) 单本书场景下，增益取决于Agent框架：若Agent本身导航能力弱则收益大，若Agent已能自主分割和检索则增益趋近于零。2) 多本书场景下，原始文档导航性能崩溃，一级渐进式披露下降较慢并拉开差距。3) 二级更深路由从未带来收益，有时反而破坏准确性。4) 渐进式披露的本质是节省上下文空间而非提升智能。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式披露在Agent本身检索能力强时是冗余的，但当文档规模大到无法通过逐字阅读来导航时，它成为决定性因素。一级渐进式披露是最优选择，更深的层级不仅无益反而有害。

title: Pailitao-MMSearch: Building Native E-Commerce Multimodal Search Foundation
summary: The evolution of e-commerce has fundamentally transformed how users search for products, shifting from simple text-based keyword queries to complex multimodal interactions that seamlessly combine product images, natural language descriptions, and mixed-intent instructions. However, existing approaches face a critical dilemma: single-modal specialist models, deployed independently for text retrieval, visual search, and voice recognition, operate in isolation and cannot handle cross-modal queries, while general-purpose vision-language models lack the domain-specific knowledge necessary for fine-grained product understanding, user behavior modeling, and commercial intent reasoning. In this work, we present Pailitao-MMSearch, one native e-commerce multimodal search foundation model designed to bridge this gap. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1)HybSID (Hybrid Semantic ID);(2)a two-stage continual pre-training strategy; and (3)a hybrid reasoning post-training pipeline. Built upon Qwen and deployed on Taobao's Pailitao multimodal search platform, Pailitao-MMSearch achieves substantial improvements in online A/B testing, including up to +13.61\% in Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) and +8.21\% in transaction volume compared to traditional multi-modal search pipeline, demonstrating the effectiveness of our native e-commerce multimodal search large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pailitao-MMSearch，一个原生电商多模态搜索基础模型，通过混合语义ID、两阶段持续预训练和混合推理后训练三大创新，在淘宝平台上实现了GMV提升13.61%、交易量提升8.21%的显著效果。
AI.motivation: 现有电商搜索面临两难困境：单模态专家模型各自为政，无法处理跨模态查询；而通用视觉语言模型又缺乏电商领域的专业知识，难以理解细粒度商品、用户行为和商业意图。
AI.method: 提出了三大创新：(1)HybSID（混合语义ID）;(2)两阶段持续预训练策略;(3)混合推理后训练流程。模型基于Qwen构建，部署在淘宝拍立淘多模态搜索平台上。
AI.result: 在线A/B测试中，相比传统多模态搜索流程，GMV提升高达13.61%，交易量提升8.21%。
AI.conclusion: Pailitao-MMSearch证明了原生电商多模态搜索大语言模型的有效性，成功弥合了单模态专家模型与通用视觉语言模型之间的鸿沟。

title: Can AI Agents Really Complete RTL-to-GDS? Lessons from Benchmarking Tool-Interactive EDA Workflows
summary: LLM-driven agent systems have emerged as a promising paradigm for electronic design automation (EDA), demonstrating strong potential for automating complex design workflows. However, existing evaluations primarily examine individual language models on isolated EDA tasks, providing limited insight into how different agent systems perform across complete EDA flows. In this work, we present FluxBench, a systematic evaluation of AI agents on end-to-end EDA workflows under unified prompts, tool environments, and technology library settings. Our evaluation covers representative scenarios, including RTL generation with open-source toolchains and an RTL-to-GDS flow using closed-source commercial EDA tools for industrial applications. Through these workflows, we assess agents' capabilities in RTL code generation, iterative repair, tool-feedback utilization, logic synthesis, placement and routing (P&R), and Engineering Change Order (ECO) automation. To further characterize the efficiency of agent systems, we introduce Token ROI, a cost-efficiency metric that measures effective improvements in EDA artifacts relative to token usage and runtime cost. Experimental results show that, even when built on the same foundation model, different agent system architectures can exhibit performance gaps of up to 86.27%. Moreover, among systems with comparable task performance, Token ROI can differ by as much as $105.92\times$. In the RTL-to-GDS flow using PicoRV32 as a case study, FluxEDA achieves an end-to-end score of up to 97.94, outperforming Claude Code equipped with domain-specific EDA skills by up to $8.39\times$. These results indicate that domain-specific skills alone are insufficient to improve agent performance in large-scale EDA scenarios. Instead, both agent system design and foundation model capability play critical roles in enabling effective automated EDA workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FluxBench，对LLM驱动的智能体系统在端到端EDA工作流中的表现进行系统评估，发现即使基于相同基础模型，不同智能体架构性能差距可达86.27%，Token ROI差异可达105.92倍，表明领域特定技能不足以提升大规模EDA场景下的智能体性能，系统架构设计和基础模型能力同样关键。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅考察单个语言模型在孤立EDA任务上的表现，缺乏对不同智能体系统在完整EDA流程上的系统性评测。
AI.method: 构建FluxBench统一评测框架，在相同提示词、工具环境和技术库设置下，评估AI智能体在RTL生成、迭代修复、工具反馈利用、逻辑综合、布局布线及ECO自动化等端到端EDA工作流中的表现，并引入Token ROI成本效率指标。
AI.result: 相同基础模型下不同智能体架构性能差距达86.27%；Token ROI差异达105.92倍；FluxEDA在RTL-to-GDS流程中以PicoRV32为例取得97.94分，较Claude Code提升8.39倍。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定技能不足以提升大规模EDA场景下的智能体性能，智能体系统设计和基础模型能力共同决定了自动化EDA工作流的有效性。

title: TVGL-CFM:Generating and Forecasting Time-Varying Trajectories of Dynamic Networks with Conditional Flow Matching
summary: Many complex systems such as brain networks, financial markets, and gene-regulatory circuits are described not by a fixed graph but by one that changes over time. A standard way to summarise such structure at each instant is the sparse precision (inverse-covariance) matrix, and the time-varying graphical lasso (TVGL) turns a multivariate signal into a smooth chain of these matrices. We introduce TVGL-CFM, a single model that learns the distribution of such chains and can both generate new, realistic time-varying network trajectories for a given class and forecast how an observed trajectory will continue. Each precision matrix lives on a curved space of positive-definite matrices, but a log-Euclidean chart flattens an entire trajectory into an ordinary vector space, so a simple conditional flow-matching model can be trained and sampled there while every decoded matrix is guaranteed to be a valid precision matrix. For forecasting we start the flow not from noise but from a rough extrapolation of the recent history, so the model only has to learn a small correction. Across EEG motor-imagery, chaotic systems, and gene-expression data, TVGL-CFM generates trajectories that keep the class-discriminative structure of real data, and it forecasts future connectivity more accurately than raw-signal baselines. Generating the structured precision trajectory directly is therefore more faithful than generating raw signals and estimating connectivity afterwards.

AI.tldr: 提出TVGL-CFM模型，利用条件流匹配在log-Euclidean空间中学习时变精度矩阵的分布，能生成和预测网络轨迹，在EEG、混沌系统和基因表达数据上表现优于原始信号基线方法。
AI.motivation: 许多复杂系统的网络结构随时间动态变化，但现有方法要么只做单时刻的稀疏精度矩阵估计（如TVGL），要么缺乏生成和预测这类时变网络轨迹的能力。作者希望建立一个能够学习时变网络序列分布、既能生成新轨迹又能预测未来轨迹的统一模型。
AI.method: 将每个精度矩阵映射到log-Euclidean空间，使其变为普通向量空间中的点，从而整个轨迹变为向量序列；在此空间中训练条件流匹配（conditional flow-matching）模型；预测时，从粗略外推的初始值出发，让流模型只学习残差修正。
AI.result: 在EEG运动想象、混沌系统和基因表达数据上，TVGL-CFM生成的轨迹保留了真实数据的类别判别结构，预测未来连接性比从原始信号出发的基线方法更准确。
AI.conclusion: 直接生成结构化的精度矩阵轨迹比先生成原始信号再估计连接性更忠实有效，log-Euclidean变换加条件流匹配是学习时变网络分布的有效框架。

title: Mobius Learning: Cyclic Depth Folding in Transformers
summary: Transformer-based language models organize computation along an ordered depth axis, where shallow and deep blocks often develop distinct representational roles. We challenge the conventional view that these roles must remain tied to a block's position in the ordered sequence. We introduce Mobius Learning, a training architecture based on cyclic depth folding, in which different data streams follow cyclically shifted block orders. The same block group is therefore applied early in the block sequence for some data streams and late for others, so it is optimized in both shallow and deep roles, a phenomenon we call depth-role superposition. Surprisingly, in four-worker experiments with a modded GPT-2 small (124M) model trained on 2.5B FineWeb tokens using Muon, Mobius Learning achieves lower validation loss than a fixed-order looped Transformer at larger numbers of Transformer block-sequence passes. This counterintuitive result shows that a block group need not remain confined to one fixed shallow or deep role within the block sequence and opens a new design space based on cyclic depth folding. Crucially, this structure makes Mobius Learning particularly well suited to memory-constrained distributed training: raw training data remain local, while each worker stores one block group rather than the complete Transformer block stack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Mobius Learning，一种基于循环深度折叠的训练架构，允许同一模块组在不同数据流中承担浅层和深层角色（深度角色叠加），在 GPT-2 small 模型上以更少资源取得更低验证损失，特别适合内存受限的分布式训练。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观点中Transformer模块必须固定于有序序列中特定浅层或深层角色的假设，探索模块组能否在不同数据流中同时承担浅层和深层角色。
AI.method: 提出循环深度折叠（cyclic depth folding）训练架构 Mobius Learning，不同数据流采用循环移位（cyclically shifted）的模块顺序，使同一模块组在部分数据流中位于序列早期（浅层角色），在另一些数据流中位于序列后期（深层角色），实现深度角色叠加。
AI.result: 在四工作者实验中，使用 modded GPT-2 small（124M）模型在 2.5B FineWeb 令牌上以 Muon 优化器训练，Mobius Learning 在更多Transformer模块序列通数下取得了比固定顺序循环Transformer更低的验证损失。
AI.conclusion: 模块组无需固守固定的浅层或深层角色，循环深度折叠开辟了新的设计空间；该结构特别适合内存受限的分布式训练，原始训练数据保持本地化，每个工作者只需存储一个模块组而非完整Transformer模块堆栈。

title: The Curvature Shadow: An Apparent Failure of Maximum-Entropy Equilibrium Selection is a Removable Artifact
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Diagnostic companion to arXiv:2606.28308. Fully reproducible: a single self-contained notebook regenerates every number, table, and figure
summary: In two-player zero-sum games whose Nash equilibria form a convex set, regularized solvers such as Regularized Nash Dynamics (R-NaD) empirically select the maximum-entropy member: the information projection (I-projection) of a uniform reference onto the Nash set. On a panel of small games this match is exact, with one apparent exception: in Kuhn poker R-NaD lands at bluff coordinate 0.180 while the maximum-entropy member sits at 0.201, a coordinate gap of about 0.021, even though R-NaD attains 99.7 percent of the maximum entropy. We ask whether this gap is a genuine selection bias or an artifact, and answer it quantitatively. We show that for selection on a one-dimensional Nash manifold the coordinate gap factorizes as $\mathrm{gap} \approx \sqrt{2δ/κ}$, where $δ$ is the entropy shortfall of the solver and $κ$ is the curvature of the entropy landscape at its peak. Across five games this relation holds to within $2 \times 10^{-4}$ (under 1 percent relative error). The four matrix games have $δ\approx 0$ (R-NaD reaches the maximum-entropy member exactly) and therefore no gap regardless of curvature; only the sequential game (Kuhn) has $δ> 0$. A causal sweep of the magnet strength drives $δ\to 0$ and the gap toward zero along the predicted curve (fitted scaling exponent 0.50, $R^2 > 0.999999$, against the exact prediction of 1/2), until the dynamics destabilize at a stability floor: behavior consistent with a removable shortfall and inconsistent with a fixed bias. We quantify the curvature half of the law from measured curvatures and flag a moving-target pitfall in the natural Tsallis-entropy experiment. The Kuhn gap is thus the curvature shadow of a small, removable entropy shortfall on an unusually flat peak; the I-projection account is upheld up to a flatness-limited residual.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在二人零和博弈中，正则化求解器（R-NaD）选择的纳什均衡是否与最大熵成员（信息投影）一致。以Kuhn扑克为例，发现坐标差距（0.021）完全可由熵短缺失和熵景观曲率解释：gap ≈ √(2δ/κ)。实验验证该关系误差低于1%，且通过磁强度扫描证明该差距是可消除的而非固定偏差。
AI.motivation: 作者想要回答一个关键问题：在Kuhn扑克中，R-NaD与最大熵纳什均衡之间约0.021的坐标差距是真正的选择偏差，还是计算伪影？这关系到正则化求解器是否真正选择了最大熵成员这一理论主张。
AI.method: 作者推导出在一维纳什流形上坐标差距的因式分解公式 gap ≈ √(2δ/κ)，其中δ是熵短缺失，κ是熵景观在峰值处的曲率。通过在五个博弈中验证该关系，并在Kuhn扑克中进行磁强度因果扫描实验，观察δ→0时差距沿预测曲线（指数0.50）趋近于零。
AI.result: 该关系在五个博弈中误差低于2×10⁻⁴（相对误差<1%）。四个矩阵博弈中δ≈0，无差距；仅Kuhn扑克存在δ>0。磁强度扫描中，拟合标度指数为0.50，R²>0.999999，精确匹配理论预测1/2。差距最终受限于稳定性底限（stability floor）。
AI.conclusion: Kuhn扑克中的差距不是固定偏差，而是可消除的熵短缺失在异常平坦熵峰上的曲率投影（curvature shadow）。信息投影理论成立，仅受限于平坦度导致的残余误差。

title: MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables, 2 algorithms, under review at TMLR
summary: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance, but often at prohibitive training cost - a challenge that is especially acute for compact models ($\leq 4 \, \mathrm{B}$ parameters) trained under limited budgets. We introduce MADA-RL, a post-training framework that specializes compact models into generator and critic roles and trains them with a debate-aware learning signal, fine-tuning only a small subset of parameters via LoRA adapters. Our central contribution is a counterfactual critic advantage: a dynamic, role-conditioned baseline that redefines the critic's advantage as its reward minus the generator ensemble's per-instance accuracy. This explicitly optimizes critics to improve over generator consensus rather than to merely reproduce a correct answer, yielding more targeted credit assignment than static mean-reward normalization. At deployment, the specialized agents are composed in a lightweight multi-round protocol. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, MADA-RL raises the accuracy of the DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B model from $39.9 \, \%$ to $41.9 \, \%$ ($+2.0$ points, $p < 0.001$) using $16$ times fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned baselines, placing it on the accuracy-trainable-parameter Pareto front. It approaches, but does not surpass, the strongest baselines (DeepScaleR, STILL-3), which are trained on substantially larger datasets; we analyse this gap and the associated inference-time cost directly. A controlled study isolates the source of MADA-RL's gains: the counterfactual advantage produces the highest critic improvement rate of any model evaluated, indicating that trained critics learn to correct generator errors rather than to imitate them.

AI.tldr: MADA-RL 是一种针对紧凑型语言模型（≤4B参数）的后训练框架，通过生成器-批评家角色分工和反事实批评家优势机制，在仅微调少量参数（LoRA）的情况下，将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B在五个数学推理基准上的准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%（+2.0点），训练参数量比全微调基线少16倍。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型推理能力强但训练成本高，紧凑型模型在有限预算下性能受限。现有方法缺乏高效的参数效率与性能平衡策略，亟需一种轻量级后训练框架来提升紧凑模型推理能力。
AI.method: 提出MADA-RL框架：(1) 将紧凑模型特化为生成器和批评家两种角色；(2) 引入反事实批评家优势——将批评家的优势定义为自身奖励减去生成器集成的每实例准确率，而非静态均值归一化；(3) 仅通过LoRA适配器微调少量参数；(4) 部署时使用轻量级多轮协议组合特化智能体。
AI.result: 在五个数学推理基准上，MADA-RL将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B的准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%（+2.0点，p<0.001），训练参数量比全微调基线少16倍，处于准确率-训练参数帕累托前沿。但未超越使用更大数据集训练的DeepScaleR、STILL-3等最强基线。
AI.conclusion: MADA-RL以极低的参数开销有效提升了紧凑模型的推理性能。核心贡献——反事实批评家优势——使批评家学习纠正生成器错误而非模仿错误，实现了更精准的信用分配。未来方向包括分析精度-推理成本的权衡及进一步缩小与更强基线的差距。

title: Retain or Consolidate? Budget-Dependent Operator Selection for Language Agent Memory
summary: Language agents depend on memory across interactions. However, the limited context windows of large language models (LLMs) and their inference costs constrain how much memory can be used at once. Existing systems mainly follow two strategies: memory retention and memory consolidation. Retention keeps raw records and preserves exact details, but relevant evidence may not fit under a tight budget; consolidation compresses and combines records, improving coverage per token but risking the loss of query-critical details. Neither strategy is universally preferable. This raises two central questions: when should consolidation replace retention, and which operator -- Merge, Abstract, or Rewrite -- should be selected? We formalize this decision by decomposing each operator's utility into a coverage effect on evidence omitted by retention and a signed replacement effect on raw evidence that already fits. Their balance explains why the preferred action changes with relative budget pressure. We implement this mechanism with Offline Abstraction-Safety (OAS), a lightweight learner that estimates action utilities from pre-generation features with held-out harm calibration. The public LongMemEval and LoCoMo benchmarks show the same budget-dependent pattern. On LongMemEval, consolidation improves absolute accuracy by up to 48% under tight budgets, whereas retention is preferable under loose budgets; LoCoMo replicates this crossover at a smaller budget, consistent with its shorter evidence. On both datasets, cross-note abstraction and merging generally outperform local rewriting when compression is necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨语言代理的记忆管理策略，提出在有限上下文窗口下，记忆保留（Retention）与记忆整合（Consolidation）各有优劣，并形式化了何时应使用整合以及选择哪种操作符（Merge、Abstract、Rewrite）的决策机制。通过OAS轻量级学习器估计效用，实验表明在严格预算下整合可提升最高48%的准确率，而宽松预算下保留更优。
AI.motivation: 现有语言代理在记忆管理中，保留策略能保存精确细节但预算紧张时证据可能装不下；整合策略提升覆盖但可能丢失关键细节。两种策略并非普适最优，因此需要明确何时该用整合、以及该选哪种整合操作符。
AI.method: 将每种操作符的效用分解为覆盖效应（对保留遗漏证据的补充）和替代效应（对已保留原始证据的替换影响），二者平衡决定最优动作。实现机制为Offline Abstraction-Safety (OAS)，一种从预生成特征中估计动作效用并基于保留样本进行危害校准的轻量级学习器。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval上，整合在严格预算下绝对准确率提升高达48%，宽松预算下保留更优；LoCoMo在更小预算处出现相同模式。两个数据集上，当需要压缩时，跨笔记抽象（Merge/Abstract）普遍优于局部重写（Rewrite）。
AI.conclusion: 记忆管理策略应随预算压力动态调整：预算紧张时优先整合（尤其是抽象与合并），预算充裕时保留更可靠。OAS提供了一种有效的轻量级决策支持方法。

title: Enhancing Personalized Bladder Cancer Treatment Through Reinforcement Learning: A Recurrent Patient State Transition Decision Support Framework
summary: Bladder cancer treatment requires personalized and adaptive decision-making, particularly for recurrent disease, where treatment effectiveness changes across successive clinical episodes. Conventional clinical decision support systems typically rely on static treatment guidelines or single-step predictive models, limiting their ability to capture disease progression over time. This paper presents a recurrent patient state-transition simulation framework for bladder cancer treatment planning that integrates predictive state-transition modeling with a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and a Deep Q-Network (DQN) reinforcement learning environment. The predictive module estimates changes in tumor characteristics following treatment, while the reinforcement learning agent sequentially optimizes treatment decisions by interacting with simulated patient trajectories. This framework enables dynamic, patient-specific treatment planning by continuously adapting recommendations to evolving clinical states. It also generates interpretable treatment trajectories and detailed simulation logs to improve transparency and support clinical decision-making. The proposed framework was evaluated against existing reinforcement learning-based treatment planning approaches. It achieved a cumulative reward of 63,918.87, an average training loss per episode of 0.0056, and a policy improvement score of 6.62%, demonstrating effective sequential learning and robust treatment optimization in a simulated recurrent treatment environment. These findings highlight the potential of recurrent patient state-transition simulation with reinforcement learning as a flexible decision-support framework for personalized bladder cancer treatment planning and AI-assisted precision oncology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合预测性状态转移模型、马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）和深度Q网络（DQN）强化学习的递归患者状态转移模拟框架，用于膀胱癌治疗规划，实现了动态、个性化的治疗决策优化。
AI.motivation: 膀胱癌治疗需要个性化、自适应的决策，尤其是面对复发疾病时，治疗效果会随临床阶段变化。传统临床决策支持系统多依赖静态指南或单步预测模型，无法捕捉疾病随时间进展的动态变化。
AI.method: 框架包含三个核心组件：1）预测性状态转移模块，用于估计治疗后肿瘤特征变化；2）马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模治疗决策序列；3）深度Q网络（DQN）强化学习智能体，通过与模拟患者轨迹交互，序贯优化治疗决策。
AI.result: 在模拟复发治疗环境中，该框架累积奖励达到63,918.87，平均训练损失每集0.0056，策略改进得分6.62%，优于现有基于强化学习的治疗规划方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，递归患者状态转移模拟结合强化学习是一种灵活且有效的个性化膀胱癌治疗规划决策支持框架，在AI辅助精准肿瘤学中具有潜力。

title: L1 Augmented Attention as an Improved Vector Similarity Metric
summary: Scaled dot product attention conflates directional alignment and vector magnitude, limiting its effectiveness as a similarity metric in Transformer models. We introduce L1 augmented attention, a simple and computationally parallelizable modification that subtracts a learned, head specific L1 distance between queries and keys from the dot product score. This hybrid similarity captures complementary geometric information. Dot product rewards directional alignment, while L1 penalizes coordinate deviations. To reduce the cost of L1 computation, we project queries and keys into low dimensional subspaces whose parameters specialize to preserve informative L1 structure. Evaluated on WikiText 2 using a compact transformer, L1 augmented attention achieves up to a 14.5% reduction in perplexity over the original transformer baseline and outperforms an RBF L2 kernel. Analysis of norm variance and learned L1 weights reveals distinct geometric roles across layers and strong head level specialization. These results demonstrate that enriching attention with L1 geometry provides a principled and effective improvement to similarity computation in modern language models, with practical benefits for both accuracy and parallel efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出L1增强注意力机制，在点积注意力中融入L1距离作为相似度度量，通过低维投影降低计算成本，在WikiText 2数据集上实现高达14.5%的困惑度降低，并展现出清晰的层次与头部专业化模式。
AI.motivation: 标准缩放点积注意力将方向对齐与向量幅度混淆，限制了其作为相似度度量的有效性，作者希望通过引入互补的几何信息来改进注意力计算。
AI.method: 在点积分数中减去一个可学习的、头特定的L1距离；将查询和键投影到低维子空间以降低L1计算成本；该投影参数专门学习保留有信息量的L1结构。
AI.result: 在WikiText 2数据集上，紧凑型Transformer的困惑度降低高达14.5%，优于RBF L2核方法；分析显示不同层和注意力头具有清晰的几何角色区分和强头部级专业化。
AI.conclusion: 用L1几何丰富注意力机制为现代语言模型的相似度计算提供了原则性的有效改进，在准确性和并行效率方面均有实际效益。

title: Why Does Feedback-Augmented Self-Distillation Fail to Improve Retrieval-Interleaved Search Agents?
summary: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) offers a promising approach for training large language models without relying on a separate teacher model. However, its effectiveness on complex agentic tasks remains largely unexplored. In this work, we instantiate Feedback-Augmented Self-Distillation (FA-SD), a self-distillation algorithm for agentic search that leverages successful demonstrations as privileged information. We identify that models can rely on recurring reasoning-and-search output templates, producing trajectories that appear diverse but are largely agnostic to the input question, making the KL-based self-distillation signal uninformative. We term this phenomenon decoding collapse, a failure mode that can be missed by existing evaluation metrics. To understand its underlying cause, we show that although the self-teacher achieves stronger performance, learning remains inherently unstable due to inconsistent supervision signals. We further decompose this inconsistency into model inconsistency and prompt inconsistency, and show that the latter can significantly degrade the quality of the supervision signal, limiting the effectiveness of self-teacher learning. To mitigate this inconsistency, we introduce an exponential moving average (EMA) teacher to stabilize the self-teacher and provide more consistent supervision signals. Although the EMA teacher requires a warm-up phase during which performance may temporarily regress, it ultimately improves model performance by providing more stable supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FA-SD算法用于智能体搜索任务的自蒸馏，发现并分析了"解码崩溃"现象（模型生成看似多样实则与输入无关的轨迹），并引入EMA教师模型来稳定自蒸馏训练，最终提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 探索同策略自蒸馏（OPSD）在复杂智能体任务上的有效性，并解决自蒸馏过程中存在的监督信号不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出Feedback-Augmented Self-Distillation (FA-SD)算法，利用成功示范作为特权信息进行自蒸馏；引入指数移动平均（EMA）教师模型来稳定自教师模型，提供更一致的监督信号。
AI.result: 发现"解码崩溃"现象——模型依赖重复的推理与搜索模板，生成看似多样但与输入问题无关的轨迹；证明提示不一致性会显著降低监督信号质量，限制自教师学习效果；EMA教师虽需预热阶段，但最终通过提供更稳定的监督提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏在复杂智能体任务中面临监督不一致的挑战，EMA教师模型是缓解该问题的有效策略。

title: Investigation of Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) Diagnosis Using Machine Learning Approaches
comment: Published in 2023 5th International Conference on Sustainable Technologies for Industry 5.0 (STI), December 2023, Dhaka, Bangladesh
summary: Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS) is a widespread hormone problem for women of childbearing age. Women with PCOS may not ovulate; they might have high levels of androgens and have many small cysts on the ovaries. It can cause missed or irregular menstrual periods, excess hair growth, acne, infertility, and weight gain. Machine Learning (ML) can effectively diagnose this disease at an earlier stage as tons of medical data are available now. Traditional approaches to detect PCOS encompass a combination of clinical evaluation, medical history assessment, physical examination, and laboratory tests. These approaches aim to identify the characteristic symptoms and hormonal imbalances associated with PCOS. Physical examination requires good resources and costs time and money. In recent times, data-driven techniques have substantially advanced disease prediction within the medical field. We aim to utilize ML approaches, incorporating unique feature selection algorithms, to predict PCOS. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to PCOS diagnosis, combining Feature Engineering and ML. Several feature selection approaches have been considered to select sets of features for training the ML model, including CatBoost, Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost), Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LGBM), AdaBoost, Random Forest (RF). Results demonstrate that AdaBoost, with ten features selected by RF Feature Importance and Highest Correlation (HC), provides the highest test accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合特征工程与机器学习（特别是AdaBoost算法及RF特征重要性+最高相关性特征选择）来预测多囊卵巢综合征（PCOS），实验表明该方法在测试集上取得了最高准确率。
AI.motivation: PCOS是育龄女性常见激素疾病，传统诊断依赖临床评估和体检，耗时且成本高。因此，需要利用数据驱动和机器学习方法实现早期、高效、低成本的诊断。
AI.method: 采用多种特征选择算法（CatBoost、XGBoost、LGBM、AdaBoost、RF）筛选特征，结合特征工程与机器学习模型进行PCOS预测。
AI.result: AdaBoost结合RF特征重要性与最高相关性（HC）选择的10个特征，在测试集上取得了最高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的特征工程与机器学习方法能有效提升PCOS诊断的准确性，其中AdaBoost搭配RF特征重要性和HC特征选择是最优组合。

title: WorldCupArena: Fine-Grained Evaluation of Language Models and Deep-Research Agents on Football Forecasting
summary: Predicting a football match before kickoff requires more than knowing past results: a model must use changing information and make a clear prediction before the answer is available. We present WorldCupArena, a dynamic benchmark for language models and deep-research agents. The 2026 FIFA World Cup is its first evaluation, and the same process can be reused for future leagues and cups. Before each match, a model either receives a common evidence package or searches for information itself. It predicts the result and score, likely players and events, match statistics, and the outcome of the competition. After the match, these predictions are compared with the recorded result. We report result accuracy, exact-score accuracy, and a scoreline score that gives some credit when a predicted score is close but not exact, together with scores for the other prediction tasks. Across 104 matches and 13 systems, models with similar result accuracy differ more clearly on detailed predictions. Compared with betting-market and human-fan baselines, the best system shows only small gains in result and exact-score accuracy, but a clearer gain in Scoreline. New schedules can be added as they begin, allowing the benchmark to evaluate future models without using outcomes that are already known. Code, prompts, predictions, and evaluation scripts are open sourced at https://github.com/wzk1015/WorldCupArena.

AI.tldr: WorldCupArena是一个动态足球比赛预测基准，用于评估语言模型和深度研究代理在2026年世界杯及未来赛事中的预测能力。它通过赛前预测（比分、球员、统计等）与赛后实际结果的对比，结合多种评分指标，发现模型在详细预测上差异更大，最佳系统相比博彩市场和人类球迷基线仅有小幅提升。
AI.motivation: 现有模型评估缺乏动态、时序性的预测基准，尤其是足球比赛预测需要在比赛开始前利用实时变化信息做出明确预测，而非简单回顾历史数据。作者希望构建一个可重复使用的、避免数据泄露的基准，以评估模型在真实未来事件上的预测能力。
AI.method: 构建动态基准WorldCupArena，以2026年世界杯为首次评估。赛前给模型提供公共证据包或允许其自行搜索信息，模型需预测比赛结果、比分、可能球员和事件、比赛统计以及赛事最终结果。赛后与实际结果对比，采用结果准确率、精确比分准确率和比分评分（对接近但不精确的比分给部分分数）等指标评估。
AI.result: 在104场比赛和13个系统上测试，发现结果准确率相似的模型在详细预测上差异更大。最优系统相比博彩市场和人类球迷基线，在结果和精确比分准确率上仅有小幅提升，但在比分评分指标上有更明显的提升。
AI.conclusion: WorldCupArena可作为评估未来模型的动态基准，新的赛程可在开始时添加，避免使用已知结果。代码、提示、预测和评估脚本均已开源。

title: Reinforcement Learning: From Algorithms To Foundation Models
summary:
Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework for sequential decision making under explicit objectives. In its classical form, RL studies how an agent should act to maximise long-term reward in a dynamic environment. In richer settings, the problem extends beyond a single agent and fixed environment: intelligent behavior may require strategic interaction, adaptation to uncertainty, and reasoning over high-dimensional worlds. This thesis studies RL from two perspectives: algorithms in games and RL in the era of foundation models.
  The first part focuses on multi-agent RL in games. It examines how incentives, policies, and equilibrium concepts interact in competitive and general-sum environments, spanning two-player zero-sum games, large-scale video games, and multi-player settings with general structure. These works investigate learning in multi-agent systems and the behavior of RL methods in interactive environments. The second part studies RL with generative and foundation models, motivated by the idea that prior knowledge can enrich sequential decision making. Pretrained generative models and learned world models serve as representation tools and structured priors for planning, control, and policy optimization. The thesis develops diffusion-based world models, investigates RL for efficient video generation, explores generative models as policy classes, and studies interactive video world models in which actions shape future observations. It also addresses long-horizon modeling through architectures with memory. Together, these contributions present a unified view of RL as objective-driven adaptation in complex sequential domains. From strategic games to generative world models, the thesis highlights how RL connects decision making, environment modeling, and emerging foundation-model capabilities, offering a broader perspective on the principles underlying intelligent behavior.

AI.tldr: 本论文从两个视角研究强化学习：一是多智能体博弈中的算法，涉及零和博弈、大规模视频游戏及一般和博弈；二是基础模型时代的强化学习，利用扩散模型、世界模型等进行决策、规划与控制。论文展示了强化学习作为目标驱动适应在复杂序列决策中的统一视角。
AI.motivation: 经典强化学习局限于单智能体与固定环境，难以应对策略交互、不确定性适应和高维世界推理等更丰富的场景。本文旨在拓展强化学习的边界，从博弈论和基础模型两个角度探索智能行为的原则。
AI.method: 第一部分采用多智能体强化学习方法，研究纳什均衡等博弈概念下的策略学习；第二部分结合生成模型（扩散模型）和世界模型，将其作为表示工具与结构化先验，用于规划、控制和策略优化，并探索长程记忆架构。
AI.result: 在博弈方面，阐明了激励、策略与均衡在多智能体系统中的交互；在基础模型方面，开发了基于扩散的世界模型、高效视频生成的RL方法、生成式策略类以及交互式视频世界模型，并在长程建模中引入记忆架构。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习提供了一个统一框架，将决策制定、环境建模与基础模型能力联系起来，从策略博弈到生成世界模型，揭示了目标驱动适应在复杂序列领域中的核心作用。

title: CADENCE: Closing the Reasoning Gap via Coverage-Adaptive On-Policy Distillation
summary:
On-policy knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from large teachers to compact students, but existing approaches suffer three compounding failure modes: (i) cold-start collapse, where a fresh student assigns near-zero mass to teacher-preferred tokens; (ii) state-agnostic divergence scheduling, where time-only forward/reverse-KL interpolation ignores the student's coverage state; and (iii) binary reward sparsity, where pass/fail signals discard information from partially correct traces.
  We present CADENCE, a unified framework with a targeted fix for each. Its DRIFT mechanism schedules a per-token convex mixture of forward-KL and reverse-KL surrogate objectives on student-sampled trajectories (per-token surrogates, not sequence-level KL gradient estimators). Six components extend it: (A) COVA, a coverage-adaptive $β$ schedule accelerating the forward-to-reverse transition; (B) FTB, a forking-token boost concentrating gradient at high-entropy positions via a globally-normalized entropy reference; (C) CCD, a dense reward adding numerical-proximity partial credit for incorrect-but-close traces; (D) LAP, brevity-preferential correct-rollout reinforcement; (E) EMR, an entropy-matching calibration regularizer; (F) BSD, a bootstrapped self-distillation phase.
  On GSM8K and MATH-500 (corrected 512-token protocol, 5 seeds, reported std), CADENCE distills a 0.5B student from a 1.5B teacher to 69.8 $\pm$ 0.5% GSM8K pass@1 (from 48.7% pretrained; 63.2% of the teacher gap closed) and to 72.1 $\pm$ 0.4% with a 3B teacher (76.2% closed), beating the strongest matched-compute label-using baseline (DRIFT+binary reward) by +4.4 $\pm$ 0.7 points. All experiments run on a single Apple Mac Studio (M-series, 64GB unified memory), showing principled distillation reaches strong reasoning quality without datacenter-scale hardware.

AI.tldr: CADENCE提出了一套针对on-policy知识蒸馏中冷启动崩溃、状态无关散度调度和二元奖励稀疏三大问题的统一框架，通过DRIFT机制（逐token前向/反向KL凸混合）及其六个扩展组件，在GSM8K和MATH-500上显著提升小模型推理能力，且仅在单台Mac Studio上即可完成训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的on-policy知识蒸馏方法存在三个相互加剧的失败模式：(i) 冷启动崩溃——新初始化的学生模型对教师偏好的token赋予近乎零的概率；(ii) 状态无关的散度调度——仅基于时间而非学生覆盖状态来插值前向/反向KL；(iii) 二元奖励稀疏——通过/失败信号丢弃了部分正确轨迹中的有用信息。作者旨在设计统一框架系统解决这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出CADENCE框架，核心是DRIFT机制：在学生采样轨迹上逐token进行前向KL和反向KL的凸混合（而非序列级的KL梯度估计）。六个扩展组件：(A) COVA——覆盖自适应β调度，加速前向到反向的过渡；(B) FTB——分叉token增强，通过全局归一化熵参考集中梯度于高熵位置；(C) CCD——稠密奖励，为不正确但接近的轨迹提供数值邻近部分信用；(D) LAP——简洁偏好正确轨迹强化；(E) EMR——熵匹配校准正则化；(F) BSD——自举自蒸馏阶段。
AI.result: 在GSM8K和MATH-500上（校正后的512 token协议，5种子，报告标准差），CADENCE将0.5B学生从1.5B教师蒸馏到69.8±0.5% GSM8K pass@1（基线48.7%，填补了教师差距的63.2%），从3B教师蒸馏到72.1±0.4%（填补76.2%），超越最强的匹配计算标签基线（DRIFT+二元奖励）+4.4±0.7个点。所有实验仅在单台Apple Mac Studio（M系列，64GB统一内存）上运行。
AI.conclusion: 通过有原则的蒸馏设计，即使没有数据中心级硬件，也能在小模型上达到强推理质量。CADENCE系统性地解决了on-policy蒸馏的三大失败模式，其各组件协同工作比单独使用任一组件效果更好。

title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出体验式学习（EL）方法，将LLM作为评判者的反馈模型重新用作教练，把对策略生成响应的评估提炼为可迁移的体验知识，通过上下文提炼内化到策略中。相比传统基于标量奖励的强化学习，EL提供了更高带宽的反馈通道，在开放任务上表现更优，泛化能力更强，且能缓解奖励破解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RL在开放任务中将基于评估模型的评价压缩为标量奖励，丢失了丰富的文本反馈信息，也无法区分不同质量等级的响应。目标是利用更高密度的反馈信号来提升后训练效果。
AI.method: 将LLM-as-a-Judge的反馈模型重新用作LLM-as-a-Coach，教练将每个策略生成的响应的评估提炼成可迁移的体验知识，这些知识用于条件化教师模型，并通过上下文提炼（on-policy context distillation）让策略内化这些知识。
AI.result: 在两种策略家族上，无论使用策略自身反馈还是专有模型反馈，EL在保留的和未见过的开放任务上都一致优于基于标量奖励的RL。EL在训练分布外泛化更好，并能缓解奖励破解问题。
AI.conclusion: 体验知识是一种比标量奖励更丰富、泛化性更强的学习信号，适合非可验证任务的后面训练。

title: ZifaMem: Structured Memory for Persona, Preference, and Emotional Continuity in AI Companions
summary: AI companions are judged not only by single-turn fluency but by whether they sustain emotional continuity: remembering who the companion is, what the user prefers, and how the relationship has felt. We present ZifaMem, a structured memory system that organizes dialogue into session summaries, episodic memories, and a consolidated user model. Against a deployment-honest comparator that supplies the full raw dialogue history, and under a fixed LLM-as-a-judge protocol with route audits, structured memory raises pooled four-backbone emotional-intelligence scores by 11.4% (95% CI 6.3% to 17.1%), and persona grounding improves on all four backbones (Claude +42% relative). Multi-turn affect context wins a +39% net preference over a single-turn snapshot (exploratory), whereas an additional emotion state machine yields no measurable gain on any of five endpoints. Under an identical preregistered protocol, three memory systems (ZifaMem, Mem0, and filtered verbatim retrieval) each improve significantly over raw-history deployment, and ZifaMem and Mem0 are statistically equivalent within +/-5 points on the preregistered primary preference endpoint. The ZifaMem SDK, CLI, and portable Agent Skills are open-sourced at https://github.com/zifacorp/zifamem.

AI.tldr: ZifaMem是一个结构化记忆系统，通过会话摘要、情景记忆和用户模型来提升AI伴侣的情感连续性，相比原始对话历史，在情感智能评分上提升11.4%，且开源发布。
AI.motivation: AI伴侣的评估不应仅看单轮流畅度，更需关注情感连续性——包括记住用户身份、偏好和关系感受。现有方法（如原始对话历史）在情感记忆方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ZifaMem结构化记忆系统，将对话组织为会话摘要、情景记忆和整合用户模型。采用固定LLM-as-a-judge协议与路由审计，在四个骨干模型上进行评估，并与Mem0和过滤逐字检索等方法对比。
AI.result: 结构化记忆使四骨干情感智能分数提升11.4%（95% CI 6.3%-17.1%）；人格基础在所有四个骨干上均有改善（Claude相对提升42%）；多轮情感上下文相比单轮快照获得+39%净偏好；额外情感状态机无显著增益；ZifaMem与Mem0在主要偏好指标上统计等效（±5分内）。
AI.conclusion: ZifaMem结构化记忆系统能有效提升AI伴侣的情感连续性，与现有方法（Mem0）性能相当，且情感状态机等附加模块未带来显著收益，验证了结构化记忆对情感AI的重要性。

title: SurvCF(t): Counterfactual Explanations for Survival Analysis in Predictive Maintenance Multivariate Time Series Data
summary: Predictive maintenance relies on accurate Remaining Useful Life estimation, often formulated using survival analysis over multivariate time-series data. While modern deep survival models achieve strong predictive performance, their black-box nature limits their use in safety-critical settings where actionable insight is required. In this work, we introduce \textit{SurvCF(t)}, the first framework for generating counterfactual explanations for survival models operating on time-series data. \textit{SurvCF(t)} identifies minimal, plausible, and temporally consistent changes to an asset's operational history that increase its predicted life time, framing explanation as a constrained optimization problem combining validity, proximity, sparsity, and plausibility. We evaluate the method on multiple benchmarks, including C-MAPSS, N-CMAPSS, and a real-world case study of the Scania Component\_X dataset, demonstrating its ability to produce actionable and interpretable interventions. Our results show that \textit{SurvCF(t)} bridges the gap between survival prediction and prescriptive maintenance, enabling explainable and decision-oriented AI for maintenance strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SurvCF(t)，首个为基于时间序列数据的生存模型生成反事实解释的框架，通过最小化、合理且时序一致的资产操作历史变化来延长预测寿命，弥合了生存预测与说明性维护之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现代深度生存模型在剩余有用寿命预测上表现优异，但其黑箱特性限制了在安全关键场景中的应用，需要可解释、可操作的洞察来支持维护决策。
AI.method: 将反事实解释建模为约束优化问题，同时考虑有效性（改变预测结果）、邻近性（最小变化）、稀疏性（少量修改）和合理性（符合实际），生成对资产操作历史的时序一致修改。
AI.result: 在C-MAPSS、N-CMAPSS及真实Scania Component_X数据集上验证，表明该方法能生成可操作、可解释的干预方案。
AI.conclusion: SurvCF(t)有效连接了生存预测与说明性维护，为维护策略提供了可解释且面向决策的AI支持。

title: Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints
summary: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules. While diffusion models have dominated as a leading paradigm for high-quality 3D molecule generation, LLM-based methods are rapidly emerging in molecular design and have shown competitive performance in pocket-conditioned molecular generation. However, their ability to reason about physics and 3D spatial environments is largely underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze whether current general-purpose LLMs are capable of navigating complex 3D constraints compared to established baselines such as specialized diffusion models. We consider 3D ligand generation conditioned on protein pockets together with ligand- and interaction-derived spatial constraints, including anchor fragments, pharmacophore points, and mandatory pocket-ligand interactions. To enable this evaluation, we introduce 3D-Fit - a token-efficient benchmarking strategy for assessing LLM performance on multi-conditioned spatial molecule generation. Our findings reveal a clear pattern in LLM spatial capabilities: while they still lag behind state-of-the-art approaches, they are promising and can handle multiple spatial constraints simultaneously, enabling scaling to heterogeneous setups.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了通用大语言模型（LLM）在基于结构的药物设计（SBDD）中处理复杂3D空间约束的能力，并与扩散模型等基线方法对比。作者提出了3D-Fit基准测试策略，发现LLM虽仍落后于最先进方法，但能同时处理多种空间约束，具有可扩展的潜力。
AI.motivation: 基于结构的药物设计中，扩散模型在3D分子生成方面表现优异，而LLM方法虽在分子设计中崭露头角，但其对物理和3D空间环境的推理能力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出3D-Fit基准测试策略，系统评估LLM在多种空间约束（锚定片段、药效团点、强制口袋-配体相互作用）下的3D配体生成能力，并与扩散模型等基线进行对比。
AI.result: LLM在3D空间推理方面仍落后于最先进的扩散模型，但展现出同时处理多种空间约束的潜力，具备在异质场景下扩展的能力。
AI.conclusion: LLM在SBDD中具备处理多条件空间约束的潜力，尽管当前性能不及扩散模型，但为进一步发展提供了方向。

title: A Dual-Hypothesis Reasoning Framework for LLM Guardrails
summary: We propose ARBITER, a novel LLM guardrail framework that introduces two key ideas: (i) dual-hypothesis reasoning, a reasoning method for LLM guardrails that explicitly considers both safe and unsafe interpretations of a prompt before making a safety decision, and (ii) multi-component supervised fine-tuning (MC-SFT), a structured training loss for reasoning-based guardrails that decomposes LLM outputs into logical components and weights them according to their importance. Existing reasoning-based guardrails often rely on expensive procedures, such as generating reasoning traces using larger or closed-source teacher models and applying full-parameter fine-tuning.
